authors_text: Haeyong Kang,Chang D. Yoo,Yongcheon Na
title: Maximum margin learning of t-SPNs for cell classification with filtered input
title_zh: 使用过滤输入进行细胞分类的 t-SPN 最大边际学习
abstract: An algorithm based on a deep probabilistic architecture referred to as a tree-structured sum-product network (t-SPN) is considered for cell classification. The t-SPN is constructed such that the unnormalized probability is represented as conditional probabilities of a subset of most similar cell classes. The constructed t-SPN architecture is learned by maximizing the margin, which is the difference in the conditional probability between the true and the most competitive false label. To enhance the generalization ability of the architecture, L2-regularization (REG) is considered along with the maximum margin (MM) criterion in the learning process. To highlight cell features, this paper investigates the effectiveness of two generic high-pass filters: ideal high-pass filtering and the Laplacian of Gaussian (LOG) filtering. On both HEp-2 and Feulgen benchmark datasets, the t-SPN architecture learned based on the max-margin criterion with regularization produced the highest accuracy rate compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms that include convolutional neural network (CNN) based algorithms. The ideal high-pass filter was more effective on the HEp-2 dataset, which is based on immunofluorescence staining, while the LOG was more effective on the Feulgen dataset, which is based on Feulgen staining.
summary: An algorithm based on a deep probabilistic architecture referred to as a tree-structured sum-product network (t-SPN) is considered for cell classification. The t-SPN is constructed such that the unnormalized probability is represented as conditional probabilities of a subset of most similar cell classes. The constructed t-SPN architecture is learned by maximizing the margin, which is the difference in the conditional probability between the true and the most competitive false label. To enhance the generalization ability of the architecture, L2-regularization (REG) is considered along with the maximum margin (MM) criterion in the learning process. To highlight cell features, this paper investigates the effectiveness of two generic high-pass filters: ideal high-pass filtering and the Laplacian of Gaussian (LOG) filtering. On both HEp-2 and Feulgen benchmark datasets, the t-SPN architecture learned based on the max-margin criterion with regularization produced the highest accuracy rate compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms that include convolutional neural network (CNN) based algorithms. The ideal high-pass filter was more effective on the HEp-2 dataset, which is based on immunofluorescence staining, while the LOG was more effective on the Feulgen dataset, which is based on Feulgen staining.
abstract_zh: 基于被称为树结构和积网络（t-SPN）的深度概率架构的算法被考虑用于细胞分类。 t-SPN 的构造使得非归一化概率表示为最相似细胞类别子集的条件概率。构建的 t-SPN 架构是通过最大化余量来学习的，余量是真实标签和最具竞争力的错误标签之间的条件概率之差。为了增强架构的泛化能力，在学习过程中考虑了 L2 正则化（REG）和最大裕度（MM）标准。为了突出细胞特征，本文研究了两种通用高通滤波器的有效性：理想高通滤波和高斯拉普拉斯 (LOG) 滤波。在 HEp-2 和 Feulgen 基准数据集上，与包括基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的算法在内的其他最先进算法相比，基于最大裕度标准和正则化学习的 t-SPN 架构产生了最高的准确率。理想的高通滤波器对基于免疫荧光染色的 HEp-2 数据集更有效，而 LOG 对基于 Feulgen 染色的 Feulgen 数据集更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树结构求和-乘积网络（t-SPN）的细胞分类算法，结合最大间隔学习和高通滤波预处理以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统细胞分类方法在复杂数据集上存在准确率不足的问题，需通过改进概率模型结构和特征提取方法提升性能。
AI.method: 构建条件概率表示的t-SPN网络，采用最大间隔优化目标并引入L2正则化；使用理想高通滤波和高斯拉普拉斯滤波增强细胞特征。
AI.result: 在HEp-2和Feulgen数据集上，该方法分别优于CNN等现有算法，其中理想高通滤波在HEp-2数据集表现更优，LOG滤波在Feulgen数据集效果更好。
AI.conclusion: 基于最大间隔正则化t-SPN的细胞分类框架有效，结合不同高通滤波策略可适应不同染色数据集的特征需求。

authors_text: Bipul Neupane,Jagannath Aryal,Abbas Rajabifard
title: Dual skip connections in U-Net, ResUnet and U-Net3+ for remote extraction of buildings
title_zh: U-Net、ResUnet 和 U-Net3+ 中的双跳跃连接，用于远程提取建筑物
comment: This work has been submitted to Springer for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to Springer for possible publication
abstract: Urban buildings are extracted from high-resolution Earth observation (EO) images using semantic segmentation networks like U-Net and its successors. Each re-iteration aims to improve performance by employing a denser skip connection mechanism that harnesses multi-scale features for accurate object mapping. However, denser connections increase network parameters and do not necessarily contribute to precise segmentation. In this paper, we develop three dual skip connection mechanisms for three networks (U-Net, ResUnet, and U-Net3+) to selectively deepen the essential feature maps for improved performance. The three mechanisms are evaluated on feature maps of different scales, producing nine new network configurations. They are evaluated against their original vanilla configurations on four building footprint datasets of different spatial resolutions, including a multi-resolution (0.3+0.6+1.2m) dataset that we develop for complex urban environments. The evaluation revealed that densifying the large- and small-scale features in U-Net and U-Net3+ produce up to 0.905 F1, more than TransUnet (0.903) and Swin-Unet (0.882) in our new dataset with up to 19x fewer parameters. The results conclude that selectively densifying feature maps and skip connections enhances network performance without a substantial increase in parameters. The findings and the new dataset will contribute to the computer vision domain and urban planning decision processes.
summary: Urban buildings are extracted from high-resolution Earth observation (EO) images using semantic segmentation networks like U-Net and its successors. The evaluation revealed that densifying the large- and small-scale features in U-Net and U-Net3+ produce up to 0.905 F1, more than TransUnet (0.903) and Swin-Unet (0.882) in our new dataset with up to 19x fewer parameters. The results conclude that selectively densifying feature maps and skip connections enhances network performance without a substantial increase in parameters. The findings and the new dataset will contribute to the computer vision domain and urban planning decision processes.
abstract_zh: 使用 U-Net 及其后继者等语义分割网络从高分辨率地球观测 (EO) 图像中提取城市建筑物。每次迭代的目的是通过采用更密集的跳跃连接机制来提高性能，该机制利用多尺度特征来实现精确的对象映射。然而，更密集的连接会增加网络参数，并且不一定有助于精确分割。在本文中，我们为三个网络（U-Net、ResUnet 和 U-Net3+）开发了三种双跳跃连接机制，以有选择地加深基本特征图以提高性能。这三种机制在不同尺度的特征图上进行评估，产生九种新的网络配置。它们在四个不同空间分辨率的建筑足迹数据集上根据原始配置进行评估，包括我们为复杂城市环境开发的多分辨率（0.3+0.6+1.2m）数据集。评估显示，对 U-Net 和 U-Net3+ 中的大型和小规模特征进行致密化可产生高达 0.905 F1，超过我们新数据集中的 TransUnet (0.903) 和 Swin-Unet (0.882)，参数最多减少 19 倍。结果得出结论，选择性地致密特征图和跳过连接可以增强网络性能，而无需大幅增加参数。这些发现和新数据集将有助于计算机视觉领域和城市规划决策过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种双跳跃连接机制改进U-Net等网络，用于高分辨率遥感图像中的建筑物提取任务。
AI.motivation: 现有密集跳跃连接虽提升分割性能但增加参数量，且未必显著提升精度，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 开发三种双跳跃连接机制应用于U-Net、ResUnet和U-Net3+，生成九种新网络配置，并在四组不同分辨率数据集上评估。
AI.result: 在自建多分辨率数据集上，U-Net和U-Net3+的改进模型达到0.905 F1分数，优于TransUnet和Swin-Unet，且参数减少19倍。
AI.conclusion: 选择性加深关键特征图与跳跃连接可有效提升性能，无需显著增加参数，成果可助力计算机视觉与城市规划领域。

search_text: Dual skip connections in U-Net, ResUnet and U-Net3+ for remote extraction of buildings U-Net、ResUnet 和 U-Net3+ 中的双跳跃连接，用于远程提取建筑物 Urban buildings are extracted from high-resolution Earth observation (EO) images using semantic segmentation networks like U-Net and its successors. Each re-iteration aims to improve performance by employing a denser skip connection mechanism that harnesses multi-scale features for accurate object mapping. However, denser connections increase network parameters and do not necessarily contribute to precise segmentation. In this paper, we develop three dual skip connection mechanisms for three networks (U-Net, ResUnet, and U-Net3+) to selectively deepen the essential feature maps for improved performance. The three mechanisms are evaluated on feature maps of different scales, producing nine new network configurations. They are evaluated against their original vanilla configurations on four building footprint datasets of different spatial resolutions, including a multi-resolution (0.3+0.6+1.2m) dataset that we develop for complex urban environments. The evaluation revealed that densifying the large- and small-scale features in U-Net and U-Net3+ produce up to 0.905 F1, more than TransUnet (0.903) and Swin-Unet (0.882) in our new dataset with up to 19x fewer parameters. The results conclude that selectively densifying feature maps and skip connections enhances network performance without a substantial increase in parameters. The findings and the new dataset will contribute to the computer vision domain and urban planning decision processes. 使用 U-Net 及其后继者等语义分割网络从高分辨率地球观测 (EO) 图像中提取城市建筑物。每次迭代的目的是通过采用更密集的跳跃连接机制来提高性能，该机制利用多尺度特征来实现精确的对象映射。然而，更密集的连接会增加网络参数，并且不一定有助于精确分割。在本文中，我们为三个网络（U-Net、ResUnet 和 U-Net3+）开发了三种双跳跃连接机制，以有选择地加深基本特征图以提高性能。这三种机制在不同尺度的特征图上进行评估，产生九种新的网络配置。它们在四个不同空间分辨率的建筑足迹数据集上根据原始配置进行评估，包括我们为复杂城市环境开发的多分辨率（0.3+0.6+1.2m）数据集。评估显示，对 U-Net 和 U-Net3+ 中的大型和小规模特征进行致密化可产生高达 0.905 F1，超过我们新数据集中的 TransUnet (0.903) 和 Swin-Unet (0.882)，参数最多减少 19 倍。结果得出结论，选择性地致密特征图和跳过连接可以增强网络性能，而无需大幅增加参数。这些发现和新数据集将有助于计算机视觉领域和城市规划决策过程。 本文提出三种双跳跃连接机制改进U-Net等网络，用于高分辨率遥感图像中的建筑物提取任务。 Bipul Neupane,Jagannath Aryal,Abbas Rajabifard cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Hasin Rehana,Muhammad Ibrahim,Md. Haider Ali
title: Plant Disease Detection using Region-Based Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用基于区域的卷积神经网络进行植物病害检测
abstract: Agriculture plays an important role in the food and economy of Bangladesh. The rapid growth of population over the years also has increased the demand for food production. One of the major reasons behind low crop production is numerous bacteria, virus and fungal plant diseases. Early detection of plant diseases and proper usage of pesticides and fertilizers are vital for preventing the diseases and boost the yield. Most of the farmers use generalized pesticides and fertilizers in the entire fields without specifically knowing the condition of the plants. Thus the production cost oftentimes increases, and, not only that, sometimes this becomes detrimental to the yield. Deep Learning models are found to be very effective to automatically detect plant diseases from images of plants, thereby reducing the need for human specialists. This paper aims at building a lightweight deep learning model for predicting leaf disease in tomato plants. By modifying the region-based convolutional neural network, we design an efficient and effective model that demonstrates satisfactory empirical performance on a benchmark dataset. Our proposed model can easily be deployed in a larger system where drones take images of leaves and these images will be fed into our model to know the health condition.
summary: Agriculture plays an important role in the food and economy of Bangladesh. The rapid growth of population over the years also has increased the demand for food production. One of the major reasons behind low crop production is numerous bacteria, virus and fungal plant diseases. Early detection of plant diseases and proper usage of pesticides and fertilizers are vital for preventing the diseases and boost the yield. Most of the farmers use generalized pesticides and fertilizers in the entire fields without specifically knowing the condition of the plants. Thus the production cost oftentimes increases, and, not only that, sometimes this becomes detrimental to the yield. Deep Learning models are found to be very effective to automatically detect plant diseases from images of plants, thereby reducing the need for human specialists. This paper aims at building a lightweight deep learning model for predicting leaf disease in tomato plants. By modifying the region-based convolutional neural network, we design an efficient and effective model that demonstrates satisfactory empirical performance on a benchmark dataset. Our proposed model can easily be deployed in a larger system where drones take images of leaves and these images will be fed into our model to know the health condition.
abstract_zh: 农业在孟加拉国的粮食和经济中发挥着重要作用。多年来人口的快速增长也增加了对粮食生产的需求。农作物产量低的主要原因之一是大量细菌、病毒和真菌植物病害。及早发现植物病害并正确使用农药和化肥对于预防病害和提高产量至关重要。大多数农民在整个田地里使用通用的农药和肥料，而不具体了解植物的状况。因此，生产成本常常增加，不仅如此，有时这还会损害产量。人们发现深度学习模型可以非常有效地从植物图像中自动检测植物病害，从而减少对人类专家的需求。本文旨在建立一个轻量级深度学习模型来预测番茄植株的叶病。通过修改基于区域的卷积神经网络，我们设计了一个高效且有效的模型，该模型在基准数据集上表现出令人满意的经验性能。我们提出的模型可以很容易地部署在更大的系统中，在该系统中，无人机拍摄树叶图像，这些图像将被输入到我们的模型中以了解健康状况。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建一种轻量级深度学习模型，通过改进区域卷积神经网络（R-CNN）来检测番茄叶部病害，以提高农业病害检测效率。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国农业面临人口增长与病害导致的低产问题，传统农药使用方式成本高且效果差。深度学习可自动识别植物病害图像，减少对人工专家的依赖。
AI.method: 基于区域卷积神经网络（R-CNN）进行改进，设计轻量化模型并在基准数据集上验证其有效性，模型可部署于无人机图像采集系统中。
AI.result: 提出的模型在基准数据集上表现出良好的实证性能，能够有效识别番茄叶部病害，且适合大规模农业系统部署。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化病害检测优化农药使用，降低生产成本并提升产量，为农业智能化提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Plant Disease Detection using Region-Based Convolutional Neural Network 使用基于区域的卷积神经网络进行植物病害检测 Agriculture plays an important role in the food and economy of Bangladesh. The rapid growth of population over the years also has increased the demand for food production. One of the major reasons behind low crop production is numerous bacteria, virus and fungal plant diseases. Early detection of plant diseases and proper usage of pesticides and fertilizers are vital for preventing the diseases and boost the yield. Most of the farmers use generalized pesticides and fertilizers in the entire fields without specifically knowing the condition of the plants. Thus the production cost oftentimes increases, and, not only that, sometimes this becomes detrimental to the yield. Deep Learning models are found to be very effective to automatically detect plant diseases from images of plants, thereby reducing the need for human specialists. This paper aims at building a lightweight deep learning model for predicting leaf disease in tomato plants. By modifying the region-based convolutional neural network, we design an efficient and effective model that demonstrates satisfactory empirical performance on a benchmark dataset. Our proposed model can easily be deployed in a larger system where drones take images of leaves and these images will be fed into our model to know the health condition. 农业在孟加拉国的粮食和经济中发挥着重要作用。多年来人口的快速增长也增加了对粮食生产的需求。农作物产量低的主要原因之一是大量细菌、病毒和真菌植物病害。及早发现植物病害并正确使用农药和化肥对于预防病害和提高产量至关重要。大多数农民在整个田地里使用通用的农药和肥料，而不具体了解植物的状况。因此，生产成本常常增加，不仅如此，有时这还会损害产量。人们发现深度学习模型可以非常有效地从植物图像中自动检测植物病害，从而减少对人类专家的需求。本文旨在建立一个轻量级深度学习模型来预测番茄植株的叶病。通过修改基于区域的卷积神经网络，我们设计了一个高效且有效的模型，该模型在基准数据集上表现出令人满意的经验性能。我们提出的模型可以很容易地部署在更大的系统中，在该系统中，无人机拍摄树叶图像，这些图像将被输入到我们的模型中以了解健康状况。 本文旨在构建一种轻量级深度学习模型，通过改进区域卷积神经网络（R-CNN）来检测番茄叶部病害，以提高农业病害检测效率。 Hasin Rehana,Muhammad Ibrahim,Md. Haider Ali cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ankita Sontakke,Kanika Kalra,Manasi Patwardhan,Lovekesh Vig,Raveendra Kumar Medicherla,Ravindra Naik,Shrishti Pradhan
title: Knowledge Transfer for Pseudo-code Generation from Low Resource Programming Language
title_zh: 从低资源编程语言生成伪代码的知识转移
abstract: Generation of pseudo-code descriptions of legacy source code for software maintenance is a manually intensive task. Recent encoder-decoder language models have shown promise for automating pseudo-code generation for high resource programming languages such as C++, but are heavily reliant on the availability of a large code-pseudocode corpus. Soliciting such pseudocode annotations for codes written in legacy programming languages (PL) is a time consuming and costly affair requiring a thorough understanding of the source PL. In this paper, we focus on transferring the knowledge acquired by the code-to-pseudocode neural model trained on a high resource PL (C++) using parallel code-pseudocode data. We aim to transfer this knowledge to a legacy PL (C) with no PL-pseudocode parallel data for training. To achieve this, we utilize an Iterative Back Translation (IBT) approach with a novel test-cases based filtration strategy, to adapt the trained C++-to-pseudocode model to C-to-pseudocode model. We observe an improvement of 23.27% in the success rate of the generated C codes through back translation, over the successive IBT iteration, illustrating the efficacy of our approach.
summary: Generation of pseudo-code descriptions of legacy source code for software maintenance is a manually intensive task. Recent encoder-decoder language models have shown promise for automating pseudo-code generation for high resource programming languages such as C++, but are heavily reliant on the availability of a large code-pseudocode corpus. Soliciting such pseudocode annotations for codes written in legacy programming languages (PL) is a time consuming and costly affair requiring a thorough understanding of the source PL. In this paper, we focus on transferring the knowledge acquired by the code-to-pseudocode neural model trained on a high resource PL (C++) using parallel code-pseudocode data. We aim to transfer this knowledge to a legacy PL (C) with no PL-pseudocode parallel data for training. To achieve this, we utilize an Iterative Back Translation (IBT) approach with a novel test-cases based filtration strategy, to adapt the trained C++-to-pseudocode model to C-to-pseudocode model. We observe an improvement of 23.27% in the success rate of the generated C codes through back translation, over the successive IBT iteration, illustrating the efficacy of our approach.
abstract_zh: 生成用于软件维护的遗留源代码的伪代码描述是一项手动密集型任务。最近的编码器-解码器语言模型已显示出为 C++ 等高资源编程语言自动生成伪代码的希望，但严重依赖于大型代码-伪代码语料库的可用性。为用传统编程语言 (PL) 编写的代码请求此类伪代码注释是一件耗时且成本高昂的事情，需要彻底了解源 PL。在本文中，我们重点关注使用并行代码-伪代码数据迁移在高资源 PL (C++) 上训练的代码到伪代码神经模型获得的知识。我们的目标是将这些知识转移到没有 PL 伪代码并行数据进行训练的遗留 PL (C) 中。为了实现这一目标，我们利用迭代反向翻译 (IBT) 方法和基于新颖测试用例的过滤策略，将经过训练的 C++ 到伪代码模型调整为 C 到伪代码模型。我们观察到，在连续的 IBT 迭代中，通过反向翻译生成的 C 代码的成功率提高了 23.27%，这说明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过知识迁移技术，将高资源编程语言（C++）的伪代码生成模型迁移至低资源编程语言（C），以解决传统伪代码生成依赖大量标注数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统伪代码生成需依赖大量代码-伪代码平行语料，而遗留编程语言缺乏此类数据，导致生成效率低且成本高。
AI.method: 采用迭代反向翻译（IBT）方法结合基于测试用例的过滤策略，利用C++模型知识迁移至C语言，无需平行语料进行训练。
AI.result: 通过反向翻译迭代优化，C语言伪代码生成成功率提升23.27%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了跨编程语言的知识迁移，为低资源语言的伪代码生成提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Liang Liu,Boshen Zhang,Jiangning Zhang,Wuhao Zhang,Zhenye Gan,Guanzhong Tian,Wenbing Zhu,Yabiao Wang,Chengjie Wang
title: MixTeacher: Mining Promising Labels with Mixed Scale Teacher for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: MixTeacher：使用混合规模 Teacher 挖掘有前途的标签以进行半监督对象检测
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Implementation available: https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Implementation available: https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher
abstract: Scale variation across object instances remains a key challenge in object detection task. Despite the remarkable progress made by modern detection models, this challenge is particularly evident in the semi-supervised case. While existing semi-supervised object detection methods rely on strict conditions to filter high-quality pseudo labels from network predictions, we observe that objects with extreme scale tend to have low confidence, resulting in a lack of positive supervision for these objects. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that addresses the scale variation problem by introducing a mixed scale teacher to improve pseudo label generation and scale-invariant learning. Additionally, we propose mining pseudo labels using score promotion of predictions across scales, which benefits from better predictions from mixed scale features. Our extensive experiments on MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks under various semi-supervised settings demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher}.
summary: Scale variation across object instances remains a key challenge in object detection task. Despite the remarkable progress made by modern detection models, this challenge is particularly evident in the semi-supervised case. While existing semi-supervised object detection methods rely on strict conditions to filter high-quality pseudo labels from network predictions, we observe that objects with extreme scale tend to have low confidence, resulting in a lack of positive supervision for these objects. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that addresses the scale variation problem by introducing a mixed scale teacher to improve pseudo label generation and scale-invariant learning. Additionally, we propose mining pseudo labels using score promotion of predictions across scales, which benefits from better predictions from mixed scale features. Our extensive experiments on MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks under various semi-supervised settings demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher}.
abstract_zh: 对象实例之间的尺度变化仍然是对象检测任务中的一个关键挑战。尽管现代检测模型取得了显着的进步，但这一挑战在半监督情况下尤其明显。虽然现有的半监督对象检测方法依赖于严格的条件从网络预测中过滤高质量的伪标签，但我们观察到具有极端规模的对象往往具有较低的置信度，导致这些对象缺乏积极的监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，通过引入混合尺度教师来改善伪标签生成和尺度不变学习来解决尺度变化问题。此外，我们建议使用跨尺度预测的分数提升来挖掘伪标签，这受益于混合尺度特征的更好预测。我们在各种半监督设置下对 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法实现了新的最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MixTeacher的半监督目标检测框架，旨在解决目标检测中尺度变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有的半监督目标检测方法在生成伪标签时依赖严格的条件，但极端尺度的目标往往置信度较低，缺乏正监督，从而影响检测性能。
AI.method: 本文引入了混合尺度教师模型，通过跨尺度预测的得分提升来挖掘伪标签，从而改善伪标签生成和尺度不变学习。
AI.result: 在MS COCO和PASCAL VOC基准数据集上，本文方法在多种半监督设置下均实现了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MixTeacher通过混合尺度教师和跨尺度得分提升方法，有效解决了目标检测中的尺度变化问题，取得了显著的性能提升。

search_text: MixTeacher: Mining Promising Labels with Mixed Scale Teacher for Semi-Supervised Object Detection MixTeacher：使用混合规模 Teacher 挖掘有前途的标签以进行半监督对象检测 Scale variation across object instances remains a key challenge in object detection task. Despite the remarkable progress made by modern detection models, this challenge is particularly evident in the semi-supervised case. While existing semi-supervised object detection methods rely on strict conditions to filter high-quality pseudo labels from network predictions, we observe that objects with extreme scale tend to have low confidence, resulting in a lack of positive supervision for these objects. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that addresses the scale variation problem by introducing a mixed scale teacher to improve pseudo label generation and scale-invariant learning. Additionally, we propose mining pseudo labels using score promotion of predictions across scales, which benefits from better predictions from mixed scale features. Our extensive experiments on MS COCO and PASCAL VOC benchmarks under various semi-supervised settings demonstrate that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher}. 对象实例之间的尺度变化仍然是对象检测任务中的一个关键挑战。尽管现代检测模型取得了显着的进步，但这一挑战在半监督情况下尤其明显。虽然现有的半监督对象检测方法依赖于严格的条件从网络预测中过滤高质量的伪标签，但我们观察到具有极端规模的对象往往具有较低的置信度，导致这些对象缺乏积极的监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，通过引入混合尺度教师来改善伪标签生成和尺度不变学习来解决尺度变化问题。此外，我们建议使用跨尺度预测的分数提升来挖掘伪标签，这受益于混合尺度特征的更好预测。我们在各种半监督设置下对 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 基准进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法实现了新的最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/lliuz/MixTeacher} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为MixTeacher的半监督目标检测框架，旨在解决目标检测中尺度变化带来的挑战。 Liang Liu,Boshen Zhang,Jiangning Zhang,Wuhao Zhang,Zhenye Gan,Guanzhong Tian,Wenbing Zhu,Yabiao Wang,Chengjie Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Shuhan Qi,Shuhao Zhang,Qiang Wang,Jiajia Zhang,Jing Xiao,Xuan Wang
title: SVDE: Scalable Value-Decomposition Exploration for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: SVDE：协作多智能体强化学习的可扩展价值分解探索
abstract: Value-decomposition methods, which reduce the difficulty of a multi-agent system by decomposing the joint state-action space into local observation-action spaces, have become popular in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). However, value-decomposition methods still have the problems of tremendous sample consumption for training and lack of active exploration. In this paper, we propose a scalable value-decomposition exploration (SVDE) method, which includes a scalable training mechanism, intrinsic reward design, and explorative experience replay. The scalable training mechanism asynchronously decouples strategy learning with environmental interaction, so as to accelerate sample generation in a MapReduce manner. For the problem of lack of exploration, an intrinsic reward design and explorative experience replay are proposed, so as to enhance exploration to produce diverse samples and filter non-novel samples, respectively. Empirically, our method achieves the best performance on almost all maps compared to other popular algorithms in a set of StarCraft II micromanagement games. A data-efficiency experiment also shows the acceleration of SVDE for sample collection and policy convergence, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of factors in SVDE through a set of ablation experiments.
summary: Value-decomposition methods, which reduce the difficulty of a multi-agent system by decomposing the joint state-action space into local observation-action spaces, have become popular in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). However, value-decomposition methods still have the problems of tremendous sample consumption for training and lack of active exploration. In this paper, we propose a scalable value-decomposition exploration (SVDE) method, which includes a scalable training mechanism, intrinsic reward design, and explorative experience replay. The scalable training mechanism asynchronously decouples strategy learning with environmental interaction, so as to accelerate sample generation in a MapReduce manner. For the problem of lack of exploration, an intrinsic reward design and explorative experience replay are proposed, so as to enhance exploration to produce diverse samples and filter non-novel samples, respectively. Empirically, our method achieves the best performance on almost all maps compared to other popular algorithms in a set of StarCraft II micromanagement games. A data-efficiency experiment also shows the acceleration of SVDE for sample collection and policy convergence, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of factors in SVDE through a set of ablation experiments.
abstract_zh: 价值分解方法通过将联合状态-动作空间分解为局部观察-动作空间来降低多智能体系统的难度，在协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）中已变得流行。然而，价值分解方法仍然存在训练样本消耗巨大、缺乏积极探索的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展的价值分解探索（SVDE）方法，其中包括可扩展的训练机制、内在奖励设计和探索性经验重播。可扩展的训练机制将策略学习与环境交互异步解耦，从而以MapReduce的方式加速样本生成。针对缺乏探索的问题，提出了内在奖励设计和探索经验重放，以分别增强探索以产生多样化样本和过滤非新样本。根据经验，与星际争霸 II 微管理游戏中的其他流行算法相比，我们的方法在几乎所有地图上都实现了最佳性能。数据效率实验还显示了 SVDE 对样本收集和政策收敛的加速，并且我们通过一组消融实验证明了 SVDE 中因素的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的价值分解探索方法（SVDE），旨在解决合作多智能体强化学习中样本消耗大和探索不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有价值分解方法在训练过程中需要大量样本且缺乏主动探索能力，导致效率低下。
AI.method: SVDE包含三个核心模块：异步解耦的可扩展训练机制（加速样本生成）、内在奖励设计（增强探索）以及探索性经验回放（过滤非新颖样本）。
AI.result: 在StarCraft II微管理游戏测试中，SVDE在多数地图上优于其他主流算法，数据效率实验验证了其加速样本收集和策略收敛的能力。
AI.conclusion: SVDE通过创新机制有效缓解了样本消耗和探索不足问题，为合作多智能体强化学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Hyun Joon Park,Seok Woo Yang,Jin Sob Kim,Wooseok Shin,Sung Won Han
title: TriAAN-VC: Triple Adaptive Attention Normalization for Any-to-Any Voice Conversion
title_zh: TriAAN-VC：用于任意语音转换的三重自适应注意力归一化
abstract: Voice Conversion (VC) must be achieved while maintaining the content of the source speech and representing the characteristics of the target speaker. The existing methods do not simultaneously satisfy the above two aspects of VC, and their conversion outputs suffer from a trade-off problem between maintaining source contents and target characteristics. In this study, we propose Triple Adaptive Attention Normalization VC (TriAAN-VC), comprising an encoder-decoder and an attention-based adaptive normalization block, that can be applied to non-parallel any-to-any VC. The proposed adaptive normalization block extracts target speaker representations and achieves conversion while minimizing the loss of the source content with siamese loss. We evaluated TriAAN-VC on the VCTK dataset in terms of the maintenance of the source content and target speaker similarity. Experimental results for one-shot VC suggest that TriAAN-VC achieves state-of-the-art performance while mitigating the trade-off problem encountered in the existing VC methods.
summary: Voice Conversion (VC) must be achieved while maintaining the content of the source speech and representing the characteristics of the target speaker. The existing methods do not simultaneously satisfy the above two aspects of VC, and their conversion outputs suffer from a trade-off problem between maintaining source contents and target characteristics. In this study, we propose Triple Adaptive Attention Normalization VC (TriAAN-VC), comprising an encoder-decoder and an attention-based adaptive normalization block, that can be applied to non-parallel any-to-any VC. The proposed adaptive normalization block extracts target speaker representations and achieves conversion while minimizing the loss of the source content with siamese loss. We evaluated TriAAN-VC on the VCTK dataset in terms of the maintenance of the source content and target speaker similarity. Experimental results for one-shot VC suggest that TriAAN-VC achieves state-of-the-art performance while mitigating the trade-off problem encountered in the existing VC methods.
abstract_zh: 语音转换（VC）必须在保持源语音内容并代表目标说话者特征的同时实现。现有的方法不能同时满足VC的上述两个方面，并且它们的转换输出存在保持源内容和目标特性之间的权衡问题。在这项研究中，我们提出了三重自适应注意力归一化 VC (TriAAN-VC)，包括编码器-解码器和基于注意力的自适应归一化块，可应用于非并行的任意到任意 VC。所提出的自适应归一化块提取目标说话者表示并实现转换，同时通过孪生损失最小化源内容的损失。我们在 VCTK 数据集上评估了 TriAAN-VC 对源内容和目标说话人相似性的维护。一次性 VC 的实验结果表明，TriAAN-VC 实现了最先进的性能，同时缓解了现有 VC 方法中遇到的权衡问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriAAN-VC方法，通过自适应归一化模块解决语音转换中源内容保持与目标特征表达的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音转换方法难以同时保持源语音内容并准确表达目标说话人特征，存在性能权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计包含编码器-解码器结构和基于注意力的自适应归一化模块，利用Siamese损失最小化源内容损失。
AI.result: 在VCTK数据集的单次语音转换任务中达到SOTA性能，有效缓解了传统方法的权衡问题。
AI.conclusion: TriAAN-VC通过三重自适应注意力归一化机制，实现了更优的源内容保持与目标特征表达平衡。

The proposed adaptive normalization block extracts target speaker representations and achieves conversion while minimizing the loss of the source content with siamese loss. Experimental results for one-shot VC suggest that TriAAN-VC achieves state-of-the-art performance while mitigating the trade-off problem encountered in the existing VC methods. 语音转换（VC）必须在保持源语音内容并代表目标说话者特征的同时实现。现有的方法不能同时满足VC的上述两个方面，并且它们的转换输出存在保持源内容和目标特性之间的权衡问题。在这项研究中，我们提出了三重自适应注意力归一化 VC (TriAAN-VC)，包括编码器-解码器和基于注意力的自适应归一化块，可应用于非并行的任意到任意 VC。所提出的自适应归一化块提取目标说话者表示并实现转换，同时通过孪生损失最小化源内容的损失。我们在 VCTK 数据集上评估了 TriAAN-VC 对源内容和目标说话人相似性的维护。一次性 VC 的实验结果表明，TriAAN-VC 实现了最先进的性能，同时缓解了现有 VC 方法中遇到的权衡问题。 本文提出TriAAN-VC方法，通过自适应归一化模块解决语音转换中源内容保持与目标特征表达的权衡问题。 Hyun Joon Park,Seok Woo Yang,Jin Sob Kim,Wooseok Shin,Sung Won Han eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Gary An,Chase Cockrell
title: Generating synthetic multi-dimensional molecular-mediator time series data for artificial intelligence-based disease trajectory forecasting and drug development digital twins: Considerations
title_zh: 生成合成多维分子介体时间序列数据，用于基于人工智能的疾病轨迹预测和药物开发数字孪生：注意事项
abstract: The use of synthetic data is recognized as a crucial step in the development of neural network-based Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems. While the methods for generating synthetic data for AI applications in other domains have a role in certain biomedical AI systems, primarily related to image processing, there is a critical gap in the generation of time series data for AI tasks where it is necessary to know how the system works. This is most pronounced in the ability to generate synthetic multi-dimensional molecular time series data (SMMTSD); this is the type of data that underpins research into biomarkers and mediator signatures for forecasting various diseases and is an essential component of the drug development pipeline. We argue the insufficiency of statistical and data-centric machine learning (ML) means of generating this type of synthetic data is due to a combination of factors: perpetual data sparsity due to the Curse of Dimensionality, the inapplicability of the Central Limit Theorem, and the limits imposed by the Causal Hierarchy Theorem. Alternatively, we present a rationale for using complex multi-scale mechanism-based simulation models, constructed and operated on to account for epistemic incompleteness and the need to provide maximal expansiveness in concordance with the Principle of Maximal Entropy. These procedures provide for the generation of SMMTD that minimizes the known shortcomings associated with neural network AI systems, namely overfitting and lack of generalizability. The generation of synthetic data that accounts for the identified factors of multi-dimensional time series data is an essential capability for the development of mediator-biomarker based AI forecasting systems, and therapeutic control development and optimization through systems like Drug Development Digital Twins.

Alternatively, we present a rationale for using complex multi-scale mechanism-based simulation models, constructed and operated on to account for epistemic incompleteness and the need to provide maximal expansiveness in concordance with the Principle of Maximal Entropy. abstract_zh: 合成数据的使用被认为是开发基于神经网络的人工智能（AI）系统的关键一步。虽然为其他领域的人工智能应用生成合成数据的方法在某些生物医学人工智能系统中发挥着作用，主要与图像处理相关，但在为人工智能任务生成时间序列数据方面存在着关键差距，因为需要了解系统的工作原理。这在生成合成多维分子时间序列数据（SMMTSD）的能力中最为明显；此类数据支持用于预测各种疾病的生物标志物和介质特征的研究，并且是药物开发流程的重要组成部分。我们认为，统计和以数据为中心的机器学习（ML）方法生成此类合成数据的不足是由多种因素造成的：维度诅咒导致的永久数据稀疏、中心极限定理的不适用以及因果层次定理施加的限制。或者，我们提出了使用复杂的基于多尺度机制的模拟模型的基本原理，该模型的构建和操作是为了解决认知不完整性以及根据最大熵原理提供最大扩展性的需要。这些过程提供了 SMMTD 的生成，最大限度地减少了与神经网络 AI 系统相关的已知缺点，即过度拟合和缺乏通用性。生成考虑多维时间序列数据的已识别因素的合成数据是开发基于介质生物标志物的人工智能预测系统以及通过药物开发数字孪生等系统进行治疗控制开发和优化的基本能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在生成用于人工智能疾病轨迹预测和药物开发数字孪生的合成多维分子中介时间序列数据。
AI.motivation: 现有统计和机器学习方法生成多维时间序列数据存在数据稀疏性、中心极限定理不适用及因果层次定理限制等缺陷，难以满足AI系统需求。
AI.method: 采用基于复杂多尺度机制的模拟模型，结合认知不完整性处理和最大熵原理，生成符合生物医学规律的合成数据。
AI.result: 生成的合成数据可有效缓解神经网络AI系统的过拟合问题，提升模型泛化能力，支撑生物标志物和药物开发数字孪生系统构建。
AI.conclusion: 基于机制的多尺度模拟方法是生成高质量合成分子时间序列数据的关键，对疾病预测和药物研发AI系统具有重要价值。

authors_text: Tuan N. Tang,Kwonyoung Kim,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: TemporalMaxer: Maximize Temporal Context with only Max Pooling for Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: TemporalMaxer：仅使用最大池化来最大化时间上下文以实现时间动作本地化
abstract: Temporal Action Localization (TAL) is a challenging task in video understanding that aims to identify and localize actions within a video sequence. Recent studies have emphasized the importance of applying long-term temporal context modeling (TCM) blocks to the extracted video clip features such as employing complex self-attention mechanisms. In this paper, we present the simplest method ever to address this task and argue that the extracted video clip features are already informative to achieve outstanding performance without sophisticated architectures. To this end, we introduce TemporalMaxer, which minimizes long-term temporal context modeling while maximizing information from the extracted video clip features with a basic, parameter-free, and local region operating max-pooling block. Picking out only the most critical information for adjacent and local clip embeddings, this block results in a more efficient TAL model. We demonstrate that TemporalMaxer outperforms other state-of-the-art methods that utilize long-term TCM such as self-attention on various TAL datasets while requiring significantly fewer parameters and computational resources. The code for our approach is publicly available at https://github.com/TuanTNG/TemporalMaxer
summary: Temporal Action Localization (TAL) is a challenging task in video understanding that aims to identify and localize actions within a video sequence. Recent studies have emphasized the importance of applying long-term temporal context modeling (TCM) blocks to the extracted video clip features such as employing complex self-attention mechanisms. In this paper, we present the simplest method ever to address this task and argue that the extracted video clip features are already informative to achieve outstanding performance without sophisticated architectures. To this end, we introduce TemporalMaxer, which minimizes long-term temporal context modeling while maximizing information from the extracted video clip features with a basic, parameter-free, and local region operating max-pooling block. Picking out only the most critical information for adjacent and local clip embeddings, this block results in a more efficient TAL model. We demonstrate that TemporalMaxer outperforms other state-of-the-art methods that utilize long-term TCM such as self-attention on various TAL datasets while requiring significantly fewer parameters and computational resources. The code for our approach is publicly available at https://github.com/TuanTNG/TemporalMaxer
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位（TAL）是视频理解中的一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在识别和定位视频序列中的动作。最近的研究强调了将长期时间上下文建模（TCM）块应用于提取的视频剪辑特征的重要性，例如采用复杂的自注意力机制。在本文中，我们提出了解决此任务的最简单方法，并认为提取的视频剪辑特征已经提供了丰富的信息，无需复杂的架构即可实现出色的性能。为此，我们引入了 TemporalMaxer，它最大限度地减少了长期时间上下文建模，同时通过基本的、无参数的和局部区域操作的最大池块来最大化提取的视频剪辑特征中的信息。该块仅挑选出相邻和局部剪辑嵌入的最关键信息，从而产生更高效的 TAL 模型。我们证明 TemporalMaxer 优于其他利用长期 TCM 的最先进方法，例如在各种 TAL 数据集上的自我关注，同时需要的参数和计算资源显着减少。我们方法的代码可在 https://github.com/TuanTNG/TemporalMaxer 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TemporalMaxer的简单方法，用于视频中的时序动作定位任务，通过仅使用最大池化操作来提取关键信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂的长期时序上下文建模（如自注意力机制），但作者认为提取的视频片段特征本身已足够有效，无需复杂架构。
AI.method: 设计了一个参数-free且仅基于局部区域的最大池化模块，通过提取相邻片段的最关键信息，简化时序上下文建模过程。
AI.result: 在多个时序动作定位数据集上，TemporalMaxer在参数量和计算资源消耗显著减少的情况下，性能优于现有基于长期时序建模的先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 简单有效的局部最大池化策略可替代复杂时序建模，为时序动作定位提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Haruya Ishikawa,Yoshimitsu Aoki
title: FindView: Precise Target View Localization Task for Look Around Agents
title_zh: FindView：环视代理的精确目标视图本地化任务
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, preprint, code available in https://github.com/haruishi43/look_around
comments: 19 pages, 7 figures, preprint, code available in https://github.com/haruishi43/look_around
abstract: With the increase in demands for service robots and automated inspection, agents need to localize in its surrounding environment to achieve more natural communication with humans by shared contexts. In this work, we propose a novel but straightforward task of precise target view localization for look around agents called the FindView task. This task imitates the movements of PTZ cameras or user interfaces for 360 degree mediums, where the observer must "look around" to find a view that exactly matches the target. To solve this task, we introduce a rule-based agent that heuristically finds the optimal view and a policy learning agent that employs reinforcement learning to learn by interacting with the 360 degree scene. Through extensive evaluations and benchmarks, we conclude that learned methods have many advantages, in particular precise localization that is robust to corruption and can be easily deployed in novel scenes.
summary: With the increase in demands for service robots and automated inspection, agents need to localize in its surrounding environment to achieve more natural communication with humans by shared contexts. In this work, we propose a novel but straightforward task of precise target view localization for look around agents called the FindView task. This task imitates the movements of PTZ cameras or user interfaces for 360 degree mediums, where the observer must "look around" to find a view that exactly matches the target. To solve this task, we introduce a rule-based agent that heuristically finds the optimal view and a policy learning agent that employs reinforcement learning to learn by interacting with the 360 degree scene. Through extensive evaluations and benchmarks, we conclude that learned methods have many advantages, in particular precise localization that is robust to corruption and can be easily deployed in novel scenes.
abstract_zh: 随着对服务机器人和自动化检查的需求增加，代理需要在其周围环境中进行本地化，以通过共享上下文与人类实现更自然的交流。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖但简单的任务，即环视智能体的精确目标视图本地化任务，称为 FindView 任务。此任务模仿 PTZ 摄像机或 360 度介质的用户界面的移动，其中观察者必须“环顾四周”才能找到与目标完全匹配的视图。为了解决这个任务，我们引入了一个基于规则的代理，它启发式地找到最佳视图，以及一个策略学习代理，它采用强化学习通过与 360 度场景交互来学习。通过广泛的评估和基准测试，我们得出的结论是，学习方法具有许多优点，特别是精确的定位，对腐败具有鲁棒性，并且可以轻松部署在新场景中。

AI.tldr: 提出FindView任务，实现环视代理的精确目标视图定位
AI.motivation: 服务机器人和自动化检测需求增加，需通过环境定位实现与人类的自然交互
AI.method: 基于规则的启发式方法与强化学习策略，通过交互学习实现360度场景中的视图定位
AI.result: 学习方法在精确定位、抗干扰能力和新场景部署方面表现优异
AI.conclusion: 学习方法在精确鲁棒定位和跨场景部署中具有显著优势

authors_text: Minjong Lee,Dongwoo Kim
title: Robust Evaluation of Diffusion-Based Adversarial Purification
title_zh: 基于扩散的对抗性净化的鲁棒评估
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023, oral presentation. Code is available at https://github.com/ml-postech/robust-evaluation-of-diffusion-based-purification
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023, oral presentation. Code is available at https://github.com/ml-postech/robust-evaluation-of-diffusion-based-purification
abstract: We question the current evaluation practice on diffusion-based purification methods. Diffusion-based purification methods aim to remove adversarial effects from an input data point at test time. The approach gains increasing attention as an alternative to adversarial training due to the disentangling between training and testing. Well-known white-box attacks are often employed to measure the robustness of the purification. However, it is unknown whether these attacks are the most effective for the diffusion-based purification since the attacks are often tailored for adversarial training. We analyze the current practices and provide a new guideline for measuring the robustness of purification methods against adversarial attacks. Based on our analysis, we further propose a new purification strategy improving robustness compared to the current diffusion-based purification methods.
summary: We question the current evaluation practice on diffusion-based purification methods. Diffusion-based purification methods aim to remove adversarial effects from an input data point at test time. The approach gains increasing attention as an alternative to adversarial training due to the disentangling between training and testing. Well-known white-box attacks are often employed to measure the robustness of the purification. However, it is unknown whether these attacks are the most effective for the diffusion-based purification since the attacks are often tailored for adversarial training. We analyze the current practices and provide a new guideline for measuring the robustness of purification methods against adversarial attacks. Based on our analysis, we further propose a new purification strategy improving robustness compared to the current diffusion-based purification methods.
abstract_zh: 我们对当前基于扩散的纯化方法的评估实践提出质疑。基于扩散的纯化方法旨在消除测试时输入数据点的对抗性影响。由于训练和测试之间的分离，该方法作为对抗性训练的替代方案而受到越来越多的关注。众所周知的白盒攻击通常用于测量纯化的稳健性。然而，尚不清楚这些攻击对于基于扩散的净化是否最有效，因为这些攻击通常是针对对抗性训练而定制的。我们分析了当前的实践，并为衡量净化方法对抗对抗性攻击的稳健性提供了新的指南。根据我们的分析，我们进一步提出了一种新的纯化策略，与当前基于扩散的纯化方法相比，提高了鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 质疑现有基于扩散的对抗净化评估方法，并提出新的评估指南及改进净化策略
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法可能不适用于扩散净化，需针对其特性设计更有效的评估方式
AI.method: 分析现有评估方法，提出新的鲁棒性评估指南，并设计改进的净化策略
AI.result: 新净化策略在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 需针对扩散净化特性设计专用评估方法以提升其鲁棒性

authors_text: Joseph Konan,Ojas Bhargave,Shikhar Agnihotri,Hojeong Lee,Ankit Shah,Shuo Han,Yunyang Zeng,Amanda Shu,Haohui Liu,Xuankai Chang,Hamza Khalid,Minseon Gwak,Kawon Lee,Minjeong Kim,Bhiksha Raj
title: Improving Perceptual Quality, Intelligibility, and Acoustics on VoIP Platforms
title_zh: 提高 VoIP 平台的感知质量、清晰度和声学效果
comment: Under review at European Association for Signal Processing. 5 pages
comments: Under review at European Association for Signal Processing. 5 pages
abstract: In this paper, we present a method for fine-tuning models trained on the Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) 2020 Challenge to improve their performance on Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) applications. Our approach involves adapting the DNS 2020 models to the specific acoustic characteristics of VoIP communications, which includes distortion and artifacts caused by compression, transmission, and platform-specific processing. To this end, we propose a multi-task learning framework for VoIP-DNS that jointly optimizes noise suppression and VoIP-specific acoustics for speech enhancement. We evaluate our approach on a diverse VoIP scenarios and show that it outperforms both industry performance and state-of-the-art methods for speech enhancement on VoIP applications. Our results demonstrate the potential of models trained on DNS-2020 to be improved and tailored to different VoIP platforms using VoIP-DNS, whose findings have important applications in areas such as speech recognition, voice assistants, and telecommunication.
summary: In this paper, we present a method for fine-tuning models trained on the Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) 2020 Challenge to improve their performance on Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) applications. Our approach involves adapting the DNS 2020 models to the specific acoustic characteristics of VoIP communications, which includes distortion and artifacts caused by compression, transmission, and platform-specific processing. To this end, we propose a multi-task learning framework for VoIP-DNS that jointly optimizes noise suppression and VoIP-specific acoustics for speech enhancement. We evaluate our approach on a diverse VoIP scenarios and show that it outperforms both industry performance and state-of-the-art methods for speech enhancement on VoIP applications. Our results demonstrate the potential of models trained on DNS-2020 to be improved and tailored to different VoIP platforms using VoIP-DNS, whose findings have important applications in areas such as speech recognition, voice assistants, and telecommunication.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种微调在 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) 2020 Challenge 上训练的模型的方法，以提高其在互联网协议语音 (VoIP) 应用程序中的性能。我们的方法包括使 DNS 2020 模型适应 VoIP 通信的特定声学特性，其中包括由压缩、传输和特定于平台的处理引起的失真和伪影。为此，我们提出了一种用于 VoIP-DNS 的多任务学习框架，该框架联合优化噪声抑制和 VoIP 特定声学以实现语音增强。我们在不同的 VoIP 场景中评估了我们的方法，并表明它的性能优于行业性能和 VoIP 应用语音增强的最先进方法。我们的结果证明了在 DNS-2020 上训练的模型具有改进和定制以适应使用 VoIP-DNS 的不同 VoIP 平台的潜力，其研究结果在语音识别、语音助手和电信等领域具有重要应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进VoIP平台语音质量的方法，通过微调DNS 2020模型以适应VoIP特有的声学特性。
AI.motivation: 现有DNS模型未针对VoIP通信中的压缩失真和平台特有处理进行优化，导致语音增强效果不足。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架VoIP-DNS，联合优化噪声抑制与VoIP特定声学特性，适应压缩、传输等环节的失真。
AI.result: 在多样化VoIP场景中优于行业基准和现有最先进方法，验证了模型改进的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DNS-2020模型可通过VoIP-DNS框架适配不同平台，为语音识别、智能助手等应用提供更优语音增强方案。

authors_text: Andrew Peng,Jiangpeng He,Fengqing Zhu
title: Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning on Food Images
title_zh: 食物图像的自监督视觉表征学习
comment: Presented and published in EI 2023 Conference Proceedings
comments: Presented and published in EI 2023 Conference Proceedings
abstract: Food image analysis is the groundwork for image-based dietary assessment, which is the process of monitoring what kinds of food and how much energy is consumed using captured food or eating scene images. Existing deep learning-based methods learn the visual representation for downstream tasks based on human annotation of each food image. However, most food images in real life are obtained without labels, and data annotation requires plenty of time and human effort, which is not feasible for real-world applications. To make use of the vast amount of unlabeled images, many existing works focus on unsupervised or self-supervised learning of visual representations directly from unlabeled data. However, none of these existing works focus on food images, which is more challenging than general objects due to its high inter-class similarity and intra-class variance. In this paper, we focus on the implementation and analysis of existing representative self-supervised learning methods on food images. Specifically, we first compare the performance of six selected self-supervised learning models on the Food-101 dataset. Then we analyze the pros and cons of each selected model when training on food data to identify the key factors that can help improve the performance. Finally, we propose several ideas for future work on self-supervised visual representation learning for food images.
summary: Food image analysis is the groundwork for image-based dietary assessment, which is the process of monitoring what kinds of food and how much energy is consumed using captured food or eating scene images. Existing deep learning-based methods learn the visual representation for downstream tasks based on human annotation of each food image. However, most food images in real life are obtained without labels, and data annotation requires plenty of time and human effort, which is not feasible for real-world applications. To make use of the vast amount of unlabeled images, many existing works focus on unsupervised or self-supervised learning of visual representations directly from unlabeled data. However, none of these existing works focus on food images, which is more challenging than general objects due to its high inter-class similarity and intra-class variance. In this paper, we focus on the implementation and analysis of existing representative self-supervised learning methods on food images. Specifically, we first compare the performance of six selected self-supervised learning models on the Food-101 dataset. Then we analyze the pros and cons of each selected model when training on food data to identify the key factors that can help improve the performance. Finally, we propose several ideas for future work on self-supervised visual representation learning for food images.
abstract_zh: 食物图像分析是基于图像的饮食评估的基础，这是使用捕获的食物或饮食场景图像来监测食物种类和消耗多少能量的过程。现有的基于深度学习的方法根据每个食物图像的人工注释来学习下游任务的视觉表示。然而，现实生活中的大多数食物图像都是在没有标签的情况下获得的，数据注释需要大量的时间和人力，这对于现实世界的应用来说是不可行的。为了利用大量未标记的图像，许多现有的工作侧重于直接从未标记的数据中无监督或自监督地学习视觉表示。然而，这些现有的工作都没有关注食物图像，由于其较高的类间相似性和类内方差，因此比一般对象更具挑战性。在本文中，我们重点关注现有代表性食品图像自监督学习方法的实现和分析。具体来说，我们首先比较了 Food-101 数据集上六个选定的自监督学习模型的性能。然后，我们在食品数据训练时分析每个选定模型的优缺点，以确定有助于提高性能的关键因素。最后，我们为食物图像的自监督视觉表示学习的未来工作提出了一些想法。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在食品图像上实施和分析现有的自监督视觉表示学习方法。
AI.motivation: 食品图像分析需要大量标注数据，但实际场景中食品图像多为无标签数据，且食品图像存在类间相似性和类内差异性，现有方法未针对食品图像进行优化。
AI.method: 在Food-101数据集上比较六种自监督学习模型的性能，并分析各模型在食品数据训练中的优缺点及影响性能的关键因素。
AI.result: 发现不同自监督方法在食品图像上的表现差异，识别出提升性能的关键因素，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习在食品图像表示学习中具有可行性，但需针对食品图像特性优化方法设计。

search_text: Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning on Food Images 食物图像的自监督视觉表征学习 Food image analysis is the groundwork for image-based dietary assessment, which is the process of monitoring what kinds of food and how much energy is consumed using captured food or eating scene images. Existing deep learning-based methods learn the visual representation for downstream tasks based on human annotation of each food image. However, most food images in real life are obtained without labels, and data annotation requires plenty of time and human effort, which is not feasible for real-world applications. To make use of the vast amount of unlabeled images, many existing works focus on unsupervised or self-supervised learning of visual representations directly from unlabeled data. However, none of these existing works focus on food images, which is more challenging than general objects due to its high inter-class similarity and intra-class variance. In this paper, we focus on the implementation and analysis of existing representative self-supervised learning methods on food images. Specifically, we first compare the performance of six selected self-supervised learning models on the Food-101 dataset. Then we analyze the pros and cons of each selected model when training on food data to identify the key factors that can help improve the performance. Finally, we propose several ideas for future work on self-supervised visual representation learning for food images. 食物图像分析是基于图像的饮食评估的基础，这是使用捕获的食物或饮食场景图像来监测食物种类和消耗多少能量的过程。现有的基于深度学习的方法根据每个食物图像的人工注释来学习下游任务的视觉表示。然而，现实生活中的大多数食物图像都是在没有标签的情况下获得的，数据注释需要大量的时间和人力，这对于现实世界的应用来说是不可行的。为了利用大量未标记的图像，许多现有的工作侧重于直接从未标记的数据中无监督或自监督地学习视觉表示。然而，这些现有的工作都没有关注食物图像，由于其较高的类间相似性和类内方差，因此比一般对象更具挑战性。在本文中，我们重点关注现有代表性食品图像自监督学习方法的实现和分析。具体来说，我们首先比较了 Food-101 数据集上六个选定的自监督学习模型的性能。然后，我们在食品数据训练时分析每个选定模型的优缺点，以确定有助于提高性能的关键因素。最后，我们为食物图像的自监督视觉表示学习的未来工作提出了一些想法。 本文主要研究在食品图像上实施和分析现有的自监督视觉表示学习方法。 Andrew Peng,Jiangpeng He,Fengqing Zhu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Soufiane Belharbi,Shakeeb Murtaza,Marco Pedersoli,Ismail Ben Ayed,Luke McCaffrey,Eric Granger
title: CoLo-CAM: Class Activation Mapping for Object Co-Localization in Weakly-Labeled Unconstrained Videos
title_zh: CoLo-CAM：弱标记无约束视频中对象协同定位的类激活映射
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, Pattern Recognition 2025, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.patcog.2025.111358, CC-BY-NC-ND license
comments: 21 pages, 8 figures, Pattern Recognition 2025, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.patcog.2025.111358, CC-BY-NC-ND license
abstract: Leveraging spatiotemporal information in videos is critical for weakly supervised video object localization (WSVOL) tasks. However, state-of-the-art methods only rely on visual and motion cues, while discarding discriminative information, making them susceptible to inaccurate localizations. Recently, discriminative models have been explored for WSVOL tasks using a temporal class activation mapping (CAM) method. Although their results are promising, objects are assumed to have limited movement from frame to frame, leading to degradation in performance for relatively long-term dependencies. This paper proposes a novel CAM method for WSVOL that exploits spatiotemporal information in activation maps during training without constraining an object's position. Its training relies on Co-Localization, hence, the name CoLo-CAM. Given a sequence of frames, localization is jointly learned based on color cues extracted across the corresponding maps, by assuming that an object has similar color in consecutive frames. CAM activations are constrained to respond similarly over pixels with similar colors, achieving co-localization. This improves localization performance because the joint learning creates direct communication among pixels across all image locations and over all frames, allowing for transfer, aggregation, and correction of localizations. Co-localization is integrated into training by minimizing the color term of a conditional random field (CRF) loss over a sequence of frames/CAMs. Extensive experiments on two challenging YouTube-Objects datasets of unconstrained videos show the merits of our method, and its robustness to long-term dependencies, leading to new state-of-the-art performance for WSVOL task.
summary: Leveraging spatiotemporal information in videos is critical for weakly supervised video object localization (WSVOL) tasks. However, state-of-the-art methods only rely on visual and motion cues, while discarding discriminative information, making them susceptible to inaccurate localizations. Recently, discriminative models have been explored for WSVOL tasks using a temporal class activation mapping (CAM) method. Although their results are promising, objects are assumed to have limited movement from frame to frame, leading to degradation in performance for relatively long-term dependencies. This paper proposes a novel CAM method for WSVOL that exploits spatiotemporal information in activation maps during training without constraining an object's position. Its training relies on Co-Localization, hence, the name CoLo-CAM. Given a sequence of frames, localization is jointly learned based on color cues extracted across the corresponding maps, by assuming that an object has similar color in consecutive frames. CAM activations are constrained to respond similarly over pixels with similar colors, achieving co-localization. This improves localization performance because the joint learning creates direct communication among pixels across all image locations and over all frames, allowing for transfer, aggregation, and correction of localizations. Co-localization is integrated into training by minimizing the color term of a conditional random field (CRF) loss over a sequence of frames/CAMs. Extensive experiments on two challenging YouTube-Objects datasets of unconstrained videos show the merits of our method, and its robustness to long-term dependencies, leading to new state-of-the-art performance for WSVOL task.
abstract_zh: 利用视频中的时空信息对于弱监督视频对象定位（WSVOL）任务至关重要。然而，最先进的方法仅依赖于视觉和运动线索，同时丢弃判别性信息，使它们容易受到不准确定位的影响。最近，使用时间类激活映射 (CAM) 方法探索了 WSVOL 任务的判别模型。尽管他们的结果很有希望，但假设对象在帧之间的移动有限，导致相对长期依赖性的性能下降。本文提出了一种用于 WSVOL 的新颖 CAM 方法，该方法在训练期间利用激活图中的时空信息，而不限制对象的位置。它的训练依赖于协同定位，因此得名 CoLo-CAM。给定一系列帧，通过假设对象在连续帧中具有相似的颜色，基于在相应地图上提取的颜色线索来联合学习定位。 CAM 激活被限制为对具有相似颜色的像素做出相似的响应，从而实现共定位。这提高了定位性能，因为联合学习在所有图像位置和所有帧上的像素之间创建了直接通信，从而允许定位的传输、聚合和校正。通过最小化帧/CAM 序列上条件随机场 (CRF) 损失的颜色项，将共定位集成到训练中。对两个具有挑战性的无约束视频 YouTube-Objects 数据集进行的广泛实验显示了我们方法的优点及其对长期依赖性的鲁棒性，从而为 WSVOL 任务带来了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoLo-CAM的新方法，用于弱监督视频目标定位（WSVOL），通过利用视频中的时空信息提升定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频目标定位中仅依赖视觉和运动线索，忽略了判别性信息，且假设目标在帧间移动有限，导致长时依赖性能下降。
AI.method: 通过联合学习连续帧中的颜色线索，利用条件随机场（CRF）损失的色彩项约束CAM激活，实现跨帧像素的协同定位，无需限制目标位置。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的YouTube-Objects数据集上实验表明，该方法在长时依赖场景下表现稳健，达到WSVOL任务的新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: CoLo-CAM通过颜色引导的协同定位机制，有效整合时空信息，解决了弱监督视频目标定位中长时依赖问题，提升了定位精度。

authors_text: Zeqiang Lai,Chenggang Yan,Ying Fu
title: Hybrid Spectral Denoising Transformer with Guided Attention
title_zh: 具有引导注意力的混合频谱去噪变压器
abstract: In this paper, we present a Hybrid Spectral Denoising Transformer (HSDT) for hyperspectral image denoising. Challenges in adapting transformer for HSI arise from the capabilities to tackle existing limitations of CNN-based methods in capturing the global and local spatial-spectral correlations while maintaining efficiency and flexibility. To address these issues, we introduce a hybrid approach that combines the advantages of both models with a Spatial-Spectral Separable Convolution (S3Conv), Guided Spectral Self-Attention (GSSA), and Self-Modulated Feed-Forward Network (SM-FFN). Our S3Conv works as a lightweight alternative to 3D convolution, which extracts more spatial-spectral correlated features while keeping the flexibility to tackle HSIs with an arbitrary number of bands. These features are then adaptively processed by GSSA which per-forms 3D self-attention across the spectral bands, guided by a set of learnable queries that encode the spectral signatures. This not only enriches our model with powerful capabilities for identifying global spectral correlations but also maintains linear complexity. Moreover, our SM-FFN proposes the self-modulation that intensifies the activations of more informative regions, which further strengthens the aggregated features. Extensive experiments are conducted on various datasets under both simulated and real-world noise, and it shows that our HSDT significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining low computational overhead. Code is at https: //github.com/Zeqiang-Lai/HSDT.
summary: In this paper, we present a Hybrid Spectral Denoising Transformer (HSDT) for hyperspectral image denoising. Challenges in adapting transformer for HSI arise from the capabilities to tackle existing limitations of CNN-based methods in capturing the global and local spatial-spectral correlations while maintaining efficiency and flexibility. To address these issues, we introduce a hybrid approach that combines the advantages of both models with a Spatial-Spectral Separable Convolution (S3Conv), Guided Spectral Self-Attention (GSSA), and Self-Modulated Feed-Forward Network (SM-FFN). Our S3Conv works as a lightweight alternative to 3D convolution, which extracts more spatial-spectral correlated features while keeping the flexibility to tackle HSIs with an arbitrary number of bands. These features are then adaptively processed by GSSA which per-forms 3D self-attention across the spectral bands, guided by a set of learnable queries that encode the spectral signatures. This not only enriches our model with powerful capabilities for identifying global spectral correlations but also maintains linear complexity. Moreover, our SM-FFN proposes the self-modulation that intensifies the activations of more informative regions, which further strengthens the aggregated features. Extensive experiments are conducted on various datasets under both simulated and real-world noise, and it shows that our HSDT significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining low computational overhead. Code is at https: //github.com/Zeqiang-Lai/HSDT.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱图像去噪的混合光谱去噪变压器（HSDT）。针对 HSI 采用 Transformer 的挑战来自于解决基于 CNN 的方法在捕获全局和局部空间频谱相关性方面的现有局限性，同时保持效率和灵活性的能力。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种混合方法，将两种模型的优点与空间谱可分离卷积（S3Conv）、引导谱自注意力（GSSA）和自调制前馈网络（SM-FFN）结合起来。我们的 S3Conv 作为 3D 卷积的轻量级替代品，可提取更多空间光谱相关特征，同时保持处理任意数量频带的 HSI 的灵活性。然后，这些特征由 GSSA 进行自适应处理，GSSA 在一组对光谱特征进行编码的可学习查询的指导下，在整个光谱带上执行 3D 自注意力。这不仅丰富了我们的模型，具有识别全局光谱相关性的强大功能，而且保持了线性复杂性。此外，我们的 SM-FFN 提出了自我调节，可以加强更多信息区域的激活，从而进一步增强聚合特征。在模拟和现实世界噪声下的各种数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明我们的 HSDT 显着优于现有的最先进方法，同时保持较低的计算开销。代码位于https://github.com/Zeqiang-Lai/HSDT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合光谱去噪Transformer（HSDT），用于高光谱图像去噪，结合卷积神经网络与Transformer的优势以提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法在捕捉高光谱图像全局与局部空间-光谱相关性时存在局限，而Transformer模型需解决效率与灵活性问题，因此需设计混合方法以兼顾性能与计算成本。
AI.method: 提出S3Conv（轻量级3D卷积替代方案）、GSSA（基于可学习查询的光谱自注意力机制）及SM-FFN（自调制前馈网络），通过分离空间-光谱特征提取、自适应光谱关联建模与特征增强实现高效去噪。
AI.result: 在多种数据集的模拟与真实噪声环境下，HSDT在去噪性能上显著优于现有最先进方法，且计算开销较低。
AI.conclusion: HSDT通过融合卷积与Transformer模块，有效解决了高光谱图像去噪中的空间-光谱关联建模难题，实现了性能与效率的平衡。

search_text: Hybrid Spectral Denoising Transformer with Guided Attention 具有引导注意力的混合频谱去噪变压器 In this paper, we present a Hybrid Spectral Denoising Transformer (HSDT) for hyperspectral image denoising. Challenges in adapting transformer for HSI arise from the capabilities to tackle existing limitations of CNN-based methods in capturing the global and local spatial-spectral correlations while maintaining efficiency and flexibility. To address these issues, we introduce a hybrid approach that combines the advantages of both models with a Spatial-Spectral Separable Convolution (S3Conv), Guided Spectral Self-Attention (GSSA), and Self-Modulated Feed-Forward Network (SM-FFN). Our S3Conv works as a lightweight alternative to 3D convolution, which extracts more spatial-spectral correlated features while keeping the flexibility to tackle HSIs with an arbitrary number of bands. These features are then adaptively processed by GSSA which per-forms 3D self-attention across the spectral bands, guided by a set of learnable queries that encode the spectral signatures. This not only enriches our model with powerful capabilities for identifying global spectral correlations but also maintains linear complexity. Moreover, our SM-FFN proposes the self-modulation that intensifies the activations of more informative regions, which further strengthens the aggregated features. Extensive experiments are conducted on various datasets under both simulated and real-world noise, and it shows that our HSDT significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining low computational overhead. Code is at https: //github.com/Zeqiang-Lai/HSDT. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱图像去噪的混合光谱去噪变压器（HSDT）。针对 HSI 采用 Transformer 的挑战来自于解决基于 CNN 的方法在捕获全局和局部空间频谱相关性方面的现有局限性，同时保持效率和灵活性的能力。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种混合方法，将两种模型的优点与空间谱可分离卷积（S3Conv）、引导谱自注意力（GSSA）和自调制前馈网络（SM-FFN）结合起来。我们的 S3Conv 作为 3D 卷积的轻量级替代品，可提取更多空间光谱相关特征，同时保持处理任意数量频带的 HSI 的灵活性。然后，这些特征由 GSSA 进行自适应处理，GSSA 在一组对光谱特征进行编码的可学习查询的指导下，在整个光谱带上执行 3D 自注意力。这不仅丰富了我们的模型，具有识别全局光谱相关性的强大功能，而且保持了线性复杂性。此外，我们的 SM-FFN 提出了自我调节，可以加强更多信息区域的激活，从而进一步增强聚合特征。在模拟和现实世界噪声下的各种数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明我们的 HSDT 显着优于现有的最先进方法，同时保持较低的计算开销。代码位于https://github.com/Zeqiang-Lai/HSDT。 本文提出一种混合光谱去噪Transformer（HSDT），用于高光谱图像去噪，结合卷积神经网络与Transformer的优势以提升去噪效果。 Zeqiang Lai,Chenggang Yan,Ying Fu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Qing Lyu,Josh Tan,Michael E. Zapadka,Janardhana Ponnatapura,Chuang Niu,Kyle J. Myers,Ge Wang,Christopher T. Whitlow
title: Translating Radiology Reports into Plain Language using ChatGPT and GPT-4 with Prompt Learning: Promising Results, Limitations, and Potential
title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 快速学习将放射学报告翻译成简单语言：有希望的结果、局限性和潜力
abstract: The large language model called ChatGPT has drawn extensively attention because of its human-like expression and reasoning abilities. In this study, we investigate the feasibility of using ChatGPT in experiments on using ChatGPT to translate radiology reports into plain language for patients and healthcare providers so that they are educated for improved healthcare. Radiology reports from 62 low-dose chest CT lung cancer screening scans and 76 brain MRI metastases screening scans were collected in the first half of February for this study. According to the evaluation by radiologists, ChatGPT can successfully translate radiology reports into plain language with an average score of 4.27 in the five-point system with 0.08 places of information missing and 0.07 places of misinformation. In terms of the suggestions provided by ChatGPT, they are general relevant such as keeping following-up with doctors and closely monitoring any symptoms, and for about 37% of 138 cases in total ChatGPT offers specific suggestions based on findings in the report. ChatGPT also presents some randomness in its responses with occasionally over-simplified or neglected information, which can be mitigated using a more detailed prompt. Furthermore, ChatGPT results are compared with a newly released large model GPT-4, showing that GPT-4 can significantly improve the quality of translated reports. Our results show that it is feasible to utilize large language models in clinical education, and further efforts are needed to address limitations and maximize their potential.

In this study, we investigate the feasibility of using ChatGPT in experiments on using ChatGPT to translate radiology reports into plain language for patients and healthcare providers so that they are educated for improved healthcare. Radiology reports from 62 low-dose chest CT lung cancer screening scans and 76 brain MRI metastases screening scans were collected in the first half of February for this study. According to the evaluation by radiologists, ChatGPT can successfully translate radiology reports into plain language with an average score of 4.27 in the five-point system with 0.08 places of information missing and 0.07 places of misinformation. In terms of the suggestions provided by ChatGPT, they are general relevant such as keeping following-up with doctors and closely monitoring any symptoms, and for about 37% of 138 cases in total ChatGPT offers specific suggestions based on findings in the report. ChatGPT also presents some randomness in its responses with occasionally over-simplified or neglected information, which can be mitigated using a more detailed prompt. Furthermore, ChatGPT results are compared with a newly released large model GPT-4, showing that GPT-4 can significantly improve the quality of translated reports. Our results show that it is feasible to utilize large language models in clinical education, and further efforts are needed to address limitations and maximize their potential.
abstract_zh: ChatGPT大型语言模型因其具有类人表达和推理能力而受到广泛关注。在这项研究中，我们在实验中调查了使用 ChatGPT 的可行性，即使用 ChatGPT 将放射学报告翻译成简单的语言提供给患者和医疗保健提供者，以便他们接受教育以改善医疗保健。本研究收集了 2 月上半月的 62 例低剂量胸部 CT 肺癌筛查扫描和 76 例脑部 MRI 转移筛查扫描的放射学报告。根据放射科医生的评估，ChatGPT 可以成功地将放射学报告翻译成简单语言，五分制平均分为 4.27 分，其中信息缺失 0.08 处，错误信息 0.07 处。就ChatGPT提供的建议而言，这些建议具有普遍相关性，例如继续与医生进行随访并密切监测任何症状，并且ChatGPT针对总共138例中的约37%根据报告中的发现提供了具体建议。 ChatGPT 的响应中还存在一些随机性，偶尔会出现过度简化或被忽略的信息，可以使用更详细的提示来缓解这种情况。此外，ChatGPT结果与新发布的大型模型GPT-4进行了比较，表明GPT-4可以显着提高翻译报告的质量。我们的结果表明，在临床教育中利用大型语言模型是可行的，但需要进一步努力来解决局限性并最大限度地发挥其潜力。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了使用ChatGPT和GPT-4通过提示学习将放射科报告翻译为通俗语言的可行性，以提升患者和医疗提供者的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 放射科报告常使用专业术语，患者和医疗人员难以理解，需通过大语言模型实现通俗化翻译以促进医疗教育。
AI.method: 收集62例低剂量CT肺癌筛查和76例脑部MRI转移瘤筛查的报告，使用ChatGPT与GPT-4进行翻译，并通过放射科医生评分评估准确性与信息完整性。
AI.result: ChatGPT平均得分为4.27（5分制），信息缺失率0.08，错误率0.07；37%的案例提供具体建议，但存在过度简化问题，GPT-4表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在临床教育中具可行性，但需优化提示策略以减少信息遗漏与错误，进一步挖掘其潜力。

authors_text: Zhongtao Fu,Xiaoyu Lei,Xubing Chen,Mohamed Ibrahim Ahmed,Cong Zhang,Miao Li,Tao Huang
title: Homography matrix based trajectory planning method for robot uncalibrated visual servoing
title_zh: 基于单应矩阵的机器人未标定视觉伺服轨迹规划方法
abstract: In view of the classical visual servoing trajectory planning method which only considers the camera trajectory, this paper proposes one homography matrix based trajectory planning method for robot uncalibrated visual servoing. Taking the robot-end-effector frame as one generic case, eigenvalue decomposition is utilized to calculate the infinite homography matrix of the robot-end-effector trajectory, and then the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera rotation is obtained, while the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera translation is obtained by the homography matrix. According to the additional image corresponding to the robot-end-effector rotation, the relationship between the robot-end-effector rotation and the variation of the image feature-points is obtained, and then the expression of the image trajectories corresponding to the optimal robot-end-effector trajectories (the rotation trajectory of the minimum geodesic and the linear translation trajectory) are obtained. Finally, the optimal image trajectories of the uncalibrated visual servoing controller is modified to track the image trajectories. Simulation experiments show that, compared with the classical IBUVS method, the proposed trajectory planning method can obtain the shortest path of any frame and complete the robot visual servoing task with large initial pose deviation.
summary: In view of the classical visual servoing trajectory planning method which only considers the camera trajectory, this paper proposes one homography matrix based trajectory planning method for robot uncalibrated visual servoing. Taking the robot-end-effector frame as one generic case, eigenvalue decomposition is utilized to calculate the infinite homography matrix of the robot-end-effector trajectory, and then the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera rotation is obtained, while the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera translation is obtained by the homography matrix. According to the additional image corresponding to the robot-end-effector rotation, the relationship between the robot-end-effector rotation and the variation of the image feature-points is obtained, and then the expression of the image trajectories corresponding to the optimal robot-end-effector trajectories (the rotation trajectory of the minimum geodesic and the linear translation trajectory) are obtained. Finally, the optimal image trajectories of the uncalibrated visual servoing controller is modified to track the image trajectories. Simulation experiments show that, compared with the classical IBUVS method, the proposed trajectory planning method can obtain the shortest path of any frame and complete the robot visual servoing task with large initial pose deviation.
abstract_zh: 针对经典视觉伺服轨迹规划方法仅考虑相机轨迹的问题，提出一种基于单应矩阵的机器人未标定视觉伺服轨迹规划方法。以机器人末端执行器坐标系为一般情况，利用特征值分解计算机器人末端执行器轨迹的无限单应矩阵，进而得到相机旋转对应的图像特征点轨迹，同时通过单应矩阵得到相机平移对应的图像特征点轨迹。根据机器人末端旋转对应的附加图像，得到机器人末端旋转与图像特征点变化之间的关系，进而得到机器人末端最优轨迹（最小测地线的旋转轨迹和线性平移轨迹）对应的图像轨迹表达式。最后，修改未标定视觉伺服控制器的最优图像轨迹以跟踪图像轨迹。仿真实验表明，与经典的IBUVS方法相比，所提出的轨迹规划方法能够获得任意帧的最短路径，完成初始位姿偏差较大的机器人视觉伺服任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单应性矩阵的轨迹规划方法，用于解决机器人未标定视觉伺服中的轨迹规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉伺服轨迹规划方法仅考虑相机轨迹，导致路径规划不够优化，无法有效处理大初始姿态偏差问题。
AI.method: 以机器人末端执行器坐标系为基准，利用特征值分解计算无限单应性矩阵，分离相机旋转和平移对应的图像特征点轨迹，并建立末端执行器旋转与图像特征点变化的关系，最终推导出最优轨迹的图像轨迹表达式。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，与经典IBUVS方法相比，该方法能获得任意帧的最短路径，并有效完成大初始姿态偏差下的视觉伺服任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于单应性矩阵的轨迹规划方法在未标定视觉伺服中表现出更优的路径规划能力和鲁棒性。

search_text: Homography matrix based trajectory planning method for robot uncalibrated visual servoing 基于单应矩阵的机器人未标定视觉伺服轨迹规划方法 In view of the classical visual servoing trajectory planning method which only considers the camera trajectory, this paper proposes one homography matrix based trajectory planning method for robot uncalibrated visual servoing. Taking the robot-end-effector frame as one generic case, eigenvalue decomposition is utilized to calculate the infinite homography matrix of the robot-end-effector trajectory, and then the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera rotation is obtained, while the image feature-point trajectories corresponding to the camera translation is obtained by the homography matrix. According to the additional image corresponding to the robot-end-effector rotation, the relationship between the robot-end-effector rotation and the variation of the image feature-points is obtained, and then the expression of the image trajectories corresponding to the optimal robot-end-effector trajectories (the rotation trajectory of the minimum geodesic and the linear translation trajectory) are obtained. Finally, the optimal image trajectories of the uncalibrated visual servoing controller is modified to track the image trajectories. Simulation experiments show that, compared with the classical IBUVS method, the proposed trajectory planning method can obtain the shortest path of any frame and complete the robot visual servoing task with large initial pose deviation. 针对经典视觉伺服轨迹规划方法仅考虑相机轨迹的问题，提出一种基于单应矩阵的机器人未标定视觉伺服轨迹规划方法。以机器人末端执行器坐标系为一般情况，利用特征值分解计算机器人末端执行器轨迹的无限单应矩阵，进而得到相机旋转对应的图像特征点轨迹，同时通过单应矩阵得到相机平移对应的图像特征点轨迹。根据机器人末端旋转对应的附加图像，得到机器人末端旋转与图像特征点变化之间的关系，进而得到机器人末端最优轨迹（最小测地线的旋转轨迹和线性平移轨迹）对应的图像轨迹表达式。最后，修改未标定视觉伺服控制器的最优图像轨迹以跟踪图像轨迹。仿真实验表明，与经典的IBUVS方法相比，所提出的轨迹规划方法能够获得任意帧的最短路径，完成初始位姿偏差较大的机器人视觉伺服任务。 本文提出了一种基于单应性矩阵的轨迹规划方法，用于解决机器人未标定视觉伺服中的轨迹规划问题。 Zhongtao Fu,Xiaoyu Lei,Xubing Chen,Mohamed Ibrahim Ahmed,Cong Zhang,Miao Li,Tao Huang cs.RO

authors_text: Xingyu Chen,Yu Deng,Baoyuan Wang
title: Mimic3D: Thriving 3D-Aware GANs via 3D-to-2D Imitation
title_zh: Mimic3D：通过 3D 到 2D 模仿蓬勃发展的 3D 感知 GAN
abstract: Generating images with both photorealism and multiview 3D consistency is crucial for 3D-aware GANs, yet existing methods struggle to achieve them simultaneously. Improving the photorealism via CNN-based 2D super-resolution can break the strict 3D consistency, while keeping the 3D consistency by learning high-resolution 3D representations for direct rendering often compromises image quality. In this paper, we propose a novel learning strategy, namely 3D-to-2D imitation, which enables a 3D-aware GAN to generate high-quality images while maintaining their strict 3D consistency, by letting the images synthesized by the generator's 3D rendering branch to mimic those generated by its 2D super-resolution branch. We also introduce 3D-aware convolutions into the generator for better 3D representation learning, which further improves the image generation quality. With the above strategies, our method reaches FID scores of 5.4 and 4.3 on FFHQ and AFHQ-v2 Cats, respectively, at 512x512 resolution, largely outperforming existing 3D-aware GANs using direct 3D rendering and coming very close to the previous state-of-the-art method that leverages 2D super-resolution. Project website: https://seanchenxy.github.io/Mimic3DWeb.
summary: Generating images with both photorealism and multiview 3D consistency is crucial for 3D-aware GANs, yet existing methods struggle to achieve them simultaneously. Improving the photorealism via CNN-based 2D super-resolution can break the strict 3D consistency, while keeping the 3D consistency by learning high-resolution 3D representations for direct rendering often compromises image quality. In this paper, we propose a novel learning strategy, namely 3D-to-2D imitation, which enables a 3D-aware GAN to generate high-quality images while maintaining their strict 3D consistency, by letting the images synthesized by the generator's 3D rendering branch to mimic those generated by its 2D super-resolution branch. We also introduce 3D-aware convolutions into the generator for better 3D representation learning, which further improves the image generation quality. With the above strategies, our method reaches FID scores of 5.4 and 4.3 on FFHQ and AFHQ-v2 Cats, respectively, at 512x512 resolution, largely outperforming existing 3D-aware GANs using direct 3D rendering and coming very close to the previous state-of-the-art method that leverages 2D super-resolution. Project website: https://seanchenxy.github.io/Mimic3DWeb.
abstract_zh: 生成具有真实感和多视图 3D 一致性的图像对于 3D 感知 GAN 至关重要，但现有方法很难同时实现这两个目标。通过基于 CNN 的 2D 超分辨率提高照片真实感可能会打破严格的 3D 一致性，而通过学习直接渲染的高分辨率 3D 表示来保持 3D 一致性通常会损害图像质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的学习策略，即 3D 到 2D 模仿，通过让生成器的 3D 渲染分支合成的图像模仿其 2D 超分辨率分支生成的图像，使 3D 感知 GAN 能够生成高质量图像，同时保持严格的 3D 一致性。我们还在生成器中引入了 3D 感知卷积，以实现更好的 3D 表示学习，从而进一步提高了图像生成质量。通过上述策略，我们的方法在 FFHQ 和 AFHQ-v2 Cats 上以 512x512 分辨率分别达到 5.4 和 4.3 的 FID 分数，很大程度上优于使用直接 3D 渲染的现有 3D 感知 GAN，并且非常接近之前利用 2D 超分辨率的最先进方法。项目网站：https://seanchenxy.github.io/Mimic3DWeb。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Mimic3D方法，通过3D到2D的模仿策略，使生成对抗网络（GAN）能够同时生成高保真图像并保持严格的3D一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D感知GAN方法在提升图像真实感与保持3D一致性之间存在矛盾：基于CNN的2D超分会破坏3D一致性，而直接渲染高分辨率3D表示则会牺牲图像质量。
AI.method: 提出3D到2D模仿策略，使生成器的3D渲染分支模仿其2D超分分支生成的图像；引入3D感知卷积以增强3D表示学习能力。
AI.result: 在512x512分辨率下，FFHQ和AFHQ-v2 Cats数据集的FID分数分别达到5.4和4.3，显著优于直接3D渲染方法，接近基于2D超分的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过平衡3D一致性与图像质量，有效解决了3D感知GAN的关键挑战，实现了具有竞争力的生成效果。

authors_text: Jiahong Zhang,Lihong Cao,Moning Zhang,Wenlong Fu
title: Extracting the Brain-like Representation by an Improved Self-Organizing Map for Image Classification
title_zh: 通过改进的自组织图提取类脑表示以进行图像分类
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICASSP-2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by ICASSP-2023
abstract: Backpropagation-based supervised learning has achieved great success in computer vision tasks. However, its biological plausibility is always controversial. Recently, the bio-inspired Hebbian learning rule (HLR) has received extensive attention. Self-Organizing Map (SOM) uses the competitive HLR to establish connections between neurons, obtaining visual features in an unsupervised way. Although the representation of SOM neurons shows some brain-like characteristics, it is still quite different from the neuron representation in the human visual cortex. This paper proposes an improved SOM with multi-winner, multi-code, and local receptive field, named mlSOM. We observe that the neuron representation of mlSOM is similar to the human visual cortex. Furthermore, mlSOM shows a sparse distributed representation of objects, which has also been found in the human inferior temporal area. In addition, experiments show that mlSOM achieves better classification accuracy than the original SOM and other state-of-the-art HLR-based methods. The code is accessible at https://github.com/JiaHongZ/mlSOM.
summary: Backpropagation-based supervised learning has achieved great success in computer vision tasks. However, its biological plausibility is always controversial. Recently, the bio-inspired Hebbian learning rule (HLR) has received extensive attention. Self-Organizing Map (SOM) uses the competitive HLR to establish connections between neurons, obtaining visual features in an unsupervised way. Although the representation of SOM neurons shows some brain-like characteristics, it is still quite different from the neuron representation in the human visual cortex. This paper proposes an improved SOM with multi-winner, multi-code, and local receptive field, named mlSOM. We observe that the neuron representation of mlSOM is similar to the human visual cortex. Furthermore, mlSOM shows a sparse distributed representation of objects, which has also been found in the human inferior temporal area. In addition, experiments show that mlSOM achieves better classification accuracy than the original SOM and other state-of-the-art HLR-based methods. The code is accessible at https://github.com/JiaHongZ/mlSOM.
abstract_zh: 基于反向传播的监督学习在计算机视觉任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，其生物学合理性始终存在争议。近年来，仿生赫布学习规则（HLR）受到了广泛关注。自组织映射（SOM）利用竞争性HLR建立神经元之间的连接，以无监督的方式获取视觉特征。尽管SOM神经元的表征显示出一些类似大脑的特征，但它与人类视觉皮层中的神经元表征仍然有很大不同。本文提出了一种具有多获胜者、多代码和局部感受野的改进SOM，命名为mlSOM。我们观察到 mlSOM 的神经元表示与人类视觉皮层相似。此外，mlSOM 显示了对象的稀疏分布表示，这也在人类下颞区中被发现。此外，实验表明，mlSOM 比原始 SOM 和其他最先进的基于 HLR 的方法实现了更好的分类精度。该代码可在 https://github.com/JiahongZ/mlSOM 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的自组织映射（mlSOM），通过引入多获胜者、多编码和局部感受野机制，用于图像分类任务，以提取更接近人脑视觉皮层的表示。
AI.motivation: 传统基于反向传播的监督学习虽在计算机视觉中表现优异，但生物合理性存疑；而现有SOM的神经元表示与人脑视觉皮层仍存在差异，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 设计mlSOM模型，结合多获胜者竞争机制、多编码策略及局部感受野结构，模拟人脑神经元连接方式，实现无监督特征学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，mlSOM在分类准确率上优于原始SOM及其他先进HLR方法，且其神经元表示与人脑初级视觉皮层及颞下皮层的稀疏分布式表征高度相似。
AI.conclusion: mlSOM通过生物启发机制有效提升了图像分类性能，其表示特性更贴近人脑视觉系统，为类脑计算提供了新思路。
