authors_text: Yuki Shirai,Devesh K. Jha,Arvind U. Raghunathan
title: Robust Pivoting Manipulation using Contact Implicit Bilevel Optimization
title_zh: 使用接触隐式双层优化的鲁棒旋转操纵
comment: Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Robotics. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.11412
comments: Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Robotics. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.11412
abstract: Generalizable manipulation requires that robots be able to interact with novel objects and environment. This requirement makes manipulation extremely challenging as a robot has to reason about complex frictional interactions with uncertainty in physical properties of the object and the environment. In this paper, we study robust optimization for planning of pivoting manipulation in the presence of uncertainties. We present insights about how friction can be exploited to compensate for inaccuracies in the estimates of the physical properties during manipulation. Under certain assumptions, we derive analytical expressions for stability margin provided by friction during pivoting manipulation. This margin is then used in a Contact Implicit Bilevel Optimization (CIBO) framework to optimize a trajectory that maximizes this stability margin to provide robustness against uncertainty in several physical parameters of the object. We present analysis of the stability margin with respect to several parameters involved in the underlying bilevel optimization problem. We demonstrate our proposed method using a 6 DoF manipulator for manipulating several different objects. We also design and validate an MPC controller using the proposed algorithm which can track and regulate the position of the object during manipulation.
summary: Generalizable manipulation requires that robots be able to interact with novel objects and environment. This requirement makes manipulation extremely challenging as a robot has to reason about complex frictional interactions with uncertainty in physical properties of the object and the environment. In this paper, we study robust optimization for planning of pivoting manipulation in the presence of uncertainties. We present insights about how friction can be exploited to compensate for inaccuracies in the estimates of the physical properties during manipulation. Under certain assumptions, we derive analytical expressions for stability margin provided by friction during pivoting manipulation. This margin is then used in a Contact Implicit Bilevel Optimization (CIBO) framework to optimize a trajectory that maximizes this stability margin to provide robustness against uncertainty in several physical parameters of the object. We present analysis of the stability margin with respect to several parameters involved in the underlying bilevel optimization problem. We demonstrate our proposed method using a 6 DoF manipulator for manipulating several different objects. We also design and validate an MPC controller using the proposed algorithm which can track and regulate the position of the object during manipulation.
abstract_zh: 可推广的操纵要求机器人能够与新的物体和环境进行交互。这一要求使得操作变得极具挑战性，因为机器人必须推理复杂的摩擦相互作用以及物体和环境物理特性的不确定性。在本文中，我们研究了在存在不确定性的情况下旋转操纵规划的鲁棒优化。我们提出了关于如何利用摩擦来补偿操纵过程中物理特性估计中的不准确性的见解。在某些假设下，我们推导了枢转操作期间摩擦力提供的稳定裕度的解析表达式。然后，在接触隐式双层优化 (CIBO) 框架中使用该裕度来优化轨迹，从而最大化该稳定性裕度，从而针对对象的多个物理参数的不确定性提供鲁棒性。我们对基础双层优化问题中涉及的几个参数的稳定性裕度进行了分析。我们展示了我们提出的方法，使用 6 DoF 操纵器来操纵几个不同的物体。我们还使用所提出的算法设计并验证了 MPC 控制器，该算法可以在操纵过程中跟踪和调节物体的位置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于接触隐式双层优化（CIBO）的鲁棒旋转操作方法，通过利用摩擦力补偿物理参数不确定性，提升机械臂在不确定环境下的操作稳定性。
AI.motivation: 通用操作需要机器人应对未知物体和环境的复杂摩擦交互，但物理属性不确定性导致操作鲁棒性不足，亟需优化方法提升稳定性。
AI.method: 推导摩擦力提供的稳定性边界解析表达式，并将其嵌入CIBO框架中优化轨迹；通过6自由度机械臂实验验证方法，并设计MPC控制器实现操作跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升多种物体旋转操作的鲁棒性，MPC控制器可稳定调节物体位置，验证了稳定性边界分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合摩擦力特性与双层优化框架，本文为不确定环境下的鲁棒操作提供了理论分析和有效实现方案。

authors_text: Emma Bluemke,Tantum Collins,Ben Garfinkel,Andrew Trask
title: Exploring the Relevance of Data Privacy-Enhancing Technologies for AI Governance Use Cases
title_zh: 探索数据隐私增强技术与人工智能治理用例的相关性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.08347
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.08347
abstract: The development of privacy-enhancing technologies has made immense progress in reducing trade-offs between privacy and performance in data exchange and analysis. Similar tools for structured transparency could be useful for AI governance by offering capabilities such as external scrutiny, auditing, and source verification. It is useful to view these different AI governance objectives as a system of information flows in order to avoid partial solutions and significant gaps in governance, as there may be significant overlap in the software stacks needed for the AI governance use cases mentioned in this text. When viewing the system as a whole, the importance of interoperability between these different AI governance solutions becomes clear. Therefore, it is imminently important to look at these problems in AI governance as a system, before these standards, auditing procedures, software, and norms settle into place.
summary: The development of privacy-enhancing technologies has made immense progress in reducing trade-offs between privacy and performance in data exchange and analysis. Similar tools for structured transparency could be useful for AI governance by offering capabilities such as external scrutiny, auditing, and source verification. It is useful to view these different AI governance objectives as a system of information flows in order to avoid partial solutions and significant gaps in governance, as there may be significant overlap in the software stacks needed for the AI governance use cases mentioned in this text. When viewing the system as a whole, the importance of interoperability between these different AI governance solutions becomes clear. Therefore, it is imminently important to look at these problems in AI governance as a system, before these standards, auditing procedures, software, and norms settle into place.
abstract_zh: 隐私增强技术的发展在减少隐私与数据交换和分析性能之间的权衡方面取得了巨大进步。类似的结构化透明度工具可以通过提供外部审查、审计和来源验证等功能，对人工智能治理有用。将这些不同的人工智能治理目标视为一个信息流系统是有用的，以避免部分解决方案和治理方面的重大差距，因为本文提到的人工智能治理用例所需的软件堆栈可能存在显着重叠。当将系统视为一个整体时，这些不同的人工智能治理解决方案之间的互操作性的重要性就变得显而易见。因此，在这些标准、审计程序、软件和规范落实到位之前，将人工智能治理中的这些问题作为一个系统来看待是迫在眉睫的。

AI.tldr: 探讨隐私增强技术（PETs）在AI治理中的应用潜力，并强调从系统视角整合AI治理解决方案的必要性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理工具存在碎片化问题，需通过结构化透明度工具（如审计、验证）弥补治理缺口，同时解决技术栈重叠带来的互操作性挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析数据隐私技术与AI治理需求的关联性，构建信息流系统模型，识别技术栈重叠与标准化需求。
AI.result: 明确PETs在AI治理中的关键作用，提出需以系统视角统筹治理方案，强化跨工具互操作性与标准化进程。
AI.conclusion: 应在治理标准固化前，优先建立跨AI治理工具的系统性协同框架，以实现技术与规范的兼容性发展。

motivation: 现有AI治理工具存在碎片化问题，需通过结构化透明度工具（如审计、验证）弥补治理缺口，同时解决技术栈重叠带来的互操作性挑战。
method: 通过分析数据隐私技术与AI治理需求的关联性，构建信息流系统模型，识别技术栈重叠与标准化需求。
result: 明确PETs在AI治理中的关键作用，提出需以系统视角统筹治理方案，强化跨工具互操作性与标准化进程。
conclusion: 应在治理标准固化前，优先建立跨AI治理工具的系统性协同框架，以实现技术与规范的兼容性发展。
search_text: Exploring the Relevance of Data Privacy-Enhancing Technologies for AI Governance Use Cases 探索数据隐私增强技术与人工智能治理用例的相关性 The development of privacy-enhancing technologies has made immense progress in reducing trade-offs between privacy and performance in data exchange and analysis. Similar tools for structured transparency could be useful for AI governance by offering capabilities such as external scrutiny, auditing, and source verification. It is useful to view these different AI governance objectives as a system of information flows in order to avoid partial solutions and significant gaps in governance, as there may be significant overlap in the software stacks needed for the AI governance use cases mentioned in this text. When viewing the system as a whole, the importance of interoperability between these different AI governance solutions becomes clear. Therefore, it is imminently important to look at these problems in AI governance as a system, before these standards, auditing procedures, software, and norms settle into place. 隐私增强技术的发展在减少隐私与数据交换和分析性能之间的权衡方面取得了巨大进步。类似的结构化透明度工具可以通过提供外部审查、审计和来源验证等功能，对人工智能治理有用。将这些不同的人工智能治理目标视为一个信息流系统是有用的，以避免部分解决方案和治理方面的重大差距，因为本文提到的人工智能治理用例所需的软件堆栈可能存在显着重叠。当将系统视为一个整体时，这些不同的人工智能治理解决方案之间的互操作性的重要性就变得显而易见。因此，在这些标准、审计程序、软件和规范落实到位之前，将人工智能治理中的这些问题作为一个系统来看待是迫在眉睫的。 探讨隐私增强技术（PETs）在AI治理中的应用潜力，并强调从系统视角整合AI治理解决方案的必要性。 Emma Bluemke,Tantum Collins,Ben Garfinkel,Andrew Trask cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Milad Azizkhani,Anthony L. Gunderman,Alex S. Qiu,Ai-Ping Hu,Xin Zhang,Yue Chen
title: Design, Modeling, and Redundancy Resolution of Soft Robot for Effective Harvesting
title_zh: 用于有效收获的软体机器人的设计、建模和冗余解决方案
abstract: Blackberry harvesting is a labor-intensive and costly process, consuming up to 50\% of the total annual crop hours. This paper presents a solution for robotic harvesting through the design, manufacturing, integration, and control of a pneumatically actuated, kinematically redundant soft arm with a tendon-driven soft robotic gripper. The hardware design is optimized for durability and modularity for practical use. The harvesting process is divided into four stages: initial placement, fine positioning, grasp, and move back to home position. For initial placement, we propose a real-time, continuous gain-scheduled redundancy resolution algorithm for simultaneous position and orientation control with joint-limit avoidance. The algorithm relies solely on visual feedback from an eye-to-hand camera and achieved a position and orientation tracking error of $0.64\pm{0.27}$ mm and $1.08\pm{1.5}^{\circ}$, respectively, in benchtop settings. Following accurate initial placement of the robotic arm, fine positioning is achieved using a combination of eye-in-hand and eye-to-hand visual feedback, reaching an accuracy of $0.75\pm{0.36}$ mm. The system's hardware, feedback framework, and control methods are thoroughly validated through benchtop and field tests, confirming feasibility for practical applications.
summary: Blackberry harvesting is a labor-intensive and costly process, consuming up to 50\% of the total annual crop hours. This paper presents a solution for robotic harvesting through the design, manufacturing, integration, and control of a pneumatically actuated, kinematically redundant soft arm with a tendon-driven soft robotic gripper. The hardware design is optimized for durability and modularity for practical use. The harvesting process is divided into four stages: initial placement, fine positioning, grasp, and move back to home position. For initial placement, we propose a real-time, continuous gain-scheduled redundancy resolution algorithm for simultaneous position and orientation control with joint-limit avoidance. The algorithm relies solely on visual feedback from an eye-to-hand camera and achieved a position and orientation tracking error of $0.64\pm{0.27}$ mm and $1.08\pm{1.5}^{\circ}$, respectively, in benchtop settings. Following accurate initial placement of the robotic arm, fine positioning is achieved using a combination of eye-in-hand and eye-to-hand visual feedback, reaching an accuracy of $0.75\pm{0.36}$ mm. The system's hardware, feedback framework, and control methods are thoroughly validated through benchtop and field tests, confirming feasibility for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 黑莓采摘是一个劳动密集型且成本高昂的过程，消耗高达每年总采收时间的 50%。本文提出了一种机器人收割解决方案，通过设计、制造、集成和控制气动、运动冗余软臂和肌腱驱动的软机器人抓手。硬件设计针对实际使用的耐用性和模块化进行了优化。收获过程分为四个阶段：初始放置、精定位、抓取、回原位。对于初始放置，我们提出了一种实时、连续增益调度的冗余分辨率算法，用于同时避免联合限制的位置和方向控制。该算法仅依赖于眼对手相机的视觉反馈，在台式设置中分别实现了 $0.64\pm{0.27}$ mm 和 $1.08\pm{1.5}^{\circ}$ 的位置和方向跟踪误差。机械臂初始准确放置后，结合手眼和眼对手视觉反馈实现精细定位，精度达到 $0.75\pm{0.36}$ mm。该系统的硬件、反馈框架和控制方法通过台式和现场测试进行了彻底验证，确认了实际应用的可行性。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一种用于黑莓采摘的软体机器人，解决采摘过程中的劳动力密集和高成本问题。
AI.motivation: 黑莓采摘过程耗费大量人力且成本高昂，占全年作物工时的50%，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 开发带有腱驱动软夹爪的气动软体机械臂，结合实时视觉反馈与增益调度冗余分辨率算法，分四阶段完成采摘任务。
AI.result: 实验室测试显示定位误差为0.64±0.27mm，姿态误差1.08±1.5°；精细定位精度达0.75±0.36mm，系统通过台架与田间测试验证可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该软体机器人系统在硬件设计、控制算法及反馈框架上均验证了实际应用的可行性。

authors_text: Saba Ahmadi,Avrim Blum,Omar Montasser,Kevin Stangl
title: Agnostic Multi-Robust Learning Using ERM
title_zh: 使用 ERM 的不可知多重鲁棒学习
abstract: A fundamental problem in robust learning is asymmetry: a learner needs to correctly classify every one of exponentially-many perturbations that an adversary might make to a test-time natural example. In contrast, the attacker only needs to find one successful perturbation. Xiang et al.[2022] proposed an algorithm that in the context of patch attacks for image classification, reduces the effective number of perturbations from an exponential to a polynomial number of perturbations and learns using an ERM oracle. However, to achieve its guarantee, their algorithm requires the natural examples to be robustly realizable. This prompts the natural question; can we extend their approach to the non-robustly-realizable case where there is no classifier with zero robust error? Our first contribution is to answer this question affirmatively by reducing this problem to a setting in which an algorithm proposed by Feige et al.[2015] can be applied, and in the process extend their guarantees. Next, we extend our results to a multi-group setting and introduce a novel agnostic multi-robust learning problem where the goal is to learn a predictor that achieves low robust loss on a (potentially) rich collection of subgroups.
summary: A fundamental problem in robust learning is asymmetry: a learner needs to correctly classify every one of exponentially-many perturbations that an adversary might make to a test-time natural example. In contrast, the attacker only needs to find one successful perturbation. Xiang et al.[2022] proposed an algorithm that in the context of patch attacks for image classification, reduces the effective number of perturbations from an exponential to a polynomial number of perturbations and learns using an ERM oracle. However, to achieve its guarantee, their algorithm requires the natural examples to be robustly realizable. This prompts the natural question; can we extend their approach to the non-robustly-realizable case where there is no classifier with zero robust error? Our first contribution is to answer this question affirmatively by reducing this problem to a setting in which an algorithm proposed by Feige et al.[2015] can be applied, and in the process extend their guarantees. Next, we extend our results to a multi-group setting and introduce a novel agnostic multi-robust learning problem where the goal is to learn a predictor that achieves low robust loss on a (potentially) rich collection of subgroups.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒学习中的一个基本问题是不对称性：学习者需要正确分类对手可能对测试时自然示例造成的指数级扰动中的每一个。相反，攻击者只需要找到一个成功的扰动。向等人[2022]提出了一种算法，在图像分类的补丁攻击的背景下，将有效扰动数从指数数减少到多项式扰动数，并使用 ERM 预言机进行学习。然而，为了实现其保证，他们的算法需要自然示例能够稳健地实现。这就提出了一个自然的问题：我们能否将他们的方法扩展到不存在鲁棒误差为零的分类器的非鲁棒可实现的情况？我们的第一个贡献是通过将这个问题简化为由 Feige 等人[2015]提出的算法的设置来肯定地回答这个问题。可以应用，并在此过程中延长其保证。接下来，我们将结果扩展到多组设置，并引入一种新颖的不可知多鲁棒学习问题，其目标是学习一个在（可能）丰富的子组集合上实现低鲁棒损失的预测器。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在非鲁棒可实现情况下扩展多鲁棒学习方法，通过引入ERM（经验风险最小化）解决对抗性攻击中的不对称性问题，并扩展到多群体场景。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒学习方法要求自然样本必须鲁棒可实现，但实际中可能存在无零鲁棒误差的分类器。需解决非鲁棒可实现场景下的多群体鲁棒学习问题。
AI.method: 将问题转化为Feige等人（2015）可处理的设置，利用ERM oracle并扩展其保证；进一步引入多群体场景下的无先验假设的多鲁棒学习框架。
AI.result: 成功扩展算法至非鲁棒可实现场景，提供多群体设置下的鲁棒损失保证，并提出新的无先验多鲁棒学习问题定义。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过算法改进和问题扩展，填补了鲁棒与非鲁棒学习之间的空白，为多群体场景下的鲁棒学习提供了理论支持。

Next, we extend our results to a multi-group setting and introduce a novel agnostic multi-robust learning problem where the goal is to learn a predictor that achieves low robust loss on a (potentially) rich collection of subgroups. 鲁棒学习中的一个基本问题是不对称性：学习者需要正确分类对手可能对测试时自然示例造成的指数级扰动中的每一个。相反，攻击者只需要找到一个成功的扰动。向等人[2022]提出了一种算法，在图像分类的补丁攻击的背景下，将有效扰动数从指数数减少到多项式扰动数，并使用 ERM 预言机进行学习。然而，为了实现其保证，他们的算法需要自然示例能够稳健地实现。这就提出了一个自然的问题：我们能否将他们的方法扩展到不存在鲁棒误差为零的分类器的非鲁棒可实现的情况？我们的第一个贡献是通过将这个问题简化为由 Feige 等人[2015]提出的算法的设置来肯定地回答这个问题。可以应用，并在此过程中延长其保证。接下来，我们将结果扩展到多组设置，并引入一种新颖的不可知多鲁棒学习问题，其目标是学习一个在（可能）丰富的子组集合上实现低鲁棒损失的预测器。 本文研究在非鲁棒可实现情况下扩展多鲁棒学习方法，通过引入ERM（经验风险最小化）解决对抗性攻击中的不对称性问题，并扩展到多群体场景。 Saba Ahmadi,Avrim Blum,Omar Montasser,Kevin Stangl cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Zixiang Zhao,Jiangshe Zhang,Xiang Gu,Chengli Tan,Shuang Xu,Yulun Zhang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Spherical Space Feature Decomposition for Guided Depth Map Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于引导深度图超分辨率的球面空间特征分解
abstract: Guided depth map super-resolution (GDSR), as a hot topic in multi-modal image processing, aims to upsample low-resolution (LR) depth maps with additional information involved in high-resolution (HR) RGB images from the same scene. The critical step of this task is to effectively extract domain-shared and domain-private RGB/depth features. In addition, three detailed issues, namely blurry edges, noisy surfaces, and over-transferred RGB texture, need to be addressed. In this paper, we propose the Spherical Space feature Decomposition Network (SSDNet) to solve the above issues. To better model cross-modality features, Restormer block-based RGB/depth encoders are employed for extracting local-global features. Then, the extracted features are mapped to the spherical space to complete the separation of private features and the alignment of shared features. Shared features of RGB are fused with the depth features to complete the GDSR task. Subsequently, a spherical contrast refinement (SCR) module is proposed to further address the detail issues. Patches that are classified according to imperfect categories are input into the SCR module, where the patch features are pulled closer to the ground truth and pushed away from the corresponding imperfect samples in the spherical feature space via contrastive learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art results on four test datasets, as well as successfully generalize to real-world scenes. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zhaozixiang1228/GDSR-SSDNet}.
summary: Guided depth map super-resolution (GDSR), as a hot topic in multi-modal image processing, aims to upsample low-resolution (LR) depth maps with additional information involved in high-resolution (HR) RGB images from the same scene. The critical step of this task is to effectively extract domain-shared and domain-private RGB/depth features. In addition, three detailed issues, namely blurry edges, noisy surfaces, and over-transferred RGB texture, need to be addressed. In this paper, we propose the Spherical Space feature Decomposition Network (SSDNet) to solve the above issues. To better model cross-modality features, Restormer block-based RGB/depth encoders are employed for extracting local-global features. Then, the extracted features are mapped to the spherical space to complete the separation of private features and the alignment of shared features. Shared features of RGB are fused with the depth features to complete the GDSR task. Subsequently, a spherical contrast refinement (SCR) module is proposed to further address the detail issues. Patches that are classified according to imperfect categories are input into the SCR module, where the patch features are pulled closer to the ground truth and pushed away from the corresponding imperfect samples in the spherical feature space via contrastive learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve state-of-the-art results on four test datasets, as well as successfully generalize to real-world scenes. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zhaozixiang1228/GDSR-SSDNet}.
abstract_zh: 引导深度图超分辨率 (GDSR) 是多模态图像处理中的热门话题，旨在利用来自同一场景的高分辨率 (HR) RGB 图像中涉及的附加信息对低分辨率 (LR) 深度图进行上采样。该任务的关键步骤是有效提取域共享和域私有的 RGB/深度特征。此外，还需要解决三个细节问题，即模糊边缘、噪声表面和过度传输的 RGB 纹理。在本文中，我们提出了球形空间特征分解网络（SSDNet）来解决上述问题。为了更好地建模跨模态特征，采用基于 Restormer 块的 RGB/深度编码器来提取局部全局特征。然后，将提取的特征映射到球面空间，完成私有特征的分离和共享特征的对齐。 RGB 的共享特征与深度特征融合，完成 GDSR 任务。随后，提出了球面对比度细化（SCR）模块来进一步解决细节问题。根据不完美类别分类的补丁被输入到 SCR 模块，其中补丁特征通过对比学习被拉近地面实况，并远离球形特征空间中相应的不完美样本。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以在四个测试数据集上取得最先进的结果，并成功推广到现实世界的场景。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Zhaozixiang1228/GDSR-SSDNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSDNet网络，通过球面空间特征分解解决引导深度图超分辨率中的模糊边缘、噪声表面和过度转移纹理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨模态特征融合时难以有效分离RGB/深度图的私有特征与共享特征，导致边缘模糊、噪声残留和纹理失真等问题。
AI.method: 采用Restormer块提取RGB/深度图局部-全局特征，通过球面空间映射实现私有特征分离与共享特征对齐，结合球面对比细化模块（SCR）进行细节优化。
AI.result: 在四个测试数据集上达到SOTA性能，并成功泛化到真实场景，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 球面空间特征分解有效提升了跨模态特征对齐精度，为引导深度图超分辨率提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yankai Zeng,Abhiramon Rajasekharan,Parth Padalkar,Kinjal Basu,Joaquín Arias,Gopal Gupta
title: Automated Interactive Domain-Specific Conversational Agents that Understand Human Dialogs
title_zh: 理解人类对话的自动交互式特定领域对话代理
abstract: Achieving human-like communication with machines remains a classic, challenging topic in the field of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning and Natural Language Processing. These Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on pattern-matching rather than a true understanding of the semantic meaning of a sentence. As a result, they may generate incorrect responses. To generate an assuredly correct response, one has to "understand" the semantics of a sentence. To achieve this "understanding", logic-based (commonsense) reasoning methods such as Answer Set Programming (ASP) are arguably needed. In this paper, we describe the AutoConcierge system that leverages LLMs and ASP to develop a conversational agent that can truly "understand" human dialogs in restricted domains. AutoConcierge is focused on a specific domain-advising users about restaurants in their local area based on their preferences. AutoConcierge will interactively understand a user's utterances, identify the missing information in them, and request the user via a natural language sentence to provide it. Once AutoConcierge has determined that all the information has been received, it computes a restaurant recommendation based on the user-preferences it has acquired from the human user. AutoConcierge is based on our STAR framework developed earlier, which uses GPT-3 to convert human dialogs into predicates that capture the deep structure of the dialog's sentence. These predicates are then input into the goal-directed s(CASP) ASP system for performing commonsense reasoning. To the best of our knowledge, AutoConcierge is the first automated conversational agent that can realistically converse like a human and provide help to humans based on truly understanding human utterances.
summary: Achieving human-like communication with machines remains a classic, challenging topic in the field of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning and Natural Language Processing. These Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on pattern-matching rather than a true understanding of the semantic meaning of a sentence. As a result, they may generate incorrect responses. To generate an assuredly correct response, one has to "understand" the semantics of a sentence. To achieve this "understanding", logic-based (commonsense) reasoning methods such as Answer Set Programming (ASP) are arguably needed. In this paper, we describe the AutoConcierge system that leverages LLMs and ASP to develop a conversational agent that can truly "understand" human dialogs in restricted domains. AutoConcierge is focused on a specific domain-advising users about restaurants in their local area based on their preferences. AutoConcierge will interactively understand a user's utterances, identify the missing information in them, and request the user via a natural language sentence to provide it. Once AutoConcierge has determined that all the information has been received, it computes a restaurant recommendation based on the user-preferences it has acquired from the human user. AutoConcierge is based on our STAR framework developed earlier, which uses GPT-3 to convert human dialogs into predicates that capture the deep structure of the dialog's sentence. These predicates are then input into the goal-directed s(CASP) ASP system for performing commonsense reasoning. To the best of our knowledge, AutoConcierge is the first automated conversational agent that can realistically converse like a human and provide help to humans based on truly understanding human utterances.
abstract_zh: 实现与机器的类人通信仍然是知识表示和推理以及自然语言处理领域的一个经典且具有挑战性的主题。这些大型语言模型 (LLM) 依赖于模式匹配，而不是对句子语义的真正理解。因此，他们可能会生成不正确的响应。为了产生确实正确的响应，人们必须“理解”句子的语义。为了实现这种“理解”，可以说需要基于逻辑（常识）的推理方法，例如答案集编程（ASP）。在本文中，我们描述了 AutoConcierge 系统，该系统利用法学硕士和 ASP 来开发一个对话代理，该代理可以真正“理解”受限领域中的人类对话。 AutoConcierge 专注于特定领域，根据用户的喜好向用户提供有关当地餐厅的建议。 AutoConcierge 将以交互方式理解用户的话语，识别其中缺失的信息，并通过自然语言句子请求用户提供该信息。一旦 AutoConcierge 确定已收到所有信息，它就会根据从人类用户那里获取的用户偏好来计算餐厅推荐。 AutoConcierge 基于我们之前开发的 STAR 框架，该框架使用 GPT-3 将人类对话转换为捕获对话句子深层结构的谓词。然后将这些谓词输入到目标导向 s(CASP) ASP 系统中以执行常识推理。据我们所知，AutoConcierge 是第一个自动对话代理，它可以像人类一样真实地交谈，并在真正理解人类话语的基础上为人类提供帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）和答案集编程（ASP）的对话代理系统AutoConcierge，旨在实现特定领域内对人类对话的真正理解与交互。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM依赖模式匹配而非语义理解，导致响应可能错误。为生成准确响应，需通过逻辑推理（如ASP）实现对语义的真正理解。
AI.method: 基于STAR框架，利用GPT-3将对话转化为语义谓词，再通过s(CASP) ASP系统进行常识推理，实现交互式信息补全与餐厅推荐。
AI.result: AutoConcierge成为首个能通过真正语义理解进行自然对话并提供准确推荐的自动化代理系统。
AI.conclusion: 结合LLM与逻辑推理方法可显著提升对话代理对人类语义的理解与推理能力，为领域特定应用提供新范式。

To the best of our knowledge, AutoConcierge is the first automated conversational agent that can realistically converse like a human and provide help to humans based on truly understanding human utterances. 实现与机器的类人通信仍然是知识表示和推理以及自然语言处理领域的一个经典且具有挑战性的主题。这些大型语言模型 (LLM) 依赖于模式匹配，而不是对句子语义的真正理解。因此，他们可能会生成不正确的响应。为了产生确实正确的响应，人们必须“理解”句子的语义。为了实现这种“理解”，可以说需要基于逻辑（常识）的推理方法，例如答案集编程（ASP）。在本文中，我们描述了 AutoConcierge 系统，该系统利用法学硕士和 ASP 来开发一个对话代理，该代理可以真正“理解”受限领域中的人类对话。 AutoConcierge 专注于特定领域，根据用户的喜好向用户提供有关当地餐厅的建议。 AutoConcierge 将以交互方式理解用户的话语，识别其中缺失的信息，并通过自然语言句子请求用户提供该信息。一旦 AutoConcierge 确定已收到所有信息，它就会根据从人类用户那里获取的用户偏好来计算餐厅推荐。 AutoConcierge 基于我们之前开发的 STAR 框架，该框架使用 GPT-3 将人类对话转换为捕获对话句子深层结构的谓词。然后将这些谓词输入到目标导向 s(CASP) ASP 系统中以执行常识推理。据我们所知，AutoConcierge 是第一个自动对话代理，它可以像人类一样真实地交谈，并在真正理解人类话语的基础上为人类提供帮助。 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）和答案集编程（ASP）的对话代理系统AutoConcierge，旨在实现特定领域内对人类对话的真正理解与交互。 Yankai Zeng,Abhiramon Rajasekharan,Parth Padalkar,Kinjal Basu,Joaquín Arias,Gopal Gupta cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Maarten Löffler,Tim Ophelders,Frank Staals,Rodrigo I. Silveira
title: Shortest Paths in Portalgons
title_zh: Portalgon 中的最短路径
comment: 34 pages. Full version of a paper to appear in a shorter form in the 39th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2023)
comments: 34 pages. Full version of a paper to appear in a shorter form in the 39th International Symposium on Computational Geometry (SoCG 2023)
abstract: Any surface that is intrinsically polyhedral can be represented by a collection of simple polygons (fragments), glued along pairs of equally long oriented edges, where each fragment is endowed with the geodesic metric arising from its Euclidean metric. We refer to such a representation as a portalgon, and we call two portalgons equivalent if the surfaces they represent are isometric. We analyze the complexity of shortest paths in portalgons. We call a fragment happy if any shortest path on the portalgon visits it at most a constant number of times. A portalgon is happy if all of its fragments are happy. We present an efficient algorithm to compute shortest paths on happy portalgons. The number of times that a shortest path visits a fragment is unbounded in general. We contrast this by showing that the intrinsic Delaunay triangulation of any polyhedral surface corresponds to a happy portalgon. Since computing the intrinsic Delaunay triangulation may be inefficient, we provide an efficient algorithm to compute happy portalgons for a restricted class of portalgons.
summary: Any surface that is intrinsically polyhedral can be represented by a collection of simple polygons (fragments), glued along pairs of equally long oriented edges, where each fragment is endowed with the geodesic metric arising from its Euclidean metric. We refer to such a representation as a portalgon, and we call two portalgons equivalent if the surfaces they represent are isometric. We analyze the complexity of shortest paths in portalgons. We call a fragment happy if any shortest path on the portalgon visits it at most a constant number of times. A portalgon is happy if all of its fragments are happy. We present an efficient algorithm to compute shortest paths on happy portalgons. The number of times that a shortest path visits a fragment is unbounded in general. We contrast this by showing that the intrinsic Delaunay triangulation of any polyhedral surface corresponds to a happy portalgon. Since computing the intrinsic Delaunay triangulation may be inefficient, we provide an efficient algorithm to compute happy portalgons for a restricted class of portalgons.
abstract_zh: 任何本质上是多面体的表面都可以用一组简单的多边形（片段）来表示，这些多边形沿着成对的等长定向边粘合，其中每个片段都被赋予了源自其欧几里德度量的测地度量。我们将这种表示称为门户边形，并且如果两个门户边形所表示的表面是等距的，我们将其称为等效的。我们分析门户中最短路径的复杂性。如果门户网站上的任何最短路径最多访问一个片段恒定的次数，我们称该片段是快乐的。如果一个传送门的所有碎片都快乐，那么它就是快乐的。我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算快乐门户上的最短路径。最短路径访问片段的次数一般来说是无限的。我们通过证明任何多面体表面的内在 Delaunay 三角剖分都对应于快乐的入口边来对此进行对比。由于计算内在的 Delaunay 三角剖分可能效率低下，因此我们提供了一种有效的算法来计算受限类别门户的快乐门户。

AI.tldr: 研究portalgon结构中计算最短路径的复杂性，并提出针对特定结构的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 解决一般portalgon中最短路径可能无限次穿越片段的效率问题，通过结构优化实现计算复杂度控制。
AI.method: 基于内在Delaunay三角剖分构建happy portalgon结构，并设计针对该结构的高效路径计算算法。
AI.result: 证明内在Delaunay三角剖分对应happy portalgon，且提出受限类别的portalgon高效算法实现。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构转化可将复杂路径问题简化，但通用场景仍需进一步算法优化。

authors_text: Ahmad Bilal Asghar,Shreyas Sundaram,Stephen L. Smith
title: Multi-Robot Persistent Monitoring: Minimizing Latency and Number of Robots with Recharging Constraints
title_zh: 多机器人持续监控：最大限度地减少延迟和具有充电限制的机器人数量
comment: 13 pages, 10 fiugres. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1903.06105
comments: 13 pages, 10 fiugres. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1903.06105
abstract: In this paper we study multi-robot path planning for persistent monitoring tasks. We consider the case where robots have a limited battery capacity with a discharge time $D$. We represent the areas to be monitored as the vertices of a weighted graph. For each vertex, there is a constraint on the maximum allowable time between robot visits, called the latency. The objective is to find the minimum number of robots that can satisfy these latency constraints while also ensuring that the robots periodically charge at a recharging depot. The decision version of this problem is known to be PSPACE-complete. We present a $O(\frac{\log D}{\log \log D}\log ρ)$ approximation algorithm for the problem where $ρ$ is the ratio of the maximum and the minimum latency constraints. We also present an orienteering based heuristic to solve the problem and show empirically that it typically provides higher quality solutions than the approximation algorithm. We extend our results to provide an algorithm for the problem of minimizing the maximum weighted latency given a fixed number of robots. We evaluate our algorithms on large problem instances in a patrolling scenario and in a wildfire monitoring application. We also compare the algorithms with an existing solver on benchmark instances.
summary: In this paper we study multi-robot path planning for persistent monitoring tasks. We consider the case where robots have a limited battery capacity with a discharge time $D$. We represent the areas to be monitored as the vertices of a weighted graph. For each vertex, there is a constraint on the maximum allowable time between robot visits, called the latency. The objective is to find the minimum number of robots that can satisfy these latency constraints while also ensuring that the robots periodically charge at a recharging depot. The decision version of this problem is known to be PSPACE-complete. We present a $O(\frac{\log D}{\log \log D}\log ρ)$ approximation algorithm for the problem where $ρ$ is the ratio of the maximum and the minimum latency constraints. We also present an orienteering based heuristic to solve the problem and show empirically that it typically provides higher quality solutions than the approximation algorithm. We extend our results to provide an algorithm for the problem of minimizing the maximum weighted latency given a fixed number of robots. We evaluate our algorithms on large problem instances in a patrolling scenario and in a wildfire monitoring application. We also compare the algorithms with an existing solver on benchmark instances.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了用于持续监控任务的多机器人路径规划。我们考虑机器人电池容量有限且放电时间为 $D$ 的情况。我们将要监控的区域表示为加权图的顶点。对于每个顶点，机器人访问之间的最大允许时间存在限制，称为延迟。目标是找到能够满足这些延迟限制的最小机器人数量，同时确保机器人定期在充电站充电。该问题的决策版本已知是 PSPACE 完整的。我们针对该问题提出了一个 $O(\frac{\log D}{\log \log D}\log ρ)$ 近似算法，其中 $ρ$ 是最大和最小延迟约束的比率。我们还提出了一种基于定向运动的启发式方法来解决该问题，并根据经验表明它通常比近似算法提供更高质量的解决方案。我们扩展了我们的结果，为在给定固定数量的机器人的情况下最小化最大加权延迟的问题提供了一种算法。我们在巡逻场景和野火监控应用程序中的大型问题实例上评估我们的算法。我们还在基准实例上将算法与现有求解器进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多机器人持续监控任务中的路径规划问题，旨在最小化所需机器人数量并满足延迟约束，同时考虑电池续航和充电限制。
AI.motivation: 在需要长时间监控的场景中，机器人电池容量有限且需定期充电，如何高效分配机器人以满足监控延迟要求是关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种基于图论的近似算法（复杂度为$O(\ rac{\\log D}{\\log \\log D}\\log ρ)$）和启发式方法（基于定向越野问题），并扩展算法以最小化固定机器人数量下的最大加权延迟。
AI.result: 实验表明，启发式方法在实际场景（如巡逻和野火监测）中优于近似算法，且算法在大规模实例上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效平衡了机器人数量、延迟约束和充电需求，为实际持续监控任务提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Steve Paul,Wenyuan Li,Brian Smyth,Yuzhou Chen,Yulia Gel,Souma Chowdhury
title: Efficient Planning of Multi-Robot Collective Transport using Graph Reinforcement Learning with Higher Order Topological Abstraction
title_zh: 使用高阶拓扑抽象的图强化学习有效规划多机器人集体运输
comment: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, 2023
abstract: Efficient multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) is fundamental to various time-sensitive applications such as disaster response, warehouse operations, and construction. This paper tackles a particular class of these problems that we call MRTA-collective transport or MRTA-CT -- here tasks present varying workloads and deadlines, and robots are subject to flight range, communication range, and payload constraints. For large instances of these problems involving 100s-1000's of tasks and 10s-100s of robots, traditional non-learning solvers are often time-inefficient, and emerging learning-based policies do not scale well to larger-sized problems without costly retraining. To address this gap, we use a recently proposed encoder-decoder graph neural network involving Capsule networks and multi-head attention mechanism, and innovatively add topological descriptors (TD) as new features to improve transferability to unseen problems of similar and larger size. Persistent homology is used to derive the TD, and proximal policy optimization is used to train our TD-augmented graph neural network. The resulting policy model compares favorably to state-of-the-art non-learning baselines while being much faster. The benefit of using TD is readily evident when scaling to test problems of size larger than those used in training.
summary: Efficient multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) is fundamental to various time-sensitive applications such as disaster response, warehouse operations, and construction. This paper tackles a particular class of these problems that we call MRTA-collective transport or MRTA-CT -- here tasks present varying workloads and deadlines, and robots are subject to flight range, communication range, and payload constraints. For large instances of these problems involving 100s-1000's of tasks and 10s-100s of robots, traditional non-learning solvers are often time-inefficient, and emerging learning-based policies do not scale well to larger-sized problems without costly retraining. To address this gap, we use a recently proposed encoder-decoder graph neural network involving Capsule networks and multi-head attention mechanism, and innovatively add topological descriptors (TD) as new features to improve transferability to unseen problems of similar and larger size. Persistent homology is used to derive the TD, and proximal policy optimization is used to train our TD-augmented graph neural network. The resulting policy model compares favorably to state-of-the-art non-learning baselines while being much faster. The benefit of using TD is readily evident when scaling to test problems of size larger than those used in training.
abstract_zh: 高效的多机器人任务分配 (MRTA) 是灾难响应、仓库运营和建筑等各种时间敏感型应用的基础。本文解决了此类问题中的一类特殊问题，我们将其称为 MRTA 集体运输或 MRTA-CT——这里的任务呈现出不同的工作负载和截止日期，并且机器人受到飞行范围、通信范围和有效负载的限制。对于涉及 100-1000 个任务和 10-100 个机器人的这些问题的大型实例，传统的非学习求解器通常时间效率低下，并且新兴的基于学习的策略在不进行昂贵的再培训的情况下无法很好地扩展到更大规模的问题。为了解决这一差距，我们使用最近提出的编码器-解码器图神经网络，涉及胶囊网络和多头注意机制，并创新地添加拓扑描述符（TD）作为新特征，以提高对类似和更大尺寸的未见过问题的可迁移性。持久同源性用于推导 TD，近端策略优化用于训练我们的 TD 增强图神经网络。由此产生的政策模型与最先进的非学习基线相比毫不逊色，同时速度更快。当扩展到测试问题的规模大于训练中使用的问题时，使用 TD 的好处是显而易见的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图强化学习和高阶拓扑抽象的多机器人协同运输规划方法，解决大规模任务分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统非学习求解器在处理大规模多机器人任务分配问题时效率低下，现有学习方法难以扩展到更大规模问题且需耗费高昂重训练成本。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器图神经网络结合胶囊网络与多头注意力机制，创新性引入通过持续同调计算的拓扑描述子（TD）作为新特征，并使用近端策略优化算法进行训练。
AI.result: 所提策略模型在保持较高任务分配质量的同时显著优于现有非学习基线方法，且在未见过的更大规模问题上表现出优异的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑描述子的引入有效提升了模型对大规模多机器人协同运输问题的泛化能力，为复杂场景下的高效任务分配提供了新思路。

search_text: Efficient Planning of Multi-Robot Collective Transport using Graph Reinforcement Learning with Higher Order Topological Abstraction 使用高阶拓扑抽象的图强化学习有效规划多机器人集体运输 Efficient multi-robot task allocation (MRTA) is fundamental to various time-sensitive applications such as disaster response, warehouse operations, and construction. This paper tackles a particular class of these problems that we call MRTA-collective transport or MRTA-CT -- here tasks present varying workloads and deadlines, and robots are subject to flight range, communication range, and payload constraints. For large instances of these problems involving 100s-1000's of tasks and 10s-100s of robots, traditional non-learning solvers are often time-inefficient, and emerging learning-based policies do not scale well to larger-sized problems without costly retraining. To address this gap, we use a recently proposed encoder-decoder graph neural network involving Capsule networks and multi-head attention mechanism, and innovatively add topological descriptors (TD) as new features to improve transferability to unseen problems of similar and larger size. Persistent homology is used to derive the TD, and proximal policy optimization is used to train our TD-augmented graph neural network. The resulting policy model compares favorably to state-of-the-art non-learning baselines while being much faster. The benefit of using TD is readily evident when scaling to test problems of size larger than those used in training. 高效的多机器人任务分配 (MRTA) 是灾难响应、仓库运营和建筑等各种时间敏感型应用的基础。本文解决了此类问题中的一类特殊问题，我们将其称为 MRTA 集体运输或 MRTA-CT——这里的任务呈现出不同的工作负载和截止日期，并且机器人受到飞行范围、通信范围和有效负载的限制。对于涉及 100-1000 个任务和 10-100 个机器人的这些问题的大型实例，传统的非学习求解器通常时间效率低下，并且新兴的基于学习的策略在不进行昂贵的再培训的情况下无法很好地扩展到更大规模的问题。为了解决这一差距，我们使用最近提出的编码器-解码器图神经网络，涉及胶囊网络和多头注意机制，并创新地添加拓扑描述符（TD）作为新特征，以提高对类似和更大尺寸的未见过问题的可迁移性。持久同源性用于推导 TD，近端策略优化用于训练我们的 TD 增强图神经网络。由此产生的政策模型与最先进的非学习基线相比毫不逊色，同时速度更快。当扩展到测试问题的规模大于训练中使用的问题时，使用 TD 的好处是显而易见的。 本文提出一种基于图强化学习和高阶拓扑抽象的多机器人协同运输规划方法，解决大规模任务分配问题。 Steve Paul,Wenyuan Li,Brian Smyth,Yuzhou Chen,Yulia Gel,Souma Chowdhury cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Nanna Inie,Jeanette Falk,Steven Tanimoto
title: Designing Participatory AI: Creative Professionals' Worries and Expectations about Generative AI
title_zh: 设计参与式人工智能：创意专业人士对生成式人工智能的担忧和期望
abstract: Generative AI, i.e., the group of technologies that automatically generate visual or written content based on text prompts, has undergone a leap in complexity and become widely available within just a few years. Such technologies potentially introduce a massive disruption to creative fields. This paper presents the results of a qualitative survey ($N$ = 23) investigating how creative professionals think about generative AI. The results show that the advancement of these AI models prompts important reflections on what defines creativity and how creatives imagine using AI to support their workflows. Based on these reflections, we discuss how we might design \textit{participatory AI} in the domain of creative expertise with the goal of empowering creative professionals in their present and future coexistence with AI.
summary: Generative AI, i.e., the group of technologies that automatically generate visual or written content based on text prompts, has undergone a leap in complexity and become widely available within just a few years. Such technologies potentially introduce a massive disruption to creative fields. This paper presents the results of a qualitative survey ($N$ = 23) investigating how creative professionals think about generative AI. The results show that the advancement of these AI models prompts important reflections on what defines creativity and how creatives imagine using AI to support their workflows. Based on these reflections, we discuss how we might design \textit{participatory AI} in the domain of creative expertise with the goal of empowering creative professionals in their present and future coexistence with AI.
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能，即根据文本提示自动生成视觉或书面内容的一组技术，在复杂性上经历了飞跃，并在短短几年内得到广泛应用。此类技术可能会给创意领域带来巨大的破坏。本文介绍了一项定性调查 ($N$ = 23) 的结果，该调查调查了创意专业人士如何看待生成式人工智能。结果表明，这些人工智能模型的进步促使人们对创造力的定义以及创意者如何利用人工智能支持其工作流程进行重要反思。基于这些思考，我们讨论了如何在创意专业领域设计\textit{参与式人工智能}，目标是增强创意专业人士当前和未来与人工智能的共存。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查创意专业人士对生成式AI的担忧与期望，探讨如何设计参与式AI以支持其工作流程。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI技术的快速发展可能颠覆创意领域，需理解创意从业者对其的担忧与期望，以设计更符合需求的AI工具。
AI.method: 采用定性调研方法，对23名创意专业人士进行访谈，分析其对生成式AI的看法及对参与式AI设计的建议。
AI.result: 调研发现创意从业者对AI的担忧与期望并存，认为AI可辅助创作但需明确创造力定义，并提出参与式AI设计需融入创意专业知识。
AI.conclusion: 通过参与式AI设计，可增强创意专业人士与AI的协作，未来需进一步探索AI在创意领域的伦理与实践框架。

authors_text: Yue Pan,Federico Magistri,Thomas Läbe,Elias Marks,Claus Smitt,Chris McCool,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss
title: Panoptic Mapping with Fruit Completion and Pose Estimation for Horticultural Robots
title_zh: 园艺机器人的全景映射与水果完成和姿势估计
abstract: Monitoring plants and fruits at high resolution play a key role in the future of agriculture. Accurate 3D information can pave the way to a diverse number of robotic applications in agriculture ranging from autonomous harvesting to precise yield estimation. Obtaining such 3D information is non-trivial as agricultural environments are often repetitive and cluttered, and one has to account for the partial observability of fruit and plants. In this paper, we address the problem of jointly estimating complete 3D shapes of fruit and their pose in a 3D multi-resolution map built by a mobile robot. To this end, we propose an online multi-resolution panoptic mapping system where regions of interest are represented with a higher resolution. We exploit data to learn a general fruit shape representation that we use at inference time together with an occlusion-aware differentiable rendering pipeline to complete partial fruit observations and estimate the 7 DoF pose of each fruit in the map. The experiments presented in this paper evaluated both in the controlled environment and in a commercial greenhouse, show that our novel algorithm yields higher completion and pose estimation accuracy than existing methods, with an improvement of 41% in completion accuracy and 52% in pose estimation accuracy while keeping a low inference time of 0.6s in average. Codes are available at: https://github.com/PRBonn/HortiMapping.
summary: Monitoring plants and fruits at high resolution play a key role in the future of agriculture. Accurate 3D information can pave the way to a diverse number of robotic applications in agriculture ranging from autonomous harvesting to precise yield estimation. Obtaining such 3D information is non-trivial as agricultural environments are often repetitive and cluttered, and one has to account for the partial observability of fruit and plants. In this paper, we address the problem of jointly estimating complete 3D shapes of fruit and their pose in a 3D multi-resolution map built by a mobile robot. To this end, we propose an online multi-resolution panoptic mapping system where regions of interest are represented with a higher resolution. We exploit data to learn a general fruit shape representation that we use at inference time together with an occlusion-aware differentiable rendering pipeline to complete partial fruit observations and estimate the 7 DoF pose of each fruit in the map. The experiments presented in this paper evaluated both in the controlled environment and in a commercial greenhouse, show that our novel algorithm yields higher completion and pose estimation accuracy than existing methods, with an improvement of 41% in completion accuracy and 52% in pose estimation accuracy while keeping a low inference time of 0.6s in average. Codes are available at: https://github.com/PRBonn/HortiMapping.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率监测植物和水果在农业的未来中发挥着关键作用。准确的 3D 信息可以为从自主收割到精确产量估算等多种农业机器人应用铺平道路。获取此类 3D 信息并非易事，因为农业环境通常是重复且混乱的，而且必须考虑到水果和植物的部分可观察性。在本文中，我们解决了在移动机器人构建的 3D 多分辨率地图中联合估计水果的完整 3D 形状及其姿态的问题。为此，我们提出了一种在线多分辨率全景测绘系统，其中感兴趣的区域以更高分辨率表示。我们利用数据来学习一般的水果形状表示，在推理时与遮挡感知的可微渲染管道一起使用，以完成部分水果观察并估计地图中每个水果的 7 DoF 姿态。本文在受控环境和商业温室中进行的实验评估表明，我们的新算法比现有方法具有更高的完成精度和姿态估计精度，完成精度提高了 41%，姿态估计精度提高了 52%，同时保持平均 0.6 秒的低推理时间。代码位于：https://github.com/PRBonn/HortiMapping。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于农业机器人的多分辨率全景映射系统，通过水果形状补全和姿态估计实现高精度的3D环境建模。
AI.motivation: 农业环境中植物和水果的高分辨率监测对自动化采摘和产量预测至关重要，但复杂环境导致水果部分不可见，传统方法难以准确获取完整3D信息。
AI.method: 设计在线多分辨率映射框架，结合学习到的通用水果形状表示与遮挡感知的可微渲染管道，实现水果形状补全和7自由度姿态估计。
AI.result: 在受控环境和商业温室实验中，补全准确率提升41%，姿态估计准确率提升52%，平均推理时间仅0.6秒。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了农业场景中的部分可观测问题，为农业机器人提供了高效精准的3D环境感知方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种用于农业机器人的多分辨率全景映射系统，通过水果形状补全和姿态估计实现高精度的3D环境建模。

search_text: Panoptic Mapping with Fruit Completion and Pose Estimation for Horticultural Robots 园艺机器人的全景映射与水果完成和姿势估计 Monitoring plants and fruits at high resolution play a key role in the future of agriculture. Accurate 3D information can pave the way to a diverse number of robotic applications in agriculture ranging from autonomous harvesting to precise yield estimation. Obtaining such 3D information is non-trivial as agricultural environments are often repetitive and cluttered, and one has to account for the partial observability of fruit and plants. In this paper, we address the problem of jointly estimating complete 3D shapes of fruit and their pose in a 3D multi-resolution map built by a mobile robot. To this end, we propose an online multi-resolution panoptic mapping system where regions of interest are represented with a higher resolution. We exploit data to learn a general fruit shape representation that we use at inference time together with an occlusion-aware differentiable rendering pipeline to complete partial fruit observations and estimate the 7 DoF pose of each fruit in the map. The experiments presented in this paper evaluated both in the controlled environment and in a commercial greenhouse, show that our novel algorithm yields higher completion and pose estimation accuracy than existing methods, with an improvement of 41% in completion accuracy and 52% in pose estimation accuracy while keeping a low inference time of 0.6s in average. Codes are available at: https://github.com/PRBonn/HortiMapping. 高分辨率监测植物和水果在农业的未来中发挥着关键作用。准确的 3D 信息可以为从自主收割到精确产量估算等多种农业机器人应用铺平道路。获取此类 3D 信息并非易事，因为农业环境通常是重复且混乱的，而且必须考虑到水果和植物的部分可观察性。在本文中，我们解决了在移动机器人构建的 3D 多分辨率地图中联合估计水果的完整 3D 形状及其姿态的问题。为此，我们提出了一种在线多分辨率全景测绘系统，其中感兴趣的区域以更高分辨率表示。我们利用数据来学习一般的水果形状表示，在推理时与遮挡感知的可微渲染管道一起使用，以完成部分水果观察并估计地图中每个水果的 7 DoF 姿态。本文在受控环境和商业温室中进行的实验评估表明，我们的新算法比现有方法具有更高的完成精度和姿态估计精度，完成精度提高了 41%，姿态估计精度提高了 52%，同时保持平均 0.6 秒的低推理时间。代码位于：https://github.com/PRBonn/HortiMapping。 本文提出一种用于农业机器人的多分辨率全景映射系统，通过水果形状补全和姿态估计实现高精度的3D环境建模。 Yue Pan,Federico Magistri,Thomas Läbe,Elias Marks,Claus Smitt,Chris McCool,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Chenbin Pan,Zhiqi Zhang,Senem Velipasalar,Yi Xu
title: EgoViT: Pyramid Video Transformer for Egocentric Action Recognition
title_zh: EgoViT：用于自我中心动作识别的金字塔视频转换器
abstract: Capturing interaction of hands with objects is important to autonomously detect human actions from egocentric videos. In this work, we present a pyramid video transformer with a dynamic class token generator for egocentric action recognition. Different from previous video transformers, which use the same static embedding as the class token for diverse inputs, we propose a dynamic class token generator that produces a class token for each input video by analyzing the hand-object interaction and the related motion information. The dynamic class token can diffuse such information to the entire model by communicating with other informative tokens in the subsequent transformer layers. With the dynamic class token, dissimilarity between videos can be more prominent, which helps the model distinguish various inputs. In addition, traditional video transformers explore temporal features globally, which requires large amounts of computation. However, egocentric videos often have a large amount of background scene transition, which causes discontinuities across distant frames. In this case, blindly reducing the temporal sampling rate will risk losing crucial information. Hence, we also propose a pyramid architecture to hierarchically process the video from short-term high rate to long-term low rate. With the proposed architecture, we significantly reduce the computational cost as well as the memory requirement without sacrificing from the model performance. We perform comparisons with different baseline video transformers on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 and EGTEA Gaze+ datasets. Both quantitative and qualitative results show that the proposed model can efficiently improve the performance for egocentric action recognition.
summary: Capturing interaction of hands with objects is important to autonomously detect human actions from egocentric videos. In this work, we present a pyramid video transformer with a dynamic class token generator for egocentric action recognition. Different from previous video transformers, which use the same static embedding as the class token for diverse inputs, we propose a dynamic class token generator that produces a class token for each input video by analyzing the hand-object interaction and the related motion information. The dynamic class token can diffuse such information to the entire model by communicating with other informative tokens in the subsequent transformer layers. With the dynamic class token, dissimilarity between videos can be more prominent, which helps the model distinguish various inputs. In addition, traditional video transformers explore temporal features globally, which requires large amounts of computation. However, egocentric videos often have a large amount of background scene transition, which causes discontinuities across distant frames. In this case, blindly reducing the temporal sampling rate will risk losing crucial information. Hence, we also propose a pyramid architecture to hierarchically process the video from short-term high rate to long-term low rate. With the proposed architecture, we significantly reduce the computational cost as well as the memory requirement without sacrificing from the model performance. We perform comparisons with different baseline video transformers on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 and EGTEA Gaze+ datasets. Both quantitative and qualitative results show that the proposed model can efficiently improve the performance for egocentric action recognition.
abstract_zh: 捕捉手与物体的交互对于从以自我为中心的视频中自主检测人类行为非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个带有动态类标记生成器的金字塔视频转换器，用于以自我为中心的动作识别。与之前的视频转换器使用相同的静态嵌入作为不同输入的类令牌不同，我们提出了一种动态类令牌生成器，通过分析手部对象交互和相关运动信息，为每个输入视频生成类令牌。动态类令牌可以通过与后续转换器层中的其他信息令牌进行通信，将此类信息扩散到整个模型。使用动态类标记，视频之间的差异可以更加突出，这有助于模型区分各种输入。此外，传统的视频转换器在全局范围内探索时间特征，这需要大量的计算。然而，以自我为中心的视频通常有大量的背景场景转换，这会导致远处帧之间的不连续性。在这种情况下，盲目降低时间采样率将面临丢失关键信息的风险。因此，我们还提出了一种金字塔架构，对视频从短期高速率到长期低速率进行分层处理。通过所提出的架构，我们显着降低了计算成本以及内存需求，而无需牺牲模型性能。我们在 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 和 EGTEA Gaze+ 数据集上与不同基线视频转换器进行比较。定量和定性结果都表明，所提出的模型可以有效提高以自我为中心的动作识别的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoViT模型，一种用于第一视角动作识别的金字塔视频变压器，通过动态类别标记生成器和分层处理结构提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频变压器计算量大且难以处理第一视角视频中的背景场景突变问题，导致动作识别效果受限。
AI.method: 设计动态类别标记生成器捕捉手-物体交互信息，并采用金字塔架构分层处理视频，从高频短期到低频长期逐步提取特征。
AI.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS-100和EGTEA Gaze+数据集上，模型在保持性能的同时显著降低计算和内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: EgoViT通过动态标记生成与金字塔结构有效解决了第一视角动作识别中的关键挑战，验证了方法的高效性与优越性。

authors_text: Neil Chulpongsatorn,Wesley Willett,Ryo Suzuki
title: HoloTouch: Interacting with Mixed Reality Visualizations Through Smartphone Proxies
title_zh: HoloTouch：通过智能手机代理与混合现实可视化交互
abstract: We contribute interaction techniques for augmenting mixed reality (MR) visualizations with smartphone proxies. By combining head-mounted displays (HMDs) with mobile touchscreens, we can augment low-resolution holographic 3D charts with precise touch input, haptics feedback, high-resolution 2D graphics, and physical manipulation. Our approach aims to complement both MR and physical visualizations. Most current MR visualizations suffer from unreliable tracking, low visual resolution, and imprecise input. Data physicalizations on the other hand, although allowing for natural physical manipulation, are limited in dynamic and interactive modification. We demonstrate how mobile devices such as smartphones or tablets can serve as physical proxies for MR data interactions, creating dynamic visualizations that support precise manipulation and rich input and output. We describe 6 interaction techniques that leverage the combined physicality, sensing, and output capabilities of HMDs and smartphones, and demonstrate those interactions via a prototype system. Based on an evaluation, we outline opportunities for combining the advantages of both MR and physical charts.
summary: We contribute interaction techniques for augmenting mixed reality (MR) visualizations with smartphone proxies. By combining head-mounted displays (HMDs) with mobile touchscreens, we can augment low-resolution holographic 3D charts with precise touch input, haptics feedback, high-resolution 2D graphics, and physical manipulation. Our approach aims to complement both MR and physical visualizations. Most current MR visualizations suffer from unreliable tracking, low visual resolution, and imprecise input. Data physicalizations on the other hand, although allowing for natural physical manipulation, are limited in dynamic and interactive modification. We demonstrate how mobile devices such as smartphones or tablets can serve as physical proxies for MR data interactions, creating dynamic visualizations that support precise manipulation and rich input and output. We describe 6 interaction techniques that leverage the combined physicality, sensing, and output capabilities of HMDs and smartphones, and demonstrate those interactions via a prototype system. Based on an evaluation, we outline opportunities for combining the advantages of both MR and physical charts.
abstract_zh: 我们贡献交互技术，通过智能手机代理增强混合现实 (MR) 可视化。通过将头戴式显示器 (HMD) 与移动触摸屏相结合，我们可以通过精确的触摸输入、触觉反馈、高分辨率 2D 图形和物理操作来增强低分辨率全息 3D 图表。我们的方法旨在补充 MR 和物理可视化。当前大多数 MR 可视化都存在跟踪不可靠、视觉分辨率低和输入不精确的问题。另一方面，数据物理化虽然允许自然的物理操作，但在动态和交互式修改方面受到限制。我们演示了智能手机或平板电脑等移动设备如何充当 MR 数据交互的物理代理，创建支持精确操作和丰富输入和输出的动态可视化。我们描述了 6 种交互技术，这些技术利用了 HMD 和智能手机的物理、传感和输出功能，并通过原型系统演示了这些交互。根据评估，我们概述了结合 MR 和物理图表优势的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HoloTouch系统，通过智能手机作为代理设备增强混合现实（MR）可视化交互，结合头戴式显示器（HMD）与移动触控屏的优势，解决MR可视化精度和交互性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MR可视化存在跟踪不稳定、分辨率低和输入不精确的缺陷，而物理数据可视化虽支持物理操作但缺乏动态交互能力，需融合两者优势以提升可视化体验。
AI.method: 设计6种交互技术，利用智能手机的触控、高分辨率显示及物理操作特性，与HMD协同实现精确输入、触觉反馈及动态可视化，并通过原型系统验证技术可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效结合MR与物理可视化的优点，支持精确交互与高保真输出，为动态数据可视化提供了新的混合交互范式。
AI.conclusion: 智能手机作为物理代理可显著增强MR可视化交互能力，未来研究应进一步优化设备协同机制与应用场景拓展。

ai_content_json.method: 设计6种交互技术，利用智能手机的触控、高分辨率显示及物理操作特性，与HMD协同实现精确输入、触觉反馈及动态可视化，并通过原型系统验证技术可行性。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法有效结合MR与物理可视化的优点，支持精确交互与高保真输出，为动态数据可视化提供了新的混合交互范式。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 智能手机作为物理代理可显著增强MR可视化交互能力，未来研究应进一步优化设备协同机制与应用场景拓展。

search_text: HoloTouch: Interacting with Mixed Reality Visualizations Through Smartphone Proxies HoloTouch：通过智能手机代理与混合现实可视化交互 We contribute interaction techniques for augmenting mixed reality (MR) visualizations with smartphone proxies. By combining head-mounted displays (HMDs) with mobile touchscreens, we can augment low-resolution holographic 3D charts with precise touch input, haptics feedback, high-resolution 2D graphics, and physical manipulation. Our approach aims to complement both MR and physical visualizations. Most current MR visualizations suffer from unreliable tracking, low visual resolution, and imprecise input. Data physicalizations on the other hand, although allowing for natural physical manipulation, are limited in dynamic and interactive modification. We demonstrate how mobile devices such as smartphones or tablets can serve as physical proxies for MR data interactions, creating dynamic visualizations that support precise manipulation and rich input and output. We describe 6 interaction techniques that leverage the combined physicality, sensing, and output capabilities of HMDs and smartphones, and demonstrate those interactions via a prototype system. Based on an evaluation, we outline opportunities for combining the advantages of both MR and physical charts. 我们贡献交互技术，通过智能手机代理增强混合现实 (MR) 可视化。通过将头戴式显示器 (HMD) 与移动触摸屏相结合，我们可以通过精确的触摸输入、触觉反馈、高分辨率 2D 图形和物理操作来增强低分辨率全息 3D 图表。我们的方法旨在补充 MR 和物理可视化。当前大多数 MR 可视化都存在跟踪不可靠、视觉分辨率低和输入不精确的问题。另一方面，数据物理化虽然允许自然的物理操作，但在动态和交互式修改方面受到限制。我们演示了智能手机或平板电脑等移动设备如何充当 MR 数据交互的物理代理，创建支持精确操作和丰富输入和输出的动态可视化。我们描述了 6 种交互技术，这些技术利用了 HMD 和智能手机的物理、传感和输出功能，并通过原型系统演示了这些交互。根据评估，我们概述了结合 MR 和物理图表优势的机会。 本文提出HoloTouch系统，通过智能手机作为代理设备增强混合现实（MR）可视化交互，结合头戴式显示器（HMD）与移动触控屏的优势，解决MR可视化精度和交互性不足的问题。 Neil Chulpongsatorn,Wesley Willett,Ryo Suzuki cs.HC

authors_text: Wei Lin,Leonid Karlinsky,Nina Shvetsova,Horst Possegger,Mateusz Kozinski,Rameswar Panda,Rogerio Feris,Hilde Kuehne,Horst Bischof
title: MAtch, eXpand and Improve: Unsupervised Finetuning for Zero-Shot Action Recognition with Language Knowledge
title_zh: 匹配、扩展和改进：利用语言知识进行零样本动作识别的无监督微调
abstract: Large scale Vision-Language (VL) models have shown tremendous success in aligning representations between visual and text modalities. This enables remarkable progress in zero-shot recognition, image generation & editing, and many other exciting tasks. However, VL models tend to over-represent objects while paying much less attention to verbs, and require additional tuning on video data for best zero-shot action recognition performance. While previous work relied on large-scale, fully-annotated data, in this work we propose an unsupervised approach. We adapt a VL model for zero-shot and few-shot action recognition using a collection of unlabeled videos and an unpaired action dictionary. Based on that, we leverage Large Language Models and VL models to build a text bag for each unlabeled video via matching, text expansion and captioning. We use those bags in a Multiple Instance Learning setup to adapt an image-text backbone to video data. Although finetuned on unlabeled video data, our resulting models demonstrate high transferability to numerous unseen zero-shot downstream tasks, improving the base VL model performance by up to 14\%, and even comparing favorably to fully-supervised baselines in both zero-shot and few-shot video recognition transfer. The code will be released later at \url{https://github.com/wlin-at/MAXI}.
summary: Large scale Vision-Language (VL) models have shown tremendous success in aligning representations between visual and text modalities. This enables remarkable progress in zero-shot recognition, image generation & editing, and many other exciting tasks. However, VL models tend to over-represent objects while paying much less attention to verbs, and require additional tuning on video data for best zero-shot action recognition performance. While previous work relied on large-scale, fully-annotated data, in this work we propose an unsupervised approach. We adapt a VL model for zero-shot and few-shot action recognition using a collection of unlabeled videos and an unpaired action dictionary. Based on that, we leverage Large Language Models and VL models to build a text bag for each unlabeled video via matching, text expansion and captioning. We use those bags in a Multiple Instance Learning setup to adapt an image-text backbone to video data. Although finetuned on unlabeled video data, our resulting models demonstrate high transferability to numerous unseen zero-shot downstream tasks, improving the base VL model performance by up to 14\%, and even comparing favorably to fully-supervised baselines in both zero-shot and few-shot video recognition transfer. The code will be released later at \url{https://github.com/wlin-at/MAXI}.
abstract_zh: 大规模视觉语言（VL）模型在协调视觉和文本模式之间的表示方面取得了巨大成功。这使得零样本识别、图像生成和编辑以及许多其他令人兴奋的任务取得了显着进展。然而，VL 模型往往会过度表示对象，而对动词的关注要少得多，并且需要对视频数据进行额外调整才能获得最佳的零样本动作识别性能。虽然之前的工作依赖于大规模、完全注释的数据，但在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无监督的方法。我们使用未标记视频的集合和未配对的动作字典来调整 VL 模型，以进行零镜头和少镜头动作识别。在此基础上，我们利用大型语言模型和VL模型，通过匹配、文本扩展和字幕为每个未标记的视频构建文本包。我们在多实例学习设置中使用这些包来使图像文本主干适应视频数据。尽管在未标记的视频数据上进行了微调，但我们得到的模型表现出对许多看不见的零镜头下游任务的高可迁移性，将基础 VL 模型性能提高了高达 14%，甚至在零镜头和少镜头视频识别传输方面与完全监督的基线相比也毫不逊色。该代码稍后将在 \url{https://github.com/wlin-at/MAXI} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的零样本动作识别方法，通过结合语言模型和视觉-语言模型，利用未标注视频和动作词典进行模型微调。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在动作识别中过度关注物体而忽视动词，且需依赖标注数据优化。为减少对标注数据的依赖，本文提出无需标注的微调方法。
AI.method: 通过匹配、文本扩展和字幕生成构建未标注视频的文本袋，结合多实例学习框架，利用语言模型和视觉-语言模型对图像-文本主干进行视频数据适配。
AI.result: 在零样本和少样本动作识别任务中，模型性能较基线提升最高14%，且优于部分全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 无需标注数据的微调方法可有效提升零样本动作识别性能，证明语言知识与多实例学习结合在视频理解中的潜力。

authors_text: Takuya Kanazawa,Chetan Gupta
title: Latent-Conditioned Policy Gradient for Multi-Objective Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多目标深度强化学习的潜在条件策略梯度
abstract: Sequential decision making in the real world often requires finding a good balance of conflicting objectives. In general, there exist a plethora of Pareto-optimal policies that embody different patterns of compromises between objectives, and it is technically challenging to obtain them exhaustively using deep neural networks. In this work, we propose a novel multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) algorithm that trains a single neural network via policy gradient to approximately obtain the entire Pareto set in a single run of training, without relying on linear scalarization of objectives. The proposed method works in both continuous and discrete action spaces with no design change of the policy network. Numerical experiments in benchmark environments demonstrate the practicality and efficacy of our approach in comparison to standard MORL baselines.
summary: Sequential decision making in the real world often requires finding a good balance of conflicting objectives. In general, there exist a plethora of Pareto-optimal policies that embody different patterns of compromises between objectives, and it is technically challenging to obtain them exhaustively using deep neural networks. In this work, we propose a novel multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) algorithm that trains a single neural network via policy gradient to approximately obtain the entire Pareto set in a single run of training, without relying on linear scalarization of objectives. The proposed method works in both continuous and discrete action spaces with no design change of the policy network. Numerical experiments in benchmark environments demonstrate the practicality and efficacy of our approach in comparison to standard MORL baselines.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中的连续决策通常需要在相互冲突的目标之间找到良好的平衡。一般来说，存在大量的帕累托最优策略，它们体现了目标之间不同的妥协模式，并且使用深度神经网络详尽地获得它们在技术上具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的多目标强化学习（MORL）算法，该算法通过策略梯度训练单个神经网络，以在单次训练中近似获得整个帕累托集，而不依赖于目标的线性标量化。所提出的方法适用于连续和离散行动空间，无需更改策略网络的设计。基准环境中的数值实验证明了我们的方法与标准 MORL 基线相比的实用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在条件策略梯度的多目标深度强化学习算法，可在单次训练中近似获取整个帕累托最优策略集。
AI.motivation: 现实世界决策常需平衡冲突目标，但现有方法难以穷举所有帕累托最优策略且依赖线性标量化，存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计单网络策略梯度方法，通过潜在条件建模实现帕累托前沿探索，兼容连续/离散动作空间且无需修改网络结构。
AI.result: 基准实验表明该方法在获取帕累托最优策略方面优于传统MORL基线方法，验证了有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为多目标强化学习提供了无需线性标量化的高效解决方案，拓展了深度强化学习的应用边界。

In this work, we propose a novel multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) algorithm that trains a single neural network via policy gradient to approximately obtain the entire Pareto set in a single run of training, without relying on linear scalarization of objectives. The proposed method works in both continuous and discrete action spaces with no design change of the policy network. Numerical experiments in benchmark environments demonstrate the practicality and efficacy of our approach in comparison to standard MORL baselines. 现实世界中的连续决策通常需要在相互冲突的目标之间找到良好的平衡。一般来说，存在大量的帕累托最优策略，它们体现了目标之间不同的妥协模式，并且使用深度神经网络详尽地获得它们在技术上具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的多目标强化学习（MORL）算法，该算法通过策略梯度训练单个神经网络，以在单次训练中近似获得整个帕累托集，而不依赖于目标的线性标量化。所提出的方法适用于连续和离散行动空间，无需更改策略网络的设计。基准环境中的数值实验证明了我们的方法与标准 MORL 基线相比的实用性和有效性。 本文提出一种基于潜在条件策略梯度的多目标深度强化学习算法，可在单次训练中近似获取整个帕累托最优策略集。 Takuya Kanazawa,Chetan Gupta cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Allan Borodin,Calum MacRury
title: Online Bipartite Matching in the Probe-Commit Model
title_zh: 探测-提交模型中的在线二方匹配
comment: Mathematical Programming journal version of conference papers https://drops.dagstuhl.de/opus/volltexte/2021/14706/ and https://drops.dagstuhl.de/opus/volltexte/2022/17168/. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.04325
comments: Mathematical Programming journal version of conference papers https://drops.dagstuhl.de/opus/volltexte/2021/14706/ and https://drops.dagstuhl.de/opus/volltexte/2022/17168/. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.04325
abstract: We consider the classical online bipartite matching problem in the probe-commit model. In this problem, when an online vertex arrives, its edges must be probed to determine if they exist, based on known edge probabilities. A probing algorithm must respect commitment, meaning that if a probed edge exists, it must be used in the matching. Additionally, each online vertex has a patience constraint which limits the number of probes that can be made to an online vertex's adjacent edges. We introduce a new configuration linear program (LP) which we prove is a relaxation of an optimal offline probing algorithm. Using this LP, we establish the following competitive ratios which depend on the model used to generate the instance graph, and the arrival order of its online vertices: - In the worst-case instance model, an optimal $1/e$ ratio when the vertices arrive in uniformly at random (u.a.r.) order. - In the known independently distributed (i.d.) instance model, an optimal $1/2$ ratio when the vertices arrive in adversarial order, and a $1-1/e$ ratio when the vertices arrive in u.a.r. order. The latter two results improve upon the previous best competitive ratio of $0.46$ due to Brubach et al. (Algorithmica 2020), which only held in the more restricted known i.i.d. (independent and identically distributed) instance model. Our $1-1/e$-competitive algorithm matches the best known result for the prophet secretary matching problem due to Ehsani et al. (SODA 2018). Our algorithm is efficient and implies a $1-1/e$ approximation ratio for the special case when the graph is known. This is the offline stochastic matching problem, and we improve upon the $0.42$ approximation ratio for one-sided patience due to Pollner et al. (EC 2022), while also generalizing the $1-1/e$ approximation ratio for unbounded patience due to Gamlath et al. (SODA 2019).

abstract_zh: 我们考虑探针提交模型中的经典在线二分匹配问题。在此问题中，当在线顶点到达时，必须根据已知的边概率探测其边以确定它们是否存在。探测算法必须尊重承诺，这意味着如果存在探测到的边缘，则必须在匹配中使用它。此外，每个在线顶点都有一个耐心约束，它限制了可以对在线顶点的相邻边进行的探测数量。我们引入了一种新的配置线性程序（LP），我们证明它是最佳离线探测算法的松弛。使用此 LP，我们建立以下竞争比率，该比率取决于用于生成实例图的模型及其在线顶点的到达顺序： - 在最坏情况实例模型中，当顶点以随机（u.a.r.）顺序均匀到达时，最佳 $1/e$ 比率。 - 在已知的独立分布（i.d.）实例模型中，当顶点以对抗顺序到达时，最优的 $1/2$ 比率，以及当顶点以 u.a.r 到达时的 $1-1/e$ 比率。命令。后两个结果比 Brubach 等人之前的 0.46 美元最佳竞争比有所提高。 （Algorithmica 2020），仅适用于更受限制的已知独立同分布。 （独立同分布）实例模型。我们的 $1-1/e$ 竞争算法与 Ehsani 等人提出的先知秘书匹配问题的最著名结果相匹配。 （SODA 2018）。我们的算法非常高效，并且在图形已知的特殊情况下意味着 $1-1/e$ 近似比率。这是离线随机匹配问题，由于 Pollner 等人，我们改进了单方面耐心的 0.42 美元近似率。 (EC 2022)，同时还概括了 Gamlath 等人提出的无限耐心的 $1-1/e$ 近似比率。 （SODA 2019）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线二分图匹配问题，在探针-提交模型下提出新的线性规划方法，以提高不同实例模型和到达顺序下的竞争比。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在探针-提交模型下的竞争比有限，尤其在随机到达和对抗到达场景中存在改进空间，需设计更高效的算法以适应不同约束条件。
AI.method: 引入新的配置线性规划（LP）作为最优离线探针算法的松弛形式，并基于该LP分析不同实例模型和到达顺序下的竞争比。
AI.result: 在最坏情况模型下随机到达时达到1/e竞争比；在独立分布模型下，对抗到达时为1/2，随机到达时为1-1/e，优于先前结果；同时匹配了已知图的1-1/e近似比。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在效率和近似比上均优于现有方法，尤其在已知图和不同耐心约束场景下具有广泛适用性，推广了先前的理论结果。

authors_text: Won Jo,Geuntaek Lim,Gwangjin Lee,Hyunwoo Kim,Byungsoo Ko,Yukyung Choi
title: VVS: Video-to-Video Retrieval with Irrelevant Frame Suppression
title_zh: VVS：具有不相关帧抑制的视频到视频检索
abstract: In content-based video retrieval (CBVR), dealing with large-scale collections, efficiency is as important as accuracy; thus, several video-level feature-based studies have actively been conducted. Nevertheless, owing to the severe difficulty of embedding a lengthy and untrimmed video into a single feature, these studies have been insufficient for accurate retrieval compared to frame-level feature-based studies. In this paper, we show that appropriate suppression of irrelevant frames can provide insight into the current obstacles of the video-level approaches. Furthermore, we propose a Video-to-Video Suppression network (VVS) as a solution. VVS is an end-to-end framework that consists of an easy distractor elimination stage to identify which frames to remove and a suppression weight generation stage to determine the extent to suppress the remaining frames. This structure is intended to effectively describe an untrimmed video with varying content and meaningless information. Its efficacy is proved via extensive experiments, and we show that our approach is not only state-of-the-art in video-level approaches but also has a fast inference time despite possessing retrieval capabilities close to those of frame-level approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/VVS
summary: In content-based video retrieval (CBVR), dealing with large-scale collections, efficiency is as important as accuracy; thus, several video-level feature-based studies have actively been conducted. Nevertheless, owing to the severe difficulty of embedding a lengthy and untrimmed video into a single feature, these studies have been insufficient for accurate retrieval compared to frame-level feature-based studies. In this paper, we show that appropriate suppression of irrelevant frames can provide insight into the current obstacles of the video-level approaches. Furthermore, we propose a Video-to-Video Suppression network (VVS) as a solution. VVS is an end-to-end framework that consists of an easy distractor elimination stage to identify which frames to remove and a suppression weight generation stage to determine the extent to suppress the remaining frames. This structure is intended to effectively describe an untrimmed video with varying content and meaningless information. Its efficacy is proved via extensive experiments, and we show that our approach is not only state-of-the-art in video-level approaches but also has a fast inference time despite possessing retrieval capabilities close to those of frame-level approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/VVS
abstract_zh: 在基于内容的视频检索（CBVR）中，处理大规模集合，效率与准确性同样重要；因此，一些基于视频级特征的研究已经被积极开展。然而，由于将冗长且未经修剪的视频嵌入到单个特征中非常困难，与基于帧级特征的研究相比，这些研究不足以准确检索。在本文中，我们表明，适当抑制不相关的帧可以深入了解视频级方法当前的障碍。此外，我们提出了视频到视频抑制网络（VVS）作为解决方案。 VVS 是一个端到端框架，由一个简单的干扰消除阶段和一个抑制权重生成阶段组成，前者用于识别要删除的帧，后者用于确定抑制剩余帧的程度。这种结构旨在有效地描述具有变化内容和无意义信息的未经修剪的视频。它的有效性通过大量的实验得到了证明，并且我们表明，我们的方法不仅在视频级方法中是最先进的，而且尽管具有接近帧级方法的检索能力，但也具有快速的推理时间。代码可在 https://github.com/sejong-rcv/VVS 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VVS的视频到视频检索方法，通过抑制无关帧来提升视频级特征的检索准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频级特征方法因难以处理长视频的嵌入而精度不足，而帧级方法虽准确但效率低，需在两者间寻找平衡。
AI.method: 设计VVS网络框架，包含两阶段：1) 消除干扰帧阶段识别需移除的帧；2) 生成抑制权重阶段确定剩余帧的抑制程度，以描述视频内容。
AI.result: 实验表明VVS在视频级方法中达到最先进水平，且推理速度较快，检索性能接近帧级方法。
AI.conclusion: 抑制无关帧能有效解决视频级方法的瓶颈，VVS在保持高效的同时实现了高精度检索。

In this paper, we show that appropriate suppression of irrelevant frames can provide insight into the current obstacles of the video-level approaches. Furthermore, we propose a Video-to-Video Suppression network (VVS) as a solution. VVS is an end-to-end framework that consists of an easy distractor elimination stage to identify which frames to remove and a suppression weight generation stage to determine the extent to suppress the remaining frames. This structure is intended to effectively describe an untrimmed video with varying content and meaningless information. Its efficacy is proved via extensive experiments, and we show that our approach is not only state-of-the-art in video-level approaches but also has a fast inference time despite possessing retrieval capabilities close to those of frame-level approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/VVS 在基于内容的视频检索（CBVR）中，处理大规模集合，效率与准确性同样重要；因此，一些基于视频级特征的研究已经被积极开展。然而，由于将冗长且未经修剪的视频嵌入到单个特征中非常困难，与基于帧级特征的研究相比，这些研究不足以准确检索。在本文中，我们表明，适当抑制不相关的帧可以深入了解视频级方法当前的障碍。此外，我们提出了视频到视频抑制网络（VVS）作为解决方案。 VVS 是一个端到端框架，由一个简单的干扰消除阶段和一个抑制权重生成阶段组成，前者用于识别要删除的帧，后者用于确定抑制剩余帧的程度。这种结构旨在有效地描述具有变化内容和无意义信息的未经修剪的视频。它的有效性通过大量的实验得到了证明，并且我们表明，我们的方法不仅在视频级方法中是最先进的，而且尽管具有接近帧级方法的检索能力，但也具有快速的推理时间。代码可在 https://github.com/sejong-rcv/VVS 获取 本文提出一种名为VVS的视频到视频检索方法，通过抑制无关帧来提升视频级特征的检索准确性。 Won Jo,Geuntaek Lim,Gwangjin Lee,Hyunwoo Kim,Byungsoo Ko,Yukyung Choi cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Bisping
title: Process Equivalence Problems as Energy Games
title_zh: 将过程等价问题视为能量博弈
abstract: We characterize all common notions of behavioral equivalence by one 6-dimensional energy game, where energies bound capabilities of an attacker trying to tell processes apart. The defender-winning initial credits exhaustively determine which preorders and equivalences from the (strong) linear-time--branching-time spectrum relate processes. The time complexity is exponential, which is optimal due to trace equivalence being covered. This complexity improves drastically on our recent approach for deciding groups of equivalences where exponential sets of distinguishing HML formulas are constructed on top of a super-exponential reachability game. In experiments using the VLTS benchmarks, the algorithm performs on par with the best similarity algorithm.
summary: We characterize all common notions of behavioral equivalence by one 6-dimensional energy game, where energies bound capabilities of an attacker trying to tell processes apart. The defender-winning initial credits exhaustively determine which preorders and equivalences from the (strong) linear-time--branching-time spectrum relate processes. The time complexity is exponential, which is optimal due to trace equivalence being covered. This complexity improves drastically on our recent approach for deciding groups of equivalences where exponential sets of distinguishing HML formulas are constructed on top of a super-exponential reachability game. In experiments using the VLTS benchmarks, the algorithm performs on par with the best similarity algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们通过一个 6 维能量游戏来描述行为等效的所有常见概念，其中能量限制了攻击者试图区分进程的能力。防守者赢得的初始积分详尽地确定了（强）线性时间-分支时间谱相关过程中的哪些预序和等价物。时间复杂度是指数级的，由于覆盖了跟踪等价性，因此这是最佳的。这种复杂性大大提高了我们最近用于确定等价组的方法，其中区分 HML 公式的指数集是在超指数可达性游戏之上构建的。在使用 VLTS 基准的实验中，该算法的性能与最佳相似度算法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文将进程等价问题建模为六维能量游戏，通过能量限制攻击者区分进程的能力，利用初始信用确定进程间的预序和等价关系。
AI.motivation: 传统方法处理进程等价问题时需构造指数级HML公式，导致复杂度高。本文旨在寻找更高效的解决方案，通过能量游戏降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 设计六维能量游戏模型，将进程等价问题转化为能量游戏，通过防御者的初始信用值判定进程间的关系，并优化时间复杂度。
AI.result: 提出的方法具有指数级时间复杂度（最优），在VLTS基准测试中表现与最佳相似性算法相当，显著优于先前的超指数级方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为进程等价问题提供了理论最优的解决方案，同时保持实际效率，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ryan Othniel Kearns
title: Contextual Trust
title_zh: 情境信任
abstract: Trust is an important aspect of human life. It provides instrumental value in allowing us to collaborate on and defer actions to others, and intrinsic value in our intimate relationships with romantic partners, family, and friends. In this paper I examine the nature of trust from a philosophical perspective. Specifically I propose to view trust as a context-sensitive state in a manner that will be made precise. The contribution of this paper is threefold. First, I make the simple observation that an individual's trust is typically both action- and context-sensitive. Action-sensitivity means that trust may obtain between a given truster and trustee for only certain actions. Context-sensitivity means that trust may obtain between a given truster and trustee, regarding the same action, in some conditions and not others. I also opine about what kinds of things may play the role of the truster, trustee, and action. Second, I advance a theory for the nature of contextual trust. I propose that the answer to "What does it mean for $A$ to trust $B$ to do $X$ in context $C$?" has two conditions. First, $A$ must take $B$'s doing $X$ as a means towards one of $A$'s ends. Second, $A$ must adopt an unquestioning attitude concerning $B$'s doing $X$ in context $C$. This unquestioning attitude is similar to the attitude introduced in Nguyen 2021. Finally, we explore how contextual trust can help us make sense of trust in general non-interpersonal settings, notably that of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. The field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) assigns paramount importance to the problem of user trust in opaque computational models, yet does little to give trust diagnostic or even conceptual criteria. I propose that contextual trust is a natural fit for the task by illustrating that model transparency and explainability map nicely into our construction of the contexts $C$.

It provides instrumental value in allowing us to collaborate on and defer actions to others, and intrinsic value in our intimate relationships with romantic partners, family, and friends. In this paper I examine the nature of trust from a philosophical perspective. Specifically I propose to view trust as a context-sensitive state in a manner that will be made precise. The contribution of this paper is threefold. First, I make the simple observation that an individual's trust is typically both action- and context-sensitive. Action-sensitivity means that trust may obtain between a given truster and trustee for only certain actions. Context-sensitivity means that trust may obtain between a given truster and trustee, regarding the same action, in some conditions and not others. I also opine about what kinds of things may play the role of the truster, trustee, and action. Second, I advance a theory for the nature of contextual trust. I propose that the answer to "What does it mean for $A$ to trust $B$ to do $X$ in context $C$?" has two conditions. First, $A$ must take $B$'s doing $X$ as a means towards one of $A$'s ends. Second, $A$ must adopt an unquestioning attitude concerning $B$'s doing $X$ in context $C$. This unquestioning attitude is similar to the attitude introduced in Nguyen 2021. Finally, we explore how contextual trust can help us make sense of trust in general non-interpersonal settings, notably that of artificial intelligence (AI) systems. The field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) assigns paramount importance to the problem of user trust in opaque computational models, yet does little to give trust diagnostic or even conceptual criteria. I propose that contextual trust is a natural fit for the task by illustrating that model transparency and explainability map nicely into our construction of the contexts $C$.
abstract_zh: 信任是人类生活的一个重要方面。它为我们提供了工具性价值，使我们能够与他人合作并将行动推迟到他人身上，并为我们与浪漫伴侣、家人和朋友的亲密关系提供了内在价值。在本文中，我从哲学角度探讨了信任的本质。具体来说，我建议以一种精确的方式将信任视为一种上下文相关的状态。本文的贡献有三个方面。首先，我做了一个简单的观察，即个人的信任通常对行动和环境都敏感。动作敏感性意味着给定的信任者和受托者之间仅可以针对某些动作获得信任。上下文敏感意味着在某些条件下，在特定的信任者和受托者之间，对于相同的行为，可以获得信任，而在其他条件下则不然。我还对什么样的事物可以扮演信任者、受托者和行动者的角色发表看法。其次，我提出了一种关于情境信任本质的理论。我建议回答“$A$ 信任 $B$ 在上下文 $C$ 中执行 $X$ 意味着什么？”有两个条件。首先，$A$ 必须将 $B$ 所做的 $X$ 视为实现 $A$ 目的之一的手段。其次，$A$ 必须对 $B$ 在 $C$ 环境中所做的 $X$ 采取毫不怀疑的态度。这种不容置疑的态度与 Nguyen 2021 中介绍的态度类似。最后，我们探讨了情境信任如何帮助我们理解一般非人际环境中的信任，特别是人工智能 (AI) 系统中的信任。可解释人工智能（XAI）领域极其重视不透明计算模型中的用户信任问题，但几乎没有提供信任诊断甚至概念标准。我认为，通过说明模型透明度和可解释性很好地映射到我们对上下文 $C$ 的构建中，上下文信任自然适合该任务。

AI.tldr: 本文从哲学角度提出一种情境信任理论，并探讨其在人工智能系统中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有信任理论未能充分解释信任的情境依赖性和行动特定性，而可解释人工智能（XAI）领域缺乏信任的概念性标准。
AI.method: 通过哲学分析提出情境信任的双重条件框架，并将模型透明性与解释性映射到情境构造中。
AI.result: 构建了包含行动导向性和无条件态度的情境信任理论，并为AI系统的信任评估提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: 情境信任理论能够有效解释人际与非人际场景中的信任机制，为XAI领域提供概念工具。
