authors_text: Oded Ovadia,Adar Kahana,Panos Stinis,Eli Turkel,George Em Karniadakis
title: ViTO: Vision Transformer-Operator
title_zh: ViTO：视觉变压器-操作员
abstract: We combine vision transformers with operator learning to solve diverse inverse problems described by partial differential equations (PDEs). Our approach, named ViTO, combines a U-Net based architecture with a vision transformer. We apply ViTO to solve inverse PDE problems of increasing complexity, namely for the wave equation, the Navier-Stokes equations and the Darcy equation. We focus on the more challenging case of super-resolution, where the input dataset for the inverse problem is at a significantly coarser resolution than the output. The results we obtain are comparable or exceed the leading operator network benchmarks in terms of accuracy. Furthermore, ViTO`s architecture has a small number of trainable parameters (less than 10% of the leading competitor), resulting in a performance speed-up of over 5x when averaged over the various test cases.
summary: We combine vision transformers with operator learning to solve diverse inverse problems described by partial differential equations (PDEs). Our approach, named ViTO, combines a U-Net based architecture with a vision transformer. We apply ViTO to solve inverse PDE problems of increasing complexity, namely for the wave equation, the Navier-Stokes equations and the Darcy equation. We focus on the more challenging case of super-resolution, where the input dataset for the inverse problem is at a significantly coarser resolution than the output. The results we obtain are comparable or exceed the leading operator network benchmarks in terms of accuracy. Furthermore, ViTO`s architecture has a small number of trainable parameters (less than 10% of the leading competitor), resulting in a performance speed-up of over 5x when averaged over the various test cases.
abstract_zh: 我们将视觉变换器与算子学习相结合来解决偏微分方程（PDE）描述的各种反问题。我们的方法名为 ViTO，将基于 U-Net 的架构与视觉转换器相结合。我们应用 ViTO 来解决日益复杂的反偏微分方程问题，即波动方程、纳维-斯托克斯方程和达西方程。我们关注更具挑战性的超分辨率情况，其中反问题的输入数据集的分辨率比输出的分辨率要低得多。我们获得的结果在准确性方面可与领先的运营商网络基准相媲美或超过。此外，ViTO 的架构具有少量可训练参数（不到领先竞争对手的 10%），在各种测试用例的平均性能加速超过 5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViTO方法，结合视觉Transformer与算子学习，用于求解由偏微分方程（PDE）描述的多样化逆问题，尤其关注超分辨率场景。
AI.motivation: 传统逆PDE求解方法在处理高复杂度问题（如超分辨率）时存在效率与精度不足的问题，需探索更高效的模型架构。
AI.method: 设计融合U-Net结构与视觉Transformer的ViTO架构，应用于波动方程、纳维-斯托克斯方程及达西方程的逆问题求解，重点优化超分辨率任务。
AI.result: ViTO在精度上达到或超越主流算子网络基准，可训练参数量少于竞品10%，平均测试案例速度提升5倍以上。
AI.conclusion: ViTO通过高效架构设计，在逆PDE问题求解中实现了精度与速度的平衡，为复杂场景提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: ViTO: Vision Transformer-Operator ViTO：视觉变压器-操作员 We combine vision transformers with operator learning to solve diverse inverse problems described by partial differential equations (PDEs). Our approach, named ViTO, combines a U-Net based architecture with a vision transformer. We apply ViTO to solve inverse PDE problems of increasing complexity, namely for the wave equation, the Navier-Stokes equations and the Darcy equation. We focus on the more challenging case of super-resolution, where the input dataset for the inverse problem is at a significantly coarser resolution than the output. The results we obtain are comparable or exceed the leading operator network benchmarks in terms of accuracy. Furthermore, ViTO`s architecture has a small number of trainable parameters (less than 10% of the leading competitor), resulting in a performance speed-up of over 5x when averaged over the various test cases. 我们将视觉变换器与算子学习相结合来解决偏微分方程（PDE）描述的各种反问题。我们的方法名为 ViTO，将基于 U-Net 的架构与视觉转换器相结合。我们应用 ViTO 来解决日益复杂的反偏微分方程问题，即波动方程、纳维-斯托克斯方程和达西方程。我们关注更具挑战性的超分辨率情况，其中反问题的输入数据集的分辨率比输出的分辨率要低得多。我们获得的结果在准确性方面可与领先的运营商网络基准相媲美或超过。此外，ViTO 的架构具有少量可训练参数（不到领先竞争对手的 10%），在各种测试用例的平均性能加速超过 5 倍。 本文提出ViTO方法，结合视觉Transformer与算子学习，用于求解由偏微分方程（PDE）描述的多样化逆问题，尤其关注超分辨率场景。 Oded Ovadia,Adar Kahana,Panos Stinis,Eli Turkel,George Em Karniadakis cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Lukas Zbinden,Lars Doorenbos,Theodoros Pissas,Adrian Thomas Huber,Raphael Sznitman,Pablo Márquez-Neila
title: Stochastic Segmentation with Conditional Categorical Diffusion Models
title_zh: 具有条件分类扩散模型的随机分割
comment: Accepted at ICCV 2023. Code available at https://github.com/LarsDoorenbos/ccdm-stochastic-segmentation
comments: Accepted at ICCV 2023. Code available at https://github.com/LarsDoorenbos/ccdm-stochastic-segmentation
abstract: Semantic segmentation has made significant progress in recent years thanks to deep neural networks, but the common objective of generating a single segmentation output that accurately matches the image's content may not be suitable for safety-critical domains such as medical diagnostics and autonomous driving. Instead, multiple possible correct segmentation maps may be required to reflect the true distribution of annotation maps. In this context, stochastic semantic segmentation methods must learn to predict conditional distributions of labels given the image, but this is challenging due to the typically multimodal distributions, high-dimensional output spaces, and limited annotation data. To address these challenges, we propose a conditional categorical diffusion model (CCDM) for semantic segmentation based on Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models. Our model is conditioned to the input image, enabling it to generate multiple segmentation label maps that account for the aleatoric uncertainty arising from divergent ground truth annotations. Our experimental results show that CCDM achieves state-of-the-art performance on LIDC, a stochastic semantic segmentation dataset, and outperforms established baselines on the classical segmentation dataset Cityscapes.
summary: Semantic segmentation has made significant progress in recent years thanks to deep neural networks, but the common objective of generating a single segmentation output that accurately matches the image's content may not be suitable for safety-critical domains such as medical diagnostics and autonomous driving. Instead, multiple possible correct segmentation maps may be required to reflect the true distribution of annotation maps. In this context, stochastic semantic segmentation methods must learn to predict conditional distributions of labels given the image, but this is challenging due to the typically multimodal distributions, high-dimensional output spaces, and limited annotation data. To address these challenges, we propose a conditional categorical diffusion model (CCDM) for semantic segmentation based on Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models. Our model is conditioned to the input image, enabling it to generate multiple segmentation label maps that account for the aleatoric uncertainty arising from divergent ground truth annotations. Our experimental results show that CCDM achieves state-of-the-art performance on LIDC, a stochastic semantic segmentation dataset, and outperforms established baselines on the classical segmentation dataset Cityscapes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于深度神经网络，语义分割取得了重大进展，但生成准确匹配图像内容的单个分割输出的共同目标可能不适合医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键领域。相反，可能需要多个可能的正确分割图来反映注释图的真实分布。在这种情况下，随机语义分割方法必须学会预测给定图像的标签的条件分布，但由于典型的多模态分布、高维输出空间和有限的注释数据，这具有挑战性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型的用于语义分割的条件分类扩散模型（CCDM）。我们的模型以输入图像为条件，使其能够生成多个分割标签图，以解释因不同的地面实况注释而产生的任意不确定性。我们的实验结果表明，CCDM 在随机语义分割数据集 LIDC 上实现了最先进的性能，并且优于经典分割数据集 Cityscapes 上建立的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件分类扩散模型（CCDM）的随机语义分割方法，用于生成反映标注图真实分布的多个可能分割结果。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割方法生成单一确定性输出，难以满足医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键领域对多可能正确分割结果的需求。
AI.method: 基于去噪扩散概率模型，设计条件分类扩散模型（CCDM），通过输入图像条件生成考虑标注歧义性的多分割标签图。
AI.result: 在LIDC随机分割数据集上达到SOTA性能，在Cityscapes经典数据集上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多模态分布、高维输出空间和标注数据有限的挑战，为安全关键领域的分割任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ian E. Nielsen,Ravi P. Ramachandran,Nidhal Bouaynaya,Hassan M. Fathallah-Shaykh,Ghulam Rasool
title: EvalAttAI: A Holistic Approach to Evaluating Attribution Maps in Robust and Non-Robust Models
title_zh: EvalAttAI：评估鲁棒和非鲁棒模型中归因图的整体方法
abstract: The expansion of explainable artificial intelligence as a field of research has generated numerous methods of visualizing and understanding the black box of a machine learning model. Attribution maps are generally used to highlight the parts of the input image that influence the model to make a specific decision. On the other hand, the robustness of machine learning models to natural noise and adversarial attacks is also being actively explored. This paper focuses on evaluating methods of attribution mapping to find whether robust neural networks are more explainable. We explore this problem within the application of classification for medical imaging. Explainability research is at an impasse. There are many methods of attribution mapping, but no current consensus on how to evaluate them and determine the ones that are the best. Our experiments on multiple datasets (natural and medical imaging) and various attribution methods reveal that two popular evaluation metrics, Deletion and Insertion, have inherent limitations and yield contradictory results. We propose a new explainability faithfulness metric (called EvalAttAI) that addresses the limitations of prior metrics. Using our novel evaluation, we found that Bayesian deep neural networks using the Variational Density Propagation technique were consistently more explainable when used with the best performing attribution method, the Vanilla Gradient. However, in general, various types of robust neural networks may not be more explainable, despite these models producing more visually plausible attribution maps.
summary: The expansion of explainable artificial intelligence as a field of research has generated numerous methods of visualizing and understanding the black box of a machine learning model. Attribution maps are generally used to highlight the parts of the input image that influence the model to make a specific decision. On the other hand, the robustness of machine learning models to natural noise and adversarial attacks is also being actively explored. This paper focuses on evaluating methods of attribution mapping to find whether robust neural networks are more explainable. We explore this problem within the application of classification for medical imaging. Explainability research is at an impasse. There are many methods of attribution mapping, but no current consensus on how to evaluate them and determine the ones that are the best. Our experiments on multiple datasets (natural and medical imaging) and various attribution methods reveal that two popular evaluation metrics, Deletion and Insertion, have inherent limitations and yield contradictory results. We propose a new explainability faithfulness metric (called EvalAttAI) that addresses the limitations of prior metrics. Using our novel evaluation, we found that Bayesian deep neural networks using the Variational Density Propagation technique were consistently more explainable when used with the best performing attribution method, the Vanilla Gradient. However, in general, various types of robust neural networks may not be more explainable, despite these models producing more visually plausible attribution maps.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能作为一个研究领域的扩展催生了许多可视化和理解机器学习模型黑匣子的方法。归因图通常用于突出显示输入图像中影响模型做出特定决策的部分。另一方面，机器学习模型对自然噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性也在积极探索。本文重点评估归因映射方法，以找出稳健的神经网络是否更可解释。我们在医学成像分类应用中探讨这个问题。可解释性研究陷入了僵局。归因映射的方法有很多，但目前对于如何评估它们并确定最好的方法还没有达成共识。我们对多个数据集（自然和医学成像）和各种归因方法的实验表明，删除和插入这两种流行的评估指标具有固有的局限性并产生矛盾的结果。我们提出了一种新的可解释性忠实度指标（称为 EvalAttAI），它解决了先前指标的局限性。通过我们的新颖评估，我们发现使用变分密度传播技术的贝叶斯深度神经网络在与性能最佳的归因方法（香草梯度）一起使用时始终更容易解释。然而，一般来说，各种类型的稳健神经网络可能无法更好地解释，尽管这些模型产生了视觉上更合理的归因图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的解释性评估指标EvalAttAI，用于比较鲁棒模型与非鲁棒模型的归因图效果，特别是在医学影像分类任务中。
AI.motivation: 可解释AI领域缺乏统一的归因图评估标准，现有指标（如删除率和插入率）存在局限性，难以准确衡量模型可解释性，尤其在医学影像等关键领域亟需可靠评估方法。
AI.method: 设计EvalAttAI指标，结合多种归因方法（如Vanilla Gradient）在自然图像和医学影像数据集上进行实验，对比分析鲁棒模型（如贝叶斯深度神经网络）与非鲁棒模型的归因效果。
AI.result: 发现删除率和插入率指标存在矛盾结果，EvalAttAI显示使用变分密度传播技术的贝叶斯DNN在Vanilla Gradient下更具可解释性，但总体而言鲁棒模型的归因图视觉合理性并不必然提升其可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 现有评估指标不完善，EvalAttAI能更准确反映模型可解释性。鲁棒模型的视觉归因效果与实际可解释性无直接关联，需结合新型评估方法进行综合分析。

search_text: EvalAttAI: A Holistic Approach to Evaluating Attribution Maps in Robust and Non-Robust Models EvalAttAI：评估鲁棒和非鲁棒模型中归因图的整体方法 The expansion of explainable artificial intelligence as a field of research has generated numerous methods of visualizing and understanding the black box of a machine learning model. Attribution maps are generally used to highlight the parts of the input image that influence the model to make a specific decision. On the other hand, the robustness of machine learning models to natural noise and adversarial attacks is also being actively explored. This paper focuses on evaluating methods of attribution mapping to find whether robust neural networks are more explainable. We explore this problem within the application of classification for medical imaging. Explainability research is at an impasse. There are many methods of attribution mapping, but no current consensus on how to evaluate them and determine the ones that are the best. Our experiments on multiple datasets (natural and medical imaging) and various attribution methods reveal that two popular evaluation metrics, Deletion and Insertion, have inherent limitations and yield contradictory results. We propose a new explainability faithfulness metric (called EvalAttAI) that addresses the limitations of prior metrics. Using our novel evaluation, we found that Bayesian deep neural networks using the Variational Density Propagation technique were consistently more explainable when used with the best performing attribution method, the Vanilla Gradient. However, in general, various types of robust neural networks may not be more explainable, despite these models producing more visually plausible attribution maps. 可解释的人工智能作为一个研究领域的扩展催生了许多可视化和理解机器学习模型黑匣子的方法。归因图通常用于突出显示输入图像中影响模型做出特定决策的部分。另一方面，机器学习模型对自然噪声和对抗性攻击的鲁棒性也在积极探索。本文重点评估归因映射方法，以找出稳健的神经网络是否更可解释。我们在医学成像分类应用中探讨这个问题。可解释性研究陷入了僵局。归因映射的方法有很多，但目前对于如何评估它们并确定最好的方法还没有达成共识。我们对多个数据集（自然和医学成像）和各种归因方法的实验表明，删除和插入这两种流行的评估指标具有固有的局限性并产生矛盾的结果。我们提出了一种新的可解释性忠实度指标（称为 EvalAttAI），它解决了先前指标的局限性。通过我们的新颖评估，我们发现使用变分密度传播技术的贝叶斯深度神经网络在与性能最佳的归因方法（香草梯度）一起使用时始终更容易解释。然而，一般来说，各种类型的稳健神经网络可能无法更好地解释，尽管这些模型产生了视觉上更合理的归因图。 本文提出一种新的解释性评估指标EvalAttAI，用于比较鲁棒模型与非鲁棒模型的归因图效果，特别是在医学影像分类任务中。 Ian E. Nielsen,Ravi P. Ramachandran,Nidhal Bouaynaya,Hassan M. Fathallah-Shaykh,Ghulam Rasool cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jan Oscar Cross-Zamirski,Praveen Anand,Guy Williams,Elizabeth Mouchet,Yinhai Wang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Class-Guided Image-to-Image Diffusion: Cell Painting from Brightfield Images with Class Labels
title_zh: 类引导的图像到图像扩散：带有类标签的明场图像的细胞绘画
abstract: Image-to-image reconstruction problems with free or inexpensive metadata in the form of class labels appear often in biological and medical image domains. Existing text-guided or style-transfer image-to-image approaches do not translate to datasets where additional information is provided as discrete classes. We introduce and implement a model which combines image-to-image and class-guided denoising diffusion probabilistic models. We train our model on a real-world dataset of microscopy images used for drug discovery, with and without incorporating metadata labels. By exploring the properties of image-to-image diffusion with relevant labels, we show that class-guided image-to-image diffusion can improve the meaningful content of the reconstructed images and outperform the unguided model in useful downstream tasks.
summary: Image-to-image reconstruction problems with free or inexpensive metadata in the form of class labels appear often in biological and medical image domains. Existing text-guided or style-transfer image-to-image approaches do not translate to datasets where additional information is provided as discrete classes. We introduce and implement a model which combines image-to-image and class-guided denoising diffusion probabilistic models. We train our model on a real-world dataset of microscopy images used for drug discovery, with and without incorporating metadata labels. By exploring the properties of image-to-image diffusion with relevant labels, we show that class-guided image-to-image diffusion can improve the meaningful content of the reconstructed images and outperform the unguided model in useful downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 使用类标签形式的免费或廉价元数据的图像到图像重建问题经常出现在生物和医学图像领域。现有的文本引导或风格转移图像到图像方法无法转换为以离散类形式提供附加信息的数据集。我们引入并实现了一个结合了图像到图像和类引导去噪扩散概率模型的模型。我们在用于药物发现的真实显微镜图像数据集上训练我们的模型，无论是否包含元数据标签。通过探索具有相关标签的图像到图像扩散的特性，我们表明类别引导的图像到图像扩散可以改善重建图像的有意义内容，并在有用的下游任务中优于无引导模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合类别标签的图像到图像扩散模型，用于从明场显微图像生成带有语义信息的细胞图像。
AI.motivation: 生物医学图像领域存在大量带有离散类别标签的低成本元数据，但现有文本引导或风格迁移方法无法有效利用此类标签进行图像重建。
AI.method: 开发融合图像到图像扩散与类别引导机制的去噪概率模型，在包含/不含元标签的显微图像数据集上进行训练与对比实验。
AI.result: 类别引导模型在重建图像语义准确性及下游任务（如药物筛选）中均优于无标签引导模型，验证了元数据的有效利用性。
AI.conclusion: 类别标签引导的扩散模型能显著提升生物医学图像重建质量，为利用结构化元数据的生成模型提供新方向。

authors_text: Alvaro Florez,Alejandro Astudillo,Wilm Decré,Jan Swevers,Joris Gillis
title: IMPACT: A Toolchain for Nonlinear Model Predictive Control Specification, Prototyping, and Deployment
title_zh: IMPACT：用于非线性模型预测控制规范、原型设计和部署的工具链
comment: Accepted in the IFAC World Congress 2023
comments: Accepted in the IFAC World Congress 2023
abstract: We present IMPACT, a flexible toolchain for nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) specification with automatic code generation capabilities. The toolchain reduces the engineering complexity of NMPC implementations by providing the user with an easy-to-use application programming interface, and with the flexibility of using multiple state-of-the-art tools and numerical optimization solvers for rapid prototyping of NMPC solutions. IMPACT is written in Python, users can call it from Python and MATLAB, and the generated NMPC solvers can be directly executed from C, Python, MATLAB and Simulink. An application example is presented involving problem specification and deployment on embedded hardware using Simulink, showing the effectiveness and applicability of IMPACT for NMPC-based solutions.
summary: We present IMPACT, a flexible toolchain for nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) specification with automatic code generation capabilities. The toolchain reduces the engineering complexity of NMPC implementations by providing the user with an easy-to-use application programming interface, and with the flexibility of using multiple state-of-the-art tools and numerical optimization solvers for rapid prototyping of NMPC solutions. IMPACT is written in Python, users can call it from Python and MATLAB, and the generated NMPC solvers can be directly executed from C, Python, MATLAB and Simulink. An application example is presented involving problem specification and deployment on embedded hardware using Simulink, showing the effectiveness and applicability of IMPACT for NMPC-based solutions.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 IMPACT，这是一个用于非线性模型预测控制 (NMPC) 规范的灵活工具链，具有自动代码生成功能。该工具链通过为用户提供易于使用的应用程序编程接口以及使用多种最先进的工具和数值优化求解器来快速构建 NMPC 解决方案原型的灵活性，降低了 NMPC 实施的工程复杂性。 IMPACT是用Python编写的，用户可以从Python和MATLAB调用它，生成的NMPC求解器可以直接从C、Python、MATLAB和Simulink执行。提供了一个应用示例，涉及使用 Simulink 进行问题规范和在嵌入式硬件上的部署，展示了 IMPACT 对于基于 NMPC 的解决方案的有效性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍IMPACT工具链，用于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）的规范、原型设计和部署，具备自动代码生成能力。
AI.motivation: 非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）的实现复杂度高，需降低工程难度并支持快速原型设计与多环境部署。
AI.method: IMPACT基于Python开发，提供易用API，支持多种优化求解器，生成的NMPC求解器可在C/Python/MATLAB/Simulink中直接运行。
AI.result: 通过嵌入式硬件上的Simulink应用示例，验证了IMPACT在NMPC解决方案中的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: IMPACT作为灵活工具链，显著降低NMPC开发门槛，支持跨平台部署，适用于实际工程场景。

authors_text: Yang Zhou,Giuseppe Loianno
title: PENet: A Joint Panoptic Edge Detection Network
title_zh: PENet：联合全景边缘检测网络
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, submitted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, submitted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: In recent years, compact and efficient scene understanding representations have gained popularity in increasing situational awareness and autonomy of robotic systems. In this work, we illustrate the concept of a panoptic edge segmentation and propose PENet, a novel detection network called that combines semantic edge detection and instance-level perception into a compact panoptic edge representation. This is obtained through a joint network by multi-task learning that concurrently predicts semantic edges, instance centers and offset flow map without bounding box predictions exploiting the cross-task correlations among the tasks. The proposed approach allows extending semantic edge detection to panoptic edge detection which encapsulates both category-aware and instance-aware segmentation. We validate the proposed panoptic edge segmentation method and demonstrate its effectiveness on the real-world Cityscapes dataset.
summary: In recent years, compact and efficient scene understanding representations have gained popularity in increasing situational awareness and autonomy of robotic systems. In this work, we illustrate the concept of a panoptic edge segmentation and propose PENet, a novel detection network called that combines semantic edge detection and instance-level perception into a compact panoptic edge representation. This is obtained through a joint network by multi-task learning that concurrently predicts semantic edges, instance centers and offset flow map without bounding box predictions exploiting the cross-task correlations among the tasks. The proposed approach allows extending semantic edge detection to panoptic edge detection which encapsulates both category-aware and instance-aware segmentation. We validate the proposed panoptic edge segmentation method and demonstrate its effectiveness on the real-world Cityscapes dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，紧凑而高效的场景理解表示在提高机器人系统的态势感知和自主性方面越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们阐述了全景边缘分割的概念，并提出了 PENet，这是一种新颖的检测网络，将语义边缘检测和实例级感知结合成紧凑的全景边缘表示。这是通过多任务学习的联合网络获得的，该网络同时预测语义边缘、实例中心和偏移流图，而无需利用任务之间的跨任务相关性进行边界框预测。所提出的方法允许将语义边缘检测扩展到全景边缘检测，其中封装了类别感知和实例感知分割。我们验证了所提出的全景边缘分割方法，并证明了其在现实世界城市景观数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PENet，一种结合语义边缘检测与实例感知的全景边缘检测网络，通过多任务学习实现无需边界框预测的紧凑表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂模块或边界框预测，难以高效融合语义与实例信息，需更紧凑的场景理解表示以提升机器人系统自主性。
AI.method: 设计联合网络同时预测语义边缘、实例中心及偏移流图，利用跨任务相关性实现多任务学习，避免边界框预测。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集验证中，证明该方法在全景边缘分割任务中的有效性，兼顾类别与实例级感知。
AI.conclusion: PENet通过多任务联合学习实现高效全景边缘检测，为机器人系统提供更紧凑的场景理解方案。

search_text: PENet: A Joint Panoptic Edge Detection Network PENet：联合全景边缘检测网络 In recent years, compact and efficient scene understanding representations have gained popularity in increasing situational awareness and autonomy of robotic systems. In this work, we illustrate the concept of a panoptic edge segmentation and propose PENet, a novel detection network called that combines semantic edge detection and instance-level perception into a compact panoptic edge representation. This is obtained through a joint network by multi-task learning that concurrently predicts semantic edges, instance centers and offset flow map without bounding box predictions exploiting the cross-task correlations among the tasks. The proposed approach allows extending semantic edge detection to panoptic edge detection which encapsulates both category-aware and instance-aware segmentation. We validate the proposed panoptic edge segmentation method and demonstrate its effectiveness on the real-world Cityscapes dataset. 近年来，紧凑而高效的场景理解表示在提高机器人系统的态势感知和自主性方面越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们阐述了全景边缘分割的概念，并提出了 PENet，这是一种新颖的检测网络，将语义边缘检测和实例级感知结合成紧凑的全景边缘表示。这是通过多任务学习的联合网络获得的，该网络同时预测语义边缘、实例中心和偏移流图，而无需利用任务之间的跨任务相关性进行边界框预测。所提出的方法允许将语义边缘检测扩展到全景边缘检测，其中封装了类别感知和实例感知分割。我们验证了所提出的全景边缘分割方法，并证明了其在现实世界城市景观数据集上的有效性。 本文提出PENet，一种结合语义边缘检测与实例感知的全景边缘检测网络，通过多任务学习实现无需边界框预测的紧凑表示。 Yang Zhou,Giuseppe Loianno cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ahsnaul Haque,Md Naseef-Ur-Rahman Chowdhury,Hamdy Soliman,Mohammad Sahinur Hossen,Tanjim Fatima,Imtiaz Ahmed
title: Wireless Sensor Networks anomaly detection using Machine Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 使用机器学习进行无线传感器网络异常检测：调查
abstract: Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) have become increasingly valuable in various civil/military applications like industrial process control, civil engineering applications such as buildings structural strength monitoring, environmental monitoring, border intrusion, IoT (Internet of Things), and healthcare. However, the sensed data generated by WSNs is often noisy and unreliable, making it a challenge to detect and diagnose anomalies. Machine learning (ML) techniques have been widely used to address this problem by detecting and identifying unusual patterns in the sensed data. This survey paper provides an overview of the state of the art applications of ML techniques for data anomaly detection in WSN domains. We first introduce the characteristics of WSNs and the challenges of anomaly detection in WSNs. Then, we review various ML techniques such as supervised, unsupervised, and semi-supervised learning that have been applied to WSN data anomaly detection. We also compare different ML-based approaches and their performance evaluation metrics. Finally, we discuss open research challenges and future directions for applying ML techniques in WSNs sensed data anomaly detection.
summary: Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) have become increasingly valuable in various civil/military applications like industrial process control, civil engineering applications such as buildings structural strength monitoring, environmental monitoring, border intrusion, IoT (Internet of Things), and healthcare. However, the sensed data generated by WSNs is often noisy and unreliable, making it a challenge to detect and diagnose anomalies. Machine learning (ML) techniques have been widely used to address this problem by detecting and identifying unusual patterns in the sensed data. This survey paper provides an overview of the state of the art applications of ML techniques for data anomaly detection in WSN domains. We first introduce the characteristics of WSNs and the challenges of anomaly detection in WSNs. Then, we review various ML techniques such as supervised, unsupervised, and semi-supervised learning that have been applied to WSN data anomaly detection. We also compare different ML-based approaches and their performance evaluation metrics. Finally, we discuss open research challenges and future directions for applying ML techniques in WSNs sensed data anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 无线传感器网络 (WSN) 在各种民用/军用应用中变得越来越有价值，例如工业过程控制、土木工程应用（例如建筑结构强度监测、环境监测、边境入侵、物联网）和医疗保健。然而，无线传感器网络生成的感测数据通常充满噪声且不可靠，这使得检测和诊断异常成为一项挑战。机器学习 (ML) 技术已被广泛用于通过检测和识别感测数据中的异常模式来解决此问题。本调查论文概述了 ML 技术在 WSN 领域中数据异常检测的最新应用。我们首先介绍无线传感器网络的特点以及无线传感器网络异常检测的挑战。然后，我们回顾了已应用于 WSN 数据异常检测的各种机器学习技术，例如监督学习、无监督学习和半监督学习。我们还比较了不同的基于机器学习的方法及其性能评估指标。最后，我们讨论了在无线传感器网络感知数据异常检测中应用机器学习技术的开放研究挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了无线传感器网络（WSNs）中使用机器学习技术进行数据异常检测的最新研究进展。
AI.motivation: WSNs生成的数据常存在噪声和不可靠性，导致异常检测困难，亟需有效的机器学习方法解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过回顾监督学习、无监督学习和半监督学习等机器学习技术在WSNs异常检测中的应用，并比较其性能评估指标。
AI.result: 总结了各类机器学习方法的优缺点，分析了其在WSNs异常检测中的性能表现及适用场景。
AI.conclusion: 指出当前研究在适应WSNs资源限制、处理数据不平衡及提升模型可解释性等方面的挑战，并提出未来研究方向。

authors_text: Sara Di Bartolomeo,Giorgio Severi,Victor Schetinger,Cody Dunne
title: Ask and You Shall Receive (a Graph Drawing): Testing ChatGPT's Potential to Apply Graph Layout Algorithms
title_zh: 提出要求，您将收到（图形绘制）：测试 ChatGPT 应用图形布局算法的潜力
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently taken the world by storm. They can generate coherent text, hold meaningful conversations, and be taught concepts and basic sets of instructions - such as the steps of an algorithm. In this context, we are interested in exploring the application of LLMs to graph drawing algorithms by performing experiments on ChatGPT. These algorithms are used to improve the readability of graph visualizations. The probabilistic nature of LLMs presents challenges to implementing algorithms correctly, but we believe that LLMs' ability to learn from vast amounts of data and apply complex operations may lead to interesting graph drawing results. For example, we could enable users with limited coding backgrounds to use simple natural language to create effective graph visualizations. Natural language specification would make data visualization more accessible and user-friendly for a wider range of users. Exploring LLMs' capabilities for graph drawing can also help us better understand how to formulate complex algorithms for LLMs; a type of knowledge that could transfer to other areas of computer science. Overall, our goal is to shed light on the exciting possibilities of using LLMs for graph drawing while providing a balanced assessment of the challenges and opportunities they present. A free copy of this paper with all supplemental materials required to reproduce our results is available on https://osf.io/n5rxd/?view_only=f09cbc2621f44074810b7d843f1e12f9

abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）最近风靡全球。他们可以生成连贯的文本，进行有意义的对话，并学习概念和基本指令集 - 例如算法的步骤。在这种背景下，我们有兴趣通过在 ChatGPT 上进行实验来探索 LLM 在图形绘制算法中的应用。这些算法用于提高图形可视化的可读性。法学硕士的概率性质对正确实施算法提出了挑战，但我们相信法学硕士从大量数据中学习并应用复杂操作的能力可能会产生有趣的图形绘制结果。例如，我们可以让编码背景有限的用户使用简单的自然语言来创建有效的图形可视化。自然语言规范将使数据可视化对于更广泛的用户来说更容易访问和用户友好。探索LLM的图形绘制能力也可以帮助我们更好地理解如何为LLM制定复杂的算法；一种可以转移到计算机科学其他领域的知识。总的来说，我们的目标是阐明使用法学硕士进行图形绘制的令人兴奋的可能性，同时对它们所带来的挑战和机遇进行平衡的评估。本文的免费副本以及重现我们的结果所需的所有补充材料可在 https://osf.io/n5rxd/?view_only=f09cbc2621f44074810b7d843f1e12f9 上获取

AI.tldr: 该论文测试了ChatGPT在应用图布局算法方面的潜力，探索其生成可读性图可视化的能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）能学习复杂操作，可能通过自然语言指令提升数据可视化的可访问性，但其概率性实现算法存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过向ChatGPT提供自然语言指令，实验其执行图布局算法的能力，并评估生成结果的准确性与有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示ChatGPT能根据简单指令生成有效图可视化，但算法实现存在误差，需进一步优化指令表述与模型训练。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在图绘制领域展现潜力，可降低用户技术门槛，但需解决算法准确性问题，未来研究可拓展至其他算法领域。

tldr: 该论文测试了ChatGPT在应用图布局算法方面的潜力，探索其生成可读性图可视化的能力。
motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）能学习复杂操作，可能通过自然语言指令提升数据可视化的可访问性，但其概率性实现算法存在挑战。
method: 通过向ChatGPT提供自然语言指令，实验其执行图布局算法的能力，并评估生成结果的准确性与有效性。
result: 实验显示ChatGPT能根据简单指令生成有效图可视化，但算法实现存在误差，需进一步优化指令表述与模型训练。
conclusion: LLMs在图绘制领域展现潜力，可降低用户技术门槛，但需解决算法准确性问题，未来研究可拓展至其他算法领域。
search_text: Ask and You Shall Receive (a Graph Drawing): Testing ChatGPT's Potential to Apply Graph Layout Algorithms 提出要求，您将收到（图形绘制）：测试 ChatGPT 应用图形布局算法的潜力 Large language models (LLMs) have recently taken the world by storm. They can generate coherent text, hold meaningful conversations, and be taught concepts and basic sets of instructions - such as the steps of an algorithm. In this context, we are interested in exploring the application of LLMs to graph drawing algorithms by performing experiments on ChatGPT. These algorithms are used to improve the readability of graph visualizations. The probabilistic nature of LLMs presents challenges to implementing algorithms correctly, but we believe that LLMs' ability to learn from vast amounts of data and apply complex operations may lead to interesting graph drawing results. For example, we could enable users with limited coding backgrounds to use simple natural language to create effective graph visualizations. Natural language specification would make data visualization more accessible and user-friendly for a wider range of users. Exploring LLMs' capabilities for graph drawing can also help us better understand how to formulate complex algorithms for LLMs; a type of knowledge that could transfer to other areas of computer science. Overall, our goal is to shed light on the exciting possibilities of using LLMs for graph drawing while providing a balanced assessment of the challenges and opportunities they present. A free copy of this paper with all supplemental materials required to reproduce our results is available on https://osf.io/n5rxd/?view_only=f09cbc2621f44074810b7d843f1e12f9 大型语言模型（LLM）最近风靡全球。他们可以生成连贯的文本，进行有意义的对话，并学习概念和基本指令集 - 例如算法的步骤。在这种背景下，我们有兴趣通过在 ChatGPT 上进行实验来探索 LLM 在图形绘制算法中的应用。这些算法用于提高图形可视化的可读性。法学硕士的概率性质对正确实施算法提出了挑战，但我们相信法学硕士从大量数据中学习并应用复杂操作的能力可能会产生有趣的图形绘制结果。例如，我们可以让编码背景有限的用户使用简单的自然语言来创建有效的图形可视化。自然语言规范将使数据可视化对于更广泛的用户来说更容易访问和用户友好。探索LLM的图形绘制能力也可以帮助我们更好地理解如何为LLM制定复杂的算法；一种可以转移到计算机科学其他领域的知识。总的来说，我们的目标是阐明使用法学硕士进行图形绘制的令人兴奋的可能性，同时对它们所带来的挑战和机遇进行平衡的评估。本文的免费副本以及重现我们的结果所需的所有补充材料可在 https://osf.io/n5rxd/?view_only=f09cbc2621f44074810b7d843f1e12f9 上获取 该论文测试了ChatGPT在应用图布局算法方面的潜力，探索其生成可读性图可视化的能力。 Sara Di Bartolomeo,Giorgio Severi,Victor Schetinger,Cody Dunne cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Daeseok Lee,Jeunghyun Byun,Bonggun Shin
title: Boosting Convolutional Neural Networks' Protein Binding Site Prediction Capacity Using SE(3)-invariant transformers, Transfer Learning and Homology-based Augmentation
title_zh: 使用 SE(3) 不变变换器、迁移学习和基于同源的增强增强卷积神经网络的蛋白质结合位点预测能力
comment: Updates in version 2: author order change (making it clear that Bonggun Shin is the corresponding author)
comments: Updates in version 2: author order change (making it clear that Bonggun Shin is the corresponding author)
abstract: Figuring out small molecule binding sites in target proteins, in the resolution of either pocket or residue, is critical in many virtual and real drug-discovery scenarios. Since it is not always easy to find such binding sites based on domain knowledge or traditional methods, different deep learning methods that predict binding sites out of protein structures have been developed in recent years. Here we present a new such deep learning algorithm, that significantly outperformed all state-of-the-art baselines in terms of the both resolutions$\unicode{x2013}$pocket and residue. This good performance was also demonstrated in a case study involving the protein human serum albumin and its binding sites. Our algorithm included new ideas both in the model architecture and in the training method. For the model architecture, it incorporated SE(3)-invariant geometric self-attention layers that operate on top of residue-level CNN outputs. This residue-level processing of the model allowed a transfer learning between the two resolutions, which turned out to significantly improve the binding pocket prediction. Moreover, we developed novel augmentation method based on protein homology, which prevented our model from over-fitting. Overall, we believe that our contribution to the literature is twofold. First, we provided a new computational method for binding site prediction that is relevant to real-world applications, as shown by the good performance on different benchmarks and case study. Second, the novel ideas in our method$\unicode{x2013}$the model architecture, transfer learning and the homology augmentation$\unicode{x2013}$would serve as useful components in future works.

Since it is not always easy to find such binding sites based on domain knowledge or traditional methods, different deep learning methods that predict binding sites out of protein structures have been developed in recent years. Here we present a new such deep learning algorithm, that significantly outperformed all state-of-the-art baselines in terms of the both resolutions$\unicode{x2013}$pocket and residue. This good performance was also demonstrated in a case study involving the protein human serum albumin and its binding sites. Our algorithm included new ideas both in the model architecture and in the training method. For the model architecture, it incorporated SE(3)-invariant geometric self-attention layers that operate on top of residue-level CNN outputs. This residue-level processing of the model allowed a transfer learning between the two resolutions, which turned out to significantly improve the binding pocket prediction. Moreover, we developed novel augmentation method based on protein homology, which prevented our model from over-fitting. Overall, we believe that our contribution to the literature is twofold. First, we provided a new computational method for binding site prediction that is relevant to real-world applications, as shown by the good performance on different benchmarks and case study. Second, the novel ideas in our method$\unicode{x2013}$the model architecture, transfer learning and the homology augmentation$\unicode{x2013}$would serve as useful components in future works.
abstract_zh: 在解决口袋或残基时找出目标蛋白中的小分子结合位点对于许多虚拟和真实的药物发现场景至关重要。由于基于领域知识或传统方法找到此类结合位点并不总是那么容易，因此近年来开发了不同的深度学习方法来预测蛋白质结构中的结合位点。在这里，我们提出了一种新的深度学习算法，该算法在分辨率$\unicode{x2013}$pocket 和残差方面显着优于所有最先进的基线。这种良好的性能也在涉及人血清白蛋白及其结合位点的案例研究中得到了证明。我们的算法在模型架构和训练方法上都包含了新的想法。对于模型架构，它结合了 SE(3) 不变的几何自注意力层，该层在残差级 CNN 输出之上运行。模型的这种残基级处理允许在两种分辨率之间进行迁移学习，结果显着改善了结合袋预测。此外，我们开发了基于蛋白质同源性的新型增强方法，这防止了我们的模型过度拟合。总的来说，我们相信我们对文献的贡献是双重的。首先，我们提供了一种与实际应用相关的新的结合位点预测计算方法，不同基准和案例研究的良好性能表明了这一点。其次，我们方法中的新颖想法$\unicode{x2013}$模型架构、迁移学习和同源增强$\unicode{x2013}$将在未来的工作中作为有用的组成部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合SE(3)-不变变换器、迁移学习和同源性增强的深度学习算法，显著提升卷积神经网络在蛋白质结合位点预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法和领域知识难以准确识别蛋白质结合位点，亟需高效且精准的计算方法以支持药物研发。
AI.method: 模型架构融合残差级CNN输出与SE(3)-不变几何自注意力层，通过迁移学习实现口袋级与残基级预测的跨分辨率知识传递，并引入基于蛋白质同源性的数据增强策略防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和人血清白蛋白案例中，该算法在口袋级和残基级预测任务上均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了具有实际应用价值的结合位点预测新方法，并为未来研究提供了模型架构、迁移学习及同源增强等创新模块。

authors_text: Sucheng Ren,Fangyun Wei,Samuel Albanie,Zheng Zhang,Han Hu
title: DeepMIM: Deep Supervision for Masked Image Modeling
title_zh: DeepMIM：掩模图像建模的深度监督
comment: Code and models are available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM
comments: Code and models are available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM
abstract: Deep supervision, which involves extra supervisions to the intermediate features of a neural network, was widely used in image classification in the early deep learning era since it significantly reduces the training difficulty and eases the optimization like avoiding gradient vanish over the vanilla training. Nevertheless, with the emergence of normalization techniques and residual connection, deep supervision in image classification was gradually phased out. In this paper, we revisit deep supervision for masked image modeling (MIM) that pre-trains a Vision Transformer (ViT) via a mask-and-predict scheme. Experimentally, we find that deep supervision drives the shallower layers to learn more meaningful representations, accelerates model convergence, and expands attention diversities. Our approach, called DeepMIM, significantly boosts the representation capability of each layer. In addition, DeepMIM is compatible with many MIM models across a range of reconstruction targets. For instance, using ViT-B, DeepMIM on MAE achieves 84.2 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming MAE by +0.6. By combining DeepMIM with a stronger tokenizer CLIP, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks, including image classification (85.6 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, outperforming MAE-CLIP by +0.8), object detection (52.8 APbox on COCO) and semantic segmentation (53.1 mIoU on ADE20K). Code and models are available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM.
summary: Deep supervision, which involves extra supervisions to the intermediate features of a neural network, was widely used in image classification in the early deep learning era since it significantly reduces the training difficulty and eases the optimization like avoiding gradient vanish over the vanilla training. Nevertheless, with the emergence of normalization techniques and residual connection, deep supervision in image classification was gradually phased out. In this paper, we revisit deep supervision for masked image modeling (MIM) that pre-trains a Vision Transformer (ViT) via a mask-and-predict scheme. Experimentally, we find that deep supervision drives the shallower layers to learn more meaningful representations, accelerates model convergence, and expands attention diversities. Our approach, called DeepMIM, significantly boosts the representation capability of each layer. In addition, DeepMIM is compatible with many MIM models across a range of reconstruction targets. For instance, using ViT-B, DeepMIM on MAE achieves 84.2 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming MAE by +0.6. By combining DeepMIM with a stronger tokenizer CLIP, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks, including image classification (85.6 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, outperforming MAE-CLIP by +0.8), object detection (52.8 APbox on COCO) and semantic segmentation (53.1 mIoU on ADE20K). Code and models are available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM.
abstract_zh: 深度监督涉及对神经网络中间特征的额外监督，在早期深度学习时代被广泛应用于图像分类，因为它显着降低了训练难度并简化了优化，例如避免普通训练中的梯度消失。然而，随着归一化技术和残差连接的出现，图像分类中的深度监督逐渐被淘汰。在本文中，我们重新审视了掩模图像建模（MIM）的深度监督，该模型通过掩模和预测方案预训练视觉变换器（ViT）。通过实验，我们发现深度监督驱动较浅层学习更有意义的表示，加速模型收敛并扩大注意力多样性。我们的方法称为 DeepMIM，显着提高了每一层的表示能力。此外，DeepMIM 与一系列重建目标的许多 MIM 模型兼容。例如，使用 ViT-B，MAE 上的 DeepMIM 在 ImageNet 上实现了 84.2 top-1 准确率，比 MAE 高出 +0.6。通过将 DeepMIM 与更强大的分词器 CLIP 相结合，我们的模型在各种下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，包括图像分类（ImageNet-1K 上的 85.6 top-1 准确率，比 MAE-CLIP 高出 +0.8）、对象检测（COCO 上的 52.8 APbox）和语义分割（ADE20K 上的 53.1 mIoU）。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepMIM方法，通过在掩码图像建模（MIM）中引入深度监督机制，提升Vision Transformer（ViT）的预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统深度监督在图像分类中因归一化技术和残差连接的出现而被弱化，但作者发现其在MIM任务中仍能有效提升浅层特征学习、加速收敛并增强注意力多样性。
AI.method: 在ViT的中间层添加深度监督，结合掩码-预测框架，通过多层级监督信号优化模型表示能力，并兼容多种MIM模型（如MAE）及不同重建目标。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上实现84.2% top-1准确率（优于MAE 0.6%），结合CLIP tokenizer后，在ImageNet-1K（85.6%）、COCO目标检测（52.8 APbox）和ADE20K语义分割（53.1 mIoU）均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度监督显著增强MIM模型的表示能力，且具有良好的跨任务兼容性，为视觉预训练提供了有效改进方案。

search_text: DeepMIM: Deep Supervision for Masked Image Modeling DeepMIM：掩模图像建模的深度监督 Deep supervision, which involves extra supervisions to the intermediate features of a neural network, was widely used in image classification in the early deep learning era since it significantly reduces the training difficulty and eases the optimization like avoiding gradient vanish over the vanilla training. Nevertheless, with the emergence of normalization techniques and residual connection, deep supervision in image classification was gradually phased out. In this paper, we revisit deep supervision for masked image modeling (MIM) that pre-trains a Vision Transformer (ViT) via a mask-and-predict scheme. Experimentally, we find that deep supervision drives the shallower layers to learn more meaningful representations, accelerates model convergence, and expands attention diversities. Our approach, called DeepMIM, significantly boosts the representation capability of each layer. In addition, DeepMIM is compatible with many MIM models across a range of reconstruction targets. For instance, using ViT-B, DeepMIM on MAE achieves 84.2 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, outperforming MAE by +0.6. By combining DeepMIM with a stronger tokenizer CLIP, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on various downstream tasks, including image classification (85.6 top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, outperforming MAE-CLIP by +0.8), object detection (52.8 APbox on COCO) and semantic segmentation (53.1 mIoU on ADE20K). Code and models are available at https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM. 深度监督涉及对神经网络中间特征的额外监督，在早期深度学习时代被广泛应用于图像分类，因为它显着降低了训练难度并简化了优化，例如避免普通训练中的梯度消失。然而，随着归一化技术和残差连接的出现，图像分类中的深度监督逐渐被淘汰。在本文中，我们重新审视了掩模图像建模（MIM）的深度监督，该模型通过掩模和预测方案预训练视觉变换器（ViT）。通过实验，我们发现深度监督驱动较浅层学习更有意义的表示，加速模型收敛并扩大注意力多样性。我们的方法称为 DeepMIM，显着提高了每一层的表示能力。此外，DeepMIM 与一系列重建目标的许多 MIM 模型兼容。例如，使用 ViT-B，MAE 上的 DeepMIM 在 ImageNet 上实现了 84.2 top-1 准确率，比 MAE 高出 +0.6。通过将 DeepMIM 与更强大的分词器 CLIP 相结合，我们的模型在各种下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，包括图像分类（ImageNet-1K 上的 85.6 top-1 准确率，比 MAE-CLIP 高出 +0.8）、对象检测（COCO 上的 52.8 APbox）和语义分割（ADE20K 上的 53.1 mIoU）。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OliverRensu/DeepMIM 获取。 本文提出DeepMIM方法，通过在掩码图像建模（MIM）中引入深度监督机制，提升Vision Transformer（ViT）的预训练效果。 Sucheng Ren,Fangyun Wei,Samuel Albanie,Zheng Zhang,Han Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Bencheng Liao,Shaoyu Chen,Bo Jiang,Tianheng Cheng,Qian Zhang,Wenyu Liu,Chang Huang,Xinggang Wang
title: Lane Graph as Path: Continuity-preserving Path-wise Modeling for Online Lane Graph Construction
title_zh: 车道图作为路径：在线车道图构建的连续性保持路径建模
abstract: Online lane graph construction is a promising but challenging task in autonomous driving. Previous methods usually model the lane graph at the pixel or piece level, and recover the lane graph by pixel-wise or piece-wise connection, which breaks down the continuity of the lane and results in suboptimal performance. Human drivers focus on and drive along the continuous and complete paths instead of considering lane pieces. Autonomous vehicles also require path-specific guidance from lane graph for trajectory planning. We argue that the path, which indicates the traffic flow, is the primitive of the lane graph. Motivated by this, we propose to model the lane graph in a novel path-wise manner, which well preserves the continuity of the lane and encodes traffic information for planning. We present a path-based online lane graph construction method, termed LaneGAP, which end-to-end learns the path and recovers the lane graph via a Path2Graph algorithm. We qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the superior accuracy and efficiency of LaneGAP over conventional pixel-based and piece-based methods on the challenging nuScenes and Argoverse2 datasets under controllable and fair conditions. Compared to the recent state-of-the-art piece-wise method TopoNet on the OpenLane-V2 dataset, LaneGAP still outperforms by 1.6 mIoU, further validating the effectiveness of path-wise modeling. Abundant visualizations in the supplementary material show LaneGAP can cope with diverse traffic conditions. Code is released at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/LaneGAP}.
summary: Online lane graph construction is a promising but challenging task in autonomous driving. Previous methods usually model the lane graph at the pixel or piece level, and recover the lane graph by pixel-wise or piece-wise connection, which breaks down the continuity of the lane and results in suboptimal performance. Human drivers focus on and drive along the continuous and complete paths instead of considering lane pieces. Autonomous vehicles also require path-specific guidance from lane graph for trajectory planning. We argue that the path, which indicates the traffic flow, is the primitive of the lane graph. Motivated by this, we propose to model the lane graph in a novel path-wise manner, which well preserves the continuity of the lane and encodes traffic information for planning. We present a path-based online lane graph construction method, termed LaneGAP, which end-to-end learns the path and recovers the lane graph via a Path2Graph algorithm. We qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the superior accuracy and efficiency of LaneGAP over conventional pixel-based and piece-based methods on the challenging nuScenes and Argoverse2 datasets under controllable and fair conditions. Compared to the recent state-of-the-art piece-wise method TopoNet on the OpenLane-V2 dataset, LaneGAP still outperforms by 1.6 mIoU, further validating the effectiveness of path-wise modeling. Abundant visualizations in the supplementary material show LaneGAP can cope with diverse traffic conditions. Code is released at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/LaneGAP}.
abstract_zh: 在线车道图构建是自动驾驶中一项有前途但具有挑战性的任务。以前的方法通常在像素或片段级别对车道图进行建模，并通过像素级或分段连接来恢复车道图，这破坏了车道的连续性并导致性能次优。人类驾驶员关注并沿着连续且完整的路径行驶，而不是考虑车道片段。自动驾驶车辆还需要车道图的特定路径引导来进行轨迹规划。我们认为，表示交通流量的路径是车道图的基元。受此启发，我们建议以一种新颖的路径方式对车道图进行建模，这很好地保留了车道的连续性，并对交通信息进行编码以进行规划。我们提出了一种基于路径的在线车道图构建方法，称为 LaneGAP，该方法端到端学习路径并通过 Path2Graph 算法恢复车道图。我们在可控和公平的条件下，在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上定性和定量地证明了 LaneGAP 相对于传统的基于像素和基于片段的方法的卓越准确性和效率。与 OpenLane-V2 数据集上最新的分段方法 TopoNet 相比，LaneGAP 仍然优于 1.6 mIoU，进一步验证了路径建模的有效性。补充材料中的大量可视化显示 LaneGAP 可以应对不同的交通状况。代码发布于\url{https://github.com/hustvl/LaneGAP}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径的在线车道图构建方法LaneGAP，通过保持车道连续性来提升自动驾驶中的车道图建模效果。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级或片段级车道图建模方法破坏了车道连续性，而人类驾驶更关注连续路径。现有方法无法满足自动驾驶对路径规划的精确需求。
AI.method: 提出LaneGAP方法，通过Path2Graph算法端到端学习路径并重建车道图，以路径为基本单元建模交通流信息。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Argoverse2等数据集上优于传统方法，较TopoNet方法提升1.6 mIoU，可视化结果验证了复杂交通场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 路径级建模能更好保持车道连续性，为自动驾驶提供更准确的路径规划依据，验证了该方法在精度和效率上的优势。

authors_text: Mehdi Azabou,Michael Mendelson,Nauman Ahad,Maks Sorokin,Shantanu Thakoor,Carolina Urzay,Eva L. Dyer
title: Relax, it doesn't matter how you get there: A new self-supervised approach for multi-timescale behavior analysis
title_zh: 放松，如何到达那里并不重要：一种用于多时间尺度行为分析的新自我监督方法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.07041
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.07041
abstract: Natural behavior consists of dynamics that are complex and unpredictable, especially when trying to predict many steps into the future. While some success has been found in building representations of behavior under constrained or simplified task-based conditions, many of these models cannot be applied to free and naturalistic settings where behavior becomes increasingly hard to model. In this work, we develop a multi-task representation learning model for behavior that combines two novel components: (i) An action prediction objective that aims to predict the distribution of actions over future timesteps, and (ii) A multi-scale architecture that builds separate latent spaces to accommodate short- and long-term dynamics. After demonstrating the ability of the method to build representations of both local and global dynamics in realistic robots in varying environments and terrains, we apply our method to the MABe 2022 Multi-agent behavior challenge, where our model ranks 1st overall and on all global tasks, and 1st or 2nd on 7 out of 9 frame-level tasks. In all of these cases, we show that our model can build representations that capture the many different factors that drive behavior and solve a wide range of downstream tasks.
summary: Natural behavior consists of dynamics that are complex and unpredictable, especially when trying to predict many steps into the future. While some success has been found in building representations of behavior under constrained or simplified task-based conditions, many of these models cannot be applied to free and naturalistic settings where behavior becomes increasingly hard to model. In this work, we develop a multi-task representation learning model for behavior that combines two novel components: (i) An action prediction objective that aims to predict the distribution of actions over future timesteps, and (ii) A multi-scale architecture that builds separate latent spaces to accommodate short- and long-term dynamics. After demonstrating the ability of the method to build representations of both local and global dynamics in realistic robots in varying environments and terrains, we apply our method to the MABe 2022 Multi-agent behavior challenge, where our model ranks 1st overall and on all global tasks, and 1st or 2nd on 7 out of 9 frame-level tasks. In all of these cases, we show that our model can build representations that capture the many different factors that drive behavior and solve a wide range of downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 自然行为由复杂且不可预测的动态组成，尤其是在尝试预测未来的许多步骤时。虽然在受限或简化的基于任务的条件下构建行为表示方面已经取得了一些成功，但其中许多模型无法应用于自由和自然的环境，在这些环境中，行为变得越来越难以建模。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种行为的多任务表示学习模型，它结合了两个新颖的组件：（i）动作预测目标，旨在预测未来时间步长的动作分布，以及（ii）构建单独的潜在空间以适应短期和长期动态的多尺度架构。在展示了该方法在不同环境和地形的现实机器人中构建局部和全局动态表示的能力后，我们将我们的方法应用于 MABe 2022 多智能体行为挑战，其中我们的模型在所有全局任务中总体排名第一，在 9 个帧级任务中的 7 个中排名第一或第二。在所有这些情况下，我们表明我们的模型可以构建捕获驱动行为并解决各种下游任务的许多不同因素的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自监督多任务学习模型，用于捕捉自然行为中的多时间尺度动态，解决长期和短期行为预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有行为模型在受限条件下表现良好，但难以处理自由自然环境中复杂且不可预测的多步未来行为预测问题。
AI.method: 结合动作预测目标（预测未来动作分布）与多尺度架构（分离短长期动态的潜在空间）的多任务表示学习框架。
AI.result: 在真实机器人环境和MABe 2022挑战赛中，模型在全局任务排名第一，7/9帧级任务位列第一或第二。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉行为驱动因素，证明其在复杂环境下的多时间尺度行为建模能力与广泛适用性。

tldr: 本文提出一种新的自监督多任务学习模型，用于捕捉自然行为中的多时间尺度动态，解决长期和短期行为预测问题。
motivation: 现有行为模型在受限条件下表现良好，但难以处理自由自然环境中复杂且不可预测的多步未来行为预测问题。
method: 结合动作预测目标（预测未来动作分布）与多尺度架构（分离短长期动态的潜在空间）的多任务表示学习框架。
result: 在真实机器人环境和MABe 2022挑战赛中，模型在全局任务排名第一，7/9帧级任务位列第一或第二。
conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉行为驱动因素，证明其在复杂环境下的多时间尺度行为建模能力与广泛适用性。
search_text: Relax, it doesn't matter how you get there: A new self-supervised approach for multi-timescale behavior analysis 放松，如何到达那里并不重要：一种用于多时间尺度行为分析的新自我监督方法 Natural behavior consists of dynamics that are complex and unpredictable, especially when trying to predict many steps into the future. While some success has been found in building representations of behavior under constrained or simplified task-based conditions, many of these models cannot be applied to free and naturalistic settings where behavior becomes increasingly hard to model. In this work, we develop a multi-task representation learning model for behavior that combines two novel components: (i) An action prediction objective that aims to predict the distribution of actions over future timesteps, and (ii) A multi-scale architecture that builds separate latent spaces to accommodate short- and long-term dynamics. After demonstrating the ability of the method to build representations of both local and global dynamics in realistic robots in varying environments and terrains, we apply our method to the MABe 2022 Multi-agent behavior challenge, where our model ranks 1st overall and on all global tasks, and 1st or 2nd on 7 out of 9 frame-level tasks. In all of these cases, we show that our model can build representations that capture the many different factors that drive behavior and solve a wide range of downstream tasks. 自然行为由复杂且不可预测的动态组成，尤其是在尝试预测未来的许多步骤时。虽然在受限或简化的基于任务的条件下构建行为表示方面已经取得了一些成功，但其中许多模型无法应用于自由和自然的环境，在这些环境中，行为变得越来越难以建模。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种行为的多任务表示学习模型，它结合了两个新颖的组件：（i）动作预测目标，旨在预测未来时间步长的动作分布，以及（ii）构建单独的潜在空间以适应短期和长期动态的多尺度架构。在展示了该方法在不同环境和地形的现实机器人中构建局部和全局动态表示的能力后，我们将我们的方法应用于 MABe 2022 多智能体行为挑战，其中我们的模型在所有全局任务中总体排名第一，在 9 个帧级任务中的 7 个中排名第一或第二。在所有这些情况下，我们表明我们的模型可以构建捕获驱动行为并解决各种下游任务的许多不同因素的表示。 本文提出一种新的自监督多任务学习模型，用于捕捉自然行为中的多时间尺度动态，解决长期和短期行为预测问题。 Mehdi Azabou,Michael Mendelson,Nauman Ahad,Maks Sorokin,Shantanu Thakoor,Carolina Urzay,Eva L. Dyer cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Lei Zhu,Xinjiang Wang,Zhanghan Ke,Wayne Zhang,Rynson Lau
title: BiFormer: Vision Transformer with Bi-Level Routing Attention
title_zh: BiFormer：具有双层路由注意力的视觉变压器
abstract: As the core building block of vision transformers, attention is a powerful tool to capture long-range dependency. However, such power comes at a cost: it incurs a huge computation burden and heavy memory footprint as pairwise token interaction across all spatial locations is computed. A series of works attempt to alleviate this problem by introducing handcrafted and content-agnostic sparsity into attention, such as restricting the attention operation to be inside local windows, axial stripes, or dilated windows. In contrast to these approaches, we propose a novel dynamic sparse attention via bi-level routing to enable a more flexible allocation of computations with content awareness. Specifically, for a query, irrelevant key-value pairs are first filtered out at a coarse region level, and then fine-grained token-to-token attention is applied in the union of remaining candidate regions (\ie, routed regions). We provide a simple yet effective implementation of the proposed bi-level routing attention, which utilizes the sparsity to save both computation and memory while involving only GPU-friendly dense matrix multiplications. Built with the proposed bi-level routing attention, a new general vision transformer, named BiFormer, is then presented. As BiFormer attends to a small subset of relevant tokens in a \textbf{query adaptive} manner without distraction from other irrelevant ones, it enjoys both good performance and high computational efficiency, especially in dense prediction tasks. Empirical results across several computer vision tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation verify the effectiveness of our design. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/rayleizhu/BiFormer}.
summary: As the core building block of vision transformers, attention is a powerful tool to capture long-range dependency. However, such power comes at a cost: it incurs a huge computation burden and heavy memory footprint as pairwise token interaction across all spatial locations is computed. A series of works attempt to alleviate this problem by introducing handcrafted and content-agnostic sparsity into attention, such as restricting the attention operation to be inside local windows, axial stripes, or dilated windows. In contrast to these approaches, we propose a novel dynamic sparse attention via bi-level routing to enable a more flexible allocation of computations with content awareness. Specifically, for a query, irrelevant key-value pairs are first filtered out at a coarse region level, and then fine-grained token-to-token attention is applied in the union of remaining candidate regions (\ie, routed regions). We provide a simple yet effective implementation of the proposed bi-level routing attention, which utilizes the sparsity to save both computation and memory while involving only GPU-friendly dense matrix multiplications. Built with the proposed bi-level routing attention, a new general vision transformer, named BiFormer, is then presented. As BiFormer attends to a small subset of relevant tokens in a \textbf{query adaptive} manner without distraction from other irrelevant ones, it enjoys both good performance and high computational efficiency, especially in dense prediction tasks. Empirical results across several computer vision tasks such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation verify the effectiveness of our design. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/rayleizhu/BiFormer}.
abstract_zh: 作为视觉转换器的核心构建块，注意力是捕获远程依赖性的强大工具。然而，这种能力是有代价的：当计算所有空间位置上的成对令牌交互时，它会带来巨大的计算负担和沉重的内存占用。一系列工作试图通过将手工制作的和内容无关的稀疏性引入注意力来缓解这个问题，例如将注意力操作限制在局部窗口、轴向条纹或扩张窗口内。与这些方法相反，我们通过双层路由提出了一种新颖的动态稀疏注意力，以通过内容感知实现更灵活的计算分配。具体来说，对于查询，首先在粗略区域级别过滤掉不相关的键值对，然后在剩余候选区域（即路由区域）的联合中应用细粒度的令牌到令牌注意。我们提供了所提出的双层路由注意力的简单而有效的实现，它利用稀疏性来节省计算和内存，同时仅涉及 GPU 友好的密集矩阵乘法。利用所提出的双层路由注意力构建，提出了一种新的通用视觉变换器，名为 BiFormer。由于 BiFormer 以 \textbf{query Adaptive} 方式处理一小部分相关标记，而不会分散其他不相关标记的注意力，因此它具有良好的性能和高计算效率，特别是在密集的预测任务中。图像分类、对象检测和语义分割等多个计算机视觉任务的实证结果验证了我们设计的有效性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/rayleizhu/BiFormer} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BiFormer的视觉Transformer模型，通过双级路由注意力机制实现高效计算。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer的注意力机制计算量大且内存消耗高，现有稀疏化方法缺乏内容感知的灵活性。
AI.method: 设计双级路由注意力机制：先在粗粒度区域过滤无关键值对，再在剩余候选区域进行细粒度注意力计算，仅使用GPU友好的密集矩阵乘法。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割等任务中验证了BiFormer的有效性，尤其在密集预测任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: BiFormer通过自适应选择相关token，在保持性能的同时显著提升计算效率，为视觉Transformer提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuan Tseng,Cheng-I Lai,Hung-yi Lee
title: Cascading and Direct Approaches to Unsupervised Constituency Parsing on Spoken Sentences
title_zh: 口语句子无监督选区解析的级联和直接方法
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2023; updated compute resource acknowledgements
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2023; updated compute resource acknowledgements
abstract: Past work on unsupervised parsing is constrained to written form. In this paper, we present the first study on unsupervised spoken constituency parsing given unlabeled spoken sentences and unpaired textual data. The goal is to determine the spoken sentences' hierarchical syntactic structure in the form of constituency parse trees, such that each node is a span of audio that corresponds to a constituent. We compare two approaches: (1) cascading an unsupervised automatic speech recognition (ASR) model and an unsupervised parser to obtain parse trees on ASR transcripts, and (2) direct training an unsupervised parser on continuous word-level speech representations. This is done by first splitting utterances into sequences of word-level segments, and aggregating self-supervised speech representations within segments to obtain segment embeddings. We find that separately training a parser on the unpaired text and directly applying it on ASR transcripts for inference produces better results for unsupervised parsing. Additionally, our results suggest that accurate segmentation alone may be sufficient to parse spoken sentences accurately. Finally, we show the direct approach may learn head-directionality correctly for both head-initial and head-final languages without any explicit inductive bias.
summary: Past work on unsupervised parsing is constrained to written form. In this paper, we present the first study on unsupervised spoken constituency parsing given unlabeled spoken sentences and unpaired textual data. The goal is to determine the spoken sentences' hierarchical syntactic structure in the form of constituency parse trees, such that each node is a span of audio that corresponds to a constituent. We compare two approaches: (1) cascading an unsupervised automatic speech recognition (ASR) model and an unsupervised parser to obtain parse trees on ASR transcripts, and (2) direct training an unsupervised parser on continuous word-level speech representations. This is done by first splitting utterances into sequences of word-level segments, and aggregating self-supervised speech representations within segments to obtain segment embeddings. We find that separately training a parser on the unpaired text and directly applying it on ASR transcripts for inference produces better results for unsupervised parsing. Additionally, our results suggest that accurate segmentation alone may be sufficient to parse spoken sentences accurately. Finally, we show the direct approach may learn head-directionality correctly for both head-initial and head-final languages without any explicit inductive bias.
abstract_zh: 过去有关无监督解析的工作仅限于书面形式。在本文中，我们提出了第一个关于给定未标记口语句子和未配对文本数据的无监督口语选区解析的研究。目标是以选区解析树的形式确定口语句子的分层句法结构，使得每个节点都是对应于一个成分的音频范围。我们比较了两种方法：(1) 级联无监督自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型和无监督解析器以获得 ASR 转录本上的解析树，以及 (2) 在连续词级语音表示上直接训练无监督解析器。这是通过首先将话语分割成单词级片段序列，然后聚合片段内的自监督语音表示以获得片段嵌入来完成的。我们发现，在未配对的文本上单独训练解析器并直接将其应用于 ASR 转录本进行推理，可以为无监督解析产生更好的结果。此外，我们的结果表明，仅准确的分割就足以准确地解析口语句子。最后，我们证明直接方法可以正确地学习中心词首语言和中心词尾语言的头部方向性，而无需任何显式的归纳偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两种无监督方法用于语音句子的成分句法分析，比较了级联自动语音识别模型与解析器的方案，以及直接基于语音表示训练解析器的方案。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督解析研究仅针对书面文本，而语音数据因识别误差和连续性挑战难以处理。需探索无需人工标注的语音句法分析方法。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：(1) 级联无监督ASR模型与解析器，通过ASR转录文本生成解析树；(2) 直接在语音分段的自监督表示上训练解析器，利用分段嵌入实现端到端解析。
AI.result: 单独训练文本解析器并应用于ASR转录效果更优；准确分段可能独立实现语音解析；直接方法可正确学习头方向性，适用于头初始/头终语言。
AI.conclusion: 直接基于语音表示的无监督解析方法有效，分段质量关键，且无需显式语言偏见即可处理不同语言结构。

conclusion: 直接基于语音表示的无监督解析方法有效，分段质量关键，且无需显式语言偏见即可处理不同语言结构。
search_text: Cascading and Direct Approaches to Unsupervised Constituency Parsing on Spoken Sentences 口语句子无监督选区解析的级联和直接方法 Past work on unsupervised parsing is constrained to written form. In this paper, we present the first study on unsupervised spoken constituency parsing given unlabeled spoken sentences and unpaired textual data. The goal is to determine the spoken sentences' hierarchical syntactic structure in the form of constituency parse trees, such that each node is a span of audio that corresponds to a constituent. We compare two approaches: (1) cascading an unsupervised automatic speech recognition (ASR) model and an unsupervised parser to obtain parse trees on ASR transcripts, and (2) direct training an unsupervised parser on continuous word-level speech representations. This is done by first splitting utterances into sequences of word-level segments, and aggregating self-supervised speech representations within segments to obtain segment embeddings. We find that separately training a parser on the unpaired text and directly applying it on ASR transcripts for inference produces better results for unsupervised parsing. Additionally, our results suggest that accurate segmentation alone may be sufficient to parse spoken sentences accurately. Finally, we show the direct approach may learn head-directionality correctly for both head-initial and head-final languages without any explicit inductive bias. 过去有关无监督解析的工作仅限于书面形式。在本文中，我们提出了第一个关于给定未标记口语句子和未配对文本数据的无监督口语选区解析的研究。目标是以选区解析树的形式确定口语句子的分层句法结构，使得每个节点都是对应于一个成分的音频范围。我们比较了两种方法：(1) 级联无监督自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型和无监督解析器以获得 ASR 转录本上的解析树，以及 (2) 在连续词级语音表示上直接训练无监督解析器。这是通过首先将话语分割成单词级片段序列，然后聚合片段内的自监督语音表示以获得片段嵌入来完成的。我们发现，在未配对的文本上单独训练解析器并直接将其应用于 ASR 转录本进行推理，可以为无监督解析产生更好的结果。此外，我们的结果表明，仅准确的分割就足以准确地解析口语句子。最后，我们证明直接方法可以正确地学习中心词首语言和中心词尾语言的头部方向性，而无需任何显式的归纳偏差。 本文研究了两种无监督方法用于语音句子的成分句法分析，比较了级联自动语音识别模型与解析器的方案，以及直接基于语音表示训练解析器的方案。 Yuan Tseng,Cheng-I Lai,Hung-yi Lee cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Rohit Jena,Pratik Chaudhari,James Gee,Ganesh Iyer,Siddharth Choudhary,Brandon M. Smith
title: Mesh Strikes Back: Fast and Efficient Human Reconstruction from RGB videos
title_zh: 网格反击：从 RGB 视频快速高效地重建人体
abstract: Human reconstruction and synthesis from monocular RGB videos is a challenging problem due to clothing, occlusion, texture discontinuities and sharpness, and framespecific pose changes. Many methods employ deferred rendering, NeRFs and implicit methods to represent clothed humans, on the premise that mesh-based representations cannot capture complex clothing and textures from RGB, silhouettes, and keypoints alone. We provide a counter viewpoint to this fundamental premise by optimizing a SMPL+D mesh and an efficient, multi-resolution texture representation using only RGB images, binary silhouettes and sparse 2D keypoints. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach is more capable of capturing geometric details compared to visual hull, mesh-based methods. We show competitive novel view synthesis and improvements in novel pose synthesis compared to NeRF-based methods, which introduce noticeable, unwanted artifacts. By restricting the solution space to the SMPL+D model combined with differentiable rendering, we obtain dramatic speedups in compute, training times (up to 24x) and inference times (up to 192x). Our method therefore can be used as is or as a fast initialization to NeRF-based methods.
summary: Human reconstruction and synthesis from monocular RGB videos is a challenging problem due to clothing, occlusion, texture discontinuities and sharpness, and framespecific pose changes. Many methods employ deferred rendering, NeRFs and implicit methods to represent clothed humans, on the premise that mesh-based representations cannot capture complex clothing and textures from RGB, silhouettes, and keypoints alone. We provide a counter viewpoint to this fundamental premise by optimizing a SMPL+D mesh and an efficient, multi-resolution texture representation using only RGB images, binary silhouettes and sparse 2D keypoints. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach is more capable of capturing geometric details compared to visual hull, mesh-based methods. We show competitive novel view synthesis and improvements in novel pose synthesis compared to NeRF-based methods, which introduce noticeable, unwanted artifacts. By restricting the solution space to the SMPL+D model combined with differentiable rendering, we obtain dramatic speedups in compute, training times (up to 24x) and inference times (up to 192x). Our method therefore can be used as is or as a fast initialization to NeRF-based methods.
abstract_zh: 由于服装、遮挡、纹理不连续性和清晰度以及特定于帧的姿势变化，单眼 RGB 视频的人体重建和合成是一个具有挑战性的问题。许多方法采用延迟渲染、NeRF 和隐式方法来表示穿着衣服的人类，前提是基于网格的表示无法仅从 RGB、轮廓和关键点捕获复杂的服装和纹理。我们通过优化 SMPL+D 网格和仅使用 RGB 图像、二进制轮廓和稀疏 2D 关键点的高效、多分辨率纹理表示，为这一基本前提提供了相反的观点。实验结果表明，与视觉船体、基于网格的方法相比，我们的方法更能够捕获几何细节。与基于 NeRF 的方法相比，我们展示了具有竞争力的新颖视图合成和新颖姿势合成的改进，这些方法引入了明显的、不需要的伪影。通过将解决方案空间限制为 SMPL+D 模型并结合可微分渲染，我们在计算、训练时间（高达 24 倍）和推理时间（高达 192 倍）方面获得了显着的加速。因此，我们的方法可以按原样使用，也可以作为基于 NeRF 的方法的快速初始化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RGB视频的高效人体重建方法，挑战了传统认为网格表示无法捕捉复杂服装和纹理的观点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理服装、遮挡等问题时存在局限性，且依赖NeRF等方法导致计算效率低下，而网格表示被认为无法单独从RGB图像中重建复杂细节。
AI.method: 通过优化SMPL+D网格与多分辨率纹理表示，结合RGB图像、二值轮廓和稀疏2D关键点，利用可微分渲染实现高效重建。
AI.result: 相比视觉外壳和基于网格的方法，几何细节更优；相比NeRF方法，新视角合成效果相当且计算速度提升24倍（训练）和192倍（推理）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在速度和精度上优于现有技术，可直接使用或作为NeRF方法的快速初始化方案。

authors_text: Gianluigi Lopardo,Frederic Precioso,Damien Garreau
title: Understanding Post-hoc Explainers: The Case of Anchors
title_zh: 了解事后解释者：锚点的案例
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13789
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.13789
abstract: In many scenarios, the interpretability of machine learning models is a highly required but difficult task. To explain the individual predictions of such models, local model-agnostic approaches have been proposed. However, the process generating the explanations can be, for a user, as mysterious as the prediction to be explained. Furthermore, interpretability methods frequently lack theoretical guarantees, and their behavior on simple models is frequently unknown. While it is difficult, if not impossible, to ensure that an explainer behaves as expected on a cutting-edge model, we can at least ensure that everything works on simple, already interpretable models. In this paper, we present a theoretical analysis of Anchors (Ribeiro et al., 2018): a popular rule-based interpretability method that highlights a small set of words to explain a text classifier's decision. After formalizing its algorithm and providing useful insights, we demonstrate mathematically that Anchors produces meaningful results when used with linear text classifiers on top of a TF-IDF vectorization. We believe that our analysis framework can aid in the development of new explainability methods based on solid theoretical foundations.
summary: In many scenarios, the interpretability of machine learning models is a highly required but difficult task. To explain the individual predictions of such models, local model-agnostic approaches have been proposed. However, the process generating the explanations can be, for a user, as mysterious as the prediction to be explained. Furthermore, interpretability methods frequently lack theoretical guarantees, and their behavior on simple models is frequently unknown. While it is difficult, if not impossible, to ensure that an explainer behaves as expected on a cutting-edge model, we can at least ensure that everything works on simple, already interpretable models. In this paper, we present a theoretical analysis of Anchors (Ribeiro et al., 2018): a popular rule-based interpretability method that highlights a small set of words to explain a text classifier's decision. After formalizing its algorithm and providing useful insights, we demonstrate mathematically that Anchors produces meaningful results when used with linear text classifiers on top of a TF-IDF vectorization. We believe that our analysis framework can aid in the development of new explainability methods based on solid theoretical foundations.
abstract_zh: 在许多场景中，机器学习模型的可解释性是一项要求很高但又很困难的任务。为了解释此类模型的单独预测，提出了局部模型不可知的方法。然而，对于用户来说，生成解释的过程可能与要解释的预测一样神秘。此外，可解释性方法常常缺乏理论保证，并且它们在简单模型上的行为通常是未知的。虽然确保解释器在尖端模型上的行为符合预期是很困难的（如果不是不可能的话），但我们至少可以确保一切都在简单的、已经可解释的模型上运行。在本文中，我们提出了 Anchors 的理论分析（Ribeiro et al., 2018）：一种流行的基于规则的可解释性方法，突出显示一小组单词来解释文本分类器的决策。在形式化其算法并提供有用的见解之后，我们从数学上证明了 Anchors 在 TF-IDF 矢量化之上与线性文本分类器一起使用时会产生有意义的结果。我们相信，我们的分析框架可以帮助开发基于坚实理论基础的新的可解释性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于规则的可解释性方法Anchors进行理论分析，验证其在简单线性文本分类器上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法缺乏理论保证，且其在简单模型上的行为尚不明确，需建立理论框架确保解释方法的可靠性。
AI.method: 形式化Anchors算法并结合TF-IDF向量化的线性分类器进行数学推导与分析。
AI.result: 数学证明Anchors在TF-IDF向量化和线性分类器组合下能生成有意义的解释结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分析框架可为未来基于理论基础的可解释性方法开发提供指导。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出的分析框架可为未来基于理论基础的可解释性方法开发提供指导。

authors_text: Logan Ward,J. Gregory Pauloski,Valerie Hayot-Sasson,Ryan Chard,Yadu Babuji,Ganesh Sivaraman,Sutanay Choudhury,Kyle Chard,Rajeev Thakur,Ian Foster
title: Cloud Services Enable Efficient AI-Guided Simulation Workflows across Heterogeneous Resources
title_zh: 云服务支持跨异构资源的高效人工智能引导仿真工作流程
abstract: Applications that fuse machine learning and simulation can benefit from the use of multiple computing resources, with, for example, simulation codes running on highly parallel supercomputers and AI training and inference tasks on specialized accelerators. Here, we present our experiences deploying two AI-guided simulation workflows across such heterogeneous systems. A unique aspect of our approach is our use of cloud-hosted management services to manage challenging aspects of cross-resource authentication and authorization, function-as-a-service (FaaS) function invocation, and data transfer. We show that these methods can achieve performance parity with systems that rely on direct connection between resources. We achieve parity by integrating the FaaS system and data transfer capabilities with a system that passes data by reference among managers and workers, and a user-configurable steering algorithm to hide data transfer latencies. We anticipate that this ease of use can enable routine use of heterogeneous resources in computational science.
summary: Applications that fuse machine learning and simulation can benefit from the use of multiple computing resources, with, for example, simulation codes running on highly parallel supercomputers and AI training and inference tasks on specialized accelerators. Here, we present our experiences deploying two AI-guided simulation workflows across such heterogeneous systems. A unique aspect of our approach is our use of cloud-hosted management services to manage challenging aspects of cross-resource authentication and authorization, function-as-a-service (FaaS) function invocation, and data transfer. We show that these methods can achieve performance parity with systems that rely on direct connection between resources. We achieve parity by integrating the FaaS system and data transfer capabilities with a system that passes data by reference among managers and workers, and a user-configurable steering algorithm to hide data transfer latencies. We anticipate that this ease of use can enable routine use of heterogeneous resources in computational science.
abstract_zh: 融合机器学习和模拟的应用程序可以受益于多种计算资源的使用，例如，在高度并行的超级计算机上运行的模拟代码以及在专用加速器上运行的人工智能训练和推理任务。在这里，我们展示了在此类异构系统中部署两个人工智能引导的模拟工作流程的经验。我们方法的一个独特之处是我们使用云托管的管理服务来管理跨资源身份验证和授权、功能即服务 (FaaS) 功能调用和数据传输等具有挑战性的方面。我们证明这些方法可以实现与依赖资源之间直接连接的系统相同的性能。我们通过将 FaaS 系统和数据传输功能与在经理和工作人员之间通过引用传递数据的系统以及用户可配置的转向算法来隐藏数据传输延迟来实现奇偶校验。我们预计这种易用性可以实现计算科学中异构资源的常规使用。

AI.motivation: 传统方法在跨异构资源协作时面临认证、授权及数据传输等挑战，需更高效管理方案。
AI.method: 通过云托管服务处理认证授权，集成FaaS与数据传输功能，并采用引用传递数据和可配置算法隐藏延迟。
AI.result: 实现与直接连接系统相当的性能，有效降低数据传输延迟影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简化了异构资源管理，有望推动计算科学中跨资源协作的常规化应用。

search_text: Cloud Services Enable Efficient AI-Guided Simulation Workflows across Heterogeneous Resources 云服务支持跨异构资源的高效人工智能引导仿真工作流程 Applications that fuse machine learning and simulation can benefit from the use of multiple computing resources, with, for example, simulation codes running on highly parallel supercomputers and AI training and inference tasks on specialized accelerators. Here, we present our experiences deploying two AI-guided simulation workflows across such heterogeneous systems. A unique aspect of our approach is our use of cloud-hosted management services to manage challenging aspects of cross-resource authentication and authorization, function-as-a-service (FaaS) function invocation, and data transfer. We show that these methods can achieve performance parity with systems that rely on direct connection between resources. We achieve parity by integrating the FaaS system and data transfer capabilities with a system that passes data by reference among managers and workers, and a user-configurable steering algorithm to hide data transfer latencies. We anticipate that this ease of use can enable routine use of heterogeneous resources in computational science. 融合机器学习和模拟的应用程序可以受益于多种计算资源的使用，例如，在高度并行的超级计算机上运行的模拟代码以及在专用加速器上运行的人工智能训练和推理任务。在这里，我们展示了在此类异构系统中部署两个人工智能引导的模拟工作流程的经验。我们方法的一个独特之处是我们使用云托管的管理服务来管理跨资源身份验证和授权、功能即服务 (FaaS) 功能调用和数据传输等具有挑战性的方面。我们证明这些方法可以实现与依赖资源之间直接连接的系统相同的性能。我们通过将 FaaS 系统和数据传输功能与在经理和工作人员之间通过引用传递数据的系统以及用户可配置的转向算法来隐藏数据传输延迟来实现奇偶校验。我们预计这种易用性可以实现计算科学中异构资源的常规使用。 本文提出利用云服务管理跨异构资源的AI引导模拟流程，以提高计算效率。 Logan Ward,J. authors_text: Kazem Taghandiki
title: Building an Effective Email Spam Classification Model with spaCy
title_zh: 使用 spaCy 构建有效的垃圾邮件分类模型
abstract: Today, people use email services such as Gmail, Outlook, AOL Mail, etc. to communicate with each other as quickly as possible to send information and official letters. Spam or junk mail is a major challenge to this type of communication, usually sent by botnets with the aim of advertising, harming and stealing information in bulk to different people. Receiving unwanted spam emails on a daily basis fills up the inbox folder. Therefore, spam detection is a fundamental challenge, so far many works have been done to detect spam using clustering and text categorisation methods. In this article, the author has used the spaCy natural language processing library and 3 machine learning (ML) algorithms Naive Bayes (NB), Decision Tree C45 and Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) in the Python programming language to detect spam emails collected from the Gmail service. Observations show the accuracy rate (96%) of the Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) algorithm in spam detection.
summary: Today, people use email services such as Gmail, Outlook, AOL Mail, etc. to communicate with each other as quickly as possible to send information and official letters. Spam or junk mail is a major challenge to this type of communication, usually sent by botnets with the aim of advertising, harming and stealing information in bulk to different people. Receiving unwanted spam emails on a daily basis fills up the inbox folder. Therefore, spam detection is a fundamental challenge, so far many works have been done to detect spam using clustering and text categorisation methods. In this article, the author has used the spaCy natural language processing library and 3 machine learning (ML) algorithms Naive Bayes (NB), Decision Tree C45 and Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) in the Python programming language to detect spam emails collected from the Gmail service. Observations show the accuracy rate (96%) of the Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) algorithm in spam detection.
abstract_zh: 如今，人们使用 Gmail、Outlook、AOL Mail 等电子邮件服务来尽可能快地相互沟通，发送信息和正式信件。垃圾邮件或垃圾邮件是此类通信的主要挑战，通常由僵尸网络发送，目的是向不同的人批量宣传、损害和窃取信息。每天收到不需要的垃圾邮件会填满收件箱文件夹。因此，垃圾邮件检测是一个根本性的挑战，到目前为止，已经做了很多使用聚类和文本分类方法来检测垃圾邮件的工作。在本文中，作者使用Python编程语言中的spaCy自然语言处理库和3种机器学习（ML）算法朴素贝叶斯（NB）、决策树C45和多层感知器（MLP）来检测从Gmail服务收集的垃圾邮件。观察结果表明，多层感知器 (MLP) 算法在垃圾邮件检测中的准确率 (96%)。

AI.tldr: 使用spaCy库和三种机器学习算法构建高效的电子邮件垃圾分类模型
AI.motivation: 垃圾邮件对电子邮件通信构成挑战，现有方法效果有限，需更高效的检测技术
AI.method: 采用spaCy进行文本处理，结合朴素贝叶斯、决策树C45和多层感知器（MLP）算法，基于Gmail收集的数据进行训练和测试
AI.result: 多层感知器（MLP）算法在垃圾邮件检测中达到96%的准确率
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，结合spaCy与MLP算法能有效提升垃圾邮件检测准确率，为实际应用提供参考
