authors_text: Rui Zhou,Yan Niu
title: Multi-Exposure HDR Composition by Gated Swin Transformer
title_zh: Gated Swin Transformer 的多重曝光 HDR 合成
abstract: Fusing a sequence of perfectly aligned images captured at various exposures, has shown great potential to approach High Dynamic Range (HDR) imaging by sensors with limited dynamic range. However, in the presence of large motion of scene objects or the camera, mis-alignment is almost inevitable and leads to the notorious ``ghost'' artifacts. Besides, factors such as the noise in the dark region or color saturation in the over-bright region may also fail to fill local image details to the HDR image. This paper provides a novel multi-exposure fusion model based on Swin Transformer. Particularly, we design feature selection gates, which are integrated with the feature extraction layers to detect outliers and block them from HDR image synthesis. To reconstruct the missing local details by well-aligned and properly-exposed regions, we exploit the long distance contextual dependency in the exposure-space pyramid by the self-attention mechanism. Extensive numerical and visual evaluation has been conducted on a variety of benchmark datasets. The experiments show that our model achieves the accuracy on par with current top performing multi-exposure HDR imaging models, while gaining higher efficiency.
summary: Fusing a sequence of perfectly aligned images captured at various exposures, has shown great potential to approach High Dynamic Range (HDR) imaging by sensors with limited dynamic range. However, in the presence of large motion of scene objects or the camera, mis-alignment is almost inevitable and leads to the notorious ``ghost'' artifacts. Besides, factors such as the noise in the dark region or color saturation in the over-bright region may also fail to fill local image details to the HDR image. This paper provides a novel multi-exposure fusion model based on Swin Transformer. Particularly, we design feature selection gates, which are integrated with the feature extraction layers to detect outliers and block them from HDR image synthesis. To reconstruct the missing local details by well-aligned and properly-exposed regions, we exploit the long distance contextual dependency in the exposure-space pyramid by the self-attention mechanism. Extensive numerical and visual evaluation has been conducted on a variety of benchmark datasets. The experiments show that our model achieves the accuracy on par with current top performing multi-exposure HDR imaging models, while gaining higher efficiency.
abstract_zh: 融合在不同曝光下捕获的一系列完美对齐的图像，显​​示出通过动态范围有限的传感器实现高动态范围 (HDR) 成像的巨大潜力。然而，在场景对象或相机发生较大运动的情况下，未对准几乎是不可避免的，并导致臭名昭著的“重影”伪影。此外，暗区的噪声或过亮区的色彩饱和度等因素也可能无法将局部图像细节填充到HDR图像中。本文提供了一种基于 Swin Transformer 的新颖的多重曝光融合模型。特别是，我们设计了特征选择门，将其与特征提取层集成以检测异常值并阻止它们进行 HDR 图像合成。为了通过良好对齐和适当曝光的区域重建丢失的局部细节，我们通过自注意力机制利用曝光空间金字塔中的长距离上下文依赖。对各种基准数据集进行了广泛的数值和视觉评估。实验表明，我们的模型达到了与当前性能最佳的多重曝光 HDR 成像模型相当的精度，同时获得了更高的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于门控Swin Transformer的多曝光HDR融合模型，解决运动场景下的鬼影伪影和局部细节缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR算法在场景运动或相机移动时易产生鬼影伪影，且暗区噪声和亮区饱和度会导致局部细节丢失，需更高效的融合方法。
AI.method: 设计特征选择门机制过滤异常特征，结合Swin Transformer的自注意力机制建模曝光空间金字塔中的长距离依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验显示，模型精度与当前最佳方法相当，但计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过门控机制和自注意力有效抑制运动伪影并重建细节，在HDR质量与效率间取得平衡。

authors_text: Mohamed Elminshawi,Srikanth Raj Chetupalli,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: Beamformer-Guided Target Speaker Extraction
title_zh: 波束形成器引导的目标扬声器提取
comment: Submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: Submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: We propose a Beamformer-guided Target Speaker Extraction (BG-TSE) method to extract a target speaker's voice from a multi-channel recording informed by the direction of arrival of the target. The proposed method employs a front-end beamformer steered towards the target speaker to provide an auxiliary signal to a single-channel TSE system. By allowing for time-varying embeddings in the single-channel TSE block, the proposed method fully exploits the correspondence between the front-end beamformer output and the target speech in the microphone signal. Experimental evaluation on simulated multi-channel 2-speaker mixtures, in both anechoic and reverberant conditions, demonstrates the advantage of the proposed method compared to recent single-channel and multi-channel baselines.
summary: We propose a Beamformer-guided Target Speaker Extraction (BG-TSE) method to extract a target speaker's voice from a multi-channel recording informed by the direction of arrival of the target. The proposed method employs a front-end beamformer steered towards the target speaker to provide an auxiliary signal to a single-channel TSE system. By allowing for time-varying embeddings in the single-channel TSE block, the proposed method fully exploits the correspondence between the front-end beamformer output and the target speech in the microphone signal. Experimental evaluation on simulated multi-channel 2-speaker mixtures, in both anechoic and reverberant conditions, demonstrates the advantage of the proposed method compared to recent single-channel and multi-channel baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种波束形成器引导的目标说话人提取（BG-TSE）方法，从根据目标到达方向通知的多通道录音中提取目标说话人的声音。所提出的方法采用指向目标扬声器的前端波束形成器，为单通道 TSE 系统提供辅助信号。通过允许单通道 TSE 块中的时变嵌入，所提出的方法充分利用了前端波束形成器输出与麦克风信号中的目标语音之间的对应关系。在消声和混响条件下对模拟多通道 2 扬声器混合进行的实验评估表明，与最近的单通道和多通道基线相比，所提出的方法具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合波束成形与单通道说话人提取的多通道目标说话人分离方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单通道说话人提取在复杂声学环境和多说话人干扰下效果有限，而多通道方法需解决方向信息与语音信号的对齐问题。
AI.method: 通过波束成形器获取目标方向的辅助信号，结合时间可变嵌入的单通道TSE模块，建立波束成形输出与麦克风信号中目标语音的对应关系。
AI.result: 在无混响和混响环境下，模拟两说话人混合信号测试显示该方法优于最新单通道和多通道基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 波束成形引导的时变嵌入机制有效提升了多通道目标说话人提取性能，为复杂场景语音分离提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhicai Wang,Yanbin Hao,Tingting Mu,Ouxiang Li,Shuo Wang,Xiangnan He
title: Bi-directional Distribution Alignment for Transductive Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于传导零样本学习的双向分布对齐
abstract: It is well-known that zero-shot learning (ZSL) can suffer severely from the problem of domain shift, where the true and learned data distributions for the unseen classes do not match. Although transductive ZSL (TZSL) attempts to improve this by allowing the use of unlabelled examples from the unseen classes, there is still a high level of distribution shift. We propose a novel TZSL model (named as Bi-VAEGAN), which largely improves the shift by a strengthened distribution alignment between the visual and auxiliary spaces. The key proposal of the model design includes (1) a bi-directional distribution alignment, (2) a simple but effective L_2-norm based feature normalization approach, and (3) a more sophisticated unseen class prior estimation approach. In benchmark evaluation using four datasets, Bi-VAEGAN achieves the new state of the arts under both the standard and generalized TZSL settings. Code could be found at https://github.com/Zhicaiwww/Bi-VAEGAN
summary: It is well-known that zero-shot learning (ZSL) can suffer severely from the problem of domain shift, where the true and learned data distributions for the unseen classes do not match. Although transductive ZSL (TZSL) attempts to improve this by allowing the use of unlabelled examples from the unseen classes, there is still a high level of distribution shift. We propose a novel TZSL model (named as Bi-VAEGAN), which largely improves the shift by a strengthened distribution alignment between the visual and auxiliary spaces. The key proposal of the model design includes (1) a bi-directional distribution alignment, (2) a simple but effective L_2-norm based feature normalization approach, and (3) a more sophisticated unseen class prior estimation approach. In benchmark evaluation using four datasets, Bi-VAEGAN achieves the new state of the arts under both the standard and generalized TZSL settings. Code could be found at https://github.com/Zhicaiwww/Bi-VAEGAN
abstract_zh: 众所周知，零样本学习（ZSL）可能会严重受到域转移问题的影响，其中未见过的类的真实数据分布和学习到的数据分布不匹配。尽管转导式 ZSL (TZSL) 试图通过允许使用未见过的类中的未标记示例来改进这一点，但仍然存在较高水平的分布偏移。我们提出了一种新颖的 TZSL 模型（称为 Bi-VAEGAN），它通过加强视觉空间和辅助空间之间的分布对齐来很大程度上改善移动。模型设计的关键建议包括（1）双向分布对齐，（2）简单但有效的基于L_2范数的特征归一化方法，以及（3）更复杂的看不见的类先验估计方法。在使用四个数据集的基准评估中，Bi-VAEGAN 在标准和广义 TZSL 设置下都实现了新的技术水平。代码可以在 https://github.com/Zhicaiwww/Bi-VAEGAN 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Bi-VAEGAN的归纳零样本学习模型，通过双向分布对齐解决视觉与辅助空间的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有归纳零样本学习方法在未见类分布对齐上仍存在显著偏移，需通过增强跨模态分布对齐来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计包含双向分布对齐机制、L2范数特征归一化及改进的未见类先验估计三重技术的Bi-VAEGAN框架。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，该方法在标准和广义归纳零样本学习场景中均达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 双向分布对齐与特征归一化策略有效缓解了领域偏移问题，验证了跨模态分布对齐在归纳零样本学习中的关键作用。

authors_text: Canwen Xu,Julian McAuley,Penghan Wang
title: Mirror: A Natural Language Interface for Data Querying, Summarization, and Visualization
title_zh: Mirror：用于数据查询、汇总和可视化的自然语言接口
abstract: We present Mirror, an open-source platform for data exploration and analysis powered by large language models. Mirror offers an intuitive natural language interface for querying databases, and automatically generates executable SQL commands to retrieve relevant data and summarize it in natural language. In addition, users can preview and manually edit the generated SQL commands to ensure the accuracy of their queries. Mirror also generates visualizations to facilitate understanding of the data. Designed with flexibility and human input in mind, Mirror is suitable for both experienced data analysts and non-technical professionals looking to gain insights from their data.
summary: We present Mirror, an open-source platform for data exploration and analysis powered by large language models. Mirror offers an intuitive natural language interface for querying databases, and automatically generates executable SQL commands to retrieve relevant data and summarize it in natural language. In addition, users can preview and manually edit the generated SQL commands to ensure the accuracy of their queries. Mirror also generates visualizations to facilitate understanding of the data. Designed with flexibility and human input in mind, Mirror is suitable for both experienced data analysts and non-technical professionals looking to gain insights from their data.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Mirror，这是一个由大型语言模型支持的数据探索和分析开源平台。 Mirror 提供直观的自然语言界面用于查询数据库，并自动生成可执行的 SQL 命令来检索相关数据并以自然语言对其进行汇总。此外，用户还可以预览并手动编辑生成的SQL命令，以确保查询的准确性。 Mirror 还生成可视化效果以促进数据的理解。 Mirror 在设计时考虑了灵活性和人工输入，适合经验丰富的数据分析师和希望从数据中获取见解的非技术专业人士。

AI.tldr: 开发基于大语言模型的自然语言接口平台Mirror，实现数据查询、汇总与可视化功能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据工具需专业技能，非技术人员难以高效获取数据洞察，需降低数据分析门槛。
AI.method: 结合大语言模型实现自然语言到SQL的转换，支持用户编辑验证查询语句，并自动生成数据可视化图表。
AI.result: 构建出适用于技术人员与非技术人员的统一数据平台，提升数据查询准确性与使用效率。
AI.conclusion: Mirror通过自然语言交互与可视化技术，为不同背景用户提供了高效的数据分析解决方案。

authors_text: Shuja Khalid,Frank Rudzicz
title: RefiNeRF: Modelling dynamic neural radiance fields with inconsistent or missing camera parameters
title_zh: RefiNeRF：对相机参数不一致或缺失的动态神经辐射场进行建模
abstract: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a challenging task in computer vision that involves synthesizing new views of a scene from a limited set of input images. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a powerful approach to address this problem, but they require accurate knowledge of camera \textit{intrinsic} and \textit{extrinsic} parameters. Traditionally, structure-from-motion (SfM) and multi-view stereo (MVS) approaches have been used to extract camera parameters, but these methods can be unreliable and may fail in certain cases. In this paper, we propose a novel technique that leverages unposed images from dynamic datasets, such as the NVIDIA dynamic scenes dataset, to learn camera parameters directly from data. Our approach is highly extensible and can be integrated into existing NeRF architectures with minimal modifications. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a variety of static and dynamic scenes and show that it outperforms traditional SfM and MVS approaches. The code for our method is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf}{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf}. Our approach offers a promising new direction for improving the accuracy and robustness of NVS using NeRF, and we anticipate that it will be a valuable tool for a wide range of applications in computer vision and graphics.
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a challenging task in computer vision that involves synthesizing new views of a scene from a limited set of input images. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a powerful approach to address this problem, but they require accurate knowledge of camera \textit{intrinsic} and \textit{extrinsic} parameters. Traditionally, structure-from-motion (SfM) and multi-view stereo (MVS) approaches have been used to extract camera parameters, but these methods can be unreliable and may fail in certain cases. In this paper, we propose a novel technique that leverages unposed images from dynamic datasets, such as the NVIDIA dynamic scenes dataset, to learn camera parameters directly from data. Our approach is highly extensible and can be integrated into existing NeRF architectures with minimal modifications. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a variety of static and dynamic scenes and show that it outperforms traditional SfM and MVS approaches. The code for our method is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf}{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf}. Our approach offers a promising new direction for improving the accuracy and robustness of NVS using NeRF, and we anticipate that it will be a valuable tool for a wide range of applications in computer vision and graphics.
abstract_zh: 新视图合成（NVS）是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及从一组有限的输入图像合成场景的新视图。神经辐射场 (NeRF) 已成为解决此问题的有效方法，但它们需要准确了解相机 \textit{intrinsic} 和 \textit{extrinsic} 参数。传统上，运动结构（SfM）和多视图立体（MVS）方法已被用来提取相机参数，但这些方法可能不可靠，在某些情况下可能会失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种新技术，该技术利用动态数据集（例如 NVIDIA 动态场景数据集）中的未摆设图像来直接从数据中学习相机参数。我们的方法具有高度可扩展性，只需进行最少的修改即可集成到现有的 NeRF 架构中。我们证明了我们的方法在各种静态和动态场景上的有效性，并表明它优于传统的 SfM 和 MVS 方法。我们方法的代码可在 \href{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf}{https://github.com/redacted/refinerf} 公开获取。我们的方法为使用 NeRF 提高 NVS 的准确性和鲁棒性提供了一个有前途的新方向，我们预计它将成为计算机视觉和图形领域广泛应用的有价值的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RefiNeRF方法，通过直接从动态数据集中学习相机参数，解决传统NeRF在动态场景中因相机参数缺失或不一致导致的建模难题。
AI.motivation: 传统结构从运动(SfM)和多视图立体(MVS)方法提取的相机参数存在不可靠性，而NeRF需要精确的相机内外参才能有效建模动态场景。
AI.method: 利用未标注的动态数据集图像，直接通过数据学习相机参数，无需依赖传统SfM/MVS流程，且可无缝集成到现有NeRF框架中。
AI.result: 在多种静态和动态场景测试中，RefiNeRF优于传统SfM/MVS方法，代码已开源，验证了方法的普适性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经辐射场在动态场景中的应用提供了更鲁棒的参数学习方案，有望推动新型视图合成技术的发展。

authors_text: Siqi Fan,Zhe Wang,Yan Wang,Jingjing Liu
title: SpiderMesh: Spatial-aware Demand-guided Recursive Meshing for RGB-T Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: SpiderMesh：用于 RGB-T 语义分割的空间感知需求引导递归网格划分
abstract: For semantic segmentation in urban scene understanding, RGB cameras alone often fail to capture a clear holistic topology in challenging lighting conditions. Thermal signal is an informative additional channel that can bring to light the contour and fine-grained texture of blurred regions in low-quality RGB image. Aiming at practical RGB-T (thermal) segmentation, we systematically propose a Spatial-aware Demand-guided Recursive Meshing (SpiderMesh) framework that: 1) proactively compensates inadequate contextual semantics in optically-impaired regions via a demand-guided target masking algorithm; 2) refines multimodal semantic features with recursive meshing to improve pixel-level semantic analysis performance. We further introduce an asymmetric data augmentation technique M-CutOut, and enable semi-supervised learning to fully utilize RGB-T labels only sparsely available in practical use. Extensive experiments on MFNet and PST900 datasets demonstrate that SpiderMesh achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard RGB-T segmentation benchmarks.
summary: For semantic segmentation in urban scene understanding, RGB cameras alone often fail to capture a clear holistic topology in challenging lighting conditions. Thermal signal is an informative additional channel that can bring to light the contour and fine-grained texture of blurred regions in low-quality RGB image. Aiming at practical RGB-T (thermal) segmentation, we systematically propose a Spatial-aware Demand-guided Recursive Meshing (SpiderMesh) framework that: 1) proactively compensates inadequate contextual semantics in optically-impaired regions via a demand-guided target masking algorithm; 2) refines multimodal semantic features with recursive meshing to improve pixel-level semantic analysis performance. We further introduce an asymmetric data augmentation technique M-CutOut, and enable semi-supervised learning to fully utilize RGB-T labels only sparsely available in practical use. Extensive experiments on MFNet and PST900 datasets demonstrate that SpiderMesh achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard RGB-T segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 对于城市场景理解中的语义分割，仅靠 RGB 摄像头通常无法在具有挑战性的照明条件下捕获清晰的整体拓扑。热信号是一种信息丰富的附加通道，可以揭示低质量 RGB 图像中模糊区域的轮廓和细粒度纹理。针对实际的RGB-T（热）分割，我们系统地提出了一种空间感知的需求引导递归网格（SpiderMesh）框架，该框架：1）通过需求引导的目标掩蔽算法主动补偿视障区域中上下文语义的不足； 2）通过递归网格划分细化多模态语义特征，以提高像素级语义分析性能。我们进一步引入了非对称数据增强技术 M-CutOut，并使半监督学习能够充分利用实际使用中稀疏的 RGB-T 标签。在 MFNet 和 PST900 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SpiderMesh 在标准 RGB-T 分割基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpiderMesh框架，通过融合RGB和热成像数据提升复杂光照条件下城市场景语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB相机在复杂光照下难以捕捉清晰场景结构，热成像数据能补充模糊区域的轮廓和纹理信息，但现有方法未能有效融合多模态特征。
AI.method: 提出空间感知需求引导的递归网格化框架，包含需求引导的目标掩码算法补偿上下文语义，递归网格化优化多模态特征，并设计M-CutOut数据增强与半监督学习策略。
AI.result: 在MFNet和PST900数据集上达到RGB-T分割领域最先进水平，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: SpiderMesh通过创新性融合热成像数据与递归网格化处理，显著提升了复杂场景下的语义分割精度，为多模态分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ali Rahimi-Kalahroudi,Janarthanan Rajendran,Ida Momennejad,Harm van Seijen,Sarath Chandar
title: Replay Buffer with Local Forgetting for Adapting to Local Environment Changes in Deep Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 具有局部遗忘功能的重放缓冲区，用于适应基于深度模型的强化学习中的局部环境变化
abstract: One of the key behavioral characteristics used in neuroscience to determine whether the subject of study -- be it a rodent or a human -- exhibits model-based learning is effective adaptation to local changes in the environment, a particular form of adaptivity that is the focus of this work. In reinforcement learning, however, recent work has shown that modern deep model-based reinforcement-learning (MBRL) methods adapt poorly to local environment changes. An explanation for this mismatch is that MBRL methods are typically designed with sample-efficiency on a single task in mind and the requirements for effective adaptation are substantially higher, both in terms of the learned world model and the planning routine. One particularly challenging requirement is that the learned world model has to be sufficiently accurate throughout relevant parts of the state-space. This is challenging for deep-learning-based world models due to catastrophic forgetting. And while a replay buffer can mitigate the effects of catastrophic forgetting, the traditional first-in-first-out replay buffer precludes effective adaptation due to maintaining stale data. In this work, we show that a conceptually simple variation of this traditional replay buffer is able to overcome this limitation. By removing only samples from the buffer from the local neighbourhood of the newly observed samples, deep world models can be built that maintain their accuracy across the state-space, while also being able to effectively adapt to local changes in the reward function. We demonstrate this by applying our replay-buffer variation to a deep version of the classical Dyna method, as well as to recent methods such as PlaNet and DreamerV2, demonstrating that deep model-based methods can adapt effectively as well to local changes in the environment.

This is challenging for deep-learning-based world models due to catastrophic forgetting. And while a replay buffer can mitigate the effects of catastrophic forgetting, the traditional first-in-first-out replay buffer precludes effective adaptation due to maintaining stale data. By removing only samples from the buffer from the local neighbourhood of the newly observed samples, deep world models can be built that maintain their accuracy across the state-space, while also being able to effectively adapt to local changes in the reward function. We demonstrate this by applying our replay-buffer variation to a deep version of the classical Dyna method, as well as to recent methods such as PlaNet and DreamerV2, demonstrating that deep model-based methods can adapt effectively as well to local changes in the environment.
abstract_zh: 神经科学中用来确定研究对象（无论是啮齿动物还是人类）是否表现出基于模型的学习的关键行为特征之一是有效适应局部环境变化，这是这项工作的重点，一种特殊形式的适应性。然而，在强化学习中，最近的工作表明，现代基于深度模型的强化学习（MBRL）方法对局部环境变化的适应能力较差。对这种不匹配的解释是，MBRL 方法通常在设计时考虑到单个任务的样本效率，并且在学习世界模型和规划例程方面，有效适应的要求要高得多。一个特别具有挑战性的要求是学习的世界模型必须在状态空间的相关部分足够准确。由于灾难性遗忘，这对于基于深度学习的世界模型来说是一个挑战。虽然重播缓冲区可以减轻灾难性遗忘的影响，但传统的先进先出重播缓冲区由于维护陈旧数据而无法进行有效的适应。在这项工作中，我们展示了这种传统重播缓冲区的概念上的简单变体能够克服这一限制。通过仅从新观察到的样本的局部邻域中的缓冲区中删除样本，可以构建深度世界模型，以在整个状态空间中保持其准确性，同时还能够有效地适应奖励函数的局部变化。我们通过将重播缓冲区变体应用于经典 Dyna 方法的深度版本以及 PlaNet 和 DreamerV2 等最新方法来证明这一点，证明基于深度模型的方法可以有效地适应环境中的局部变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的重放缓冲区方法，通过局部遗忘机制解决深度模型基于强化学习在局部环境变化下的适应性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型基于强化学习（MBRL）方法在应对局部环境变化时表现不佳，因其世界模型易受灾难性遗忘影响，且传统重放缓冲区保留过时数据阻碍适应性。
AI.method: 设计一种局部遗忘重放缓冲区，仅移除新样本局部邻域内的旧样本，从而在保持状态空间准确性的同时提升对奖励函数局部变化的适应能力。
AI.result: 将该方法应用于Dyna、PlaNet和DreamerV2等算法，验证了深度MBRL方法可有效适应局部环境变化。
AI.conclusion: 局部遗忘重放缓冲区能有效缓解灾难性遗忘和过时数据问题，使深度MBRL方法具备良好的局部环境适应性。

search_text: Replay Buffer with Local Forgetting for Adapting to Local Environment Changes in Deep Model-Based Reinforcement Learning 具有局部遗忘功能的重放缓冲区，用于适应基于深度模型的强化学习中的局部环境变化 One of the key behavioral characteristics used in neuroscience to determine whether the subject of study -- be it a rodent or a human -- exhibits model-based learning is effective adaptation to local changes in the environment, a particular form of adaptivity that is the focus of this work. In reinforcement learning, however, recent work has shown that modern deep model-based reinforcement-learning (MBRL) methods adapt poorly to local environment changes. An explanation for this mismatch is that MBRL methods are typically designed with sample-efficiency on a single task in mind and the requirements for effective adaptation are substantially higher, both in terms of the learned world model and the planning routine. One particularly challenging requirement is that the learned world model has to be sufficiently accurate throughout relevant parts of the state-space. This is challenging for deep-learning-based world models due to catastrophic forgetting. And while a replay buffer can mitigate the effects of catastrophic forgetting, the traditional first-in-first-out replay buffer precludes effective adaptation due to maintaining stale data. In this work, we show that a conceptually simple variation of this traditional replay buffer is able to overcome this limitation. By removing only samples from the buffer from the local neighbourhood of the newly observed samples, deep world models can be built that maintain their accuracy across the state-space, while also being able to effectively adapt to local changes in the reward function. We demonstrate this by applying our replay-buffer variation to a deep version of the classical Dyna method, as well as to recent methods such as PlaNet and DreamerV2, demonstrating that deep model-based methods can adapt effectively as well to local changes in the environment. 神经科学中用来确定研究对象（无论是啮齿动物还是人类）是否表现出基于模型的学习的关键行为特征之一是有效适应局部环境变化，这是这项工作的重点，一种特殊形式的适应性。然而，在强化学习中，最近的工作表明，现代基于深度模型的强化学习（MBRL）方法对局部环境变化的适应能力较差。对这种不匹配的解释是，MBRL 方法通常在设计时考虑到单个任务的样本效率，并且在学习世界模型和规划例程方面，有效适应的要求要高得多。一个特别具有挑战性的要求是学习的世界模型必须在状态空间的相关部分足够准确。由于灾难性遗忘，这对于基于深度学习的世界模型来说是一个挑战。虽然重播缓冲区可以减轻灾难性遗忘的影响，但传统的先进先出重播缓冲区由于维护陈旧数据而无法进行有效的适应。在这项工作中，我们展示了这种传统重播缓冲区的概念上的简单变体能够克服这一限制。通过仅从新观察到的样本的局部邻域中的缓冲区中删除样本，可以构建深度世界模型，以在整个状态空间中保持其准确性，同时还能够有效地适应奖励函数的局部变化。我们通过将重播缓冲区变体应用于经典 Dyna 方法的深度版本以及 PlaNet 和 DreamerV2 等最新方法来证明这一点，证明基于深度模型的方法可以有效地适应环境中的局部变化。 本文提出一种改进的重放缓冲区方法，通过局部遗忘机制解决深度模型基于强化学习在局部环境变化下的适应性问题。 Ali Rahimi-Kalahroudi,Janarthanan Rajendran,Ida Momennejad,Harm van Seijen,Sarath Chandar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Patrick Zimmer,Michael Halstead,Chris McCool
title: Panoptic One-Click Segmentation: Applied to Agricultural Data
title_zh: 全景一键分割：应用于农业数据
comment: in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2023)
comments: in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2023)
abstract: In weed control, precision agriculture can help to greatly reduce the use of herbicides, resulting in both economical and ecological benefits. A key element is the ability to locate and segment all the plants from image data. Modern instance segmentation techniques can achieve this, however, training such systems requires large amounts of hand-labelled data which is expensive and laborious to obtain. Weakly supervised training can help to greatly reduce labelling efforts and costs. We propose panoptic one-click segmentation, an efficient and accurate offline tool to produce pseudo-labels from click inputs which reduces labelling effort. Our approach jointly estimates the pixel-wise location of all N objects in the scene, compared to traditional approaches which iterate independently through all N objects; this greatly reduces training time. Using just 10% of the data to train our panoptic one-click segmentation approach yields 68.1% and 68.8% mean object intersection over union (IoU) on challenging sugar beet and corn image data respectively, providing comparable performance to traditional one-click approaches while being approximately 12 times faster to train. We demonstrate the applicability of our system by generating pseudo-labels from clicks on the remaining 90% of the data. These pseudo-labels are then used to train Mask R-CNN, in a semi-supervised manner, improving the absolute performance (of mean foreground IoU) by 9.4 and 7.9 points for sugar beet and corn data respectively. Finally, we show that our technique can recover missed clicks during annotation outlining a further benefit over traditional approaches.
summary: In weed control, precision agriculture can help to greatly reduce the use of herbicides, resulting in both economical and ecological benefits. A key element is the ability to locate and segment all the plants from image data. Modern instance segmentation techniques can achieve this, however, training such systems requires large amounts of hand-labelled data which is expensive and laborious to obtain. Weakly supervised training can help to greatly reduce labelling efforts and costs. We propose panoptic one-click segmentation, an efficient and accurate offline tool to produce pseudo-labels from click inputs which reduces labelling effort. Our approach jointly estimates the pixel-wise location of all N objects in the scene, compared to traditional approaches which iterate independently through all N objects; this greatly reduces training time. Using just 10% of the data to train our panoptic one-click segmentation approach yields 68.1% and 68.8% mean object intersection over union (IoU) on challenging sugar beet and corn image data respectively, providing comparable performance to traditional one-click approaches while being approximately 12 times faster to train. We demonstrate the applicability of our system by generating pseudo-labels from clicks on the remaining 90% of the data. These pseudo-labels are then used to train Mask R-CNN, in a semi-supervised manner, improving the absolute performance (of mean foreground IoU) by 9.4 and 7.9 points for sugar beet and corn data respectively. Finally, we show that our technique can recover missed clicks during annotation outlining a further benefit over traditional approaches.
abstract_zh: 在杂草控制方面，精准农业有助于大幅减少除草剂的使用，产生经济效益和生态效益。一个关键要素是能够从图像数据中定位和分割所有植物。现代实例分割技术可以实现这一点，但是，训练此类系统需要大量手工标记的数据，而获取这些数据既昂贵又费力。弱监督培训有助于大大减少标签工作和成本。我们提出全景一键分割，这是一种高效、准确的离线工具，可以从点击输入生成伪标签，从而减少标记工作。与独立迭代所有 N 个对象的传统方法相比，我们的方法联合估计场景中所有 N 个对象的像素位置；这大大减少了训练时间。仅使用 10% 的数据来训练我们的全景一键分割方法，在具有挑战性的甜菜和玉米图像数据上分别产生 68.1% 和 68.8% 的平均对象交集 (IoU)，提供与传统一键方法相当的性能，同时训练速度提高约 12 倍。我们通过对剩余 90% 的数据的点击生成伪标签来证明我们系统的适用性。然后使用这些伪标签以半监督方式训练 Mask R-CNN，将甜菜和玉米数据的绝对性能（平均前景 IoU）分别提高 9.4 和 7.9 点。最后，我们展示了我们的技术可以在注释期间恢复错过的点击，概述了相对于传统方法的进一步优势。

AI.tldr: 开发一种高效的单击分割工具，用于农业图像中的植物分割，减少人工标注需求。
AI.motivation: 传统实例分割需要大量人工标注数据，成本高且耗时，弱监督方法可减少标注负担，提升农业应用的可行性。
AI.method: 提出全景单击分割方法，联合估计场景中所有物体的像素位置，通过点击生成伪标签，减少训练时间，并用于半监督训练Mask R-CNN。
AI.result: 使用10%数据训练，糖 beet和玉米数据的mIoU分别为68.1%和68.8%，半监督训练后提升9.4和7.9点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升训练效率，半监督训练增强模型性能，且能恢复遗漏标注，优于传统方法。

authors_text: Runzhou Tao,Wencheng Han,Zhongying Qiu,Cheng-zhong Xu,Jianbing Shen
title: Weakly Supervised Monocular 3D Object Detection using Multi-View Projection and Direction Consistency
title_zh: 使用多视图投影和方向一致性的弱监督单目 3D 物体检测
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection has become a mainstream approach in automatic driving for its easy application. A prominent advantage is that it does not need LiDAR point clouds during the inference. However, most current methods still rely on 3D point cloud data for labeling the ground truths used in the training phase. This inconsistency between the training and inference makes it hard to utilize the large-scale feedback data and increases the data collection expenses. To bridge this gap, we propose a new weakly supervised monocular 3D objection detection method, which can train the model with only 2D labels marked on images. To be specific, we explore three types of consistency in this task, i.e. the projection, multi-view and direction consistency, and design a weakly-supervised architecture based on these consistencies. Moreover, we propose a new 2D direction labeling method in this task to guide the model for accurate rotation direction prediction. Experiments show that our weakly-supervised method achieves comparable performance with some fully supervised methods. When used as a pre-training method, our model can significantly outperform the corresponding fully-supervised baseline with only 1/3 3D labels. https://github.com/weakmono3d/weakmono3d
summary: Monocular 3D object detection has become a mainstream approach in automatic driving for its easy application. A prominent advantage is that it does not need LiDAR point clouds during the inference. However, most current methods still rely on 3D point cloud data for labeling the ground truths used in the training phase. This inconsistency between the training and inference makes it hard to utilize the large-scale feedback data and increases the data collection expenses. To bridge this gap, we propose a new weakly supervised monocular 3D objection detection method, which can train the model with only 2D labels marked on images. To be specific, we explore three types of consistency in this task, i.e. the projection, multi-view and direction consistency, and design a weakly-supervised architecture based on these consistencies. Moreover, we propose a new 2D direction labeling method in this task to guide the model for accurate rotation direction prediction. Experiments show that our weakly-supervised method achieves comparable performance with some fully supervised methods. When used as a pre-training method, our model can significantly outperform the corresponding fully-supervised baseline with only 1/3 3D labels. https://github.com/weakmono3d/weakmono3d
abstract_zh: 单目3D物体检测因其易于应用而成为自动驾驶的主流方法。一个突出的优点是在推理过程中不需要LiDAR点云。然而，大多数当前方法仍然依赖 3D 点云数据来标记训练阶段使用的地面事实。训练和推理之间的这种不一致使得大规模反馈数据难以利用并增加了数据收集费用。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种新的弱监督单目 3D 物体检测方法，该方法可以仅使用图像上标记的 2D 标签来训练模型。具体来说，我们在该任务中探索了三种类型的一致性，即投影一致性、多视图一致性和方向一致性，并基于这些一致性设计了弱监督架构。此外，我们在此任务中提出了一种新的2D方向标记方法来指导模型进行准确的旋转方向预测。实验表明，我们的弱监督方法取得了与一些完全监督方法相当的性能。当用作预训练方法时，我们的模型可以显着优于仅具有 1/3 3D 标签的相应完全监督基线。 https://github.com/weakmono3d/weakmono3d

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督单目3D目标检测方法，仅使用2D图像标签进行训练，解决传统方法依赖3D点云标注导致的数据成本高和应用限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法在训练阶段依赖3D点云标注，与实际推理阶段无LiDAR数据的场景存在不一致性，导致难以利用大规模反馈数据并增加数据采集成本。
AI.method: 通过探索投影一致性、多视角一致性和方向一致性，设计弱监督架构；提出新的2D方向标注方法，指导模型学习旋转方向预测。
AI.result: 弱监督方法性能与全监督方法相当，作为预训练模型时仅使用1/3 3D标签即可显著超越全监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少对3D标注数据的依赖，为单目3D检测提供更高效、低成本的训练方案。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Monocular 3D Object Detection using Multi-View Projection and Direction Consistency 使用多视图投影和方向一致性的弱监督单目 3D 物体检测 Monocular 3D object detection has become a mainstream approach in automatic driving for its easy application. A prominent advantage is that it does not need LiDAR point clouds during the inference. However, most current methods still rely on 3D point cloud data for labeling the ground truths used in the training phase. This inconsistency between the training and inference makes it hard to utilize the large-scale feedback data and increases the data collection expenses. To bridge this gap, we propose a new weakly supervised monocular 3D objection detection method, which can train the model with only 2D labels marked on images. To be specific, we explore three types of consistency in this task, i.e. the projection, multi-view and direction consistency, and design a weakly-supervised architecture based on these consistencies. Moreover, we propose a new 2D direction labeling method in this task to guide the model for accurate rotation direction prediction. Experiments show that our weakly-supervised method achieves comparable performance with some fully supervised methods. When used as a pre-training method, our model can significantly outperform the corresponding fully-supervised baseline with only 1/3 3D labels. https://github.com/weakmono3d/weakmono3d 单目3D物体检测因其易于应用而成为自动驾驶的主流方法。一个突出的优点是在推理过程中不需要LiDAR点云。然而，大多数当前方法仍然依赖 3D 点云数据来标记训练阶段使用的地面事实。训练和推理之间的这种不一致使得大规模反馈数据难以利用并增加了数据收集费用。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种新的弱监督单目 3D 物体检测方法，该方法可以仅使用图像上标记的 2D 标签来训练模型。具体来说，我们在该任务中探索了三种类型的一致性，即投影一致性、多视图一致性和方向一致性，并基于这些一致性设计了弱监督架构。此外，我们在此任务中提出了一种新的2D方向标记方法来指导模型进行准确的旋转方向预测。实验表明，我们的弱监督方法取得了与一些完全监督方法相当的性能。当用作预训练方法时，我们的模型可以显着优于仅具有 1/3 3D 标签的相应完全监督基线。 https://github.com/weakmono3d/weakmono3d 本文提出一种弱监督单目3D目标检测方法，仅使用2D图像标签进行训练，解决传统方法依赖3D点云标注导致的数据成本高和应用限制问题。 Runzhou Tao,Wencheng Han,Zhongying Qiu,Cheng-zhong Xu,Jianbing Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Shuning Chang,Pichao Wang,Ming Lin,Fan Wang,David Junhao Zhang,Rong Jin,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Making Vision Transformers Efficient from A Token Sparsification View
title_zh: 从令牌稀疏化的角度提高视觉转换器的效率
abstract: The quadratic computational complexity to the number of tokens limits the practical applications of Vision Transformers (ViTs). Several works propose to prune redundant tokens to achieve efficient ViTs. However, these methods generally suffer from (i) dramatic accuracy drops, (ii) application difficulty in the local vision transformer, and (iii) non-general-purpose networks for downstream tasks. In this work, we propose a novel Semantic Token ViT (STViT), for efficient global and local vision transformers, which can also be revised to serve as backbone for downstream tasks. The semantic tokens represent cluster centers, and they are initialized by pooling image tokens in space and recovered by attention, which can adaptively represent global or local semantic information. Due to the cluster properties, a few semantic tokens can attain the same effect as vast image tokens, for both global and local vision transformers. For instance, only 16 semantic tokens on DeiT-(Tiny,Small,Base) can achieve the same accuracy with more than 100% inference speed improvement and nearly 60% FLOPs reduction; on Swin-(Tiny,Small,Base), we can employ 16 semantic tokens in each window to further speed it up by around 20% with slight accuracy increase. Besides great success in image classification, we also extend our method to video recognition. In addition, we design a STViT-R(ecover) network to restore the detailed spatial information based on the STViT, making it work for downstream tasks, which is powerless for previous token sparsification methods. Experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve competitive results compared to the original networks in object detection and instance segmentation, with over 30% FLOPs reduction for backbone. Code is available at http://github.com/changsn/STViT-R
summary: The quadratic computational complexity to the number of tokens limits the practical applications of Vision Transformers (ViTs). Several works propose to prune redundant tokens to achieve efficient ViTs. However, these methods generally suffer from (i) dramatic accuracy drops, (ii) application difficulty in the local vision transformer, and (iii) non-general-purpose networks for downstream tasks. In this work, we propose a novel Semantic Token ViT (STViT), for efficient global and local vision transformers, which can also be revised to serve as backbone for downstream tasks. The semantic tokens represent cluster centers, and they are initialized by pooling image tokens in space and recovered by attention, which can adaptively represent global or local semantic information. Due to the cluster properties, a few semantic tokens can attain the same effect as vast image tokens, for both global and local vision transformers. For instance, only 16 semantic tokens on DeiT-(Tiny,Small,Base) can achieve the same accuracy with more than 100% inference speed improvement and nearly 60% FLOPs reduction; on Swin-(Tiny,Small,Base), we can employ 16 semantic tokens in each window to further speed it up by around 20% with slight accuracy increase. Besides great success in image classification, we also extend our method to video recognition. In addition, we design a STViT-R(ecover) network to restore the detailed spatial information based on the STViT, making it work for downstream tasks, which is powerless for previous token sparsification methods. Experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve competitive results compared to the original networks in object detection and instance segmentation, with over 30% FLOPs reduction for backbone. Code is available at http://github.com/changsn/STViT-R
abstract_zh: 代币数量的二次计算复杂性限制了视觉变换器（ViT）的实际应用。一些工作建议修剪冗余令牌以实现高效的 ViT。然而，这些方法通常面临以下问题：（i）准确率急剧下降，（ii）本地视觉转换器中的应用困难，以及（iii）用于下游任务的非通用网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的语义令牌 ViT (STViT)，用于高效的全局和局部视觉转换器，它也可以修改为下游任务的骨干。语义标记代表聚类中心，它们通过在空间中池化图像标记来初始化并通过注意力恢复，可以自适应地表示全局或局部语义信息。由于集群属性，对于全局和局部视觉变换器来说，一些语义标记可以达到与大量图像标记相同的效果。例如，DeiT-(Tiny,Small,Base)上仅16个语义标记就可以达到相同的精度，推理速度提高100%以上，FLOPs减少近60%；在 Swin-(Tiny,Small,Base) 上，我们可以在每个窗口中使用 16 个语义标记，以进一步将速度提高约 20%，同时精确度略有提高。除了在图像分类方面取得巨大成功外，我们还将我们的方法扩展到视频识别。此外，我们设计了一个STViT-R（ecover）网络来基于STViT恢复详细的空间信息，使其适用于下游任务，这是以前的令牌稀疏方法所无能为力的。实验表明，与原始网络相比，我们的方法在对象检测和实例分割方面可以取得有竞争力的结果，骨干网络的 FLOPs 减少超过 30%。代码可在 http://github.com/changsn/STViT-R 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STViT的新方法，通过语义令牌稀疏化提高视觉Transformer（ViT）的效率，同时保持全局和局部特征表示能力，并扩展到视频识别和下游任务。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT模型因令牌数量呈二次复杂度增长导致计算效率低下，且现有剪枝方法存在精度下降、局部ViT应用困难及无法适配下游任务等局限性。
AI.method: 设计语义令牌作为聚类中心，通过空间池化初始化并利用注意力机制恢复，自适应表示全局或局部语义信息；提出STViT-R网络恢复空间细节以支持下游任务。
AI.result: 在DeiT和Swin模型上，仅用16个语义令牌即可实现超过100%的推理加速和近60%的FLOPs减少，局部ViT加速约20%且精度微增；在目标检测和实例分割任务中减少30% FLOPs且保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: STViT通过语义令牌稀疏化有效平衡了效率与性能，适用于多种视觉任务，为高效ViT设计提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Wenqi Ouyang,Yi Dong,Xiaoyang Kang,Peiran Ren,Xin Xu,Xuansong Xie
title: RSFNet: A White-Box Image Retouching Approach using Region-Specific Color Filters
title_zh: RSFNet：使用特定区域滤色器的白盒图像修饰方法
abstract: Retouching images is an essential aspect of enhancing the visual appeal of photos. Although users often share common aesthetic preferences, their retouching methods may vary based on their individual preferences. Therefore, there is a need for white-box approaches that produce satisfying results and enable users to conveniently edit their images simultaneously. Recent white-box retouching methods rely on cascaded global filters that provide image-level filter arguments but cannot perform fine-grained retouching. In contrast, colorists typically employ a divide-and-conquer approach, performing a series of region-specific fine-grained enhancements when using traditional tools like Davinci Resolve. We draw on this insight to develop a white-box framework for photo retouching using parallel region-specific filters, called RSFNet. Our model generates filter arguments (e.g., saturation, contrast, hue) and attention maps of regions for each filter simultaneously. Instead of cascading filters, RSFNet employs linear summations of filters, allowing for a more diverse range of filter classes that can be trained more easily. Our experiments demonstrate that RSFNet achieves state-of-the-art results, offering satisfying aesthetic appeal and increased user convenience for editable white-box retouching.
summary: Retouching images is an essential aspect of enhancing the visual appeal of photos. Although users often share common aesthetic preferences, their retouching methods may vary based on their individual preferences. Therefore, there is a need for white-box approaches that produce satisfying results and enable users to conveniently edit their images simultaneously. Recent white-box retouching methods rely on cascaded global filters that provide image-level filter arguments but cannot perform fine-grained retouching. In contrast, colorists typically employ a divide-and-conquer approach, performing a series of region-specific fine-grained enhancements when using traditional tools like Davinci Resolve. We draw on this insight to develop a white-box framework for photo retouching using parallel region-specific filters, called RSFNet. Our model generates filter arguments (e.g., saturation, contrast, hue) and attention maps of regions for each filter simultaneously. Instead of cascading filters, RSFNet employs linear summations of filters, allowing for a more diverse range of filter classes that can be trained more easily. Our experiments demonstrate that RSFNet achieves state-of-the-art results, offering satisfying aesthetic appeal and increased user convenience for editable white-box retouching.
abstract_zh: 修饰图像是增强照片视觉吸引力的重要方面。尽管用户通常具有共同的审美偏好，但他们的修饰方法可能会根据个人喜好而有所不同。因此，需要一种白盒方法来产生令人满意的结果，并使用户能够同时方便地编辑图像。最近的白盒修饰方法依赖于级联全局过滤器，这些过滤器提供图像级过滤器参数，但无法执行细粒度修饰。相比之下，调色师通常采用分而治之的方法，在使用 Davinci Resolve 等传统工具时执行一系列特定于区域的细粒度增强。我们利用这一见解开发了一个使用并行区域特定滤镜进行照片修饰的白盒框架，称为 RSFNet。我们的模型同时生成过滤器参数（例如饱和度、对比度、色调）和每个过滤器区域的注意图。 RSFNet 采用滤波器的线性求和，而不是级联滤波器，从而可以更轻松地训练更多样化的滤波器类别。我们的实验表明，RSFNet 实现了最先进的结果，提供了令人满意的审美吸引力，并增加了可编辑白盒修饰的用户便利性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域特定颜色滤镜的白盒图像润色方法RSFNet，实现更精细的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有白盒润色方法依赖全局滤镜难以实现细粒度调整，而专业调色师常用区域划分策略，需开发更灵活的可编辑框架。
AI.method: 通过并行区域滤镜生成饱和度/对比度等参数及注意力图，采用线性滤镜叠加替代级联结构，提升训练效率与多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明RSFNet在美学效果和用户编辑便捷性上达到SOTA水平，验证了区域滤镜策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RSFNet通过区域化白盒设计，兼顾了专业级润色效果与用户自定义编辑需求，为图像处理提供新思路。

search_text: RSFNet: A White-Box Image Retouching Approach using Region-Specific Color Filters RSFNet：使用特定区域滤色器的白盒图像修饰方法 Retouching images is an essential aspect of enhancing the visual appeal of photos. Although users often share common aesthetic preferences, their retouching methods may vary based on their individual preferences. Therefore, there is a need for white-box approaches that produce satisfying results and enable users to conveniently edit their images simultaneously. Recent white-box retouching methods rely on cascaded global filters that provide image-level filter arguments but cannot perform fine-grained retouching. In contrast, colorists typically employ a divide-and-conquer approach, performing a series of region-specific fine-grained enhancements when using traditional tools like Davinci Resolve. We draw on this insight to develop a white-box framework for photo retouching using parallel region-specific filters, called RSFNet. Our model generates filter arguments (e.g., saturation, contrast, hue) and attention maps of regions for each filter simultaneously. Instead of cascading filters, RSFNet employs linear summations of filters, allowing for a more diverse range of filter classes that can be trained more easily. Our experiments demonstrate that RSFNet achieves state-of-the-art results, offering satisfying aesthetic appeal and increased user convenience for editable white-box retouching. 修饰图像是增强照片视觉吸引力的重要方面。尽管用户通常具有共同的审美偏好，但他们的修饰方法可能会根据个人喜好而有所不同。因此，需要一种白盒方法来产生令人满意的结果，并使用户能够同时方便地编辑图像。最近的白盒修饰方法依赖于级联全局过滤器，这些过滤器提供图像级过滤器参数，但无法执行细粒度修饰。相比之下，调色师通常采用分而治之的方法，在使用 Davinci Resolve 等传统工具时执行一系列特定于区域的细粒度增强。我们利用这一见解开发了一个使用并行区域特定滤镜进行照片修饰的白盒框架，称为 RSFNet。我们的模型同时生成过滤器参数（例如饱和度、对比度、色调）和每个过滤器区域的注意图。 RSFNet 采用滤波器的线性求和，而不是级联滤波器，从而可以更轻松地训练更多样化的滤波器类别。我们的实验表明，RSFNet 实现了最先进的结果，提供了令人满意的审美吸引力，并增加了可编辑白盒修饰的用户便利性。 本文提出一种基于区域特定颜色滤镜的白盒图像润色方法RSFNet，实现更精细的图像编辑。 Wenqi Ouyang,Yi Dong,Xiaoyang Kang,Peiran Ren,Xin Xu,Xuansong Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Guanghao Li,Wansen Wu,Yan Sun,Li Shen,Baoyuan Wu,Dacheng Tao
title: Visual Prompt Based Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: 基于视觉提示的个性化联邦学习
abstract: As a popular paradigm of distributed learning, personalized federated learning (PFL) allows personalized models to improve generalization ability and robustness by utilizing knowledge from all distributed clients. Most existing PFL algorithms tackle personalization in a model-centric way, such as personalized layer partition, model regularization, and model interpolation, which all fail to take into account the data characteristics of distributed clients. In this paper, we propose a novel PFL framework for image classification tasks, dubbed pFedPT, that leverages personalized visual prompts to implicitly represent local data distribution information of clients and provides that information to the aggregation model to help with classification tasks. Specifically, in each round of pFedPT training, each client generates a local personalized prompt related to local data distribution. Then, the local model is trained on the input composed of raw data and a visual prompt to learn the distribution information contained in the prompt. During model testing, the aggregated model obtains prior knowledge of the data distributions based on the prompts, which can be seen as an adaptive fine-tuning of the aggregation model to improve model performances on different clients. Furthermore, the visual prompt can be added as an orthogonal method to implement personalization on the client for existing FL methods to boost their performance. Experiments on the CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets show that pFedPT outperforms several state-of-the-art (SOTA) PFL algorithms by a large margin in various settings.
summary: As a popular paradigm of distributed learning, personalized federated learning (PFL) allows personalized models to improve generalization ability and robustness by utilizing knowledge from all distributed clients. Most existing PFL algorithms tackle personalization in a model-centric way, such as personalized layer partition, model regularization, and model interpolation, which all fail to take into account the data characteristics of distributed clients. In this paper, we propose a novel PFL framework for image classification tasks, dubbed pFedPT, that leverages personalized visual prompts to implicitly represent local data distribution information of clients and provides that information to the aggregation model to help with classification tasks. Specifically, in each round of pFedPT training, each client generates a local personalized prompt related to local data distribution. Then, the local model is trained on the input composed of raw data and a visual prompt to learn the distribution information contained in the prompt. During model testing, the aggregated model obtains prior knowledge of the data distributions based on the prompts, which can be seen as an adaptive fine-tuning of the aggregation model to improve model performances on different clients. Furthermore, the visual prompt can be added as an orthogonal method to implement personalization on the client for existing FL methods to boost their performance. Experiments on the CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets show that pFedPT outperforms several state-of-the-art (SOTA) PFL algorithms by a large margin in various settings.
abstract_zh: 作为分布式学习的流行范例，个性化联邦学习（PFL）允许个性化模型通过利用来自所有分布式客户端的知识来提高泛化能力和鲁棒性。现有的PFL算法大多以模型为中心来处理个性化问题，如个性化层划分、模型正则化、模型插值等，这些都未能考虑分布式客户端的数据特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像分类任务的新型 PFL 框架，称为 pFedPT，它利用个性化视觉提示来隐式表示客户端的本地数据分布信息，并将该信息提供给聚合模型以帮助完成分类任务。具体来说，在每轮pFedPT训练中，每个客户端都会生成与本地数据分布相关的本地个性化提示。然后，在由原始数据和视觉提示组成的输入上训练本地模型，以学习提示中包含的分布信息。在模型测试过程中，聚合模型根据提示获得数据分布的先验知识，这可以看作是聚合模型的自适应微调，以提高不同客户端上的模型性能。此外，视觉提示可以作为正交方法添加，以在客户端上对现有 FL 方法实施个性化，以提高其性能。 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集上的实验表明，pFedPT 在各种设置下都大幅优于几种最先进的 (SOTA) PFL 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉提示的个性化联邦学习框架pFedPT，通过个性化视觉提示隐式表示客户端数据分布信息，提升图像分类任务中聚合模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化联邦学习方法以模型为中心，未充分考虑客户端数据分布特征，导致模型难以适应不同客户端的数据分布差异。
AI.method: 设计pFedPT框架，每个客户端生成与本地数据分布相关的个性化视觉提示，结合原始数据训练本地模型；测试时聚合模型利用提示进行自适应微调，且可作为现有方法的正交个性化手段。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和CIFAR100数据集上，pFedPT显著优于多种最先进的个性化联邦学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 引入视觉提示可有效捕捉数据分布特征，提升个性化联邦学习性能，且该方法具有良好的兼容性可集成到现有联邦学习框架中。

authors_text: Julius Richter,Simon Welker,Jean-Marie Lemercier,Bunlong Lay,Tal Peer,Timo Gerkmann
title: Speech Signal Improvement Using Causal Generative Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用因果生成扩散模型改进语音信号
abstract: In this paper, we present a causal speech signal improvement system that is designed to handle different types of distortions. The method is based on a generative diffusion model which has been shown to work well in scenarios with missing data and non-linear corruptions. To guarantee causal processing, we modify the network architecture of our previous work and replace global normalization with causal adaptive gain control. We generate diverse training data containing a broad range of distortions. This work was performed in the context of an "ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge" and submitted to the non-real-time track of the "Speech Signal Improvement Challenge 2023", where it was ranked fifth.
summary: In this paper, we present a causal speech signal improvement system that is designed to handle different types of distortions. The method is based on a generative diffusion model which has been shown to work well in scenarios with missing data and non-linear corruptions. To guarantee causal processing, we modify the network architecture of our previous work and replace global normalization with causal adaptive gain control. We generate diverse training data containing a broad range of distortions. This work was performed in the context of an "ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge" and submitted to the non-real-time track of the "Speech Signal Improvement Challenge 2023", where it was ranked fifth.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种因果语音信号改进系统，旨在处理不同类型的失真。该方法基于生成扩散模型，该模型已被证明在丢失数据和非线性损坏的情况下效果良好。为了保证因果处理，我们修改了之前工作的网络架构，并用因果自适应增益控制代替全局归一化。我们生成包含各种失真的多样化训练数据。这项工作是在“ICASSP 信号处理大挑战”的背景下进行的，并提交给“2023 年语音信号改进挑战”的非实时赛道，排名第五。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果生成扩散模型的语音信号增强系统，用于处理多种失真情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂失真和非线性噪声时存在局限，需设计满足因果性约束的模型以提升语音质量。
AI.method: 修改生成扩散模型架构，采用因果自适应增益控制替代全局归一化，并构建包含广泛失真的训练数据集。
AI.result: 该方法在Speech Signal Improvement Challenge 2023非实时赛道中获得第五名。
AI.conclusion: 因果生成扩散模型能有效处理多类型语音失真，验证了方法在实际竞赛场景中的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果生成扩散模型的语音信号增强系统，用于处理多种失真情况。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂失真和非线性噪声时存在局限，需设计满足因果性约束的模型以提升语音质量。
ai_content.method: 修改生成扩散模型架构，采用因果自适应增益控制替代全局归一化，并构建包含广泛失真的训练数据集。
ai_content.result: 该方法在Speech Signal Improvement Challenge 2023非实时赛道中获得第五名。

search_text: Speech Signal Improvement Using Causal Generative Diffusion Models 使用因果生成扩散模型改进语音信号 In this paper, we present a causal speech signal improvement system that is designed to handle different types of distortions. The method is based on a generative diffusion model which has been shown to work well in scenarios with missing data and non-linear corruptions. To guarantee causal processing, we modify the network architecture of our previous work and replace global normalization with causal adaptive gain control. We generate diverse training data containing a broad range of distortions. This work was performed in the context of an "ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge" and submitted to the non-real-time track of the "Speech Signal Improvement Challenge 2023", where it was ranked fifth. 在本文中，我们提出了一种因果语音信号改进系统，旨在处理不同类型的失真。该方法基于生成扩散模型，该模型已被证明在丢失数据和非线性损坏的情况下效果良好。为了保证因果处理，我们修改了之前工作的网络架构，并用因果自适应增益控制代替全局归一化。我们生成包含各种失真的多样化训练数据。这项工作是在“ICASSP 信号处理大挑战”的背景下进行的，并提交给“2023 年语音信号改进挑战”的非实时赛道，排名第五。 本文提出一种基于因果生成扩散模型的语音信号增强系统，用于处理多种失真情况。 Julius Richter,Simon Welker,Jean-Marie Lemercier,Bunlong Lay,Tal Peer,Timo Gerkmann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Kalina Bonofiglio,Lauryn Whiteside,Maya Angeles,Matthew Haahr,Brandon Simpson,Josh Palmer,Yijia Wu,Markus P. Nemitz
title: Soft Fluidic Closed-Loop Controller for Untethered Underwater Gliders
title_zh: 用于无系留水下滑翔机的软流体闭环控制器
abstract: Soft underwater robots typically explore bioinspired designs at the expense of power efficiency when compared to traditional underwater robots, which limits their practical use in real-world applications. We leverage a fluidic closed-loop controller to actuate a passive underwater glider. A soft hydrostatic pressure sensor is configured as a bangbang controller actuating a swim bladder made from silicone balloons. Our underwater glider oscillates between the water surface and 4 m depth while traveling 15 m translational. The fluidic underwater glider demonstrates a power efficiency of 28 mW/m. This work demonstrates a low-cost and power-efficient underwater glider and non-electronic controller. Due to its simple design, low cost, and ease of fabrication using FDM printing and soft lithography, it serves as a starting point for the exploration of non-electronic underwater soft robots.
summary: Soft underwater robots typically explore bioinspired designs at the expense of power efficiency when compared to traditional underwater robots, which limits their practical use in real-world applications. We leverage a fluidic closed-loop controller to actuate a passive underwater glider. A soft hydrostatic pressure sensor is configured as a bangbang controller actuating a swim bladder made from silicone balloons. Our underwater glider oscillates between the water surface and 4 m depth while traveling 15 m translational. The fluidic underwater glider demonstrates a power efficiency of 28 mW/m. This work demonstrates a low-cost and power-efficient underwater glider and non-electronic controller. Due to its simple design, low cost, and ease of fabrication using FDM printing and soft lithography, it serves as a starting point for the exploration of non-electronic underwater soft robots.
abstract_zh: 与传统水下机器人相比，软体水下机器人通常以牺牲功率效率为代价来探索仿生设计，这限制了它们在现实世界中的实际应用。我们利用流体闭环控制器来驱动被动水下滑翔机。软静水压力传感器被配置为 bangbang 控制器，驱动由硅胶气球制成的鱼鳔。我们的水下滑翔机在水面和 4 m 深度之间振荡，同时平移 15 m。流体水下滑翔机的功率效率为 28 mW/m。这项工作展示了一种低成本且节能的水下滑翔机和非电子控制器。由于其设计简单、成本低廉且易于使用 FDM 印刷和软光刻制造，因此它成为探索非电子水下软机器人的起点。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于流体闭环控制的软体自主水下滑翔器，以提高其功率效率和实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统软体水下机器人因功率效率低而限制实际应用，需开发高效、低成本的非电子控制方案。
AI.method: 利用流体闭环控制器与软水压传感器驱动硅胶鱼鳔，结合FDM打印和软光刻技术制造。
AI.result: 实现15米行程的水面至4米深度振荡，功率效率达28 mW/m，展示低成本、高效能。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种低成本、高效能的非电子控制方案，为未来软体水下机器人研究提供基础。

authors_text: Minsu Kim,Chae Won Kim,Yong Man Ro
title: Deep Visual Forced Alignment: Learning to Align Transcription with Talking Face Video
title_zh: 深度视觉强制对齐：学习将转录与说话的面部视频对齐
abstract: Forced alignment refers to a technology that time-aligns a given transcription with a corresponding speech. However, as the forced alignment technologies have developed using speech audio, they might fail in alignment when the input speech audio is noise-corrupted or is not accessible. We focus on that there is another component that the speech can be inferred from, the speech video (i.e., talking face video). Since the drawbacks of audio-based forced alignment can be complemented using the visual information when the audio signal is under poor condition, we try to develop a novel video-based forced alignment method. However, different from audio forced alignment, it is challenging to develop a reliable visual forced alignment technology for the following two reasons: 1) Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) has a much lower performance compared to audio-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), and 2) the translation from text to video is not reliable, so the method typically used for building audio forced alignment cannot be utilized in developing visual forced alignment. In order to alleviate these challenges, in this paper, we propose a new method that is appropriate for visual forced alignment, namely Deep Visual Forced Alignment (DVFA). The proposed DVFA can align the input transcription (i.e., sentence) with the talking face video without accessing the speech audio. Moreover, by augmenting the alignment task with anomaly case detection, DVFA can detect mismatches between the input transcription and the input video while performing the alignment. Therefore, we can robustly align the text with the talking face video even if there exist error words in the text. Through extensive experiments, we show the effectiveness of the proposed DVFA not only in the alignment task but also in interpreting the outputs of VSR models.
summary: Forced alignment refers to a technology that time-aligns a given transcription with a corresponding speech. However, as the forced alignment technologies have developed using speech audio, they might fail in alignment when the input speech audio is noise-corrupted or is not accessible. We focus on that there is another component that the speech can be inferred from, the speech video (i.e., talking face video). Since the drawbacks of audio-based forced alignment can be complemented using the visual information when the audio signal is under poor condition, we try to develop a novel video-based forced alignment method. However, different from audio forced alignment, it is challenging to develop a reliable visual forced alignment technology for the following two reasons: 1) Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) has a much lower performance compared to audio-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), and 2) the translation from text to video is not reliable, so the method typically used for building audio forced alignment cannot be utilized in developing visual forced alignment. In order to alleviate these challenges, in this paper, we propose a new method that is appropriate for visual forced alignment, namely Deep Visual Forced Alignment (DVFA). The proposed DVFA can align the input transcription (i.e., sentence) with the talking face video without accessing the speech audio. Moreover, by augmenting the alignment task with anomaly case detection, DVFA can detect mismatches between the input transcription and the input video while performing the alignment. Therefore, we can robustly align the text with the talking face video even if there exist error words in the text. Through extensive experiments, we show the effectiveness of the proposed DVFA not only in the alignment task but also in interpreting the outputs of VSR models.
abstract_zh: 强制对齐是指将给定转录与相应语音进行时间对齐的技术。然而，由于强制对齐技术是使用语音音频开发的，因此当输入语音音频被噪声破坏或不可访问时，它们可能会无法对齐。我们关注的是可以从语音视频（即说话的面部视频）推断语音的另一个组成部分。由于当音频信号条件较差时，可以使用视觉信息来弥补基于音频的强制对齐的缺点，因此我们尝试开发一种新颖的基于视频的强制对齐方法。然而，与音频强制对齐不同，开发可靠的视觉强制对齐技术具有挑战性，原因有两个：1）与基于音频的自动语音识别（ASR）相比，视觉语音识别（VSR）的性能要低得多；2）从文本到视频的翻译不可靠，因此通常用于构建音频强制对齐的方法不能用于开发视觉强制对齐。为了缓解这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种适合视觉强制对齐的新方法，即深度视觉强制对齐（DVFA）。所提出的 DVFA 可以将输入转录（即句子）与说话的面部视频对齐，而无需访问语音音频。此外，通过通过异常情况检测增强对齐任务，DVFA 可以在执行对齐时检测输入转录和输入视频之间的不匹配。因此，即使文本中存在错误单词，我们也可以稳健地将文本与说话的面部视频对齐。通过大量的实验，我们证明了所提出的 DVFA 不仅在对齐任务中而且在解释 VSR 模型的输出方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需语音音频的基于视觉的强制对齐方法DVFA，通过分析说话人面部视频将文本转录与视频进行对齐，并检测文本与视频之间的不匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统强制对齐依赖音频信号，但音频存在噪声或缺失时失效。面部视频包含语音信息，但视觉语音识别（VSR）性能较低且文本到视频的映射不可靠，需开发新的视觉强制对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出Deep Visual Forced Alignment（DVFA）框架，利用面部视频特征进行文本-视频对齐，并通过异常检测模块识别文本与视频内容的不匹配，提升对齐鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明DVFA在强制对齐任务及解释VSR模型输出方面均有效，即使文本存在错误也能实现可靠对齐。
AI.conclusion: DVFA通过结合视觉信息和异常检测，解决了无音频场景下的文本-视频对齐问题，为视觉语音处理提供了新方法。

Moreover, by augmenting the alignment task with anomaly case detection, DVFA can detect mismatches between the input transcription and the input video while performing the alignment. Therefore, we can robustly align the text with the talking face video even if there exist error words in the text. Through extensive experiments, we show the effectiveness of the proposed DVFA not only in the alignment task but also in interpreting the outputs of VSR models. 强制对齐是指将给定转录与相应语音进行时间对齐的技术。然而，由于强制对齐技术是使用语音音频开发的，因此当输入语音音频被噪声破坏或不可访问时，它们可能会无法对齐。我们关注的是可以从语音视频（即说话的面部视频）推断语音的另一个组成部分。由于当音频信号条件较差时，可以使用视觉信息来弥补基于音频的强制对齐的缺点，因此我们尝试开发一种新颖的基于视频的强制对齐方法。然而，与音频强制对齐不同，开发可靠的视觉强制对齐技术具有挑战性，原因有两个：1）与基于音频的自动语音识别（ASR）相比，视觉语音识别（VSR）的性能要低得多；2）从文本到视频的翻译不可靠，因此通常用于构建音频强制对齐的方法不能用于开发视觉强制对齐。为了缓解这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种适合视觉强制对齐的新方法，即深度视觉强制对齐（DVFA）。所提出的 DVFA 可以将输入转录（即句子）与说话的面部视频对齐，而无需访问语音音频。此外，通过通过异常情况检测增强对齐任务，DVFA 可以在执行对齐时检测输入转录和输入视频之间的不匹配。因此，即使文本中存在错误单词，我们也可以稳健地将文本与说话的面部视频对齐。通过大量的实验，我们证明了所提出的 DVFA 不仅在对齐任务中而且在解释 VSR 模型的输出方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种无需语音音频的基于视觉的强制对齐方法DVFA，通过分析说话人面部视频将文本转录与视频进行对齐，并检测文本与视频之间的不匹配。 Minsu Kim,Chae Won Kim,Yong Man Ro cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuhang Lu,Touradj Ebrahimi
title: Cross-resolution Face Recognition via Identity-Preserving Network and Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过身份保护网络和知识蒸馏进行跨分辨率人脸识别
abstract: Cross-resolution face recognition has become a challenging problem for modern deep face recognition systems. It aims at matching a low-resolution probe image with high-resolution gallery images registered in a database. Existing methods mainly leverage prior information from high-resolution images by either reconstructing facial details with super-resolution techniques or learning a unified feature space. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a new approach that enforces the network to focus on the discriminative information stored in the low-frequency components of a low-resolution image. A cross-resolution knowledge distillation paradigm is first employed as the learning framework. Then, an identity-preserving network, WaveResNet, and a wavelet similarity loss are designed to capture low-frequency details and boost performance. Finally, an image degradation model is conceived to simulate more realistic low-resolution training data. Consequently, extensive experimental results show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the baseline model and other state-of-the-art methods across a variety of image resolutions.
summary: Cross-resolution face recognition has become a challenging problem for modern deep face recognition systems. It aims at matching a low-resolution probe image with high-resolution gallery images registered in a database. Existing methods mainly leverage prior information from high-resolution images by either reconstructing facial details with super-resolution techniques or learning a unified feature space. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a new approach that enforces the network to focus on the discriminative information stored in the low-frequency components of a low-resolution image. A cross-resolution knowledge distillation paradigm is first employed as the learning framework. Then, an identity-preserving network, WaveResNet, and a wavelet similarity loss are designed to capture low-frequency details and boost performance. Finally, an image degradation model is conceived to simulate more realistic low-resolution training data. Consequently, extensive experimental results show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the baseline model and other state-of-the-art methods across a variety of image resolutions.
abstract_zh: 跨分辨率人脸识别已成为现代深度人脸识别系统的一个具有挑战性的问题。它的目的是将低分辨率探测图像与数据库中注册的高分辨率图库图像进行匹配。现有方法主要通过使用超分辨率技术重建面部细节或学习统一的特征空间来利用高分辨率图像的先验信息。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新方法，强制网络专注于存储在低分辨率图像低频分量中的判别信息。首先采用跨分辨率知识蒸馏范式作为学习框架。然后，设计了身份保留网络 WaveResNet 和小波相似性损失来捕获低频细节并提高性能。最后，构想了图像退化模型来模拟更真实的低分辨率训练数据。因此，大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在各种图像分辨率下始终优于基线模型和其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过身份保持网络和知识蒸馏解决跨分辨率人脸识别问题的方法，旨在匹配低分辨率探针图像与高分辨率数据库图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖超分辨率重建或统一特征空间，但存在细节丢失或特征对齐困难的问题。本文通过关注低频成分中的判别信息，提升跨分辨率匹配性能。
AI.method: 采用跨分辨率知识蒸馏框架，设计身份保持网络WaveResNet与小波相似性损失以捕捉低频细节，并构建图像退化模型生成更真实的低分辨率训练数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种分辨率下均优于基线模型和其他最先进方法，显著提升跨分辨率人脸识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦低频信息与真实退化数据模拟，本文方法有效解决了跨分辨率人脸识别中的关键挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vijitha Kannumuru,Santhosh Kannan S P,Krithiga Shankar,Joy Larnyoh,Rohith Mahadevan,Raja CSP Raman
title: Fashion-model pose recommendation and generation using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习进行时装模特姿势推荐和生成
abstract: Fashion-model pose is an important attribute in the fashion industry. Creative directors, modeling production houses, and top photographers always look for professional models able to pose. without the skill to correctly pose, their chances of landing professional modeling employment are regrettably quite little. There are occasions when models and photographers are unsure of the best pose to strike while taking photographs. This research concentrates on suggesting the fashion personnel a series of similar images based on the input image. The image is segmented into different parts and similar images are suggested for the user. This was achieved by calculating the color histogram of the input image and applying the same for all the images in the dataset and comparing the histograms. Synthetic images have become popular to avoid privacy concerns and to overcome the high cost of photoshoots. Hence, this paper also extends the work of generating synthetic images from the recommendation engine using styleGAN to an extent.
summary: Fashion-model pose is an important attribute in the fashion industry. Creative directors, modeling production houses, and top photographers always look for professional models able to pose. without the skill to correctly pose, their chances of landing professional modeling employment are regrettably quite little. There are occasions when models and photographers are unsure of the best pose to strike while taking photographs. This research concentrates on suggesting the fashion personnel a series of similar images based on the input image. The image is segmented into different parts and similar images are suggested for the user. This was achieved by calculating the color histogram of the input image and applying the same for all the images in the dataset and comparing the histograms. Synthetic images have become popular to avoid privacy concerns and to overcome the high cost of photoshoots. Hence, this paper also extends the work of generating synthetic images from the recommendation engine using styleGAN to an extent.
abstract_zh: 时装模特的姿势是时装界的一个重要属性。创意总监、模特制作公司和顶级摄影师总是寻找能够摆姿势的专业模特。遗憾的是，如果没有正确摆姿势的技巧，他们获得职业模特工作的机会就很小。有时，模特和摄影师不确定拍照时的最佳姿势。这项研究的重点是根据输入图像向时尚人员建议一系列相似的图像。图像被分割成不同的部分，并向用户推荐相似的图像。这是通过计算输入图像的颜色直方图并将其应用于数据集中的所有图像并比较直方图来实现的。为了避免隐私问题并克服拍摄照片的高昂成本，合成图像已变得流行。因此，本文还在一定程度上扩展了使用 styleGAN 从推荐引擎生成合成图像的工作。

AI.tldr: 利用机器学习技术推荐和生成时尚模特姿势，以辅助时尚行业中的拍摄工作
AI.motivation: 解决时尚行业中模特和摄影师在拍摄时对最佳姿势选择的困惑，并通过合成图像降低隐私风险和拍摄成本
AI.method: 通过图像分割和颜色直方图匹配推荐相似姿势图像，并结合styleGAN生成合成图像
AI.result: 实现了基于颜色直方图的姿势图像推荐系统，并成功利用styleGAN生成高质量的合成图像
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效辅助时尚行业中的姿势选择和图像生成，提高了拍摄效率并降低了成本

authors_text: Jiaxu Zhang,Junwu Weng,Di Kang,Fang Zhao,Shaoli Huang,Xuefei Zhe,Linchao Bao,Ying Shan,Jue Wang,Zhigang Tu
title: Skinned Motion Retargeting with Residual Perception of Motion Semantics & Geometry
title_zh: 利用运动语义和几何的残余感知进行蒙皮运动重定向
abstract: A good motion retargeting cannot be reached without reasonable consideration of source-target differences on both the skeleton and shape geometry levels. In this work, we propose a novel Residual RETargeting network (R2ET) structure, which relies on two neural modification modules, to adjust the source motions to fit the target skeletons and shapes progressively. In particular, a skeleton-aware module is introduced to preserve the source motion semantics. A shape-aware module is designed to perceive the geometries of target characters to reduce interpenetration and contact-missing. Driven by our explored distance-based losses that explicitly model the motion semantics and geometry, these two modules can learn residual motion modifications on the source motion to generate plausible retargeted motion in a single inference without post-processing. To balance these two modifications, we further present a balancing gate to conduct linear interpolation between them. Extensive experiments on the public dataset Mixamo demonstrate that our R2ET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, and provides a good balance between the preservation of motion semantics as well as the attenuation of interpenetration and contact-missing. Code is available at https://github.com/Kebii/R2ET.
summary: A good motion retargeting cannot be reached without reasonable consideration of source-target differences on both the skeleton and shape geometry levels. In this work, we propose a novel Residual RETargeting network (R2ET) structure, which relies on two neural modification modules, to adjust the source motions to fit the target skeletons and shapes progressively. In particular, a skeleton-aware module is introduced to preserve the source motion semantics. A shape-aware module is designed to perceive the geometries of target characters to reduce interpenetration and contact-missing. Driven by our explored distance-based losses that explicitly model the motion semantics and geometry, these two modules can learn residual motion modifications on the source motion to generate plausible retargeted motion in a single inference without post-processing. To balance these two modifications, we further present a balancing gate to conduct linear interpolation between them. Extensive experiments on the public dataset Mixamo demonstrate that our R2ET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, and provides a good balance between the preservation of motion semantics as well as the attenuation of interpenetration and contact-missing. Code is available at https://github.com/Kebii/R2ET.
abstract_zh: 如果不合理考虑骨架和形状几何级别上的源目标差异，就无法实现良好的运动重定向。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的残差RETargeting网络（R2ET）结构，它依赖于两个神经修改模块，来调整源运动以逐步适应目标骨架和形状。特别是，引入了骨架感知模块来保留源运动语义。形状感知模块旨在感知目标角色的几何形状，以减少相互渗透和接触缺失。在我们探索的基于距离的损失的驱动下，明确地对运动语义和几何进行建模，这两个模块可以学习源运动的残余运动修改，从而在单个推理中生成合理的重定向运动，而无需进行后处理。为了平衡这两个修改，我们进一步提出了一个平衡门来在它们之间进行线性插值。在公共数据集 Mixamo 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 R2ET 实现了最先进的性能，并在运动语义的保留以及互穿和接触缺失的衰减之间提供了良好的平衡。代码可在 https://github.com/Kebii/R2ET 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差感知的运动重定向网络R2ET，通过考虑源目标骨骼和形状几何差异，实现更精确的运动重定向。
AI.motivation: 现有运动重定向方法未能充分考虑源目标在骨骼结构和形状几何层面的差异，导致运动语义丢失或角色间穿透等问题。
AI.method: 设计包含骨骼感知模块和形状感知模块的R2ET网络，通过距离损失函数建模运动语义与几何关系，并引入平衡门机制融合两种模块的修正结果。
AI.result: 在Mixamo数据集上实验表明，R2ET在运动语义保持与减少穿透/接触缺失方面达到SOTA性能，且无需后处理即可生成合理重定向运动。
AI.conclusion: R2ET通过双模块协同与平衡机制，有效解决了运动重定向中骨骼语义保持与几何适配的矛盾，为复杂角色动画生成提供新思路。

search_text: Skinned Motion Retargeting with Residual Perception of Motion Semantics & Geometry 利用运动语义和几何的残余感知进行蒙皮运动重定向 A good motion retargeting cannot be reached without reasonable consideration of source-target differences on both the skeleton and shape geometry levels. In this work, we propose a novel Residual RETargeting network (R2ET) structure, which relies on two neural modification modules, to adjust the source motions to fit the target skeletons and shapes progressively. In particular, a skeleton-aware module is introduced to preserve the source motion semantics. A shape-aware module is designed to perceive the geometries of target characters to reduce interpenetration and contact-missing. Driven by our explored distance-based losses that explicitly model the motion semantics and geometry, these two modules can learn residual motion modifications on the source motion to generate plausible retargeted motion in a single inference without post-processing. To balance these two modifications, we further present a balancing gate to conduct linear interpolation between them. Extensive experiments on the public dataset Mixamo demonstrate that our R2ET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, and provides a good balance between the preservation of motion semantics as well as the attenuation of interpenetration and contact-missing. Code is available at https://github.com/Kebii/R2ET. 如果不合理考虑骨架和形状几何级别上的源目标差异，就无法实现良好的运动重定向。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的残差RETargeting网络（R2ET）结构，它依赖于两个神经修改模块，来调整源运动以逐步适应目标骨架和形状。特别是，引入了骨架感知模块来保留源运动语义。形状感知模块旨在感知目标角色的几何形状，以减少相互渗透和接触缺失。在我们探索的基于距离的损失的驱动下，明确地对运动语义和几何进行建模，这两个模块可以学习源运动的残余运动修改，从而在单个推理中生成合理的重定向运动，而无需进行后处理。为了平衡这两个修改，我们进一步提出了一个平衡门来在它们之间进行线性插值。在公共数据集 Mixamo 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 R2ET 实现了最先进的性能，并在运动语义的保留以及互穿和接触缺失的衰减之间提供了良好的平衡。代码可在 https://github.com/Kebii/R2ET 获取。 本文提出一种基于残差感知的运动重定向网络R2ET，通过考虑源目标骨骼和形状几何差异，实现更精确的运动重定向。 Jiaxu Zhang,Junwu Weng,Di Kang,Fang Zhao,Shaoli Huang,Xuefei Zhe,Linchao Bao,Ying Shan,Jue Wang,Zhigang Tu cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Sriram Radhakrishna,Adithya Balasubramanyam
title: Economical Quaternion Extraction from a Human Skeletal Pose Estimate using 2-D Cameras
title_zh: 使用 2-D 相机从人体骨骼姿势估计中经济地提取四元数
comment: This is the post-final version of the paper published with IEEE CONECCT 2023 with some figure reference errors rectified
comments: This is the post-final version of the paper published with IEEE CONECCT 2023 with some figure reference errors rectified
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel algorithm to extract a quaternion from a two dimensional camera frame for estimating a contained human skeletal pose. The problem of pose estimation is usually tackled through the usage of stereo cameras and intertial measurement units for obtaining depth and euclidean distance for measurement of points in 3D space. However, the usage of these devices comes with a high signal processing latency as well as a significant monetary cost. By making use of MediaPipe, a framework for building perception pipelines for human pose estimation, the proposed algorithm extracts a quaternion from a 2-D frame capturing an image of a human object at a sub-fifty millisecond latency while also being capable of deployment at edges with a single camera frame and a generally low computational resource availability, especially for use cases involving last-minute detection and reaction by autonomous robots. The algorithm seeks to bypass the funding barrier and improve accessibility for robotics researchers involved in designing control systems.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel algorithm to extract a quaternion from a two dimensional camera frame for estimating a contained human skeletal pose. The problem of pose estimation is usually tackled through the usage of stereo cameras and intertial measurement units for obtaining depth and euclidean distance for measurement of points in 3D space. However, the usage of these devices comes with a high signal processing latency as well as a significant monetary cost. By making use of MediaPipe, a framework for building perception pipelines for human pose estimation, the proposed algorithm extracts a quaternion from a 2-D frame capturing an image of a human object at a sub-fifty millisecond latency while also being capable of deployment at edges with a single camera frame and a generally low computational resource availability, especially for use cases involving last-minute detection and reaction by autonomous robots. The algorithm seeks to bypass the funding barrier and improve accessibility for robotics researchers involved in designing control systems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种从二维相机帧中提取四元数的新颖算法，用于估计所包含的人体骨骼姿势。位姿估计问题通常通过使用立体相机和惯性测量单元来解决，以获得深度和欧几里德距离以测量 3D 空间中的点。然而，使用这些设备会带来较高的信号处理延迟以及高昂的金钱成本。通过利用 MediaPipe（一种用于构建人体姿势估计感知管道的框架），所提出的算法从二维帧中提取四元数，以低于 50 毫秒的延迟捕获人体图像，同时还能够使用单个相机帧和通常较低的计算资源可用性在边缘进行部署，特别是对于涉及自主机器人最后一刻检测和反应的用例。该算法旨在绕过资金障碍并提高参与设计控制系统的机器人研究人员的可及性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从2D摄像头图像中提取四元数以估计人体骨骼姿态的算法，替代传统高成本的立体摄像头和IMU设备。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖立体摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）获取深度信息，存在高成本和信号处理延迟问题，限制了机器人控制系统的实时性和普及性。
AI.method: 基于MediaPipe框架，直接从单帧2D图像中提取人体骨骼姿态对应的四元数，无需深度信息，降低计算资源需求。
AI.result: 算法实现低于50毫秒的延迟，可在边缘设备部署，显著降低硬件成本并提升自主机器人实时检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了传统姿态估计的高成本与高延迟问题，为机器人控制系统的开发提供了经济高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Nam Tuan Ly,Atsuhiro Takasu
title: An End-to-End Multi-Task Learning Model for Image-based Table Recognition
title_zh: 基于图像的表格识别的端到端多任务学习模型
comment: 10 pages, VISAPP2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.07641
comments: 10 pages, VISAPP2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.07641
abstract: Image-based table recognition is a challenging task due to the diversity of table styles and the complexity of table structures. Most of the previous methods focus on a non-end-to-end approach which divides the problem into two separate sub-problems: table structure recognition; and cell-content recognition and then attempts to solve each sub-problem independently using two separate systems. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end multi-task learning model for image-based table recognition. The proposed model consists of one shared encoder, one shared decoder, and three separate decoders which are used for learning three sub-tasks of table recognition: table structure recognition, cell detection, and cell-content recognition. The whole system can be easily trained and inferred in an end-to-end approach. In the experiments, we evaluate the performance of the proposed model on two large-scale datasets: FinTabNet and PubTabNet. The experiment results show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in all benchmark datasets.
summary: Image-based table recognition is a challenging task due to the diversity of table styles and the complexity of table structures. Most of the previous methods focus on a non-end-to-end approach which divides the problem into two separate sub-problems: table structure recognition; and cell-content recognition and then attempts to solve each sub-problem independently using two separate systems. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end multi-task learning model for image-based table recognition. The proposed model consists of one shared encoder, one shared decoder, and three separate decoders which are used for learning three sub-tasks of table recognition: table structure recognition, cell detection, and cell-content recognition. The whole system can be easily trained and inferred in an end-to-end approach. In the experiments, we evaluate the performance of the proposed model on two large-scale datasets: FinTabNet and PubTabNet. The experiment results show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in all benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于表格样式的多样性和表格结构的复杂性，基于图像的表格识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。以前的大多数方法都侧重于非端到端方法，该方法将问题分为两个单独的子问题：表结构识别；和单元格内容识别，然后尝试使用两个单独的系统独立解决每个子问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于基于图像的表格识别的端到端多任务学习模型。该模型由一个共享编码器、一个共享解码器和三个独立的解码器组成，用于学习表格识别的三个子任务：表格结构识别、单元格检测和单元格内容识别。整个系统可以通过端到端的方法轻松地进行训练和推断。在实验中，我们评估了所提出的模型在两个大型数据集：FinTabNet 和 PubTabNet 上的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在所有基准数据集中都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的多任务学习模型，用于图像中的表格识别。
AI.motivation: 由于表格样式多样且结构复杂，传统的非端到端方法将问题拆分为两个子问题分别处理，效率和效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种端到端的多任务学习模型，包含一个共享编码器、一个共享解码器和三个独立解码器，用于学习表格结构识别、单元格检测和单元格内容识别三个子任务。
AI.result: 在FinTabNet和PubTabNet两个大型数据集上的实验结果表明，该模型在所有基准数据集上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过端到端的多任务学习方法，在表格识别任务中取得了更好的性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。
