search_text: An End-to-End Multi-Task Learning Model for Image-based Table Recognition 基于图像的表格识别的端到端多任务学习模型 Image-based table recognition is a challenging task due to the diversity of table styles and the complexity of table structures. Most of the previous methods focus on a non-end-to-end approach which divides the problem into two separate sub-problems: table structure recognition; and cell-content recognition and then attempts to solve each sub-problem independently using two separate systems. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end multi-task learning model for image-based table recognition. The proposed model consists of one shared encoder, one shared decoder, and three separate decoders which are used for learning three sub-tasks of table recognition: table structure recognition, cell detection, and cell-content recognition. The whole system can be easily trained and inferred in an end-to-end approach. In the experiments, we evaluate the performance of the proposed model on two large-scale datasets: FinTabNet and PubTabNet. The experiment results show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in all benchmark datasets. 由于表格样式的多样性和表格结构的复杂性，基于图像的表格识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。以前的大多数方法都侧重于非端到端方法，该方法将问题分为两个单独的子问题：表结构识别；和单元格内容识别，然后尝试使用两个单独的系统独立解决每个子问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于基于图像的表格识别的端到端多任务学习模型。该模型由一个共享编码器、一个共享解码器和三个独立的解码器组成，用于学习表格识别的三个子任务：表格结构识别、单元格检测和单元格内容识别。整个系统可以通过端到端的方法轻松地进行训练和推断。在实验中，我们评估了所提出的模型在两个大型数据集：FinTabNet 和 PubTabNet 上的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在所有基准数据集中都优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种端到端的多任务学习模型，用于图像中的表格识别。 Nam Tuan Ly,Atsuhiro Takasu cs.CV

authors_text: Ye Huang,Di Kang,Shenghua Gao,Wen Li,Lixin Duan
title: High-level Feature Guided Decoding for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的高级特征引导解码
comment: Revised version, refactored presentation and added more experiments
comments: Revised version, refactored presentation and added more experiments
abstract: Existing pyramid-based upsamplers (e.g. SemanticFPN), although efficient, usually produce less accurate results compared to dilation-based models when using the same backbone. This is partially caused by the contaminated high-level features since they are fused and fine-tuned with noisy low-level features on limited data. To address this issue, we propose to use powerful pre-trained high-level features as guidance (HFG) so that the upsampler can produce robust results. Specifically, \emph{only} the high-level features from the backbone are used to train the class tokens, which are then reused by the upsampler for classification, guiding the upsampler features to more discriminative backbone features. One crucial design of the HFG is to protect the high-level features from being contaminated by using proper stop-gradient operations so that the backbone does not update according to the noisy gradient from the upsampler. To push the upper limit of HFG, we introduce a context augmentation encoder (CAE) that can efficiently and effectively operate on the low-resolution high-level feature, resulting in improved representation and thus better guidance. We named our complete solution as the High-Level Features Guided Decoder (HFGD). We evaluate the proposed HFGD on three benchmarks: Pascal Context, COCOStuff164k, and Cityscapes. HFGD achieves state-of-the-art results among methods that do not use extra training data, demonstrating its effectiveness and generalization ability.
summary: Existing pyramid-based upsamplers (e.g. SemanticFPN), although efficient, usually produce less accurate results compared to dilation-based models when using the same backbone. This is partially caused by the contaminated high-level features since they are fused and fine-tuned with noisy low-level features on limited data. To address this issue, we propose to use powerful pre-trained high-level features as guidance (HFG) so that the upsampler can produce robust results. Specifically, \emph{only} the high-level features from the backbone are used to train the class tokens, which are then reused by the upsampler for classification, guiding the upsampler features to more discriminative backbone features. One crucial design of the HFG is to protect the high-level features from being contaminated by using proper stop-gradient operations so that the backbone does not update according to the noisy gradient from the upsampler. To push the upper limit of HFG, we introduce a context augmentation encoder (CAE) that can efficiently and effectively operate on the low-resolution high-level feature, resulting in improved representation and thus better guidance. We named our complete solution as the High-Level Features Guided Decoder (HFGD). We evaluate the proposed HFGD on three benchmarks: Pascal Context, COCOStuff164k, and Cityscapes. HFGD achieves state-of-the-art results among methods that do not use extra training data, demonstrating its effectiveness and generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于金字塔的上采样器（例如 SemanticFPN）虽然高效，但在使用相同骨干网时，与基于扩张的模型相比，通常会产生不太准确的结果。这部分是由于高级特征被污染造成的，因为它们是在有限的数据上与嘈杂的低级特征融合和微调的。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用强大的预训练高级特征作为指导（HFG），以便上采样器可以产生稳健的结果。具体来说，\emph{仅}使用来自主干的高级特征来训练类标记，然后由上采样器重用这些标记进行分类，从而将上采样器特征引导到更具辨别力的主干特征。 HFG 的一项关键设计是通过使用适当的停止梯度操作来保护高级特征免受污染，以便主干网络不会根据上采样器的噪声梯度进行更新。为了突破 HFG 的上限，我们引入了上下文增强编码器（CAE），它可以高效且有效地对低分辨率高级特征进行操作，从而改进表示，从而获得更好的指导。我们将完整的解决方案命名为高级功能引导解码器 (HFGD)。我们根据三个基准评估所提出的 HFGD：Pascal Context、COCOStuff164k 和 Cityscapes。 HFGD 在不使用额外训练数据的方法中取得了最先进的结果，证明了其有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高层特征引导的解码方法HFGD，用于提升语义分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有金字塔上采样器因高层特征被低层噪声污染导致精度不足，需保护高层特征并利用预训练特征进行有效引导。
AI.method: 通过预训练高层特征训练分类标记，结合stop-gradient操作防止污染，并引入上下文增强编码器（CAE）优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在Pascal Context、COCOStuff164k和Cityscapes三个基准测试中达到无额外训练数据的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: HFGD验证了高层特征引导的有效性，展示了其在语义分割任务中的泛化能力与优越性。

authors_text: Hugo Bertiche,Niloy J. Mitra,Kuldeep Kulkarni,Chun-Hao Paul Huang,Tuanfeng Y. Wang,Meysam Madadi,Sergio Escalera,Duygu Ceylan
title: Blowing in the Wind: CycleNet for Human Cinemagraphs from Still Images
title_zh: 风中飘扬：CycleNet 用于静态图像中的人体动态图像
abstract: Cinemagraphs are short looping videos created by adding subtle motions to a static image. This kind of media is popular and engaging. However, automatic generation of cinemagraphs is an underexplored area and current solutions require tedious low-level manual authoring by artists. In this paper, we present an automatic method that allows generating human cinemagraphs from single RGB images. We investigate the problem in the context of dressed humans under the wind. At the core of our method is a novel cyclic neural network that produces looping cinemagraphs for the target loop duration. To circumvent the problem of collecting real data, we demonstrate that it is possible, by working in the image normal space, to learn garment motion dynamics on synthetic data and generalize to real data. We evaluate our method on both synthetic and real data and demonstrate that it is possible to create compelling and plausible cinemagraphs from single RGB images.
summary: Cinemagraphs are short looping videos created by adding subtle motions to a static image. This kind of media is popular and engaging. However, automatic generation of cinemagraphs is an underexplored area and current solutions require tedious low-level manual authoring by artists. In this paper, we present an automatic method that allows generating human cinemagraphs from single RGB images. We investigate the problem in the context of dressed humans under the wind. At the core of our method is a novel cyclic neural network that produces looping cinemagraphs for the target loop duration. To circumvent the problem of collecting real data, we demonstrate that it is possible, by working in the image normal space, to learn garment motion dynamics on synthetic data and generalize to real data. We evaluate our method on both synthetic and real data and demonstrate that it is possible to create compelling and plausible cinemagraphs from single RGB images.
abstract_zh: Cinemagraph 是通过向静态图像添加微妙的动作而创建的短循环视频。这种媒体很受欢迎且有吸引力。然而，电影照片的自动生成是一个尚未开发的领域，当前的解决方案需要艺术家进行繁琐的低级手动创作。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动方法，可以从单个 RGB 图像生成人体电影图像。我们在风中穿着衣服的人的背景下研究这个问题。我们方法的核心是一种新颖的循环神经网络，它可以在目标循环持续时间内生成循环电影图像。为了解决收集真实数据的问题，我们证明了通过在图像法线空间中工作，可以学习合成数据上的服装运动动力学并推广到真实数据。我们在合成数据和真实数据上评估我们的方法，并证明可以从单个 RGB 图像创建引人注目且可信的电影图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络（CycleNet）的自动方法，从单张静态图像生成具有风中衣物动态效果的人类动态图（Cinemagraphs）。
AI.motivation: 当前Cinemagraphs生成依赖人工繁琐操作，自动方法研究不足。风中衣物动态的自然模拟对视觉效果至关重要，但缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计CycleNet循环神经网络，通过合成数据学习衣物运动模式并泛化至真实场景，无需真实数据即可生成符合物理规律的循环动态效果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均能生成具有可信动态效果的Cinemagraphs，验证了方法在单图像输入下的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CycleNet为自动化的Cinemagraphs生成提供了可行方案，通过合成数据驱动的运动建模可有效解决真实数据稀缺问题。

Cinemagraph 是通过向静态图像添加微妙的动作而创建的短循环视频。这种媒体很受欢迎且有吸引力。然而，电影照片的自动生成是一个尚未开发的领域，当前的解决方案需要艺术家进行繁琐的低级手动创作。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动方法，可以从单个 RGB 图像生成人体电影图像。我们在风中穿着衣服的人的背景下研究这个问题。我们方法的核心是一种新颖的循环神经网络，它可以在目标循环持续时间内生成循环电影图像。为了解决收集真实数据的问题，我们证明了通过在图像法线空间中工作，可以学习合成数据上的服装运动动力学并推广到真实数据。我们在合成数据和真实数据上评估我们的方法，并证明可以从单个 RGB 图像创建引人注目且可信的电影图像。 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络（CycleNet）的自动方法，从单张静态图像生成具有风中衣物动态效果的人类动态图（Cinemagraphs）。 Hugo Bertiche,Niloy J. Mitra,Kuldeep Kulkarni,Chun-Hao Paul Huang,Tuanfeng Y. Wang,Meysam Madadi,Sergio Escalera,Duygu Ceylan cs.CV

authors_text: Yuguang Yang,Yu Pan,Jingjing Yin,Jiangyu Han,Lei Ma,Heng Lu
title: HYBRIDFORMER: improving SqueezeFormer with hybrid attention and NSR mechanism
title_zh: HYBRIDFORMER：利用混合注意力和 NSR 机制改进 SqueezeFormer
abstract: SqueezeFormer has recently shown impressive performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR). However, its inference speed suffers from the quadratic complexity of softmax-attention (SA). In addition, limited by the large convolution kernel size, the local modeling ability of SqueezeFormer is insufficient. In this paper, we propose a novel method HybridFormer to improve SqueezeFormer in a fast and efficient way. Specifically, we first incorporate linear attention (LA) and propose a hybrid LASA paradigm to increase the model's inference speed. Second, a hybrid neural architecture search (NAS) guided structural re-parameterization (SRep) mechanism, termed NSR, is proposed to enhance the ability of the model to extract local interactions. Extensive experiments conducted on the LibriSpeech dataset demonstrate that our proposed HybridFormer can achieve a 9.1% relative word error rate (WER) reduction over SqueezeFormer on the test-other dataset. Furthermore, when input speech is 30s, the HybridFormer can improve the model's inference speed up to 18%. Our source code is available online.
summary: SqueezeFormer has recently shown impressive performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR). However, its inference speed suffers from the quadratic complexity of softmax-attention (SA). In addition, limited by the large convolution kernel size, the local modeling ability of SqueezeFormer is insufficient. In this paper, we propose a novel method HybridFormer to improve SqueezeFormer in a fast and efficient way. Specifically, we first incorporate linear attention (LA) and propose a hybrid LASA paradigm to increase the model's inference speed. Second, a hybrid neural architecture search (NAS) guided structural re-parameterization (SRep) mechanism, termed NSR, is proposed to enhance the ability of the model to extract local interactions. Extensive experiments conducted on the LibriSpeech dataset demonstrate that our proposed HybridFormer can achieve a 9.1% relative word error rate (WER) reduction over SqueezeFormer on the test-other dataset. Furthermore, when input speech is 30s, the HybridFormer can improve the model's inference speed up to 18%. Our source code is available online.
abstract_zh: SqueezeFormer 最近在自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，其推理速度受到 softmax-attention (SA) 二次复杂度的影响。此外，受大卷积核尺寸的限制，SqueezeFormer的局部建模能力不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法 HybridFormer 来快速有效地改进 SqueezeFormer。具体来说，我们首先结合线性注意力（LA）并提出混合 LASA 范式来提高模型的推理速度。其次，提出了一种混合神经架构搜索（NAS）引导结构重新参数化（SRep）机制（称为 NSR），以增强模型提取局部交互的能力。在 LibriSpeech 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 HybridFormer 在测试其他数据集上比 SqueezeFormer 可以实现 9.1% 的相对单词错误率 (WER) 降低。此外，当输入语音为30s时，HybridFormer可以将模型的推理速度提高高达18%。我们的源代码可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HybridFormer方法，在保持SqueezeFormer优势的同时，通过混合注意力机制和NSR机制提升自动语音识别（ASR）的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: SqueezeFormer虽在ASR中表现优异，但其softmax注意力机制存在二次复杂度导致推理速度慢，且大卷积核限制了局部建模能力，亟需优化。
AI.method: 融合线性注意力（LA）构建混合LASA范式以加速推理，并设计基于神经架构搜索（NAS）引导的结构重参数化（SRep）机制NSR，增强局部交互建模能力。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，HybridFormer在test-other测试集上相对词错误率（WER）降低9.1%，30秒输入时推理速度提升18%。
AI.conclusion: HybridFormer有效解决了SqueezeFormer的效率与建模局限，为高效ASR模型设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Marouane Tliba,Aladine Chetouani,Giuseppe Valenzise,Frederic Dufaux
title: Quality evaluation of point clouds: a novel no-reference approach using transformer-based architecture
title_zh: 点云质量评估：一种使用基于变压器的架构的新型无参考方法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.02459
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2211.02459
abstract: With the increased interest in immersive experiences, point cloud came to birth and was widely adopted as the first choice to represent 3D media. Besides several distortions that could affect the 3D content spanning from acquisition to rendering, efficient transmission of such volumetric content over traditional communication systems stands at the expense of the delivered perceptual quality. To estimate the magnitude of such degradation, employing quality metrics became an inevitable solution. In this work, we propose a novel deep-based no-reference quality metric that operates directly on the whole point cloud without requiring extensive pre-processing, enabling real-time evaluation over both transmission and rendering levels. To do so, we use a novel model design consisting primarily of cross and self-attention layers, in order to learn the best set of local semantic affinities while keeping the best combination of geometry and color information in multiple levels from basic features extraction to deep representation modeling.
summary: With the increased interest in immersive experiences, point cloud came to birth and was widely adopted as the first choice to represent 3D media. Besides several distortions that could affect the 3D content spanning from acquisition to rendering, efficient transmission of such volumetric content over traditional communication systems stands at the expense of the delivered perceptual quality. To estimate the magnitude of such degradation, employing quality metrics became an inevitable solution. In this work, we propose a novel deep-based no-reference quality metric that operates directly on the whole point cloud without requiring extensive pre-processing, enabling real-time evaluation over both transmission and rendering levels. To do so, we use a novel model design consisting primarily of cross and self-attention layers, in order to learn the best set of local semantic affinities while keeping the best combination of geometry and color information in multiple levels from basic features extraction to deep representation modeling.
abstract_zh: 随着人们对沉浸式体验的兴趣日益浓厚，点云应运而生，并被广泛采用作为代表 3D 媒体的首选。除了可能影响从采集到渲染的 3D 内容的多种失真之外，通过传统通信系统有效传输此类体积内容也会以牺牲所提供的感知质量为代价。为了估计这种退化的程度，采用质量指标成为不可避免的解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度的无参考质量度量，该度量直接在整个点云上运行，不需要大量的预处理，从而能够对传输和渲染级别进行实时评估。为此，我们使用了一种主要由交叉层和自注意力层组成的新颖模型设计，以便学习最佳的局部语义亲和力集，同时在从基本特征提取到深度表示建模的多个级别上保持几何和颜色信息的最佳组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的无需参考的点云质量评估方法，直接对完整点云进行实时质量评价。
AI.motivation: 随着沉浸式体验需求增长，点云作为3D媒体的主要表示形式，在传输和渲染过程中易受失真影响，亟需高效的质量评估方法。
AI.method: 设计包含交叉注意力和自注意力层的Transformer模型，学习局部语义关联并融合多层级的几何与颜色信息。
AI.result: 实现了无需预处理的端到端实时质量评估，有效表征点云在传输和渲染中的感知质量退化程度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为点云质量评估提供了新颖的深度学习解决方案，可在保证精度的同时满足实时性需求。

authors_text: Ario Sadafi,Oleksandra Adonkina,Ashkan Khakzar,Peter Lienemann,Rudolf Matthias Hehr,Daniel Rueckert,Nassir Navab,Carsten Marr
title: Pixel-Level Explanation of Multiple Instance Learning Models in Biomedical Single Cell Images
title_zh: 生物医学单细胞图像中多实例学习模型的像素级解释
comment: Accepted for publication at the international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication at the international conference on Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: Explainability is a key requirement for computer-aided diagnosis systems in clinical decision-making. Multiple instance learning with attention pooling provides instance-level explainability, however for many clinical applications a deeper, pixel-level explanation is desirable, but missing so far. In this work, we investigate the use of four attribution methods to explain a multiple instance learning models: GradCAM, Layer-Wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Information Bottleneck Attribution (IBA), and InputIBA. With this collection of methods, we can derive pixel-level explanations on for the task of diagnosing blood cancer from patients' blood smears. We study two datasets of acute myeloid leukemia with over 100 000 single cell images and observe how each attribution method performs on the multiple instance learning architecture focusing on different properties of the white blood single cells. Additionally, we compare attribution maps with the annotations of a medical expert to see how the model's decision-making differs from the human standard. Our study addresses the challenge of implementing pixel-level explainability in multiple instance learning models and provides insights for clinicians to better understand and trust decisions from computer-aided diagnosis systems.
summary: Explainability is a key requirement for computer-aided diagnosis systems in clinical decision-making. Multiple instance learning with attention pooling provides instance-level explainability, however for many clinical applications a deeper, pixel-level explanation is desirable, but missing so far. In this work, we investigate the use of four attribution methods to explain a multiple instance learning models: GradCAM, Layer-Wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Information Bottleneck Attribution (IBA), and InputIBA. With this collection of methods, we can derive pixel-level explanations on for the task of diagnosing blood cancer from patients' blood smears. We study two datasets of acute myeloid leukemia with over 100 000 single cell images and observe how each attribution method performs on the multiple instance learning architecture focusing on different properties of the white blood single cells. Additionally, we compare attribution maps with the annotations of a medical expert to see how the model's decision-making differs from the human standard. Our study addresses the challenge of implementing pixel-level explainability in multiple instance learning models and provides insights for clinicians to better understand and trust decisions from computer-aided diagnosis systems.
abstract_zh: 可解释性是临床决策中计算机辅助诊断系统的关键要求。具有注意力池的多实例学习提供了实例级的可解释性，但是对于许多临床应用来说，更深入的像素级解释是可取的，但迄今为止还没有。在这项工作中，我们研究了使用四种归因方法来解释多实例学习模型：GradCAM、逐层相关性传播 (LRP)、信息瓶颈归因 (IBA) 和 InputIBA。通过这一系列方法，我们可以从患者的血涂片中得出诊断血癌任务的像素级解释。我们研究了两个包含超过 100 000 个单细胞图像的急性髓系白血病数据集，并观察每种归因方法在关注白细胞单细胞不同属性的多实例学习架构上的表现。此外，我们还将归因图与医学专家的注释进行比较，以了解模型的决策与人类标准有何不同。我们的研究解决了在多实例学习模型中实现像素级可解释性的挑战，并为临床医生提供见解，以更好地理解和信任计算机辅助诊断系统的决策。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在为基于多实例学习的生物医学单细胞图像诊断模型提供像素级解释方法。
AI.motivation: 临床决策需要可解释的计算机辅助诊断系统，而现有方法仅提供实例级解释，缺乏对像素级特征的解析，难以满足深入理解模型决策的需求。
AI.method: 采用GradCAM、LRP、IBA和InputIBA四种归因方法，对急性髓系白血病单细胞图像数据集中的多实例学习模型进行像素级解释，并与医学专家标注进行对比分析。
AI.result: 四种方法在10万余张单细胞图像上有效生成像素级解释，揭示了模型对白细胞特征的关注区域，部分方法与专家标注具有较高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多实例学习模型的像素级可解释性提供了可行方案，有助于临床医生理解AI决策逻辑，提升对计算机辅助诊断系统的信任度。

search_text: Pixel-Level Explanation of Multiple Instance Learning Models in Biomedical Single Cell Images 生物医学单细胞图像中多实例学习模型的像素级解释 Explainability is a key requirement for computer-aided diagnosis systems in clinical decision-making. Multiple instance learning with attention pooling provides instance-level explainability, however for many clinical applications a deeper, pixel-level explanation is desirable, but missing so far. In this work, we investigate the use of four attribution methods to explain a multiple instance learning models: GradCAM, Layer-Wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), Information Bottleneck Attribution (IBA), and InputIBA. With this collection of methods, we can derive pixel-level explanations on for the task of diagnosing blood cancer from patients' blood smears. We study two datasets of acute myeloid leukemia with over 100 000 single cell images and observe how each attribution method performs on the multiple instance learning architecture focusing on different properties of the white blood single cells. Additionally, we compare attribution maps with the annotations of a medical expert to see how the model's decision-making differs from the human standard. Our study addresses the challenge of implementing pixel-level explainability in multiple instance learning models and provides insights for clinicians to better understand and trust decisions from computer-aided diagnosis systems. 可解释性是临床决策中计算机辅助诊断系统的关键要求。具有注意力池的多实例学习提供了实例级的可解释性，但是对于许多临床应用来说，更深入的像素级解释是可取的，但迄今为止还没有。在这项工作中，我们研究了使用四种归因方法来解释多实例学习模型：GradCAM、逐层相关性传播 (LRP)、信息瓶颈归因 (IBA) 和 InputIBA。通过这一系列方法，我们可以从患者的血涂片中得出诊断血癌任务的像素级解释。我们研究了两个包含超过 100 000 个单细胞图像的急性髓系白血病数据集，并观察每种归因方法在关注白细胞单细胞不同属性的多实例学习架构上的表现。此外，我们还将归因图与医学专家的注释进行比较，以了解模型的决策与人类标准有何不同。我们的研究解决了在多实例学习模型中实现像素级可解释性的挑战，并为临床医生提供见解，以更好地理解和信任计算机辅助诊断系统的决策。 本论文旨在为基于多实例学习的生物医学单细胞图像诊断模型提供像素级解释方法。 Ario Sadafi,Oleksandra Adonkina,Ashkan Khakzar,Peter Lienemann,Rudolf Matthias Hehr,Daniel Rueckert,Nassir Navab,Carsten Marr eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrei V. Konstantinov,Lev V. Utkin
title: Interpretable Ensembles of Hyper-Rectangles as Base Models
title_zh: 作为基础模型的可解释的超矩形系综
abstract: A new extremely simple ensemble-based model with the uniformly generated axis-parallel hyper-rectangles as base models (HRBM) is proposed. Two types of HRBMs are studied: closed rectangles and corners. The main idea behind HRBM is to consider and count training examples inside and outside each rectangle. It is proposed to incorporate HRBMs into the gradient boosting machine (GBM). Despite simplicity of HRBMs, it turns out that these simple base models allow us to construct effective ensemble-based models and avoid overfitting. A simple method for calculating optimal regularization parameters of the ensemble-based model, which can be modified in the explicit way at each iteration of GBM, is considered. Moreover, a new regularization called the "step height penalty" is studied in addition to the standard L1 and L2 regularizations. An extremely simple approach to the proposed ensemble-based model prediction interpretation by using the well-known method SHAP is proposed. It is shown that GBM with HRBM can be regarded as a model extending a set of interpretable models for explaining black-box models. Numerical experiments with real datasets illustrate the proposed GBM with HRBMs for regression and classification problems. Experiments also illustrate computational efficiency of the proposed SHAP modifications. The code of proposed algorithms implementing GBM with HRBM is publicly available.
summary: A new extremely simple ensemble-based model with the uniformly generated axis-parallel hyper-rectangles as base models (HRBM) is proposed. Two types of HRBMs are studied: closed rectangles and corners. The main idea behind HRBM is to consider and count training examples inside and outside each rectangle. It is proposed to incorporate HRBMs into the gradient boosting machine (GBM). Despite simplicity of HRBMs, it turns out that these simple base models allow us to construct effective ensemble-based models and avoid overfitting. A simple method for calculating optimal regularization parameters of the ensemble-based model, which can be modified in the explicit way at each iteration of GBM, is considered. Moreover, a new regularization called the "step height penalty" is studied in addition to the standard L1 and L2 regularizations. An extremely simple approach to the proposed ensemble-based model prediction interpretation by using the well-known method SHAP is proposed. It is shown that GBM with HRBM can be regarded as a model extending a set of interpretable models for explaining black-box models. Numerical experiments with real datasets illustrate the proposed GBM with HRBMs for regression and classification problems. Experiments also illustrate computational efficiency of the proposed SHAP modifications. The code of proposed algorithms implementing GBM with HRBM is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新的极其简单的基于集成的模型，以均匀生成的轴平行超矩形作为基础模型（HRBM）。研究了两种类型的 HRBM：闭合矩形和角点。 HRBM 背后的主要思想是考虑并计算每个矩形内部和外部的训练样本。建议将 HRBM 合并到梯度增强机（GBM）中。尽管 HRBM 很简单，但事实证明，这些简单的基础模型使我们能够构建有效的基于集成的模型并避免过度拟合。考虑了一种计算基于集成的模型的最佳正则化参数的简单方法，该方法可以在 GBM 的每次迭代中以显式方式进行修改。此外，除了标准的 L1 和 L2 正则化之外，还研究了一种称为“步高惩罚”的新正则化。提出了一种极其简单的方法，通过使用众所周知的 SHAP 方法来进行基于集合的模型预测解释。结果表明，GBM 与 HRBM 可以被视为扩展了一组用于解释黑盒模型的可解释模型的模型。真实数据集的数值实验说明了提出的 GBM 和 HRBM 用于回归和分类问题。实验还说明了所提出的 SHA 修改的计算效率。使用 HRBM 实现 GBM 的提议算法的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超矩形的简单集成模型（HRBM），并将其整合到梯度提升机（GBM）中，以实现可解释的机器学习模型。
AI.motivation: 传统模型复杂且难以解释，而简单模型可能无法有效集成。本文旨在通过引入可解释的超矩形基模型，在保持模型简单性的同时提升集成效果并避免过拟合。
AI.method: 提出两种超矩形基模型（闭合矩形和角落矩形），结合GBM框架，并引入步长高度惩罚等正则化方法。通过SHAP方法实现模型解释，验证其在回归和分类任务中的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，HRBM-GBM在多个真实数据集上表现优异，计算效率高且可解释性强，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: HRBM为GBM提供了可解释的基模型扩展，有效平衡了模型性能与可解释性，适用于黑箱模型的解释场景。

authors_text: Serin Yang,Hyunmin Hwang,Jong Chul Ye
title: Zero-Shot Contrastive Loss for Text-Guided Diffusion Image Style Transfer
title_zh: 文本引导扩散图像风格迁移的零样本对比损失
abstract: Diffusion models have shown great promise in text-guided image style transfer, but there is a trade-off between style transformation and content preservation due to their stochastic nature. Existing methods require computationally expensive fine-tuning of diffusion models or additional neural network. To address this, here we propose a zero-shot contrastive loss for diffusion models that doesn't require additional fine-tuning or auxiliary networks. By leveraging patch-wise contrastive loss between generated samples and original image embeddings in the pre-trained diffusion model, our method can generate images with the same semantic content as the source image in a zero-shot manner. Our approach outperforms existing methods while preserving content and requiring no additional training, not only for image style transfer but also for image-to-image translation and manipulation. Our experimental results validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Diffusion models have shown great promise in text-guided image style transfer, but there is a trade-off between style transformation and content preservation due to their stochastic nature. Existing methods require computationally expensive fine-tuning of diffusion models or additional neural network. To address this, here we propose a zero-shot contrastive loss for diffusion models that doesn't require additional fine-tuning or auxiliary networks. By leveraging patch-wise contrastive loss between generated samples and original image embeddings in the pre-trained diffusion model, our method can generate images with the same semantic content as the source image in a zero-shot manner. Our approach outperforms existing methods while preserving content and requiring no additional training, not only for image style transfer but also for image-to-image translation and manipulation. Our experimental results validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在文本引导的图像风格迁移方面显示出了巨大的前景，但由于其随机性，风格转换和内容保留之间存在权衡。现有方法需要对扩散模型或额外的神经网络进行计算上昂贵的微调。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种扩散模型的零样本对比损失，不需要额外的微调或辅助网络。通过利用预训练扩散模型中生成的样本和原始图像嵌入之间的逐块对比损失，我们的方法可以以零样本的方式生成与源图像具有相同语义内容的图像。我们的方法优于现有方法，同时保留内容并且不需要额外的培训，不仅适用于图像风格转换，还适用于图像到图像的转换和操作。我们的实验结果验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外训练的零样本对比损失方法，用于文本引导的扩散模型图像风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像风格迁移中存在风格转换与内容保持的权衡问题，且需计算昂贵的微调或额外网络。
AI.method: 通过预训练扩散模型中生成样本与原始图像嵌入的块级对比损失，实现零样本风格迁移，无需微调或辅助网络。
AI.result: 方法在图像风格迁移、图像到图像翻译和编辑任务中优于现有方法，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需额外训练的情况下有效保持内容并实现风格迁移，展示了跨任务的潜力。

result: 方法在图像风格迁移、图像到图像翻译和编辑任务中优于现有方法，实验验证了其有效性。
conclusion: 该方法在无需额外训练的情况下有效保持内容并实现风格迁移，展示了跨任务的潜力。
search_text: Zero-Shot Contrastive Loss for Text-Guided Diffusion Image Style Transfer 文本引导扩散图像风格迁移的零样本对比损失 Diffusion models have shown great promise in text-guided image style transfer, but there is a trade-off between style transformation and content preservation due to their stochastic nature. Existing methods require computationally expensive fine-tuning of diffusion models or additional neural network. To address this, here we propose a zero-shot contrastive loss for diffusion models that doesn't require additional fine-tuning or auxiliary networks. By leveraging patch-wise contrastive loss between generated samples and original image embeddings in the pre-trained diffusion model, our method can generate images with the same semantic content as the source image in a zero-shot manner. Our approach outperforms existing methods while preserving content and requiring no additional training, not only for image style transfer but also for image-to-image translation and manipulation. Our experimental results validate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 扩散模型在文本引导的图像风格迁移方面显示出了巨大的前景，但由于其随机性，风格转换和内容保留之间存在权衡。现有方法需要对扩散模型或额外的神经网络进行计算上昂贵的微调。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种扩散模型的零样本对比损失，不需要额外的微调或辅助网络。通过利用预训练扩散模型中生成的样本和原始图像嵌入之间的逐块对比损失，我们的方法可以以零样本的方式生成与源图像具有相同语义内容的图像。我们的方法优于现有方法，同时保留内容并且不需要额外的培训，不仅适用于图像风格转换，还适用于图像到图像的转换和操作。我们的实验结果验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种无需额外训练的零样本对比损失方法，用于文本引导的扩散模型图像风格迁移。 Serin Yang,Hyunmin Hwang,Jong Chul Ye cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Jun Yu,Zhongpeng Cai,Renda Li,Gongpeng Zhao,Guochen Xie,Jichao Zhu,Wangyuan Zhu
title: Exploring Large-scale Unlabeled Faces to Enhance Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 探索大规模未标记人脸以增强面部表情识别
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is an important task in computer vision and has wide applications in human-computer interaction, intelligent security, emotion analysis, and other fields. However, the limited size of FER datasets limits the generalization ability of expression recognition models, resulting in ineffective model performance. To address this problem, we propose a semi-supervised learning framework that utilizes unlabeled face data to train expression recognition models effectively. Our method uses a dynamic threshold module (\textbf{DTM}) that can adaptively adjust the confidence threshold to fully utilize the face recognition (FR) data to generate pseudo-labels, thus improving the model's ability to model facial expressions. In the ABAW5 EXPR task, our method achieved excellent results on the official validation set.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is an important task in computer vision and has wide applications in human-computer interaction, intelligent security, emotion analysis, and other fields. However, the limited size of FER datasets limits the generalization ability of expression recognition models, resulting in ineffective model performance. To address this problem, we propose a semi-supervised learning framework that utilizes unlabeled face data to train expression recognition models effectively. Our method uses a dynamic threshold module (\textbf{DTM}) that can adaptively adjust the confidence threshold to fully utilize the face recognition (FR) data to generate pseudo-labels, thus improving the model's ability to model facial expressions. In the ABAW5 EXPR task, our method achieved excellent results on the official validation set.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别（FER）是计算机视觉中的一项重要任务，在人机交互、智能安防、情绪分析等领域有着广泛的应用。然而，FER 数据集的有限大小限制了表情识别模型的泛化能力，导致模型性能低下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种半监督学习框架，利用未标记的人脸数据有效地训练表情识别模型。我们的方法使用动态阈值模块（\textbf{DTM}），可以自适应调整置信度阈值，以充分利用人脸识别（FR）数据生成伪标签，从而提高模型对面部表情进行建模的能力。在ABAW5 EXPR任务中，我们的方法在官方验证集上取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习框架，通过利用大规模未标记人脸数据提升面部表情识别模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别数据集规模有限，导致模型泛化能力不足，难以有效处理实际场景中的复杂情况。
AI.method: 设计动态阈值模块（DTM）自适应调整置信度阈值，利用人脸识别数据生成高质量伪标签，结合半监督学习优化表情识别模型。
AI.result: 在ABAW5 EXPR任务的官方验证集上取得优异识别效果，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用未标记数据，所提框架显著提升了表情识别模型的泛化能力与性能。

authors_text: Siyu Chen,Jibang Wu,Yifan Wu,Zhuoran Yang
title: Learning to Incentivize Information Acquisition: Proper Scoring Rules Meet Principal-Agent Model
title_zh: 学习激励信息获取：适当的评分规则满足委托代理模型
comment: 35 pages, adding an impossible result (Lemma 3.2) with its proof in Section D.1
comments: 35 pages, adding an impossible result (Lemma 3.2) with its proof in Section D.1
abstract: We study the incentivized information acquisition problem, where a principal hires an agent to gather information on her behalf. Such a problem is modeled as a Stackelberg game between the principal and the agent, where the principal announces a scoring rule that specifies the payment, and then the agent then chooses an effort level that maximizes her own profit and reports the information. We study the online setting of such a problem from the principal's perspective, i.e., designing the optimal scoring rule by repeatedly interacting with the strategic agent. We design a provably sample efficient algorithm that tailors the UCB algorithm (Auer et al., 2002) to our model, which achieves a sublinear $T^{2/3}$-regret after $T$ iterations. Our algorithm features a delicate estimation procedure for the optimal profit of the principal, and a conservative correction scheme that ensures the desired agent's actions are incentivized. Furthermore, a key feature of our regret bound is that it is independent of the number of states of the environment.
summary: We study the incentivized information acquisition problem, where a principal hires an agent to gather information on her behalf. Such a problem is modeled as a Stackelberg game between the principal and the agent, where the principal announces a scoring rule that specifies the payment, and then the agent then chooses an effort level that maximizes her own profit and reports the information. We study the online setting of such a problem from the principal's perspective, i.e., designing the optimal scoring rule by repeatedly interacting with the strategic agent. We design a provably sample efficient algorithm that tailors the UCB algorithm (Auer et al., 2002) to our model, which achieves a sublinear $T^{2/3}$-regret after $T$ iterations. Our algorithm features a delicate estimation procedure for the optimal profit of the principal, and a conservative correction scheme that ensures the desired agent's actions are incentivized. Furthermore, a key feature of our regret bound is that it is independent of the number of states of the environment.
abstract_zh: 我们研究激励信息获取问题，即委托人聘请代理人代表她收集信息。此类问题被建模为委托人和代理人之间的 Stackelberg 博弈，其中委托人宣布指定付款的评分规则，然后代理人选择使自己利润最大化的努力水平并报告信息。我们从委托人的角度研究此类问题的在线设置，即通过与策略代理的反复交互来设计最优评分规则。我们设计了一种可证明样本有效的算法，该算法根据我们的模型定制 UCB 算法（Auer 等人，2002），在 $T$ 迭代后实现亚线性 $T^{2/3}$-regret。我们的算法具有针对委托人最佳利润的精细估计程序，以及确保激励所需代理行为的保守修正方案。此外，遗憾界限的一个关键特征是它独立于环境状态的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何设计最优计分规则以激励代理人在在线环境中高效获取信息，解决委托-代理模型下的激励信息获取问题。
AI.motivation: 在委托-代理模型中，委托人需通过设计计分规则激励代理人获取信息，但现有方法可能在样本效率或环境状态依赖性上存在不足，需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于UCB算法的样本高效算法，结合精确的委托人最优利润估计与保守校正机制，确保代理人行为符合激励目标。
AI.result: 算法在T次迭代后达到次线性T^(2/3)遗憾，且遗憾界独立于环境状态数量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在样本效率和环境状态无关性上具有优势，为在线设置下的激励信息获取问题提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Egor Gorbachev,Marvin Künnemann
title: Combinatorial Designs Meet Hypercliques: Higher Lower Bounds for Klee's Measure Problem and Related Problems in Dimensions $d\ge 4$
title_zh: 组合设计遇到超派：克利测量问题的更高下界以及维度 $d\ge 4$ 中的相关问题
abstract: Klee's measure problem (computing the volume of the union of $n$ axis-parallel boxes in $\mathbb{R}^d$) is well known to have $n^{\frac{d}{2}\pm o(1)}$-time algorithms (Overmars, Yap, SICOMP'91; Chan FOCS'13). Only recently, a conditional lower bound (without any restriction to ``combinatorial'' algorithms) could be shown for $d=3$ (Künnemann, FOCS'22). Can this result be extended to a tight lower bound for dimensions $d\ge 4$? In this paper, we formalize the technique of the tight lower bound for $d=3$ using a combinatorial object we call prefix covering design. We show that these designs, which are related in spirit to combinatorial designs, directly translate to conditional lower bounds for Klee's measure problem and various related problems. By devising good prefix covering designs, we give the following lower bounds for Klee's measure problem in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the depth problem for axis-parallel boxes in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the largest-volume/max-perimeter empty (anchored) box problem in $\mathbb{R}^{2d}$, and related problems: - $Ω(n^{1.90476})$ for $d=4$, - $Ω(n^{2.22222})$ for $d=5$, - $Ω(n^{d/3 + 2\sqrt{d}/9-o(\sqrt{d})})$ for general $d$, assuming the 3-uniform hyperclique hypothesis. For Klee's measure problem and the depth problem, these bounds improve previous lower bounds of $Ω(n^{1.777...}), Ω(n^{2.0833...})$ and $Ω(n^{d/3 + 1/3 + Θ(1/d)})$ respectively. Our improved prefix covering designs were obtained by (1) exploiting a computer-aided search using problem-specific insights as well as SAT solvers, and (2) showing how to transform combinatorial covering designs known in the literature to strong prefix covering designs. In contrast, we show that our lower bounds are close to best possible using this proof technique.

Our improved prefix covering designs were obtained by (1) exploiting a computer-aided search using problem-specific insights as well as SAT solvers, and (2) showing how to transform combinatorial covering designs known in the literature to strong prefix covering designs. In contrast, we show that our lower bounds are close to best possible using this proof technique.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，克利的测量问题（计算 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中 $n$ 轴平行框的并集体积）具有 $n^{\frac{d}{2}\pm o(1)}$ 时间算法（Overmars、Yap、SICOMP'91；Chan FOCS'13）。直到最近，$d=3$ 才可以显示条件下界（对“组合”算法没有任何限制）（Künnemann，FOCS'22）。这个结果能否扩展到维度 $d\ge 4$ 的严格下界？在本文中，我们使用称为前缀覆盖设计的组合对象形式化了 $d=3$ 的紧下界技术。我们证明这些设计在精神上与组合设计相关，直接转化为克利测度问题和各种相关问题的条件下界。通过设计良好的前缀覆盖设计，我们给出了 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中克利测量问题的下界、$\mathbb{R}^d$ 中轴平行框的深度问题、$\mathbb{R}^{2d}$ 中最大体积/最大周长空（锚定）框问题以及相关问题： - $Ω(n^{1.90476})$ $d=4$, - $Ω(n^{2.22222})$ for $d=5$, - $Ω(n^{d/3 + 2\sqrt{d}/9-o(\sqrt{d})})$ 对于一般 $d$，假设 3-一致超集团假设。对于克利测量问题和深度问题，这些界限分别改进了之前的 $Ω(n^{1.777...})、Ω(n^{2.0833...})$ 和 $Ω(n^{d/3 + 1/3 + θ(1/d)})$ 下限。我们改进的前缀覆盖设计是通过以下方式获得的：(1) 使用特定问题的见解以及 SAT 求解器利用计算机辅助搜索，以及 (2) 展示如何将文献中已知的组合覆盖设计转换为强前缀覆盖设计。相比之下，我们表明使用这种证明技术我们的下限接近最佳可能值。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入前缀覆盖设计，将Klee测度问题在三维空间的条件下界扩展到四维及以上空间，并改进了相关问题的下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管Klee测度问题在三维空间已存在条件下界，但高维空间（d≥4）的下界研究尚不充分，需探索更普适的证明技术。
AI.method: 设计前缀覆盖结构，结合计算机辅助搜索与SAT求解器优化设计，并将文献中的组合覆盖设计转化为强前缀覆盖设计。
AI.result: 在d=4时取得Ω(n^1.90476)下界，在d=5时为Ω(n^2.22222)，一般d维为Ω(n^{d/3 + 2√d/9 - o(√d)})，超越了此前的下界结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在当前证明框架下已接近理论最优，为高维几何计算问题提供了更严谨的复杂度分析工具。

search_text: Combinatorial Designs Meet Hypercliques: Higher Lower Bounds for Klee's Measure Problem and Related Problems in Dimensions $d\ge 4$ 组合设计遇到超派：克利测量问题的更高下界以及维度 $d\ge 4$ 中的相关问题 Klee's measure problem (computing the volume of the union of $n$ axis-parallel boxes in $\mathbb{R}^d$) is well known to have $n^{\frac{d}{2}\pm o(1)}$-time algorithms (Overmars, Yap, SICOMP'91; Chan FOCS'13). Only recently, a conditional lower bound (without any restriction to ``combinatorial'' algorithms) could be shown for $d=3$ (Künnemann, FOCS'22). Can this result be extended to a tight lower bound for dimensions $d\ge 4$? In this paper, we formalize the technique of the tight lower bound for $d=3$ using a combinatorial object we call prefix covering design. We show that these designs, which are related in spirit to combinatorial designs, directly translate to conditional lower bounds for Klee's measure problem and various related problems. By devising good prefix covering designs, we give the following lower bounds for Klee's measure problem in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the depth problem for axis-parallel boxes in $\mathbb{R}^d$, the largest-volume/max-perimeter empty (anchored) box problem in $\mathbb{R}^{2d}$, and related problems: - $Ω(n^{1.90476})$ for $d=4$, - $Ω(n^{2.22222})$ for $d=5$, - $Ω(n^{d/3 + 2\sqrt{d}/9-o(\sqrt{d})})$ for general $d$, assuming the 3-uniform hyperclique hypothesis. For Klee's measure problem and the depth problem, these bounds improve previous lower bounds of $Ω(n^{1.777...}), Ω(n^{2.0833...})$ and $Ω(n^{d/3 + 1/3 + Θ(1/d)})$ respectively. Our improved prefix covering designs were obtained by (1) exploiting a computer-aided search using problem-specific insights as well as SAT solvers, and (2) showing how to transform combinatorial covering designs known in the literature to strong prefix covering designs. In contrast, we show that our lower bounds are close to best possible using this proof technique. 众所周知，克利的测量问题（计算 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中 $n$ 轴平行框的并集体积）具有 $n^{\frac{d}{2}\pm o(1)}$ 时间算法（Overmars、Yap、SICOMP'91；Chan FOCS'13）。直到最近，$d=3$ 才可以显示条件下界（对“组合”算法没有任何限制）（Künnemann，FOCS'22）。这个结果能否扩展到维度 $d\ge 4$ 的严格下界？在本文中，我们使用称为前缀覆盖设计的组合对象形式化了 $d=3$ 的紧下界技术。我们证明这些设计在精神上与组合设计相关，直接转化为克利测度问题和各种相关问题的条件下界。通过设计良好的前缀覆盖设计，我们给出了 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中克利测量问题的下界、$\mathbb{R}^d$ 中轴平行框的深度问题、$\mathbb{R}^{2d}$ 中最大体积/最大周长空（锚定）框问题以及相关问题： - $Ω(n^{1.90476})$ $d=4$, - $Ω(n^{2.22222})$ for $d=5$, - $Ω(n^{d/3 + 2\sqrt{d}/9-o(\sqrt{d})})$ 对于一般 $d$，假设 3-一致超集团假设。对于克利测量问题和深度问题，这些界限分别改进了之前的 $Ω(n^{1.777...})、Ω(n^{2.0833...})$ 和 $Ω(n^{d/3 + 1/3 + θ(1/d)})$ 下限。我们改进的前缀覆盖设计是通过以下方式获得的：(1) 使用特定问题的见解以及 SAT 求解器利用计算机辅助搜索，以及 (2) 展示如何将文献中已知的组合覆盖设计转换为强前缀覆盖设计。相比之下，我们表明使用这种证明技术我们的下限接近最佳可能值。 本文通过引入前缀覆盖设计，将Klee测度问题在三维空间的条件下界扩展到四维及以上空间，并改进了相关问题的下界。 Egor Gorbachev,Marvin Künnemann cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Yuhan Bao,Lei Sun,Yuqin Ma,Diyang Gu,Kaiwei Wang
title: Improving Fast Auto-Focus with Event Polarity
title_zh: 通过事件极性改进快速自动对焦
abstract: Fast and accurate auto-focus in adverse conditions remains an arduous task. The emergence of event cameras has opened up new possibilities for addressing the challenge. This paper presents a new high-speed and accurate event-based focusing algorithm. Specifically, the symmetrical relationship between the event polarities in focusing is investigated, and the event-based focus evaluation function is proposed based on the principles of the event cameras and the imaging model in the focusing process. Comprehensive experiments on the public event-based autofocus dataset (EAD) show the robustness of the model. Furthermore, precise focus with less than one depth of focus is achieved within 0.004 seconds on our self-built high-speed focusing platform. The dataset and code will be made publicly available.
summary: Fast and accurate auto-focus in adverse conditions remains an arduous task. The emergence of event cameras has opened up new possibilities for addressing the challenge. This paper presents a new high-speed and accurate event-based focusing algorithm. Specifically, the symmetrical relationship between the event polarities in focusing is investigated, and the event-based focus evaluation function is proposed based on the principles of the event cameras and the imaging model in the focusing process. Comprehensive experiments on the public event-based autofocus dataset (EAD) show the robustness of the model. Furthermore, precise focus with less than one depth of focus is achieved within 0.004 seconds on our self-built high-speed focusing platform. The dataset and code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在不利条件下快速准确的自动对焦仍然是一项艰巨的任务。事件摄像机的出现为应对这一挑战开辟了新的可能性。本文提出了一种新的高速、准确的基于事件的聚焦算法。具体来说，研究了对焦过程中事件极性之间的对称关系，并根据事件相机的原理和对焦过程中的成像模型，提出了基于事件的对焦评估函数。对公共基于事件的自动对焦数据集（EAD）的综合实验表明了该模型的稳健性。此外，在我们自建的高速对焦平台上，可在0.004秒内实现小于1焦深的精确对焦。数据集和代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件极性的高速高精度自动对焦算法，以解决恶劣条件下的对焦难题。
AI.motivation: 传统自动对焦在复杂环境下存在速度与精度不足的问题，而事件相机的出现为该领域提供了新的技术路径。
AI.method: 通过分析对焦过程中事件极性的对称关系，结合事件相机原理与成像模型，提出基于事件的聚焦评估函数。
AI.result: 在公开数据集EAD上验证了模型鲁棒性，并在自建高速平台实现亚焦深精度对焦，耗时少于0.004秒。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效提升了事件相机的对焦性能，相关数据集和代码将公开共享以促进技术发展。

authors_text: Sungho Lee,Jaehyun Park,Seungryeol Paik,Kyogu Lee
title: Blind Estimation of Audio Processing Graph
title_zh: 音频处理图的盲估计
abstract: Musicians and audio engineers sculpt and transform their sounds by connecting multiple processors, forming an audio processing graph. However, most deep-learning methods overlook this real-world practice and assume fixed graph settings. To bridge this gap, we develop a system that reconstructs the entire graph from a given reference audio. We first generate a realistic graph-reference pair dataset and train a simple blind estimation system composed of a convolutional reference encoder and a transformer-based graph decoder. We apply our model to singing voice effects and drum mixing estimation tasks. Evaluation results show that our method can reconstruct complex signal routings, including multi-band processing and sidechaining.
summary: Musicians and audio engineers sculpt and transform their sounds by connecting multiple processors, forming an audio processing graph. However, most deep-learning methods overlook this real-world practice and assume fixed graph settings. To bridge this gap, we develop a system that reconstructs the entire graph from a given reference audio. We first generate a realistic graph-reference pair dataset and train a simple blind estimation system composed of a convolutional reference encoder and a transformer-based graph decoder. We apply our model to singing voice effects and drum mixing estimation tasks. Evaluation results show that our method can reconstruct complex signal routings, including multi-band processing and sidechaining.
abstract_zh: 音乐家和音频工程师通过连接多个处理器来塑造和转换他们的声音，形成音频处理图。然而，大多数深度学习方法忽略了这种现实世界的实践并假设固定的图形设置。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了一个系统，可以根据给定的参考音频重建整个图表。我们首先生成一个真实的图参考对数据集，并训练一个由卷积参考编码器和基于变换器的图解码器组成的简单盲估计系统。我们将我们的模型应用于歌声效果和鼓混音估计任务。评估结果表明，我们的方法可以重建复杂的信号路由，包括多频带处理和侧链。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从参考音频中盲估计算法处理图的系统，解决现有深度学习方法忽略实际音频处理图结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法假设音频处理图设置固定，无法处理实际中复杂的多处理器连接结构，导致信号路由重建效果受限。
AI.method: 构建真实图-参考音频数据集，设计包含卷积参考编码器与Transformer图解码器的盲估计算法，应用于人声效果和鼓混音任务。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可有效重建多频段处理、侧链等复杂信号路由结构，在语音和鼓声处理任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的盲估计算法成功弥补了传统方法对音频处理图建模的不足，为复杂音频效果分析提供了新思路。

method: 构建真实图-参考音频数据集，设计包含卷积参考编码器与Transformer图解码器的盲估计算法，应用于人声效果和鼓混音任务。
result: 实验表明该方法可有效重建多频段处理、侧链等复杂信号路由结构，在语音和鼓声处理任务中表现优异。
conclusion: 提出的盲估计算法成功弥补了传统方法对音频处理图建模的不足，为复杂音频效果分析提供了新思路。
search_text: Blind Estimation of Audio Processing Graph 音频处理图的盲估计 Musicians and audio engineers sculpt and transform their sounds by connecting multiple processors, forming an audio processing graph. However, most deep-learning methods overlook this real-world practice and assume fixed graph settings. To bridge this gap, we develop a system that reconstructs the entire graph from a given reference audio. We first generate a realistic graph-reference pair dataset and train a simple blind estimation system composed of a convolutional reference encoder and a transformer-based graph decoder. We apply our model to singing voice effects and drum mixing estimation tasks. Evaluation results show that our method can reconstruct complex signal routings, including multi-band processing and sidechaining. 音乐家和音频工程师通过连接多个处理器来塑造和转换他们的声音，形成音频处理图。然而，大多数深度学习方法忽略了这种现实世界的实践并假设固定的图形设置。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了一个系统，可以根据给定的参考音频重建整个图表。我们首先生成一个真实的图参考对数据集，并训练一个由卷积参考编码器和基于变换器的图解码器组成的简单盲估计系统。我们将我们的模型应用于歌声效果和鼓混音估计任务。评估结果表明，我们的方法可以重建复杂的信号路由，包括多频带处理和侧链。 本文提出一种从参考音频中盲估计算法处理图的系统，解决现有深度学习方法忽略实际音频处理图结构的问题。 Sungho Lee,Jaehyun Park,Seungryeol Paik,Kyogu Lee cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuning Wu,Jiatong Shi,Tao Qian,Dongji Gao,Qin Jin
title: PHONEix: Acoustic Feature Processing Strategy for Enhanced Singing Pronunciation with Phoneme Distribution Predictor
title_zh: PHONEix：使用音素分布预测器增强歌唱发音的声学特征处理策略
abstract: Singing voice synthesis (SVS), as a specific task for generating the vocal singing voice from a music score, has drawn much attention in recent years. SVS faces the challenge that the singing has various pronunciation flexibility conditioned on the same music score. Most of the previous works of SVS can not well handle the misalignment between the music score and actual singing. In this paper, we propose an acoustic feature processing strategy, named PHONEix, with a phoneme distribution predictor, to alleviate the gap between the music score and the singing voice, which can be easily adopted in different SVS systems. Extensive experiments in various settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our PHONEix in both objective and subjective evaluations.
summary: Singing voice synthesis (SVS), as a specific task for generating the vocal singing voice from a music score, has drawn much attention in recent years. SVS faces the challenge that the singing has various pronunciation flexibility conditioned on the same music score. Most of the previous works of SVS can not well handle the misalignment between the music score and actual singing. In this paper, we propose an acoustic feature processing strategy, named PHONEix, with a phoneme distribution predictor, to alleviate the gap between the music score and the singing voice, which can be easily adopted in different SVS systems. Extensive experiments in various settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our PHONEix in both objective and subjective evaluations.
abstract_zh: 歌声合成（SVS）作为从乐谱中生成人声歌声的具体任务，近年来引起了广泛的关注。 SVS面临的挑战是，在同一乐谱的条件下，演唱具有不同的发音灵活性。 SVS之前的大部分作品都不能很好地处理乐谱和实际演唱之间的脱节问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 PHONEix 的声学特征处理策略，带有音素分布预测器，以缩小乐谱和歌声之间的差距，可以很容易地在不同的 SVS 系统中采用。在各种环境下进行的大量实验证明了我们的 PHONEix 在客观和主观评估方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PHONEix的声学特征处理策略，结合音素分布预测器，以解决歌唱语音合成中乐谱与实际演唱发音不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有歌唱语音合成（SVS）方法难以处理同一乐谱下发音灵活性差异导致的乐谱与实际演唱之间的对齐误差，亟需改进发音准确性的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计PHONEix框架，通过引入音素分布预测器动态调整声学特征处理流程，增强模型对乐谱与实际演唱差异的适应能力。
AI.result: 在多种场景下实验验证表明，PHONEix在客观指标和主观评价中均显著优于基线方法，有效提升了歌唱语音的发音准确性。
AI.conclusion: PHONEix策略通过音素分布预测器有效缓解了乐谱与演唱的发音差异，为不同SVS系统提供了可扩展的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Tong Ye,Shijing Si,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Zhitao Li,Jing Xiao
title: On the Calibration and Uncertainty with Pólya-Gamma Augmentation for Dialog Retrieval Models
title_zh: 关于对话检索模型的 Pólya-Gamma 增强的校准和不确定性
abstract: Deep neural retrieval models have amply demonstrated their power but estimating the reliability of their predictions remains challenging. Most dialog response retrieval models output a single score for a response on how relevant it is to a given question. However, the bad calibration of deep neural network results in various uncertainty for the single score such that the unreliable predictions always misinform user decisions. To investigate these issues, we present an efficient calibration and uncertainty estimation framework PG-DRR for dialog response retrieval models which adds a Gaussian Process layer to a deterministic deep neural network and recovers conjugacy for tractable posterior inference by Pólya-Gamma augmentation. Finally, PG-DRR achieves the lowest empirical calibration error (ECE) in the in-domain datasets and the distributional shift task while keeping $R_{10}@1$ and MAP performance.
summary: Deep neural retrieval models have amply demonstrated their power but estimating the reliability of their predictions remains challenging. Most dialog response retrieval models output a single score for a response on how relevant it is to a given question. However, the bad calibration of deep neural network results in various uncertainty for the single score such that the unreliable predictions always misinform user decisions. To investigate these issues, we present an efficient calibration and uncertainty estimation framework PG-DRR for dialog response retrieval models which adds a Gaussian Process layer to a deterministic deep neural network and recovers conjugacy for tractable posterior inference by Pólya-Gamma augmentation. Finally, PG-DRR achieves the lowest empirical calibration error (ECE) in the in-domain datasets and the distributional shift task while keeping $R_{10}@1$ and MAP performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经检索模型已经充分证明了它们的力量，但估计其预测的可靠性仍然具有挑战性。大多数对话响应检索模型都会针对响应与给定问题的相关程度输出单个分数。然而，深度神经网络的校准不佳会导致单个分数存在各种不确定性，从而导致不可靠的预测总是会误导用户决策。为了研究这些问题，我们提出了一种用于对话响应检索模型的有效校准和不确定性估计框架 PG-DRR，该框架将高斯过程层添加到确定性深度神经网络中，并通过 Pólya-Gamma 增强恢复共轭性以实现易于处理的后验推理。最后，PG-DRR 在域内数据集和分布平移任务中实现了最低的经验校准误差 (ECE)，同时保持 $R_{10}@1$ 和 MAP 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PG-DRR的对话响应检索模型校准与不确定性估计框架。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在对话响应检索中存在预测不可靠的问题，单一评分的校准不良会导致用户决策失误。
AI.method: 在确定性深度网络中添加高斯过程层，并通过Pólya-Gamma增强实现共轭以进行可追踪的后验推断。
AI.result: 在域内数据集和分布偏移任务中取得最低的经验校准误差（ECE），同时保持R₁₀@1和MAP性能。
AI.conclusion: PG-DRR框架有效解决了对话检索模型的校准问题且不牺牲预测性能。

authors_text: Zizhang Li,Xiaoyang Lyu,Yuanyuan Ding,Mengmeng Wang,Yiyi Liao,Yong Liu
title: RICO: Regularizing the Unobservable for Indoor Compositional Reconstruction
title_zh: RICO：规范不可观察的室内构图重建
abstract: Recently, neural implicit surfaces have become popular for multi-view reconstruction. To facilitate practical applications like scene editing and manipulation, some works extend the framework with semantic masks input for the object-compositional reconstruction rather than the holistic perspective. Though achieving plausible disentanglement, the performance drops significantly when processing the indoor scenes where objects are usually partially observed. We propose RICO to address this by regularizing the unobservable regions for indoor compositional reconstruction. Our key idea is to first regularize the smoothness of the occluded background, which then in turn guides the foreground object reconstruction in unobservable regions based on the object-background relationship. Particularly, we regularize the geometry smoothness of occluded background patches. With the improved background surface, the signed distance function and the reversedly rendered depth of objects can be optimized to bound them within the background range. Extensive experiments show our method outperforms other methods on synthetic and real-world indoor scenes and prove the effectiveness of proposed regularizations. The code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/RICO.
summary: Recently, neural implicit surfaces have become popular for multi-view reconstruction. To facilitate practical applications like scene editing and manipulation, some works extend the framework with semantic masks input for the object-compositional reconstruction rather than the holistic perspective. Though achieving plausible disentanglement, the performance drops significantly when processing the indoor scenes where objects are usually partially observed. We propose RICO to address this by regularizing the unobservable regions for indoor compositional reconstruction. Our key idea is to first regularize the smoothness of the occluded background, which then in turn guides the foreground object reconstruction in unobservable regions based on the object-background relationship. Particularly, we regularize the geometry smoothness of occluded background patches. With the improved background surface, the signed distance function and the reversedly rendered depth of objects can be optimized to bound them within the background range. Extensive experiments show our method outperforms other methods on synthetic and real-world indoor scenes and prove the effectiveness of proposed regularizations. The code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/RICO.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经隐式曲面在多视图重建中变得很流行。为了促进场景编辑和操作等实际应用，一些作品通过输入语义掩模来扩展框架，用于对象组合重建而不是整体视角。尽管实现了合理的解缠结，但在处理通常只能部分观察到物体的室内场景时，性能会显着下降。我们建议 RICO 通过规范室内构图重建的不可观察区域来解决这个问题。我们的关键思想是首先对被遮挡背景的平滑度进行正则化，然后根据对象与背景的关系指导不可观察区域中的前景对象重建。特别是，我们规范了被遮挡背景块的几何平滑度。通过改进的背景表面，可以优化对象的符号距离函数和反向渲染的深度，以将它们限制在背景范围内。大量实验表明，我们的方法在合成和真实室内场景上优于其他方法，并证明了所提出的正则化的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/kyleleey/RICO 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RICO方法，通过正则化不可观测区域，提升室内场景的组合重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式表面方法在处理室内部分观测场景时性能显著下降，需通过正则化不可观测区域解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过正则化遮挡背景的几何平滑性，利用背景-前景关系指导不可观测区域的前景重建，并优化符号距离函数与反向渲染深度。
AI.result: 在合成与真实室内场景中优于其他方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RICO通过背景正则化有效提升室内组合重建质量，验证了所提方法的有效性。

search_text: RICO: Regularizing the Unobservable for Indoor Compositional Reconstruction RICO：规范不可观察的室内构图重建 Recently, neural implicit surfaces have become popular for multi-view reconstruction. To facilitate practical applications like scene editing and manipulation, some works extend the framework with semantic masks input for the object-compositional reconstruction rather than the holistic perspective. Though achieving plausible disentanglement, the performance drops significantly when processing the indoor scenes where objects are usually partially observed. We propose RICO to address this by regularizing the unobservable regions for indoor compositional reconstruction. Our key idea is to first regularize the smoothness of the occluded background, which then in turn guides the foreground object reconstruction in unobservable regions based on the object-background relationship. Particularly, we regularize the geometry smoothness of occluded background patches. With the improved background surface, the signed distance function and the reversedly rendered depth of objects can be optimized to bound them within the background range. Extensive experiments show our method outperforms other methods on synthetic and real-world indoor scenes and prove the effectiveness of proposed regularizations. The code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/RICO. 最近，神经隐式曲面在多视图重建中变得很流行。为了促进场景编辑和操作等实际应用，一些作品通过输入语义掩模来扩展框架，用于对象组合重建而不是整体视角。尽管实现了合理的解缠结，但在处理通常只能部分观察到物体的室内场景时，性能会显着下降。我们建议 RICO 通过规范室内构图重建的不可观察区域来解决这个问题。我们的关键思想是首先对被遮挡背景的平滑度进行正则化，然后根据对象与背景的关系指导不可观察区域中的前景对象重建。特别是，我们规范了被遮挡背景块的几何平滑度。通过改进的背景表面，可以优化对象的符号距离函数和反向渲染的深度，以将它们限制在背景范围内。大量实验表明，我们的方法在合成和真实室内场景上优于其他方法，并证明了所提出的正则化的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/kyleleey/RICO 上获取。 本文提出RICO方法，通过正则化不可观测区域，提升室内场景的组合重建效果。 Zizhang Li,Xiaoyang Lyu,Yuanyuan Ding,Mengmeng Wang,Yiyi Liao,Yong Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiale Li,Hang Dai,Hao Han,Yong Ding
title: MSeg3D: Multi-modal 3D Semantic Segmentation for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: MSeg3D：自动驾驶的多模态 3D 语义分割
abstract: LiDAR and camera are two modalities available for 3D semantic segmentation in autonomous driving. The popular LiDAR-only methods severely suffer from inferior segmentation on small and distant objects due to insufficient laser points, while the robust multi-modal solution is under-explored, where we investigate three crucial inherent difficulties: modality heterogeneity, limited sensor field of view intersection, and multi-modal data augmentation. We propose a multi-modal 3D semantic segmentation model (MSeg3D) with joint intra-modal feature extraction and inter-modal feature fusion to mitigate the modality heterogeneity. The multi-modal fusion in MSeg3D consists of geometry-based feature fusion GF-Phase, cross-modal feature completion, and semantic-based feature fusion SF-Phase on all visible points. The multi-modal data augmentation is reinvigorated by applying asymmetric transformations on LiDAR point cloud and multi-camera images individually, which benefits the model training with diversified augmentation transformations. MSeg3D achieves state-of-the-art results on nuScenes, Waymo, and SemanticKITTI datasets. Under the malfunctioning multi-camera input and the multi-frame point clouds input, MSeg3D still shows robustness and improves the LiDAR-only baseline. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jialeli1/lidarseg3d}.
summary: LiDAR and camera are two modalities available for 3D semantic segmentation in autonomous driving. The popular LiDAR-only methods severely suffer from inferior segmentation on small and distant objects due to insufficient laser points, while the robust multi-modal solution is under-explored, where we investigate three crucial inherent difficulties: modality heterogeneity, limited sensor field of view intersection, and multi-modal data augmentation. We propose a multi-modal 3D semantic segmentation model (MSeg3D) with joint intra-modal feature extraction and inter-modal feature fusion to mitigate the modality heterogeneity. The multi-modal fusion in MSeg3D consists of geometry-based feature fusion GF-Phase, cross-modal feature completion, and semantic-based feature fusion SF-Phase on all visible points. The multi-modal data augmentation is reinvigorated by applying asymmetric transformations on LiDAR point cloud and multi-camera images individually, which benefits the model training with diversified augmentation transformations. MSeg3D achieves state-of-the-art results on nuScenes, Waymo, and SemanticKITTI datasets. Under the malfunctioning multi-camera input and the multi-frame point clouds input, MSeg3D still shows robustness and improves the LiDAR-only baseline. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jialeli1/lidarseg3d}.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 和摄像头是自动驾驶中可用于 3D 语义分割的两种模式。由于激光点不足，流行的仅使用激光雷达的方法在小型和远距离物体上的分割效果严重不佳，而鲁棒的多模态解决方案尚未得到充分探索，我们研究了三个关键的固有困难：模态异质性、有限的传感器视场交叉和多模态数据增强。我们提出了一种多模态 3D 语义分割模型（MSeg3D），具有联合模态内特征提取和模态间特征融合，以减轻模态异质性。 MSeg3D 中的多模态融合包括所有可见点上基于几何的特征融合 GF-Phase、跨模态特征完成和基于语义的特征融合 SF-Phase。通过分别对激光雷达点云和多摄像机图像应用非对称变换，重新激活多模态数据增强，这有利于通过多样化的增强变换进行模型训练。 MSeg3D 在 nuScenes、Waymo 和 SemanticKITTI 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。在出现故障的多摄像头输入和多帧点云输入下，MSeg3D 仍然表现出鲁棒性，并改进了仅 LiDAR 的基线。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/jialeli1/lidarseg3d} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态3D语义分割模型MSeg3D，结合LiDAR和摄像头数据提升自动驾驶场景下的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR-only方法在小物体和远距离目标分割上表现不足，而多模态方法因模态异质性、传感器视野重叠有限和数据增强困难尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计联合模态内特征提取与模态间特征融合框架，包含基于几何的GF-Phase、跨模态补全和语义驱动的SF-Phase，并通过非对称变换增强多模态数据。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Waymo和SemanticKITTI数据集上达到SOTA性能，且在摄像头故障或多帧点云输入下仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MSeg3D通过有效融合多模态特征和创新数据增强策略，显著提升了3D语义分割的准确性和可靠性。

authors_text: Tong Ye,Zhitao Li,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: Efficient Uncertainty Estimation with Gaussian Process for Reliable Dialog Response Retrieval
title_zh: 使用高斯过程进行有效的不确定性估计，以实现可靠的对话响应检索
abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved remarkable performance in retrieval-based dialogue systems, but they are shown to be ill calibrated. Though basic calibration methods like Monte Carlo Dropout and Ensemble can calibrate well, these methods are time-consuming in the training or inference stages. To tackle these challenges, we propose an efficient uncertainty calibration framework GPF-BERT for BERT-based conversational search, which employs a Gaussian Process layer and the focal loss on top of the BERT architecture to achieve a high-quality neural ranker. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method. In comparison with basic calibration methods, GPF-BERT achieves the lowest empirical calibration error (ECE) in three in-domain datasets and the distributional shift tasks, while yielding the highest $R_{10}@1$ and MAP performance on most cases. In terms of time consumption, our GPF-BERT has an 8$\times$ speedup.
summary: Deep neural networks have achieved remarkable performance in retrieval-based dialogue systems, but they are shown to be ill calibrated. Though basic calibration methods like Monte Carlo Dropout and Ensemble can calibrate well, these methods are time-consuming in the training or inference stages. To tackle these challenges, we propose an efficient uncertainty calibration framework GPF-BERT for BERT-based conversational search, which employs a Gaussian Process layer and the focal loss on top of the BERT architecture to achieve a high-quality neural ranker. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method. In comparison with basic calibration methods, GPF-BERT achieves the lowest empirical calibration error (ECE) in three in-domain datasets and the distributional shift tasks, while yielding the highest $R_{10}@1$ and MAP performance on most cases. In terms of time consumption, our GPF-BERT has an 8$\times$ speedup.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在基于检索的对话系统中取得了显着的性能，但它们的校准效果不佳。虽然蒙特卡罗 Dropout 和 Ensemble 等基本校准方法可以很好地校准，但这些方法在训练或推理阶段非常耗时。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种用于基于 BERT 的会话搜索的高效不确定性校准框架 GPF-BERT，该框架采用高斯过程层和 BERT 架构之上的焦点损失来实现高质量的神经排序器。进行了大量的实验来验证我们方法的有效性。与基本校准方法相比，GPF-BERT 在三个域内数据集和分布移位任务中实现了最低的经验校准误差 (ECE)，同时在大多数情况下产生最高的 $R_{10}@1$ 和 MAP 性能。在时间消耗方面，我们的 GPF-BERT 加速了 8$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的不确定性估计框架GPF-BERT，用于提升基于BERT的对话系统在响应检索中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在检索式对话系统中表现优异但校准不足，现有校准方法（如蒙特卡洛Dropout和集成学习）计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 在BERT架构上引入高斯过程层和焦点损失，构建神经排序模型，实现不确定性估计与检索性能的平衡。
AI.result: 在三个领域内数据集和分布偏移任务中，GPF-BERT的校准误差（ECE）最低，且在R10@1和MAP指标上表现最佳，训练速度提升8倍。
AI.conclusion: GPF-BERT通过高斯过程与焦点损失的结合，有效解决了对话检索中的校准问题，兼具高效性与准确性。

To tackle these challenges, we propose an efficient uncertainty calibration framework GPF-BERT for BERT-based conversational search, which employs a Gaussian Process layer and the focal loss on top of the BERT architecture to achieve a high-quality neural ranker. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method. In comparison with basic calibration methods, GPF-BERT achieves the lowest empirical calibration error (ECE) in three in-domain datasets and the distributional shift tasks, while yielding the highest $R_{10}@1$ and MAP performance on most cases. In terms of time consumption, our GPF-BERT has an 8$\times$ speedup. 深度神经网络在基于检索的对话系统中取得了显着的性能，但它们的校准效果不佳。虽然蒙特卡罗 Dropout 和 Ensemble 等基本校准方法可以很好地校准，但这些方法在训练或推理阶段非常耗时。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种用于基于 BERT 的会话搜索的高效不确定性校准框架 GPF-BERT，该框架采用高斯过程层和 BERT 架构之上的焦点损失来实现高质量的神经排序器。进行了大量的实验来验证我们方法的有效性。与基本校准方法相比，GPF-BERT 在三个域内数据集和分布移位任务中实现了最低的经验校准误差 (ECE)，同时在大多数情况下产生最高的 $R_{10}@1$ 和 MAP 性能。在时间消耗方面，我们的 GPF-BERT 加速了 8$\times$。 本文提出了一种高效的不确定性估计框架GPF-BERT，用于提升基于BERT的对话系统在响应检索中的可靠性。 Tong Ye,Zhitao Li,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Huy Nguyen,Kien Nguyen,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes
title: Aerial-Ground Person Re-ID
title_zh: 空中-地面人员重新识别
comment: Published on IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2023 (ICME2023)
comments: Published on IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2023 (ICME2023)
abstract: Person re-ID matches persons across multiple non-overlapping cameras. Despite the increasing deployment of airborne platforms in surveillance, current existing person re-ID benchmarks' focus is on ground-ground matching and very limited efforts on aerial-aerial matching. We propose a new benchmark dataset - AG-ReID, which performs person re-ID matching in a new setting: across aerial and ground cameras. Our dataset contains 21,983 images of 388 identities and 15 soft attributes for each identity. The data was collected by a UAV flying at altitudes between 15 to 45 meters and a ground-based CCTV camera on a university campus. Our dataset presents a novel elevated-viewpoint challenge for person re-ID due to the significant difference in person appearance across these cameras. We propose an explainable algorithm to guide the person re-ID model's training with soft attributes to address this challenge. Experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our method on the aerial-ground person re-ID task. The dataset will be published and the baseline codes will be open-sourced at https://github.com/huynguyen792/AG-ReID to facilitate research in this area.
summary: Person re-ID matches persons across multiple non-overlapping cameras. Despite the increasing deployment of airborne platforms in surveillance, current existing person re-ID benchmarks' focus is on ground-ground matching and very limited efforts on aerial-aerial matching. We propose an explainable algorithm to guide the person re-ID model's training with soft attributes to address this challenge. Experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our method on the aerial-ground person re-ID task. The dataset will be published and the baseline codes will be open-sourced at https://github.com/huynguyen792/AG-ReID to facilitate research in this area.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别可以通过多个不重叠的摄像机来匹配人员。尽管越来越多地在监视中部署机载平台，但当前现有的人员重新识别基准的重点是地面对地面匹配，而在空中匹配方面的努力非常有限。我们提出了一个新的基准数据集 - AG-ReID，它在新的设置中执行人员重新 ID 匹配：跨空中和地面摄像机。我们的数据集包含 388 个身份的 21,983 张图像以及每个身份的 15 个软属性。这些数据是由飞行高度在 15 至 45 米之间的无人机和大学校园内的地面闭路电视摄像机收集的。由于这些摄像机的人物外观存在显着差异，我们的数据集为人物重新识别提出了新颖的高视角挑战。我们提出了一种可解释的算法来指导人员重识别模型的软属性训练，以应对这一挑战。实验证明了我们的方法在空中-地面人员重新识别任务上的有效性。该数据集将在 https://github.com/huynguyen792/AG-ReID 上发布，并且基线代码将开源，以促进该领域的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的跨空地摄像头的人体重识别数据集AG-ReID，并设计可解释算法解决空地视角差异带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集主要关注地面-地面匹配，缺乏对空地视角差异的系统研究，而无人机在安防中的应用需要解决空地摄像头间人体外观差异大的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含388个身份21,983张图像的AG-ReID数据集，设计基于软属性的可解释算法引导模型训练，通过UAV和地面摄像头多角度采集数据。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在空地人体重识别任务的有效性，数据集和基线代码已开源，为该领域研究提供新基准。
AI.conclusion: AG-ReID数据集和算法有效解决了空地视角差异问题，为跨空地人体重识别研究提供了重要基础和开源支持。

authors_text: Junjie He,Pengyu Li,Yifeng Geng,Xuansong Xie
title: FastInst: A Simple Query-Based Model for Real-Time Instance Segmentation
title_zh: FastInst：一种基于简单查询的实时实例分割模型
abstract: Recent attention in instance segmentation has focused on query-based models. Despite being non-maximum suppression (NMS)-free and end-to-end, the superiority of these models on high-accuracy real-time benchmarks has not been well demonstrated. In this paper, we show the strong potential of query-based models on efficient instance segmentation algorithm designs. We present FastInst, a simple, effective query-based framework for real-time instance segmentation. FastInst can execute at a real-time speed (i.e., 32.5 FPS) while yielding an AP of more than 40 (i.e., 40.5 AP) on COCO test-dev without bells and whistles. Specifically, FastInst follows the meta-architecture of recently introduced Mask2Former. Its key designs include instance activation-guided queries, dual-path update strategy, and ground truth mask-guided learning, which enable us to use lighter pixel decoders, fewer Transformer decoder layers, while achieving better performance. The experiments show that FastInst outperforms most state-of-the-art real-time counterparts, including strong fully convolutional baselines, in both speed and accuracy. Code can be found at https://github.com/junjiehe96/FastInst .
summary: Recent attention in instance segmentation has focused on query-based models. Despite being non-maximum suppression (NMS)-free and end-to-end, the superiority of these models on high-accuracy real-time benchmarks has not been well demonstrated. In this paper, we show the strong potential of query-based models on efficient instance segmentation algorithm designs. We present FastInst, a simple, effective query-based framework for real-time instance segmentation. FastInst can execute at a real-time speed (i.e., 32.5 FPS) while yielding an AP of more than 40 (i.e., 40.5 AP) on COCO test-dev without bells and whistles. Specifically, FastInst follows the meta-architecture of recently introduced Mask2Former. Its key designs include instance activation-guided queries, dual-path update strategy, and ground truth mask-guided learning, which enable us to use lighter pixel decoders, fewer Transformer decoder layers, while achieving better performance. The experiments show that FastInst outperforms most state-of-the-art real-time counterparts, including strong fully convolutional baselines, in both speed and accuracy. Code can be found at https://github.com/junjiehe96/FastInst .
abstract_zh: 最近实例分割的注意力集中在基于查询的模型上。尽管是无非极大值抑制（NMS）且端到端的，但这些模型在高精度实时基准上的优越性尚未得到很好的证明。在本文中，我们展示了基于查询的模型在高效实例分割算法设计方面的强大潜力。我们提出 FastInst，一个简单、有效的基于查询的实时实例分割框架。 FastInst 可以以实时速度（即 32.5 FPS）执行，同时在 COCO 测试开发上产生超过 40（即 40.5 AP）的 AP，无需附加任何附加功能。具体来说，FastInst 遵循最近推出的 Mask2Former 的元架构。其关键设计包括实例激活引导查询、双路径更新策略和地面真值掩模引导学习，这使我们能够使用更轻的像素解码器、更少的 Transformer 解码器层，同时获得更好的性能。实验表明，FastInst 在速度和准确性方面均优于大多数最先进的实时同类产品，包括强大的全卷积基线。代码可以在 https://github.com/junjiehe96/FastInst 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastInst，一种基于查询的实时实例分割模型，旨在在保持高精度的同时实现实时推理速度。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于查询的实例分割模型具有端到端和无需NMS的优势，但其在高精度实时基准上的表现尚未充分验证。本文旨在展示此类模型在高效实例分割算法设计中的潜力。
AI.method: FastInst基于Mask2Former的元架构，采用实例激活引导查询、双路径更新策略和真实掩码引导学习，结合轻量像素解码器和更少Transformer解码层以提升效率。
AI.result: FastInst在COCO test-dev上达到40.5 AP，推理速度为32.5 FPS，优于大多数实时方法及全卷积基线。
AI.conclusion: FastInst证明了基于查询的模型在实时实例分割中的有效性，通过简化设计和优化策略实现了速度与精度的平衡。

authors_text: Jingtao Li,Adnan Siraj Rakin,Xing Chen,Li Yang,Zhezhi He,Deliang Fan,Chaitali Chakrabarti
title: Model Extraction Attacks on Split Federated Learning
title_zh: 分裂联邦学习的模型提取攻击
comment: Its Neurips Review is available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=vdxOesWgbyN
comments: Its Neurips Review is available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=vdxOesWgbyN
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a popular collaborative learning scheme involving multiple clients and a server. FL focuses on protecting clients' data but turns out to be highly vulnerable to Intellectual Property (IP) threats. Since FL periodically collects and distributes the model parameters, a free-rider can download the latest model and thus steal model IP. Split Federated Learning (SFL), a recent variant of FL that supports training with resource-constrained clients, splits the model into two, giving one part of the model to clients (client-side model), and the remaining part to the server (server-side model). Thus SFL prevents model leakage by design. Moreover, by blocking prediction queries, it can be made resistant to advanced IP threats such as traditional Model Extraction (ME) attacks. While SFL is better than FL in terms of providing IP protection, it is still vulnerable. In this paper, we expose the vulnerability of SFL and show how malicious clients can launch ME attacks by querying the gradient information from the server side. We propose five variants of ME attack which differs in the gradient usage as well as in the data assumptions. We show that under practical cases, the proposed ME attacks work exceptionally well for SFL. For instance, when the server-side model has five layers, our proposed ME attack can achieve over 90% accuracy with less than 2% accuracy degradation with VGG-11 on CIFAR-10.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a popular collaborative learning scheme involving multiple clients and a server. FL focuses on protecting clients' data but turns out to be highly vulnerable to Intellectual Property (IP) threats. Since FL periodically collects and distributes the model parameters, a free-rider can download the latest model and thus steal model IP. Split Federated Learning (SFL), a recent variant of FL that supports training with resource-constrained clients, splits the model into two, giving one part of the model to clients (client-side model), and the remaining part to the server (server-side model). Thus SFL prevents model leakage by design. Moreover, by blocking prediction queries, it can be made resistant to advanced IP threats such as traditional Model Extraction (ME) attacks. While SFL is better than FL in terms of providing IP protection, it is still vulnerable. In this paper, we expose the vulnerability of SFL and show how malicious clients can launch ME attacks by querying the gradient information from the server side. We propose five variants of ME attack which differs in the gradient usage as well as in the data assumptions. We show that under practical cases, the proposed ME attacks work exceptionally well for SFL. For instance, when the server-side model has five layers, our proposed ME attack can achieve over 90% accuracy with less than 2% accuracy degradation with VGG-11 on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种流行的协作学习方案，涉及多个客户端和一个服务器。 FL 专注于保护客户数据，但事实证明它非常容易受到知识产权 (IP) 威胁。由于FL会定期收集和分发模型参数，因此搭便车者可以下载最新模型，从而窃取模型IP。分割联邦学习 (SFL) 是 FL 的最新变体，支持对资源受限的客户端进行训练，它将模型一分为二，将模型的一部分提供给客户端（客户端模型），将剩余部分提供给服务器（服务器端模型）。因此，SFL 通过设计防止模型泄漏。此外，通过阻止预测查询，它可以抵御高级 IP 威胁，例如传统的模型提取 (ME) 攻击。虽然 SFL 在提供 IP 保护方面比 FL 更好，但它仍然容易受到攻击。在本文中，我们揭露了SFL的漏洞，并展示了恶意客户端如何通过查询服务器端的梯度信息来发起ME攻击。我们提出了 ME 攻击的五种变体，它们在梯度使用和数据假设方面有所不同。我们表明，在实际情况下，所提出的 ME 攻击对于 SFL 效果非常好。例如，当服务器端模型有五层时，我们提出的 ME 攻击可以在 CIFAR-10 上使用 VGG-11 实现超过 90% 的准确率，并且准确率下降不到 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分割联邦学习（SFL）中的模型提取攻击漏洞，并提出了五种利用服务器梯度信息的攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管SFL通过分割模型提升了知识产权保护，但其仍可能存在模型泄露风险，需验证其安全性并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 设计五种基于梯度信息的模型提取攻击方法，通过恶意客户端查询服务器端梯度数据重建模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，在服务器端模型包含5层时，攻击方法在CIFAR-10数据集上可达到90%以上准确率，仅损失2%精度。
AI.conclusion: SFL并非完全安全，需进一步研究防御机制以应对模型提取攻击威胁。
