search_text: Model Extraction Attacks on Split Federated Learning 分裂联邦学习的模型提取攻击 Federated Learning (FL) is a popular collaborative learning scheme involving multiple clients and a server. FL focuses on protecting clients' data but turns out to be highly vulnerable to Intellectual Property (IP) threats. Since FL periodically collects and distributes the model parameters, a free-rider can download the latest model and thus steal model IP. Split Federated Learning (SFL), a recent variant of FL that supports training with resource-constrained clients, splits the model into two, giving one part of the model to clients (client-side model), and the remaining part to the server (server-side model). Thus SFL prevents model leakage by design. Moreover, by blocking prediction queries, it can be made resistant to advanced IP threats such as traditional Model Extraction (ME) attacks. While SFL is better than FL in terms of providing IP protection, it is still vulnerable. In this paper, we expose the vulnerability of SFL and show how malicious clients can launch ME attacks by querying the gradient information from the server side. We propose five variants of ME attack which differs in the gradient usage as well as in the data assumptions. We show that under practical cases, the proposed ME attacks work exceptionally well for SFL. For instance, when the server-side model has five layers, our proposed ME attack can achieve over 90% accuracy with less than 2% accuracy degradation with VGG-11 on CIFAR-10. 联邦学习（FL）是一种流行的协作学习方案，涉及多个客户端和一个服务器。 FL 专注于保护客户数据，但事实证明它非常容易受到知识产权 (IP) 威胁。由于FL会定期收集和分发模型参数，因此搭便车者可以下载最新模型，从而窃取模型IP。分割联邦学习 (SFL) 是 FL 的最新变体，支持对资源受限的客户端进行训练，它将模型一分为二，将模型的一部分提供给客户端（客户端模型），将剩余部分提供给服务器（服务器端模型）。因此，SFL 通过设计防止模型泄漏。此外，通过阻止预测查询，它可以抵御高级 IP 威胁，例如传统的模型提取 (ME) 攻击。虽然 SFL 在提供 IP 保护方面比 FL 更好，但它仍然容易受到攻击。在本文中，我们揭露了SFL的漏洞，并展示了恶意客户端如何通过查询服务器端的梯度信息来发起ME攻击。我们提出了 ME 攻击的五种变体，它们在梯度使用和数据假设方面有所不同。我们表明，在实际情况下，所提出的 ME 攻击对于 SFL 效果非常好。例如，当服务器端模型有五层时，我们提出的 ME 攻击可以在 CIFAR-10 上使用 VGG-11 实现超过 90% 的准确率，并且准确率下降不到 2%。 本文研究了分割联邦学习（SFL）中的模型提取攻击漏洞，并提出了五种利用服务器梯度信息的攻击方法。 Jingtao Li,Adnan Siraj Rakin,Xing Chen,Li Yang,Zhezhi He,Deliang Fan,Chaitali Chakrabarti cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Ruihuang Li,Chenhang He,Yabin Zhang,Shuai Li,Liyi Chen,Lei Zhang
title: SIM: Semantic-aware Instance Mask Generation for Box-Supervised Instance Segmentation
title_zh: SIM：用于框监督实例分割的语义感知实例掩码生成
abstract: Weakly supervised instance segmentation using only bounding box annotations has recently attracted much research attention. Most of the current efforts leverage low-level image features as extra supervision without explicitly exploiting the high-level semantic information of the objects, which will become ineffective when the foreground objects have similar appearances to the background or other objects nearby. We propose a new box-supervised instance segmentation approach by developing a Semantic-aware Instance Mask (SIM) generation paradigm. Instead of heavily relying on local pair-wise affinities among neighboring pixels, we construct a group of category-wise feature centroids as prototypes to identify foreground objects and assign them semantic-level pseudo labels. Considering that the semantic-aware prototypes cannot distinguish different instances of the same semantics, we propose a self-correction mechanism to rectify the falsely activated regions while enhancing the correct ones. Furthermore, to handle the occlusions between objects, we tailor the Copy-Paste operation for the weakly-supervised instance segmentation task to augment challenging training data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed SIM approach over other state-of-the-art methods. The source code: https://github.com/lslrh/SIM.
summary: Weakly supervised instance segmentation using only bounding box annotations has recently attracted much research attention. Most of the current efforts leverage low-level image features as extra supervision without explicitly exploiting the high-level semantic information of the objects, which will become ineffective when the foreground objects have similar appearances to the background or other objects nearby. We propose a new box-supervised instance segmentation approach by developing a Semantic-aware Instance Mask (SIM) generation paradigm. Instead of heavily relying on local pair-wise affinities among neighboring pixels, we construct a group of category-wise feature centroids as prototypes to identify foreground objects and assign them semantic-level pseudo labels. Considering that the semantic-aware prototypes cannot distinguish different instances of the same semantics, we propose a self-correction mechanism to rectify the falsely activated regions while enhancing the correct ones. Furthermore, to handle the occlusions between objects, we tailor the Copy-Paste operation for the weakly-supervised instance segmentation task to augment challenging training data. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed SIM approach over other state-of-the-art methods. The source code: https://github.com/lslrh/SIM.
abstract_zh: 仅使用边界框注释的弱监督实例分割最近引起了很多研究关注。目前的大多数工作都利用低级图像特征作为额外的监督，而没有明确利用对象的高级语义信息，当前景对象与背景或附近其他对象具有相似的外观时，这将变得无效。我们通过开发语义感知实例掩码（SIM）生成范例，提出了一种新的框监督实例分割方法。我们没有严重依赖相邻像素之间的局部成对亲和力，而是构建了一组类别特征质心作为原型来识别前景对象并为它们分配语义级伪标签。考虑到语义感知原型无法区分相同语义的不同实例，我们提出了一种自我纠正机制来纠正错误激活的区域，同时增强正确的区域。此外，为了处理对象之间的遮挡，我们为弱监督实例分割任务定制了复制粘贴操作，以增强具有挑战性的训练数据。大量的实验结果证明了我们提出的 SIM 方法相对于其他最先进方法的优越性。源代码：https://github.com/lslrh/SIM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义感知的实例掩码生成方法（SIM），用于解决仅使用边界框标注的弱监督实例分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖低级图像特征而未充分利用高级语义信息，导致在前景与背景或附近物体外观相似时效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过构建类别级特征原型作为前景对象识别的语义原型，并引入自校正机制修正错误区域；同时设计针对性的Copy-Paste操作增强训练数据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，SIM方法优于现有最先进方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SIM通过语义感知原型与自校正机制有效提升了弱监督实例分割性能，尤其在处理外观相似物体和遮挡场景中表现突出。

authors_text: Giorgia Adorni,Felix Boelter,Stefano Carlo Lambertenghi
title: Investigating GANsformer: A Replication Study of a State-of-the-Art Image Generation Model
title_zh: 研究 GANsformer：最先进图像生成模型的复制研究
abstract: The field of image generation through generative modelling is abundantly discussed nowadays. It can be used for various applications, such as up-scaling existing images, creating non-existing objects, such as interior design scenes, products or even human faces, and achieving transfer-learning processes. In this context, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are a class of widely studied machine learning frameworks first appearing in the paper "Generative adversarial nets" by Goodfellow et al. that achieve the goal above. In our work, we reproduce and evaluate a novel variation of the original GAN network, the GANformer, proposed in "Generative Adversarial Transformers" by Hudson and Zitnick. This project aimed to recreate the methods presented in this paper to reproduce the original results and comment on the authors' claims. Due to resources and time limitations, we had to constrain the network's training times, dataset types, and sizes. Our research successfully recreated both variations of the proposed GANformer model and found differences between the authors' and our results. Moreover, discrepancies between the publication methodology and the one implemented, made available in the code, allowed us to study two undisclosed variations of the presented procedures.
summary: The field of image generation through generative modelling is abundantly discussed nowadays. It can be used for various applications, such as up-scaling existing images, creating non-existing objects, such as interior design scenes, products or even human faces, and achieving transfer-learning processes. In this context, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are a class of widely studied machine learning frameworks first appearing in the paper "Generative adversarial nets" by Goodfellow et al. that achieve the goal above. In our work, we reproduce and evaluate a novel variation of the original GAN network, the GANformer, proposed in "Generative Adversarial Transformers" by Hudson and Zitnick. This project aimed to recreate the methods presented in this paper to reproduce the original results and comment on the authors' claims. Due to resources and time limitations, we had to constrain the network's training times, dataset types, and sizes. Our research successfully recreated both variations of the proposed GANformer model and found differences between the authors' and our results. Moreover, discrepancies between the publication methodology and the one implemented, made available in the code, allowed us to study two undisclosed variations of the presented procedures.
abstract_zh: 如今，通过生成建模生成图像的领域得到了广泛的讨论。它可用于各种应用，例如放大现有图像、创建不存在的对象（例如室内设计场景、产品甚至人脸）以及实现迁移学习过程。在这种背景下，生成对抗网络（GAN）是一类被广泛研究的机器学习框架，首次出现在 Goodfellow 等人的论文“生成对抗网络”中。从而实现上述目标。在我们的工作中，我们重现并评估了 Hudson 和 Zitnick 在“生成对抗变压器”中提出的原始 GAN 网络的一种新颖变体，即 GANformer。该项目旨在重新创建本文中提出的方法，以重现原始结果并对作者的主张进行评论。由于资源和时间的限制，我们必须限制网络的训练时间、数据集类型和大小。我们的研究成功地重建了所提出的 GANformer 模型的两种变体，并发现了作者和我们的结果之间的差异。此外，发布方法与代码中提供的实施方法之间的差异使我们能够研究所提出程序的两种未公开的变体。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在复制并评估GANformer图像生成模型，验证其方法有效性并比较结果差异。
AI.motivation: 验证GANformer模型的可复现性，探讨其方法论与实现细节的透明度，以及资源限制对结果的影响。
AI.method: 通过受限资源条件（时间、数据集规模）重现GANformer的两种变体，对比原论文方法与代码实现的差异。
AI.result: 成功复现模型但结果存在差异，发现原论文方法描述与代码实现存在未公开的两种变体差异。
AI.conclusion: 复制研究揭示了方法描述与实现的不一致，强调了资源限制对模型评估的影响，建议提升研究透明度以促进可复现性。

search_text: Investigating GANsformer: A Replication Study of a State-of-the-Art Image Generation Model 研究 GANsformer：最先进图像生成模型的复制研究 The field of image generation through generative modelling is abundantly discussed nowadays. It can be used for various applications, such as up-scaling existing images, creating non-existing objects, such as interior design scenes, products or even human faces, and achieving transfer-learning processes. In this context, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are a class of widely studied machine learning frameworks first appearing in the paper "Generative adversarial nets" by Goodfellow et al. that achieve the goal above. In our work, we reproduce and evaluate a novel variation of the original GAN network, the GANformer, proposed in "Generative Adversarial Transformers" by Hudson and Zitnick. This project aimed to recreate the methods presented in this paper to reproduce the original results and comment on the authors' claims. Due to resources and time limitations, we had to constrain the network's training times, dataset types, and sizes. Our research successfully recreated both variations of the proposed GANformer model and found differences between the authors' and our results. Moreover, discrepancies between the publication methodology and the one implemented, made available in the code, allowed us to study two undisclosed variations of the presented procedures. 如今，通过生成建模生成图像的领域得到了广泛的讨论。它可用于各种应用，例如放大现有图像、创建不存在的对象（例如室内设计场景、产品甚至人脸）以及实现迁移学习过程。在这种背景下，生成对抗网络（GAN）是一类被广泛研究的机器学习框架，首次出现在 Goodfellow 等人的论文“生成对抗网络”中。从而实现上述目标。在我们的工作中，我们重现并评估了 Hudson 和 Zitnick 在“生成对抗变压器”中提出的原始 GAN 网络的一种新颖变体，即 GANformer。该项目旨在重新创建本文中提出的方法，以重现原始结果并对作者的主张进行评论。由于资源和时间的限制，我们必须限制网络的训练时间、数据集类型和大小。我们的研究成功地重建了所提出的 GANformer 模型的两种变体，并发现了作者和我们的结果之间的差异。此外，发布方法与代码中提供的实施方法之间的差异使我们能够研究所提出程序的两种未公开的变体。 本文旨在复制并评估GANformer图像生成模型，验证其方法有效性并比较结果差异。 Giorgia Adorni,Felix Boelter,Stefano Carlo Lambertenghi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hector Henriquez,Diana Fuentes,Francisco Suarez,Patricio Gonzalez
title: EGFR mutation prediction using F18-FDG PET-CT based radiomics features in non-small cell lung cancer
title_zh: 使用基于 F18-FDG PET-CT 的放射组学特征预测非小细胞肺癌的 EGFR 突变
comment: Conference paper. International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics - ICBHI 2022
comments: Conference paper. International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics - ICBHI 2022
abstract: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death in the world. Accurate determination of the EGFR (epidermal growth factor receptor) mutation status is highly relevant for the proper treatment of this patients. Purpose: The aim of this study was to predict the mutational status of the EGFR in non-small cell lung cancer patients using radiomics features extracted from PET-CT images. Methods: Retrospective study that involve 34 patients with lung cancer confirmed by histology and EGFR status mutation assessment. A total of 2.205 radiomics features were extracted from manual segmentation of the PET-CT images using pyradiomics library. Both computed tomography and positron emission tomography images were used. All images were acquired with intravenous iodinated contrast and F18-FDG. Preprocessing includes resampling, normalization, and discretization of the pixel intensity. Three methods were used for the feature selection process: backward selection (set 1), forward selection (set 2), and feature importance analysis of random forest model (set 3). Nine machine learning methods were used for radiomics model building. Results: 35.2% of patients had EGFR mutation, without significant differences in age, gender, tumor size and SUVmax. After the feature selection process 6, 7 and 17 radiomics features were selected, respectively in each group. The best performances were obtained by Ridge Regression in set 1: AUC of 0.826 (95% CI, 0.811 - 0.839), Random Forest in set 2: AUC of 0.823 (95% CI, 0.808 - 0.838) and Neural Network in set 3: AUC of 0.821 (95% CI, 0.808 - 0.835). Conclusion: The radiomics features analysis has the potential of predicting clinically relevant mutations in lung cancer patients through a non-invasive methodology.

abstract_zh: 肺癌是世界上癌症死亡的主要原因。准确测定EGFR（表皮生长因子受体）突变状态对于该患者的正确治疗高度相关。目的：本研究的目的是利用从 PET-CT 图像中提取的放射组学特征来预测非小细胞肺癌患者 EGFR 的突变状态。方法：回顾性研究34例经组织学和EGFR突变状态评估证实的肺癌患者。使用放射组学库对 PET-CT 图像进行手动分割，总共提取了 2.205 个放射组学特征。使用计算机断层扫描和正电子发射断层扫描图像。所有图像均通过静脉注射碘造影剂和 F18-FDG 获得。预处理包括像素强度的重采样、归一化和离散化。特征选择过程使用了三种方法：后向选择（第 1 组）、前向选择（第 2 组）和随机森林模型的特征重要性分析（第 3 组）。九种机器学习方法用于放射组学模型构建。结果：35.2%的患者存在EGFR突变，年龄、性别、肿瘤大小和SUVmax无显着差异。经过特征选择过程后，每组分别选择 6、7 和 17 个放射组学特征。组 1 中的岭回归获得了最佳性能：AUC 为 0.826（95% CI，0.811 - 0.839）；组 2 中的随机森林：AUC 为 0.823（95% CI，0.808 - 0.838）；组 3 中的神经网络：AUC 为 0.821（95% CI，0.808 - 0.808） 0.835）。结论：放射组学特征分析有可能通过非侵入性方法预测肺癌患者的临床相关突变。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用F18-FDG PET-CT影像的放射组学特征，预测非小细胞肺癌患者的EGFR基因突变状态。
AI.motivation: EGFR突变状态对非小细胞肺癌患者的靶向治疗至关重要，传统检测方法存在侵入性及成本高的问题，需探索无创预测方法。
AI.method: 回顾性分析34例经组织学确诊的肺癌患者PET-CT影像，提取2205个放射组学特征，经重采样、归一化等预处理后，采用向后选择、向前选择及随机森林特征重要性分析三种方法筛选特征，并使用九种机器学习模型构建预测模型。
AI.result: 三种特征选择方法分别筛选出6/7/17个特征，最佳模型AUC达0.826（岭回归）、0.823（随机森林）和0.821（神经网络），突变阳性率为35.2%。
AI.conclusion: 放射组学分析可通过非侵入性影像手段有效预测肺癌患者的EGFR突变状态，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Haoyu He,Jianfei Cai,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao,Bohan Zhuang
title: Sensitivity-Aware Visual Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
title_zh: 灵敏度感知视觉参数高效微调
abstract: Visual Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become a powerful alternative for full fine-tuning so as to adapt pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks, which only tunes a small number of parameters while freezing the vast majority ones to ease storage burden and optimization difficulty. However, existing PEFT methods introduce trainable parameters to the same positions across different tasks depending solely on human heuristics and neglect the domain gaps. To this end, we study where to introduce and how to allocate trainable parameters by proposing a novel Sensitivity-aware visual Parameter-efficient fine-Tuning (SPT) scheme, which adaptively allocates trainable parameters to task-specific important positions given a desired tunable parameter budget. Specifically, our SPT first quickly identifies the sensitive parameters that require tuning for a given task in a data-dependent way. Next, our SPT further boosts the representational capability for the weight matrices whose number of sensitive parameters exceeds a pre-defined threshold by utilizing existing structured tuning methods, e.g., LoRA [23] or Adapter [22], to replace directly tuning the selected sensitive parameters (unstructured tuning) under the budget. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that our SPT is complementary to the existing PEFT methods and largely boosts their performance, e.g., SPT improves Adapter with supervised pre-trained ViT-B/16 backbone by 4.2% and 1.4% mean Top-1 accuracy, reaching SOTA performance on FGVC and VTAB-1k benchmarks, respectively. Source code is at https://github.com/ziplab/SPT
summary: Visual Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become a powerful alternative for full fine-tuning so as to adapt pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks, which only tunes a small number of parameters while freezing the vast majority ones to ease storage burden and optimization difficulty. However, existing PEFT methods introduce trainable parameters to the same positions across different tasks depending solely on human heuristics and neglect the domain gaps. To this end, we study where to introduce and how to allocate trainable parameters by proposing a novel Sensitivity-aware visual Parameter-efficient fine-Tuning (SPT) scheme, which adaptively allocates trainable parameters to task-specific important positions given a desired tunable parameter budget. Specifically, our SPT first quickly identifies the sensitive parameters that require tuning for a given task in a data-dependent way. Next, our SPT further boosts the representational capability for the weight matrices whose number of sensitive parameters exceeds a pre-defined threshold by utilizing existing structured tuning methods, e.g., LoRA [23] or Adapter [22], to replace directly tuning the selected sensitive parameters (unstructured tuning) under the budget. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that our SPT is complementary to the existing PEFT methods and largely boosts their performance, e.g., SPT improves Adapter with supervised pre-trained ViT-B/16 backbone by 4.2% and 1.4% mean Top-1 accuracy, reaching SOTA performance on FGVC and VTAB-1k benchmarks, respectively. Source code is at https://github.com/ziplab/SPT
abstract_zh: 视觉参数高效微调（PEFT）已成为全面微调的强大替代方案，使预先训练的视觉模型适应下游任务，它仅调整少量参数，同时冻结绝大多数参数，以减轻存储负担和优化难度。然而，现有的 PEFT 方法仅依赖于人类启发法，将可训练参数引入到不同任务的相同位置，并忽略了域间隙。为此，我们通过提出一种新颖的敏感度感知视觉参数高效微调（SPT）方案来研究在哪里引入以及如何分配可训练参数，该方案在给定所需的可调参数预算的情况下自适应地将可训练参数分配到特定于任务的重要位置。具体来说，我们的 SPT 首先快速识别需要以数据相关方式调整给定任务的敏感参数。接下来，我们的SPT通过利用现有的结构化调整方法，例如LoRA [23]或Adapter [22]，进一步提高敏感参数数量超过预定义阈值的权重矩阵的表示能力，以取代在预算下直接调整选定的敏感参数（非结构化调整）。对各种下游识别任务的大量实验表明，我们的 SPT 是对现有 PEFT 方法的补充，并大大提高了它们的性能，例如，SPT 将具有监督预训练 ViT-B/16 主干的 Adapter 的平均 Top-1 准确率提高了 4.2% 和 1.4%，分别在 FGVC 和 VTAB-1k 基准上达到了 SOTA 性能。源代码位于 https://github.com/ziplab/SPT

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种敏感性感知的视觉参数高效微调方法（SPT），通过动态分配可训练参数提升视觉模型在下游任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉参数高效微调方法依赖人工启发式规则分配可训练参数，忽视了不同任务间的领域差异，导致参数利用效率低下。
AI.method: SPT通过数据相关方式快速识别任务敏感参数，当敏感参数数量超过阈值时，采用LoRA或Adapter等结构化微调方法替代直接微调，实现参数预算下的自适应分配。
AI.result: 在FGVC和VTAB-1k基准测试中，SPT分别将Adapter方法的Top-1准确率提升4.2%和1.4%，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SPT通过敏感性分析与结构化微调结合，有效提升了参数高效微调方法的性能，具有广泛的适用性和互补性。

search_text: Sensitivity-Aware Visual Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning 灵敏度感知视觉参数高效微调 Visual Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become a powerful alternative for full fine-tuning so as to adapt pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks, which only tunes a small number of parameters while freezing the vast majority ones to ease storage burden and optimization difficulty. However, existing PEFT methods introduce trainable parameters to the same positions across different tasks depending solely on human heuristics and neglect the domain gaps. To this end, we study where to introduce and how to allocate trainable parameters by proposing a novel Sensitivity-aware visual Parameter-efficient fine-Tuning (SPT) scheme, which adaptively allocates trainable parameters to task-specific important positions given a desired tunable parameter budget. Specifically, our SPT first quickly identifies the sensitive parameters that require tuning for a given task in a data-dependent way. Next, our SPT further boosts the representational capability for the weight matrices whose number of sensitive parameters exceeds a pre-defined threshold by utilizing existing structured tuning methods, e.g., LoRA [23] or Adapter [22], to replace directly tuning the selected sensitive parameters (unstructured tuning) under the budget. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that our SPT is complementary to the existing PEFT methods and largely boosts their performance, e.g., SPT improves Adapter with supervised pre-trained ViT-B/16 backbone by 4.2% and 1.4% mean Top-1 accuracy, reaching SOTA performance on FGVC and VTAB-1k benchmarks, respectively. Source code is at https://github.com/ziplab/SPT 视觉参数高效微调（PEFT）已成为全面微调的强大替代方案，使预先训练的视觉模型适应下游任务，它仅调整少量参数，同时冻结绝大多数参数，以减轻存储负担和优化难度。然而，现有的 PEFT 方法仅依赖于人类启发法，将可训练参数引入到不同任务的相同位置，并忽略了域间隙。为此，我们通过提出一种新颖的敏感度感知视觉参数高效微调（SPT）方案来研究在哪里引入以及如何分配可训练参数，该方案在给定所需的可调参数预算的情况下自适应地将可训练参数分配到特定于任务的重要位置。具体来说，我们的 SPT 首先快速识别需要以数据相关方式调整给定任务的敏感参数。接下来，我们的SPT通过利用现有的结构化调整方法，例如LoRA [23]或Adapter [22]，进一步提高敏感参数数量超过预定义阈值的权重矩阵的表示能力，以取代在预算下直接调整选定的敏感参数（非结构化调整）。对各种下游识别任务的大量实验表明，我们的 SPT 是对现有 PEFT 方法的补充，并大大提高了它们的性能，例如，SPT 将具有监督预训练 ViT-B/16 主干的 Adapter 的平均 Top-1 准确率提高了 4.2% 和 1.4%，分别在 FGVC 和 VTAB-1k 基准上达到了 SOTA 性能。源代码位于 https://github.com/ziplab/SPT 本文提出一种敏感性感知的视觉参数高效微调方法（SPT），通过动态分配可训练参数提升视觉模型在下游任务中的性能。 Haoyu He,Jianfei Cai,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao,Bohan Zhuang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Weijian Huang,Hao Yang,Cheng Li,Mingtong Dai,Rui Yang,Shanshan Wang
title: MGA: Medical generalist agent through text-guided knowledge transformation
title_zh: MGA：通过文本引导知识转换的医学通才代理
abstract: Multi-modal representation methods have achieved advanced performance in medical applications by extracting more robust features from multi-domain data. However, existing methods usually need to train additional branches for downstream tasks, which may increase the model complexities in clinical applications as well as introduce additional human inductive bias. Besides, very few studies exploit the rich clinical knowledge embedded in clinical daily reports. To this end, we propose a novel medical generalist agent, MGA, that can address three kinds of common clinical tasks via clinical reports knowledge transformation. Unlike the existing methods, MGA can easily adapt to different tasks without specific downstream branches when their corresponding annotations are missing. More importantly, we are the first attempt to use medical professional language guidance as a transmission medium to guide the agent's behavior. The proposed method is implemented on four well-known X-ray open-source datasets, MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, MIMIC-CXR-JPG, and MIMIC-CXR-MS. Promising results are obtained, which validate the effectiveness of our proposed MGA. Code is available at: https://github.com/SZUHvern/MGA
summary: Multi-modal representation methods have achieved advanced performance in medical applications by extracting more robust features from multi-domain data. However, existing methods usually need to train additional branches for downstream tasks, which may increase the model complexities in clinical applications as well as introduce additional human inductive bias. Besides, very few studies exploit the rich clinical knowledge embedded in clinical daily reports. To this end, we propose a novel medical generalist agent, MGA, that can address three kinds of common clinical tasks via clinical reports knowledge transformation. Unlike the existing methods, MGA can easily adapt to different tasks without specific downstream branches when their corresponding annotations are missing. More importantly, we are the first attempt to use medical professional language guidance as a transmission medium to guide the agent's behavior. The proposed method is implemented on four well-known X-ray open-source datasets, MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert, MIMIC-CXR-JPG, and MIMIC-CXR-MS. Promising results are obtained, which validate the effectiveness of our proposed MGA. Code is available at: https://github.com/SZUHvern/MGA
abstract_zh: 多模态表示方法通过从多域数据中提取更鲁棒的特征，在医疗应用中取得了先进的性能。然而，现有方法通常需要为下游任务训练额外的分支，这可能会增加临床应用中的模型复杂性，并引入额外的人类归纳偏差。此外，很少有研究利用临床每日报告中丰富的临床知识。为此，我们提出了一种新型医学通才代理 MGA，它可以通过临床报告知识转换来解决三种常见的临床任务。与现有方法不同，当相应的注释丢失时，MGA 可以轻松适应不同的任务，而无需特定的下游分支。更重要的是，我们是首次尝试使用医学专业语言指导作为传输媒介来指导代理人的行为。该方法在四个著名的 X 射线开源数据集 MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert、MIMIC-CXR-JPG 和 MIMIC-CXR-MS 上实现。获得了有希望的结果，验证了我们提出的 MGA 的有效性。代码位于：https://github.com/SZUHvern/MGA

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过文本引导的知识转换实现的医疗通用代理（MGA），用于解决临床任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需为下游任务训练额外分支，增加模型复杂度并引入人工偏见，且未充分利用临床报告中的知识。
AI.method: MGA通过临床报告知识转换处理三种临床任务，无需特定下游分支，并首次使用医学专业语言指导代理行为。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR等四个公开数据集上验证了MGA的有效性，取得有希望的结果。
AI.conclusion: MGA无需额外分支即可适应多种任务，有效利用临床知识，代码已开源。

authors_text: Yulin Pan,Xiangteng He,Biao Gong,Yuxin Peng,Yiliang Lv
title: Enhancing Unsupervised Audio Representation Learning via Adversarial Sample Generation
title_zh: 通过对抗样本生成增强无监督音频表示学习
abstract: Existing audio analysis methods generally first transform the audio stream to spectrogram, and then feed it into CNN for further analysis. A standard CNN recognizes specific visual patterns over feature map, then pools for high-level representation, which overlooks the positional information of recognized patterns. However, unlike natural image, the semantic of an audio spectrogram is sensitive to positional change, as its vertical and horizontal axes indicate the frequency and temporal information of the audio, instead of naive rectangular coordinates. Thus, the insensitivity of CNN to positional change plays a negative role on audio spectrogram encoding. To address this issue, this paper proposes a new self-supervised learning mechanism, which enhances the audio representation by first generating adversarial samples (\textit{i.e.}, negative samples), then driving CNN to distinguish the embeddings of negative pairs in the latent space. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves best or competitive results on 9 downstream datasets compared with previous methods, which verifies its effectiveness on audio representation learning.
summary: Existing audio analysis methods generally first transform the audio stream to spectrogram, and then feed it into CNN for further analysis. A standard CNN recognizes specific visual patterns over feature map, then pools for high-level representation, which overlooks the positional information of recognized patterns. However, unlike natural image, the semantic of an audio spectrogram is sensitive to positional change, as its vertical and horizontal axes indicate the frequency and temporal information of the audio, instead of naive rectangular coordinates. Thus, the insensitivity of CNN to positional change plays a negative role on audio spectrogram encoding. To address this issue, this paper proposes a new self-supervised learning mechanism, which enhances the audio representation by first generating adversarial samples (\textit{i.e.}, negative samples), then driving CNN to distinguish the embeddings of negative pairs in the latent space. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves best or competitive results on 9 downstream datasets compared with previous methods, which verifies its effectiveness on audio representation learning.
abstract_zh: 现有的音频分析方法通常首先将音频流转换为声谱图，然后将其输入CNN进行进一步分析。标准 CNN 识别特征图上的特定视觉模式，然后进行池化以进行高级表示，这会忽略已识别模式的位置信息。然而，与自然图像不同，音频频谱图的语义对位置变化敏感，因为它的垂直轴和水平轴指示音频的频率和时间信息，而不是朴素的直角坐标。因此，CNN 对位置变化的不敏感性对音频频谱图编码产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新的自监督学习机制，该机制通过首先生成对抗性样本（\textit{i.e.，负样本），然后驱动 CNN 区分潜在空间中负对的嵌入来增强音频表示。大量实验表明，与之前的方法相比，所提出的方法在 9 个下游数据集上取得了最佳或有竞争力的结果，这验证了其在音频表示学习方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习机制，通过生成对抗样本增强音频表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN处理音频频谱图时忽略位置信息，而音频语义对位置变化敏感，导致表征效果不佳。
AI.method: 生成对抗样本（负样本），训练CNN在潜在空间区分负样本对的嵌入。
AI.result: 在9个下游数据集上取得最佳或有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了音频表示学习性能，验证了对抗样本生成机制的有效性。

authors_text: Yubo Ma,Yixin Cao,YongChing Hong,Aixin Sun
title: Large Language Model Is Not a Good Few-shot Information Extractor, but a Good Reranker for Hard Samples!
title_zh: 大型语言模型不是一个好的小样本信息提取器，而是一个好的硬样本重排序器！
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable strides in various tasks. Whether LLMs are competitive few-shot solvers for information extraction (IE) tasks, however, remains an open problem. In this work, we aim to provide a thorough answer to this question. Through extensive experiments on nine datasets across four IE tasks, we demonstrate that current advanced LLMs consistently exhibit inferior performance, higher latency, and increased budget requirements compared to fine-tuned SLMs under most settings. Therefore, we conclude that LLMs are not effective few-shot information extractors in general. Nonetheless, we illustrate that with appropriate prompting strategies, LLMs can effectively complement SLMs and tackle challenging samples that SLMs struggle with. And moreover, we propose an adaptive filter-then-rerank paradigm to combine the strengths of LLMs and SLMs. In this paradigm, SLMs serve as filters and LLMs serve as rerankers. By prompting LLMs to rerank a small portion of difficult samples identified by SLMs, our preliminary system consistently achieves promising improvements (2.4% F1-gain on average) on various IE tasks, with an acceptable time and cost investment.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable strides in various tasks. Whether LLMs are competitive few-shot solvers for information extraction (IE) tasks, however, remains an open problem. In this work, we aim to provide a thorough answer to this question. Through extensive experiments on nine datasets across four IE tasks, we demonstrate that current advanced LLMs consistently exhibit inferior performance, higher latency, and increased budget requirements compared to fine-tuned SLMs under most settings. Therefore, we conclude that LLMs are not effective few-shot information extractors in general. Nonetheless, we illustrate that with appropriate prompting strategies, LLMs can effectively complement SLMs and tackle challenging samples that SLMs struggle with. And moreover, we propose an adaptive filter-then-rerank paradigm to combine the strengths of LLMs and SLMs. In this paradigm, SLMs serve as filters and LLMs serve as rerankers. By prompting LLMs to rerank a small portion of difficult samples identified by SLMs, our preliminary system consistently achieves promising improvements (2.4% F1-gain on average) on various IE tasks, with an acceptable time and cost investment.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在各种任务中取得了显着的进步。然而，法学硕士是否是信息提取（IE）任务中具有竞争力的小样本求解器，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们的目标是为这个问题提供彻底的答案。通过对四个 IE 任务的九个数据集进行广泛的实验，我们证明，与大多数设置下的微调 SLM 相比，当前的高级 LLM 始终表现出较差的性能、更高的延迟和更高的预算要求。因此，我们得出结论，法学硕士通常不是有效的小样本信息提取器。尽管如此，我们证明，通过适当的激励策略，法学硕士可以有效地补充 SLM 并解决 SLM 难以解决的具有挑战性的样本。此外，我们提出了一种自适应过滤然后重新排序范例来结合 LLM 和 SLM 的优势。在此范例中，SLM 充当过滤器，LLM 充当重新排序器。通过促使法学硕士对 SLM 识别的一小部分困难样本进行重新排序，我们的初步系统在各种 IE 任务上持续实现了有希望的改进（平均 F1 增益 2.4%），并且时间和成本投资可接受。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）在少样本信息抽取（IE）任务中的表现，并提出了一种结合LLM与微调小语言模型（SLM）的自适应过滤-重排序框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在多项任务中表现出色，但其在少样本信息抽取场景下的有效性仍存在争议，需明确其与微调小模型的优劣及协作潜力。
AI.method: 通过在九个数据集上进行四类IE任务的广泛实验，对比LLM与微调SLM的性能；提出自适应过滤-重排序范式，由SLM筛选样本后，LLM对困难样本进行重排序。
AI.result: 实验表明，LLM在多数设置下表现劣于SLM，但通过适当提示策略，LLM可辅助SLM处理困难样本，平均F1值提升2.4%且时间成本可控。
AI.conclusion: LLM不适合作为通用少样本信息抽取器，但通过与SLM协作（SLM过滤、LLM重排序），可有效提升复杂样本处理效果。

Whether LLMs are competitive few-shot solvers for information extraction (IE) tasks, however, remains an open problem. In this work, we aim to provide a thorough answer to this question. And moreover, we propose an adaptive filter-then-rerank paradigm to combine the strengths of LLMs and SLMs. In this paradigm, SLMs serve as filters and LLMs serve as rerankers. authors_text: Huali Xu,Shuaifeng Zhi,Shuzhou Sun,Vishal M. Patel,Li Liu
title: Deep Learning for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Visual Recognition: A Survey
title_zh: 用于跨域少样本视觉识别的深度学习：一项调查
comment: Accepted at ACM Computing Surveys; 35 pages, 12 figures, 6 tables
comments: Accepted at ACM Computing Surveys; 35 pages, 12 figures, 6 tables
abstract: While deep learning excels in computer vision tasks with abundant labeled data, its performance diminishes significantly in scenarios with limited labeled samples. To address this, Few-shot learning (FSL) enables models to perform the target tasks with very few labeled examples by leveraging prior knowledge from related tasks. However, traditional FSL assumes that both the related and target tasks come from the same domain, which is a restrictive assumption in many real-world scenarios where domain differences are common. To overcome this limitation, Cross-domain few-shot learning (CDFSL) has gained attention, as it allows source and target data to come from different domains and label spaces. This paper presents the first comprehensive review of Cross-domain Few-shot Learning (CDFSL), a field that has received less attention compared to traditional FSL due to its unique challenges. We aim to provide both a position paper and a tutorial for researchers, covering key problems, existing methods, and future research directions. The review begins with a formal definition of CDFSL, outlining its core challenges, followed by a systematic analysis of current approaches, organized under a clear taxonomy. Finally, we discuss promising future directions in terms of problem setups, applications, and theoretical advancements.

To address this, Few-shot learning (FSL) enables models to perform the target tasks with very few labeled examples by leveraging prior knowledge from related tasks. This paper presents the first comprehensive review of Cross-domain Few-shot Learning (CDFSL), a field that has received less attention compared to traditional FSL due to its unique challenges. We aim to provide both a position paper and a tutorial for researchers, covering key problems, existing methods, and future research directions. Finally, we discuss promising future directions in terms of problem setups, applications, and theoretical advancements.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度学习在具有丰富标记数据的计算机视觉任务中表现出色，但在标记样本有限的场景中，其性能显着下降。为了解决这个问题，小样本学习（FSL）使模型能够利用相关任务的先验知识，用很少的标记示例来执行目标任务。然而，传统的 FSL 假设相关任务和目标任务都来自同一领域，这在许多领域差异很常见的现实场景中是一个限制性假设。为了克服这一限制，跨域少样本学习（CDFSL）引起了人们的关注，因为它允许源数据和目标数据来自不同的域和标签空间。本文首次对跨域少样本学习（CDFSL）进行了全面综述，与传统 FSL 相比，该领域由于其独特的挑战而受到的关注较少。我们的目标是为研究人员提供立场文件和教程，涵盖关键问题、现有方法和未来的研究方向。审查首先对 CDFSL 进行正式定义，概述其核心挑战，然后根据明确的分类法对当前方法进行系统分析。最后，我们讨论了问题设置、应用和理论进步方面有希望的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了跨领域小样本视觉识别（CDFSL）领域，分析了其核心挑战、现有方法及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统小样本学习假设源任务与目标任务同领域，但实际场景中领域差异普遍存在，需解决跨领域小样本学习的挑战。
AI.method: 通过定义CDFSL问题，构建清晰分类体系，系统分析现有方法，并总结关键问题与未来方向。
AI.result: 梳理了CDFSL的核心挑战，归纳了当前主流方法，并指出现有研究的局限性与潜在改进空间。
AI.conclusion: CDFSL需在问题设定、应用落地及理论分析上进一步突破，未来研究应关注领域差异建模与泛化能力提升。

authors_text: Hong-Po Hsieh,Amy Zavatsky,Min Chen
title: Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis for Aiding Glyph Design
title_zh: 辅助字形设计的多标准决策分析
comment: First version was completed on 2 Dec. 2022
comments: First version was completed on 2 Dec. 2022
abstract: Glyph-based visualization is one of the main techniques for visualizing complex multivariate data. With small glyphs, data variables are typically encoded with relatively low visual and perceptual precision. Glyph designers have to contemplate the trade-offs in allocating visual channels when there is a large number of data variables. While there are many successful glyph designs in the literature, there is not yet a systematic method for assisting visualization designers to evaluate different design options that feature different types of trade-offs. In this paper, we present an evaluation scheme based on the multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA) methodology. The scheme provides designers with a structured way to consider their glyph designs from a range of perspectives, while rendering a semi-quantitative template for evaluating different design options. In addition, this work provides guideposts for future empirical research to obtain more quantitative measurements that can be used in MCDA-aided glyph design processes.
summary: Glyph-based visualization is one of the main techniques for visualizing complex multivariate data. With small glyphs, data variables are typically encoded with relatively low visual and perceptual precision. Glyph designers have to contemplate the trade-offs in allocating visual channels when there is a large number of data variables. While there are many successful glyph designs in the literature, there is not yet a systematic method for assisting visualization designers to evaluate different design options that feature different types of trade-offs. In this paper, we present an evaluation scheme based on the multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA) methodology. The scheme provides designers with a structured way to consider their glyph designs from a range of perspectives, while rendering a semi-quantitative template for evaluating different design options. In addition, this work provides guideposts for future empirical research to obtain more quantitative measurements that can be used in MCDA-aided glyph design processes.
abstract_zh: 基于字形的可视化是可视化复杂多元数据的主要技术之一。对于小字形，数据变量通常以相对较低的视觉和感知精度进行编码。当存在大量数据变量时，字形设计者必须考虑分配视觉通道的权衡。尽管文献中有许多成功的字形设计，但目前还没有一种系统的方法来帮助可视化设计人员评估具有不同类型权衡的不同设计选项。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多标准决策分析（MCDA）方法的评估方案。该方案为设计人员提供了一种结构化的方式，从多个角度考虑他们的字形设计，同时呈现用于评估不同设计选项的半定量模板。此外，这项工作为未来的实证研究提供了指导方针，以获得更多可用于 MCDA 辅助字形设计过程的定量测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多标准决策分析（MCDA）的方法，用于系统评估不同符号设计选项的权衡，辅助可视化设计师优化多变量数据的符号编码方案。
AI.motivation: 现有符号设计缺乏系统方法评估不同设计选项的视觉与感知精度权衡，导致设计师难以量化比较复杂多变量数据的编码效果。
AI.method: 构建基于MCDA的评估框架，通过结构化指标体系和半定量模板，从多维度分析符号设计的视觉通道分配与感知效率。
AI.result: 开发出可操作的符号设计评估方案，提供半定量评价模板，并为后续实证研究获取定量指标奠定方法论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了符号设计领域系统评估工具的空白，为多变量数据可视化设计提供了可复用的决策支持框架。

search_text: Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis for Aiding Glyph Design 辅助字形设计的多标准决策分析 Glyph-based visualization is one of the main techniques for visualizing complex multivariate data. With small glyphs, data variables are typically encoded with relatively low visual and perceptual precision. Glyph designers have to contemplate the trade-offs in allocating visual channels when there is a large number of data variables. While there are many successful glyph designs in the literature, there is not yet a systematic method for assisting visualization designers to evaluate different design options that feature different types of trade-offs. In this paper, we present an evaluation scheme based on the multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA) methodology. The scheme provides designers with a structured way to consider their glyph designs from a range of perspectives, while rendering a semi-quantitative template for evaluating different design options. In addition, this work provides guideposts for future empirical research to obtain more quantitative measurements that can be used in MCDA-aided glyph design processes. 基于字形的可视化是可视化复杂多元数据的主要技术之一。对于小字形，数据变量通常以相对较低的视觉和感知精度进行编码。当存在大量数据变量时，字形设计者必须考虑分配视觉通道的权衡。尽管文献中有许多成功的字形设计，但目前还没有一种系统的方法来帮助可视化设计人员评估具有不同类型权衡的不同设计选项。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多标准决策分析（MCDA）方法的评估方案。该方案为设计人员提供了一种结构化的方式，从多个角度考虑他们的字形设计，同时呈现用于评估不同设计选项的半定量模板。此外，这项工作为未来的实证研究提供了指导方针，以获得更多可用于 MCDA 辅助字形设计过程的定量测量。 本文提出一种基于多标准决策分析（MCDA）的方法，用于系统评估不同符号设计选项的权衡，辅助可视化设计师优化多变量数据的符号编码方案。 Hong-Po Hsieh,Amy Zavatsky,Min Chen cs.HC

authors_text: Chaoyang Jiang,Xiaoni Zheng,Zhe Jin,Chengpu Yu
title: UMS-VINS: United Monocular-Stereo Features for Visual-Inertial Tightly Coupled Odometry
title_zh: UMS-VINS：用于视觉惯性紧耦合里程计的联合单目立体特征
abstract: This paper introduces the united monocular-stereo features into a visual-inertial tightly coupled odometry (UMS-VINS) for robust pose estimation. UMS-VINS requires two cameras and a low-cost inertial measurement unit (IMU). The UMS-VINS is an evolution of VINS-FUSION, which modifies the VINS-FUSION from the following three perspectives. 1) UMS-VINS extracts and tracks features from the sub-pixel plane to achieve better positions of the features. 2) UMS-VINS introduces additional 2-dimensional features from the left and/or right cameras. 3) If the visual initialization fails, the IMU propagation is directly used for pose estimation, and if the visual-IMU alignment fails, UMS-VINS estimates the pose via the visual odometry. The performances on both public datasets and new real-world experiments indicate that the proposed UMS-VINS outperforms the VINS-FUSION from the perspective of localization accuracy, localization robustness, and environmental adaptability.
summary: This paper introduces the united monocular-stereo features into a visual-inertial tightly coupled odometry (UMS-VINS) for robust pose estimation. UMS-VINS requires two cameras and a low-cost inertial measurement unit (IMU). The UMS-VINS is an evolution of VINS-FUSION, which modifies the VINS-FUSION from the following three perspectives. 1) UMS-VINS extracts and tracks features from the sub-pixel plane to achieve better positions of the features. 2) UMS-VINS introduces additional 2-dimensional features from the left and/or right cameras. 3) If the visual initialization fails, the IMU propagation is directly used for pose estimation, and if the visual-IMU alignment fails, UMS-VINS estimates the pose via the visual odometry. The performances on both public datasets and new real-world experiments indicate that the proposed UMS-VINS outperforms the VINS-FUSION from the perspective of localization accuracy, localization robustness, and environmental adaptability.
abstract_zh: 本文将联合单目立体特征引入视觉惯性紧耦合里程计（UMS-VINS）中，以实现稳健的姿态估计。 UMS-VINS 需要两个摄像头和一个低成本惯性测量单元 (IMU)。 UMS-VINS是VINS-FUSION的演进，从以下三个角度对VINS-FUSION进行了修改。 1）UMS-VINS从子像素平面提取并跟踪特征，以获得更好的特征位置。 2) UMS-VINS 引入了来自左和/或右摄像头的附加二维特征。 3）如果视觉初始化失败，则直接使用IMU传播进行位姿估计，如果视觉-IMU对齐失败，UMS-VINS通过视觉里程计估计位姿。公共数据集和新的现实世界实验的性能表明，从定位精度、定位鲁棒性和环境适应性的角度来看，所提出的 UMS-VINS 优于 VINS-FUSION。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合单目与立体视觉特征的紧耦合视觉惯性里程计方法UMS-VINS，以提高定位精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉惯性里程计在复杂环境下面临初始化失败和特征跟踪丢失的问题，需通过融合多传感器信息提升系统可靠性。
AI.method: 在VINS-FUSION基础上改进：1) 从亚像素平面提取特征；2) 融合双目相机的二维特征；3) 引入IMU传播和视觉里程计作为失败时的备用方案。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和实际场景测试中，UMS-VINS在定位精度、鲁棒性和环境适应性方面优于VINS-FUSION。
AI.conclusion: UMS-VINS通过多模态特征融合和故障容错机制，显著提升了视觉惯性里程计的性能与适用范围。

authors_text: Fuhui Zhou,Yihao Li,Ming Xu,Lu Yuan,Qihui Wu,Rose Qingyang Hu,Naofal Al-Dhahir
title: Cognitive Semantic Communication Systems Driven by Knowledge Graph: Principle, Implementation, and Performance Evaluation
title_zh: 知识图驱动的认知语义通信系统：原理、实现和性能评估
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.11958
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.11958
abstract: Semantic communication is envisioned as a promising technique to break through the Shannon limit. However, semantic inference and semantic error correction have not been well studied. Moreover, error correction methods of existing semantic communication frameworks are inexplicable and inflexible, which limits the achievable performance. In this paper, to tackle this issue, a knowledge graph is exploited to develop semantic communication systems. Two cognitive semantic communication frameworks are proposed for the single-user and multiple-user communication scenarios. Moreover, a simple, general, and interpretable semantic alignment algorithm for semantic information detection is proposed. Furthermore, an effective semantic correction algorithm is proposed by mining the inference rule from the knowledge graph. Additionally, the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to recover semantic information. For the multi-user cognitive semantic communication system, a message recovery algorithm is proposed to distinguish messages of different users by matching the knowledge level between the source and the destination. Extensive simulation results conducted on a public dataset demonstrate that our proposed single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems are superior to benchmark communication systems in terms of the data compression rate and communication reliability. Finally, we present realistic single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems results by building a software-defined radio prototype system.
summary: Semantic communication is envisioned as a promising technique to break through the Shannon limit. However, semantic inference and semantic error correction have not been well studied. Moreover, error correction methods of existing semantic communication frameworks are inexplicable and inflexible, which limits the achievable performance. In this paper, to tackle this issue, a knowledge graph is exploited to develop semantic communication systems. Two cognitive semantic communication frameworks are proposed for the single-user and multiple-user communication scenarios. Moreover, a simple, general, and interpretable semantic alignment algorithm for semantic information detection is proposed. Furthermore, an effective semantic correction algorithm is proposed by mining the inference rule from the knowledge graph. Additionally, the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to recover semantic information. For the multi-user cognitive semantic communication system, a message recovery algorithm is proposed to distinguish messages of different users by matching the knowledge level between the source and the destination. Extensive simulation results conducted on a public dataset demonstrate that our proposed single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems are superior to benchmark communication systems in terms of the data compression rate and communication reliability. Finally, we present realistic single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems results by building a software-defined radio prototype system.
abstract_zh: 语义通信被认为是突破香农极限的一种有前途的技术。然而，语义推理和语义纠错尚未得到很好的研究。此外，现有语义通信框架的纠错方法难以解释且不灵活，这限制了可实现的性能。在本文中，为了解决这个问题，利用知识图来开发语义通信系统。针对单用户和多用户通信场景提出了两种认知语义通信框架。此外，提出了一种简单、通用、可解释的语义对齐算法，用于语义信息检测。此外，通过挖掘知识图谱的推理规则，提出了一种有效的语义校正算法。此外，预训练模型经过微调以恢复语义信息。针对多用户认知语义通信系统，提出了一种消息恢复算法，通过匹配源和目的地之间的知识水平来区分不同用户的消息。在公共数据集上进行的广泛模拟结果表明，我们提出的单用户和多用户认知语义通信系统在数据压缩率和通信可靠性方面优于基准通信系统。最后，我们通过构建软件定义的无线电原型系统来呈现现实的单用户和多用户认知语义通信系统结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于知识图谱的认知语义通信系统，解决现有语义通信框架中语义纠错方法不灵活、可解释性差的问题，并验证其在数据压缩率和通信可靠性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有语义通信框架的纠错方法缺乏解释性与灵活性，导致性能受限，难以突破香农极限。
AI.method: 利用知识图谱构建单用户与多用户认知语义通信框架，提出语义对齐算法、基于知识图谱推理规则的纠错算法，并通过预训练模型微调恢复语义信息。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的仿真结果表明，所提系统在数据压缩率和通信可靠性上优于基准系统，软件定义无线电原型验证了可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于知识图谱的认知语义通信系统能有效提升通信性能，为突破香农极限提供新思路。

In this paper, to tackle this issue, a knowledge graph is exploited to develop semantic communication systems. Two cognitive semantic communication frameworks are proposed for the single-user and multiple-user communication scenarios. Moreover, a simple, general, and interpretable semantic alignment algorithm for semantic information detection is proposed. Furthermore, an effective semantic correction algorithm is proposed by mining the inference rule from the knowledge graph. Additionally, the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to recover semantic information. For the multi-user cognitive semantic communication system, a message recovery algorithm is proposed to distinguish messages of different users by matching the knowledge level between the source and the destination. Extensive simulation results conducted on a public dataset demonstrate that our proposed single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems are superior to benchmark communication systems in terms of the data compression rate and communication reliability. Finally, we present realistic single-user and multi-user cognitive semantic communication systems results by building a software-defined radio prototype system. 语义通信被认为是突破香农极限的一种有前途的技术。然而，语义推理和语义纠错尚未得到很好的研究。此外，现有语义通信框架的纠错方法难以解释且不灵活，这限制了可实现的性能。在本文中，为了解决这个问题，利用知识图来开发语义通信系统。针对单用户和多用户通信场景提出了两种认知语义通信框架。此外，提出了一种简单、通用、可解释的语义对齐算法，用于语义信息检测。此外，通过挖掘知识图谱的推理规则，提出了一种有效的语义校正算法。此外，预训练模型经过微调以恢复语义信息。针对多用户认知语义通信系统，提出了一种消息恢复算法，通过匹配源和目的地之间的知识水平来区分不同用户的消息。在公共数据集上进行的广泛模拟结果表明，我们提出的单用户和多用户认知语义通信系统在数据压缩率和通信可靠性方面优于基准通信系统。最后，我们通过构建软件定义的无线电原型系统来呈现现实的单用户和多用户认知语义通信系统结果。 本文提出基于知识图谱的认知语义通信系统，解决现有语义通信框架中语义纠错方法不灵活、可解释性差的问题，并验证其在数据压缩率和通信可靠性方面的优势。 Fuhui Zhou,Yihao Li,Ming Xu,Lu Yuan,Qihui Wu,Rose Qingyang Hu,Naofal Al-Dhahir cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Yu,Renda Li,Zhongpeng Cai,Gongpeng Zhao,Guochen Xie,Jichao Zhu,Wangyuan Zhu
title: Local Region Perception and Relationship Learning Combined with Feature Fusion for Facial Action Unit Detection
title_zh: 局部区域感知和关系学习与特征融合相结合用于面部动作单元检测
abstract: Human affective behavior analysis plays a vital role in human-computer interaction (HCI) systems. In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2023 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). We propose a single-stage trained AU detection framework. Specifically, in order to effectively extract facial local region features related to AU detection, we use a local region perception module to effectively extract features of different AUs. Meanwhile, we use a graph neural network-based relational learning module to capture the relationship between AUs. In addition, considering the role of the overall feature of the target face on AU detection, we also use the feature fusion module to fuse the feature information extracted by the backbone network and the AU feature information extracted by the relationship learning module. We also adopted some sampling methods, data augmentation techniques and post-processing strategies to further improve the performance of the model.
summary: Human affective behavior analysis plays a vital role in human-computer interaction (HCI) systems. In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2023 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). We propose a single-stage trained AU detection framework. Specifically, in order to effectively extract facial local region features related to AU detection, we use a local region perception module to effectively extract features of different AUs. Meanwhile, we use a graph neural network-based relational learning module to capture the relationship between AUs. In addition, considering the role of the overall feature of the target face on AU detection, we also use the feature fusion module to fuse the feature information extracted by the backbone network and the AU feature information extracted by the relationship learning module. We also adopted some sampling methods, data augmentation techniques and post-processing strategies to further improve the performance of the model.
abstract_zh: 人类情感行为分析在人机交互（HCI）系统中起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们介绍了我们向 CVPR 2023 野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛提交的作品。我们提出了一个单阶段训练的 AU 检测框架。具体来说，为了有效提取与AU检测相关的面部局部区域特征，我们使用局部区域感知模块来有效提取不同AU的特征。同时，我们使用基于图神经网络的关系学习模块来捕获AU之间的关系。此外，考虑到目标人脸的整体特征对AU检测的作用，我们还使用特征融合模块将主干网络提取的特征信息和关系学习模块提取的AU特征信息进行融合。我们还采用了一些采样方法、数据增强技术和后处理策略来进一步提高模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合局部区域感知、关系学习和特征融合的面部动作单元（AU）检测框架，用于野外情感行为分析。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取面部局部区域特征及捕捉AU间关系方面存在不足，影响了AU检测的准确性。
AI.method: 设计局部区域感知模块提取不同AU的特征，采用图神经网络学习AU关系，并通过特征融合模块整合全局特征与AU特征，结合数据增强与后处理策略。
AI.result: 在CVPR 2023 ABAW竞赛中模型性能显著提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过多模块协同作用，有效提升了野外场景下AU检测的准确率与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Joanna Hong,Minsu Kim,Jeongsoo Choi,Yong Man Ro
title: Watch or Listen: Robust Audio-Visual Speech Recognition with Visual Corruption Modeling and Reliability Scoring
title_zh: 观看或聆听：具有视觉损坏建模和可靠性评分的强大视听语音识别
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2023. Implementation available: https://github.com/joannahong/AV-RelScore
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2023. Implementation available: https://github.com/joannahong/AV-RelScore
abstract: This paper deals with Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR) under multimodal input corruption situations where audio inputs and visual inputs are both corrupted, which is not well addressed in previous research directions. Previous studies have focused on how to complement the corrupted audio inputs with the clean visual inputs with the assumption of the availability of clean visual inputs. However, in real life, clean visual inputs are not always accessible and can even be corrupted by occluded lip regions or noises. Thus, we firstly analyze that the previous AVSR models are not indeed robust to the corruption of multimodal input streams, the audio and the visual inputs, compared to uni-modal models. Then, we design multimodal input corruption modeling to develop robust AVSR models. Lastly, we propose a novel AVSR framework, namely Audio-Visual Reliability Scoring module (AV-RelScore), that is robust to the corrupted multimodal inputs. The AV-RelScore can determine which input modal stream is reliable or not for the prediction and also can exploit the more reliable streams in prediction. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated with comprehensive experiments on popular benchmark databases, LRS2 and LRS3. We also show that the reliability scores obtained by AV-RelScore well reflect the degree of corruption and make the proposed model focus on the reliable multimodal representations.
summary: This paper deals with Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR) under multimodal input corruption situations where audio inputs and visual inputs are both corrupted, which is not well addressed in previous research directions. Previous studies have focused on how to complement the corrupted audio inputs with the clean visual inputs with the assumption of the availability of clean visual inputs. However, in real life, clean visual inputs are not always accessible and can even be corrupted by occluded lip regions or noises. Thus, we firstly analyze that the previous AVSR models are not indeed robust to the corruption of multimodal input streams, the audio and the visual inputs, compared to uni-modal models. Then, we design multimodal input corruption modeling to develop robust AVSR models. Lastly, we propose a novel AVSR framework, namely Audio-Visual Reliability Scoring module (AV-RelScore), that is robust to the corrupted multimodal inputs. The AV-RelScore can determine which input modal stream is reliable or not for the prediction and also can exploit the more reliable streams in prediction. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated with comprehensive experiments on popular benchmark databases, LRS2 and LRS3. We also show that the reliability scores obtained by AV-RelScore well reflect the degree of corruption and make the proposed model focus on the reliable multimodal representations.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了多模式输入损坏情况下的视听语音识别（AVSR），其中音频输入和视觉输入都被损坏，这在以前的研究方向中没有得到很好的解决。先前的研究主要集中在假设干净的视觉输入可用的情况下如何用干净的视觉输入来补充损坏的音频输入。然而，在现实生活中，干净的视觉输入并不总是可访问的，甚至可能被遮挡的嘴唇区域或噪音破坏。因此，我们首先分析与单模态模型相比，之前的 AVSR 模型对于多模态输入流、音频和视觉输入的损坏确实并不鲁棒。然后，我们设计多模态输入损坏模型来开发稳健的 AVSR 模型。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的 AVSR 框架，即视听可靠性评分模块（AV-RelScore），它对损坏的多模态输入具有鲁棒性。 AV-RelScore 可以确定哪个输入模态流对于预测来说是可靠的或不可靠的，并且还可以在预测中利用更可靠的流。通过在流行的基准数据库LRS2和LRS3上进行综合实验来评估所提出方法的有效性。我们还表明，AV-RelScore 获得的可靠性分数很好地反映了腐败程度，并使所提出​​的模型专注于可靠的多模态表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在音频和视觉输入均受干扰的情况下仍能保持鲁棒性的音频-视觉语音识别（AVSR）框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设视觉输入始终干净以补充受干扰的音频输入，但实际中视觉输入也可能因遮挡或噪声而受损，导致传统AVSR模型在多模态干扰下表现不足。
AI.method: 设计多模态输入干扰建模方法，并提出音频-视觉可靠性评分模块（AV-RelScore），通过评估各模态可靠性动态选择更可信的输入流进行预测。
AI.result: 在LRS2和LRS3数据集上的实验表明，AV-RelScore能准确反映输入干扰程度，使模型聚焦于可靠模态表示，提升识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模多模态干扰并引入可靠性评分机制，本文提出的框架显著增强了AVSR在复杂干扰环境下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Pan Gao,Xinlang Chen,Rong Quan,Wei Xiang
title: MRGAN360: Multi-stage Recurrent Generative Adversarial Network for 360 Degree Image Saliency Prediction
title_zh: MRGAN360：用于 360 度图像显着性预测的多级循环生成对抗网络
abstract: Thanks to the ability of providing an immersive and interactive experience, the uptake of 360 degree image content has been rapidly growing in consumer and industrial applications. Compared to planar 2D images, saliency prediction for 360 degree images is more challenging due to their high resolutions and spherical viewing ranges. Currently, most high-performance saliency prediction models for omnidirectional images (ODIs) rely on deeper or broader convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which benefit from CNNs' superior feature representation capabilities while suffering from their high computational costs. In this paper, inspired by the human visual cognitive process, i.e., human being's perception of a visual scene is always accomplished by multiple stages of analysis, we propose a novel multi-stage recurrent generative adversarial networks for ODIs dubbed MRGAN360, to predict the saliency maps stage by stage. At each stage, the prediction model takes as input the original image and the output of the previous stage and outputs a more accurate saliency map. We employ a recurrent neural network among adjacent prediction stages to model their correlations, and exploit a discriminator at the end of each stage to supervise the output saliency map. In addition, we share the weights among all the stages to obtain a lightweight architecture that is computationally cheap. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate that our proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art model in terms of both prediction accuracy and model size.
summary: Thanks to the ability of providing an immersive and interactive experience, the uptake of 360 degree image content has been rapidly growing in consumer and industrial applications. Compared to planar 2D images, saliency prediction for 360 degree images is more challenging due to their high resolutions and spherical viewing ranges. Currently, most high-performance saliency prediction models for omnidirectional images (ODIs) rely on deeper or broader convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which benefit from CNNs' superior feature representation capabilities while suffering from their high computational costs. In this paper, inspired by the human visual cognitive process, i.e., human being's perception of a visual scene is always accomplished by multiple stages of analysis, we propose a novel multi-stage recurrent generative adversarial networks for ODIs dubbed MRGAN360, to predict the saliency maps stage by stage. At each stage, the prediction model takes as input the original image and the output of the previous stage and outputs a more accurate saliency map. We employ a recurrent neural network among adjacent prediction stages to model their correlations, and exploit a discriminator at the end of each stage to supervise the output saliency map. In addition, we share the weights among all the stages to obtain a lightweight architecture that is computationally cheap. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate that our proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art model in terms of both prediction accuracy and model size.
abstract_zh: 由于能够提供身临其境的交互式体验，360 度图像内容的使用量在消费和工业应用中迅速增长。与平面 2D 图像相比，360 度图像的显着性预测由于其高分辨率和球形观看范围而更具挑战性。目前，大多数全向图像的高性能显着性预测模型（ODI）依赖于更深或更广的卷积神经网络（CNN），它受益于CNN卓越的特征表示能力，但同时也面临着高昂的计算成本。在本文中，受人类视觉认知过程的启发，即人类对视觉场景的感知总是通过多个阶段的分析来完成，我们提出了一种新型的 ODI 多阶段循环生成对抗网络 MRGAN360，以逐步预测显着性图。在每个阶段，预测模型将原始图像和前一阶段的输出作为输入，并输出更准确的显着图。我们在相邻预测阶段之间采用循环神经网络来建模它们的相关性，并在每个阶段末尾利用鉴别器来监督输出显着性图。此外，我们在所有阶段之间共享权重，以获得计算成本低的轻量级架构。进行了大量的实验来证明我们提出的模型在预测精度和模型大小方面都优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段循环生成对抗网络MRGAN360，用于预测360度全景图像的显著性图。
AI.motivation: 现有全景图像显著性预测模型依赖深度CNN，计算成本高。受人类分阶段视觉认知过程启发，需设计更高效且准确的预测方法。
AI.method: 采用多阶段循环结构，每阶段结合原始图像与前一阶段输出生成更精确显著性图；通过共享权重降低计算量，并在每阶段末尾使用判别器监督输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，MRGAN360在预测精度和模型规模上均优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: MRGAN360通过模拟人类分阶段视觉机制，实现了高效且精准的全景图像显著性预测。

Currently, most high-performance saliency prediction models for omnidirectional images (ODIs) rely on deeper or broader convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which benefit from CNNs' superior feature representation capabilities while suffering from their high computational costs. We employ a recurrent neural network among adjacent prediction stages to model their correlations, and exploit a discriminator at the end of each stage to supervise the output saliency map. In addition, we share the weights among all the stages to obtain a lightweight architecture that is computationally cheap. authors_text: Weihuang Liu,Xiaodong Cun,Chi-Man Pun,Menghan Xia,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang
title: CoordFill: Efficient High-Resolution Image Inpainting via Parameterized Coordinate Querying
title_zh: CoordFill：通过参数化坐标查询进行高效的高分辨率图像修复
abstract: Image inpainting aims to fill the missing hole of the input. It is hard to solve this task efficiently when facing high-resolution images due to two reasons: (1) Large reception field needs to be handled for high-resolution image inpainting. (2) The general encoder and decoder network synthesizes many background pixels synchronously due to the form of the image matrix. In this paper, we try to break the above limitations for the first time thanks to the recent development of continuous implicit representation. In detail, we down-sample and encode the degraded image to produce the spatial-adaptive parameters for each spatial patch via an attentional Fast Fourier Convolution(FFC)-based parameter generation network. Then, we take these parameters as the weights and biases of a series of multi-layer perceptron(MLP), where the input is the encoded continuous coordinates and the output is the synthesized color value. Thanks to the proposed structure, we only encode the high-resolution image in a relatively low resolution for larger reception field capturing. Then, the continuous position encoding will be helpful to synthesize the photo-realistic high-frequency textures by re-sampling the coordinate in a higher resolution. Also, our framework enables us to query the coordinates of missing pixels only in parallel, yielding a more efficient solution than the previous methods. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves real-time performance on the 2048$\times$2048 images using a single GTX 2080 Ti GPU and can handle 4096$\times$4096 images, with much better performance than existing state-of-the-art methods visually and numerically. The code is available at: https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/CoordFill.
summary: Image inpainting aims to fill the missing hole of the input. It is hard to solve this task efficiently when facing high-resolution images due to two reasons: (1) Large reception field needs to be handled for high-resolution image inpainting. (2) The general encoder and decoder network synthesizes many background pixels synchronously due to the form of the image matrix. In this paper, we try to break the above limitations for the first time thanks to the recent development of continuous implicit representation. In detail, we down-sample and encode the degraded image to produce the spatial-adaptive parameters for each spatial patch via an attentional Fast Fourier Convolution(FFC)-based parameter generation network. Then, we take these parameters as the weights and biases of a series of multi-layer perceptron(MLP), where the input is the encoded continuous coordinates and the output is the synthesized color value. Thanks to the proposed structure, we only encode the high-resolution image in a relatively low resolution for larger reception field capturing. Then, the continuous position encoding will be helpful to synthesize the photo-realistic high-frequency textures by re-sampling the coordinate in a higher resolution. Also, our framework enables us to query the coordinates of missing pixels only in parallel, yielding a more efficient solution than the previous methods. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves real-time performance on the 2048$\times$2048 images using a single GTX 2080 Ti GPU and can handle 4096$\times$4096 images, with much better performance than existing state-of-the-art methods visually and numerically. The code is available at: https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/CoordFill.
abstract_zh: 图像修复的目的是填补输入中缺失的漏洞。面对高分辨率图像时，很难有效地解决此任务，原因有两个：（1）高分辨率图像修复需要处理大的接收场。 (2)通用编码器和解码器网络由于图像矩阵的形式而同步合成许多背景像素。在本文中，由于连续隐式表示的最新发展，我们尝试首次打破上述限制。具体来说，我们对降级图像进行下采样和编码，通过基于注意力的快速傅立叶卷积（FFC）的参数生成网络为每个空间块生成空间自适应参数。然后，我们将这些参数作为一系列多层感知器（MLP）的权重和偏差，其中输入是编码的连续坐标，输出是合成的颜色值。由于所提出的结构，我们仅以相对较低的分辨率对高分辨率图像进行编码，以捕获更大的接收场。然后，连续位置编码将有助于通过以更高分辨率重新采样坐标来合成照片级真实感高频纹理。此外，我们的框架使我们能够仅并行查询丢失像素的坐标，从而产生比以前的方法更有效的解决方案。实验表明，该方法使用单个 GTX 2080 Ti GPU 在 2048×2048 图像上实现了实时性能，并且可以处理 4096×4096 图像，在视觉和数值上比现有最先进的方法具有更好的性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/CoordFill。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoordFill方法，通过参数化坐标查询实现高效的高分辨率图像修复。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像修复面临感受野过大和背景像素同步生成效率低的问题，传统编码解码结构难以兼顾效率与质量。
AI.method: 采用参数化坐标查询框架，通过注意力机制的FFC网络生成空间自适应参数，利用MLP以连续坐标为输入生成像素值，实现低分辨率编码与高分辨率重采样的解耦。
AI.result: 在单块GTX 2080 Ti GPU上实现实时修复2048×2048图像，支持4096×4096图像处理，在视觉和数值指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CoordFill通过坐标驱动的显式合成机制突破传统结构限制，为高分辨率图像修复提供了更高效且高质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Yimin Yin,Siliang He,Renye Zhang,Hongli Chang,Xu Han,Jinghua Zhang
title: Deep Learning for Iris Recognition: A Review
title_zh: 虹膜识别深度学习：回顾
abstract: Iris recognition is a secure biometric technology known for its stability and privacy. With no two irises being identical and little change throughout a person's lifetime, iris recognition is considered more reliable and less susceptible to external factors than other biometric recognition methods. Unlike traditional machine learning-based iris recognition methods, deep learning technology does not rely on feature engineering and boasts excellent performance. This paper collects 120 relevant papers to summarize the development of iris recognition based on deep learning. We first introduce the background of iris recognition and the motivation and contribution of this survey. Then, we present the common datasets widely used in iris recognition. After that, we summarize the key tasks involved in the process of iris recognition based on deep learning technology, including identification, segmentation, presentation attack detection, and localization. Finally, we discuss the challenges and potential development of iris recognition. This review provides a comprehensive sight of the research of iris recognition based on deep learning.

After that, we summarize the key tasks involved in the process of iris recognition based on deep learning technology, including identification, segmentation, presentation attack detection, and localization. Finally, we discuss the challenges and potential development of iris recognition. This review provides a comprehensive sight of the research of iris recognition based on deep learning.
abstract_zh: 虹膜识别是一种安全的生物识别技术，以其稳定性和隐私性而闻名。由于没有两个虹膜是相同的，并且在人的一生中变化很小，因此虹膜识别被认为比其他生物识别方法更可靠并且更不易受到外部因素的影响。与传统的基于机器学习的虹膜识别方法不同，深度学习技术不依赖特征工程，具有优异的性能。本文收集了120篇相关论文，总结了基于深度学习的虹膜识别的发展。我们首先介绍虹膜识别的背景以及本次调查的动机和贡献。然后，我们介绍了虹膜识别中广泛使用的常见数据集。之后，我们总结了基于深度学习技术的虹膜识别过程中涉及的关键任务，包括识别、分割、呈现攻击检测和定位。最后，我们讨论虹膜识别的挑战和潜在发展。本文综述了基于深度学习的虹膜识别研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的虹膜识别技术的发展，总结了相关研究并分析了其挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统虹膜识别方法依赖特征工程且易受外部因素影响，而深度学习技术无需手动特征提取且性能优越，因此有必要系统梳理该领域研究进展。
AI.method: 收集120篇相关文献，总结虹膜识别的关键任务（如识别、分割、攻击检测等），分析常用数据集及技术发展趋势。
AI.result: 提供了基于深度学习的虹膜识别技术的全面综述，明确了当前研究的挑战（如小样本学习、跨模态匹配）及潜在发展方向。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了虹膜识别的准确性与鲁棒性，但仍需解决数据多样性、模型可解释性等关键问题以推动实际应用。

search_text: Deep Learning for Iris Recognition: A Review 虹膜识别深度学习：回顾 Iris recognition is a secure biometric technology known for its stability and privacy. With no two irises being identical and little change throughout a person's lifetime, iris recognition is considered more reliable and less susceptible to external factors than other biometric recognition methods. Unlike traditional machine learning-based iris recognition methods, deep learning technology does not rely on feature engineering and boasts excellent performance. This paper collects 120 relevant papers to summarize the development of iris recognition based on deep learning. We first introduce the background of iris recognition and the motivation and contribution of this survey. Then, we present the common datasets widely used in iris recognition. After that, we summarize the key tasks involved in the process of iris recognition based on deep learning technology, including identification, segmentation, presentation attack detection, and localization. Finally, we discuss the challenges and potential development of iris recognition. This review provides a comprehensive sight of the research of iris recognition based on deep learning. 虹膜识别是一种安全的生物识别技术，以其稳定性和隐私性而闻名。由于没有两个虹膜是相同的，并且在人的一生中变化很小，因此虹膜识别被认为比其他生物识别方法更可靠并且更不易受到外部因素的影响。与传统的基于机器学习的虹膜识别方法不同，深度学习技术不依赖特征工程，具有优异的性能。本文收集了120篇相关论文，总结了基于深度学习的虹膜识别的发展。我们首先介绍虹膜识别的背景以及本次调查的动机和贡献。然后，我们介绍了虹膜识别中广泛使用的常见数据集。之后，我们总结了基于深度学习技术的虹膜识别过程中涉及的关键任务，包括识别、分割、呈现攻击检测和定位。最后，我们讨论虹膜识别的挑战和潜在发展。本文综述了基于深度学习的虹膜识别研究。 本文综述了基于深度学习的虹膜识别技术的发展，总结了相关研究并分析了其挑战与未来方向。 Yimin Yin,Siliang He,Renye Zhang,Hongli Chang,Xu Han,Jinghua Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Sebastian Hafner,Stefanos Georganos,Theodomir Mugiraneza,Yifang Ban
title: Mapping Urban Population Growth from Sentinel-2 MSI and Census Data Using Deep Learning: A Case Study in Kigali, Rwanda
title_zh: 使用深度学习根据 Sentinel-2 MSI 和人口普查数据绘制城市人口增长图：卢旺达基加利的案例研究
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures, accepted for publication in the JURSE 2023 Proceedings
comments: 4 pages, 5 figures, accepted for publication in the JURSE 2023 Proceedings
abstract: To better understand current trends of urban population growth in Sub-Saharan Africa, high-quality spatiotemporal population estimates are necessary. While the joint use of remote sensing and deep learning has achieved promising results for population distribution estimation, most of the current work focuses on fine-scale spatial predictions derived from single date census, thereby neglecting temporal analyses. In this work, we focus on evaluating how deep learning change detection techniques can unravel temporal population dynamics at short intervals. Since Post-Classification Comparison (PCC) methods for change detection are known to propagate the error of the individual maps, we propose an end-to-end population growth mapping method. Specifically, a ResNet encoder, pretrained on a population mapping task with Sentinel-2 MSI data, was incorporated into a Siamese network. The Siamese network was trained at the census level to accurately predict population change. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated in Kigali, Rwanda, for the time period 2016-2020, using bi-temporal Sentinel-2 data. Compared to PCC, the Siamese network greatly reduced errors in population change predictions at the census level. These results show promise for future remote sensing-based population growth mapping endeavors.
summary: To better understand current trends of urban population growth in Sub-Saharan Africa, high-quality spatiotemporal population estimates are necessary. While the joint use of remote sensing and deep learning has achieved promising results for population distribution estimation, most of the current work focuses on fine-scale spatial predictions derived from single date census, thereby neglecting temporal analyses. In this work, we focus on evaluating how deep learning change detection techniques can unravel temporal population dynamics at short intervals. Since Post-Classification Comparison (PCC) methods for change detection are known to propagate the error of the individual maps, we propose an end-to-end population growth mapping method. Specifically, a ResNet encoder, pretrained on a population mapping task with Sentinel-2 MSI data, was incorporated into a Siamese network. The Siamese network was trained at the census level to accurately predict population change. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated in Kigali, Rwanda, for the time period 2016-2020, using bi-temporal Sentinel-2 data. Compared to PCC, the Siamese network greatly reduced errors in population change predictions at the census level. These results show promise for future remote sensing-based population growth mapping endeavors.
abstract_zh: 为了更好地了解撒哈拉以南非洲城市人口增长的当前趋势，高质量的时空人口估计是必要的。虽然遥感和深度学习的联合使用在人口分布估计方面取得了可喜的成果，但目前的大部分工作都集中在单一日期普查得出的精细空间预测上，从而忽略了时间分析。在这项工作中，我们重点评估深度学习变化检测技术如何在短时间内揭示时间群体动态。由于已知用于变化检测的分类后比较（PCC）方法会传播各个映射的误差，因此我们提出了一种端到端的群体增长映射方法。具体来说，使用 Sentinel-2 MSI 数据对人口映射任务进行预训练的 ResNet 编码器被合并到 Siamese 网络中。 Siamese 网络接受了人口普查级别的培训，以准确预测人口变化。使用双时态 Sentinel-2 数据在卢旺达基加利 2016-2020 年期间证明了所提出方法的有效性。与PCC相比，Siamese网络大大减少了人口普查层面人口变化预测的错误。这些结果为未来基于遥感的人口增长测绘工作带来了希望。

AI.tldr: 本文利用Sentinel-2多光谱数据和人口普查数据，结合深度学习方法，研究卢旺达基加利市2016-2020年人口增长的时空动态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单一时间点的人口分布预测，忽视了时间序列分析；传统后分类对比方法存在误差传播问题，需提出更精准的动态人口变化映射方法。
AI.method: 构建基于ResNet编码器的孪生网络，利用双时相Sentinel-2数据与人口普查数据进行端到端训练，实现人口变化的精准预测。
AI.result: 与传统方法相比，该方法在普查尺度上显著降低了人口变化预测误差，验证了模型在基加利地区的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为撒哈拉以南非洲地区基于遥感数据的人口增长动态分析提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: George C. Alexandropoulos,Dinh-Thuy Phan-Huy,Kostantinos D. Katsanos,Maurizio Crozzoli,Henk Wymeersch,Petar Popovski,Philippe Ratajczak,Yohann Bénédic,Marie-Helene Hamon,Sebastien Herraiz Gonzalez,Placido Mursia,Marco Rossanese,Vincenzo Sciancalepore,Jean-Baptiste Gros,Sergio Terranova,Gabriele Gradoni,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Moustafa Rahal,Benoit Denis,Raffaele D'Errico,Antonio Clemente,Emilio Calvanese Strinati
title: RIS-Enabled Smart Wireless Environments: Deployment Scenarios, Network Architecture, Bandwidth and Area of Influence
title_zh: 支持 RIS 的智能无线环境：部署场景、网络架构、带宽和影响区域
comment: 43 pages, 21 figures, sumbitted for a journal publication. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.13478
comments: 43 pages, 21 figures, sumbitted for a journal publication. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.13478
abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) constitute the key enabler for programmable electromagnetic propagation environments, and are lately being considered as a candidate physical-layer technology for the demanding connectivity, reliability, localization, and sustainability requirements of next generation wireless networks. In this paper, we first present the deployment scenarios for RIS-enabled smart wireless environments that have been recently designed within the ongoing European Union Horizon 2020 RISE-6G project, as well as a network architecture integrating RISs with existing standardized interfaces. We identify various RIS deployment strategies and sketch the core architectural requirements in terms of RIS control and signaling, depending on the RIS hardware architectures and respective capabilities. Furthermore, we introduce and discuss, with the aid of simulations and reflectarray measurements, two novel metrics that emerge in the context of RIS-empowered wireless systems: the RIS bandwidth and area of influence. Their extensive investigation corroborates the need for careful deployment and planning of the RIS technology in future networks.
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) constitute the key enabler for programmable electromagnetic propagation environments, and are lately being considered as a candidate physical-layer technology for the demanding connectivity, reliability, localization, and sustainability requirements of next generation wireless networks. In this paper, we first present the deployment scenarios for RIS-enabled smart wireless environments that have been recently designed within the ongoing European Union Horizon 2020 RISE-6G project, as well as a network architecture integrating RISs with existing standardized interfaces. We identify various RIS deployment strategies and sketch the core architectural requirements in terms of RIS control and signaling, depending on the RIS hardware architectures and respective capabilities. Furthermore, we introduce and discuss, with the aid of simulations and reflectarray measurements, two novel metrics that emerge in the context of RIS-empowered wireless systems: the RIS bandwidth and area of influence. Their extensive investigation corroborates the need for careful deployment and planning of the RIS technology in future networks.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面 (RIS) 是可编程电磁传播环境的关键推动者，最近被认为是满足下一代无线网络苛刻的连接性、可靠性、本地化和可持续性要求的候选物理层技术。在本文中，我们首先介绍了最近在正在进行的欧盟 Horizo​​n 2020 RISE-6G 项目中设计的支持 RIS 的智能无线环境的部署场景，以及将 RIS 与现有标准化接口集成的网络架构。我们确定了各种 RIS 部署策略，并根据 RIS 硬件架构和各自的功能，在 RIS 控制和信令方面勾勒出核心架构要求。此外，我们借助模拟和反射阵列测量，介绍并讨论了在 RIS 授权的无线系统背景下出现的两个新颖指标：RIS 带宽和影响区域。他们的广泛调查证实了在未来网络中仔细部署和规划 RIS 技术的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨可重构智能表面（RIS）在无线环境中的部署策略、网络架构设计，并提出衡量RIS性能的两个关键指标：带宽和影响区域。
AI.motivation: 下一代无线网络对连接性、可靠性、定位精度和可持续性提出更高要求，而RIS作为新型物理层技术，需通过系统化部署和规划实现其潜力。
AI.method: 结合欧盟RISE-6G项目成果，分析RIS部署场景与网络架构，通过仿真与反射阵列实测定义RIS带宽及影响区域指标，并验证其有效性。
AI.result: 证实RIS带宽和影响区域是影响网络性能的核心参数，需根据硬件架构和部署场景进行精细化规划，以实现最优通信效果。
AI.conclusion: RIS技术需通过科学部署和动态规划实现其价值，提出的两个指标为未来智能无线网络设计提供了理论依据和实践指导。

search_text: RIS-Enabled Smart Wireless Environments: Deployment Scenarios, Network Architecture, Bandwidth and Area of Influence 支持 RIS 的智能无线环境：部署场景、网络架构、带宽和影响区域 Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) constitute the key enabler for programmable electromagnetic propagation environments, and are lately being considered as a candidate physical-layer technology for the demanding connectivity, reliability, localization, and sustainability requirements of next generation wireless networks. In this paper, we first present the deployment scenarios for RIS-enabled smart wireless environments that have been recently designed within the ongoing European Union Horizon 2020 RISE-6G project, as well as a network architecture integrating RISs with existing standardized interfaces. We identify various RIS deployment strategies and sketch the core architectural requirements in terms of RIS control and signaling, depending on the RIS hardware architectures and respective capabilities. Furthermore, we introduce and discuss, with the aid of simulations and reflectarray measurements, two novel metrics that emerge in the context of RIS-empowered wireless systems: the RIS bandwidth and area of influence. Their extensive investigation corroborates the need for careful deployment and planning of the RIS technology in future networks. 可重构智能表面 (RIS) 是可编程电磁传播环境的关键推动者，最近被认为是满足下一代无线网络苛刻的连接性、可靠性、本地化和可持续性要求的候选物理层技术。在本文中，我们首先介绍了最近在正在进行的欧盟 Horizo​​n 2020 RISE-6G 项目中设计的支持 RIS 的智能无线环境的部署场景，以及将 RIS 与现有标准化接口集成的网络架构。我们确定了各种 RIS 部署策略，并根据 RIS 硬件架构和各自的功能，在 RIS 控制和信令方面勾勒出核心架构要求。此外，我们借助模拟和反射阵列测量，介绍并讨论了在 RIS 授权的无线系统背景下出现的两个新颖指标：RIS 带宽和影响区域。他们的广泛调查证实了在未来网络中仔细部署和规划 RIS 技术的必要性。 本文旨在探讨可重构智能表面（RIS）在无线环境中的部署策略、网络架构设计，并提出衡量RIS性能的两个关键指标：带宽和影响区域。 George C.
