Katsanos,Maurizio Crozzoli,Henk Wymeersch,Petar Popovski,Philippe Ratajczak,Yohann Bénédic,Marie-Helene Hamon,Sebastien Herraiz Gonzalez,Placido Mursia,Marco Rossanese,Vincenzo Sciancalepore,Jean-Baptiste Gros,Sergio Terranova,Gabriele Gradoni,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Moustafa Rahal,Benoit Denis,Raffaele D'Errico,Antonio Clemente,Emilio Calvanese Strinati cs.IT,cs.ET

authors_text: Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie
title: The Devil's Advocate: Shattering the Illusion of Unexploitable Data using Diffusion Models
title_zh: 魔鬼代言人：使用扩散模型打破不可利用数据的幻想
comment: Accepted to the 2024 IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SatML)
comments: Accepted to the 2024 IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SatML)
abstract: Protecting personal data against exploitation of machine learning models is crucial. Recently, availability attacks have shown great promise to provide an extra layer of protection against the unauthorized use of data to train neural networks. These methods aim to add imperceptible noise to clean data so that the neural networks cannot extract meaningful patterns from the protected data, claiming that they can make personal data "unexploitable." This paper provides a strong countermeasure against such approaches, showing that unexploitable data might only be an illusion. In particular, we leverage the power of diffusion models and show that a carefully designed denoising process can counteract the effectiveness of the data-protecting perturbations. We rigorously analyze our algorithm, and theoretically prove that the amount of required denoising is directly related to the magnitude of the data-protecting perturbations. Our approach, called AVATAR, delivers state-of-the-art performance against a suite of recent availability attacks in various scenarios, outperforming adversarial training even under distribution mismatch between the diffusion model and the protected data. Our findings call for more research into making personal data unexploitable, showing that this goal is far from over. Our implementation is available at this repository: https://github.com/hmdolatabadi/AVATAR.
summary: Protecting personal data against exploitation of machine learning models is crucial. Recently, availability attacks have shown great promise to provide an extra layer of protection against the unauthorized use of data to train neural networks. These methods aim to add imperceptible noise to clean data so that the neural networks cannot extract meaningful patterns from the protected data, claiming that they can make personal data "unexploitable." This paper provides a strong countermeasure against such approaches, showing that unexploitable data might only be an illusion. In particular, we leverage the power of diffusion models and show that a carefully designed denoising process can counteract the effectiveness of the data-protecting perturbations. We rigorously analyze our algorithm, and theoretically prove that the amount of required denoising is directly related to the magnitude of the data-protecting perturbations. Our approach, called AVATAR, delivers state-of-the-art performance against a suite of recent availability attacks in various scenarios, outperforming adversarial training even under distribution mismatch between the diffusion model and the protected data. Our findings call for more research into making personal data unexploitable, showing that this goal is far from over. Our implementation is available at this repository: https://github.com/hmdolatabadi/AVATAR.
abstract_zh: 保护个人数据免遭机器学习模型的利用至关重要。最近，可用性攻击已显示出巨大的前景，可以提供额外的保护层，防止未经授权使用数据来训练神经网络。这些方法旨在向干净的数据添加难以察觉的噪音，以便神经网络无法从受保护的数据中提取有意义的模式，声称它们可以使个人数据“无法利用”。本文针对此类方法提供了强有力的对策，表明不可利用的数据可能只是一种幻觉。特别是，我们利用扩散模型的力量，并表明精心设计的去噪过程可以抵消数据保护扰动的有效性。我们严格分析我们的算法，并从理论上证明所需的去噪量与数据保护扰动的幅度直接相关。我们的方法称为 AVATAR，针对各种场景中的一系列最近的可用性攻击提供了最先进的性能，即使在扩散模型和受保护数据之间的分布不匹配的情况下，其性能也优于对抗性训练。我们的研究结果要求进行更多研究，以防止个人数据被利用，这表明这一目标还远未结束。我们的实现可以在这个存储库中找到：https://github.com/hmdolatabadi/AVATAR。

AI.tldr: 本文通过扩散模型揭示数据保护方法的局限性，提出名为AVATAR的算法以消除数据保护扰动，证明所谓'不可利用数据'可能仅为幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有数据保护方法通过添加噪声使数据'不可利用'，但作者质疑其有效性，主张需进一步研究真正实现数据不可利用的方案。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型设计去噪过程，理论证明所需去噪量与数据保护扰动幅度直接相关，并开发出名为AVATAR的算法。
AI.result: AVATAR在多种场景下优于现有方法，即使在扩散模型与保护数据分布不匹配时仍表现优异，验证了数据保护扰动可被有效对抗。
AI.conclusion: 所谓'不可利用数据'的实现仍面临挑战，需更多研究探索更有效的数据保护机制。

authors_text: Lei Yang,Kaicheng Yu,Tao Tang,Jun Li,Kun Yuan,Li Wang,Xinyu Zhang,Peng Chen
title: BEVHeight: A Robust Framework for Vision-based Roadside 3D Object Detection
title_zh: BEVHeight：基于视觉的路边 3D 物体检测的稳健框架
abstract: While most recent autonomous driving system focuses on developing perception methods on ego-vehicle sensors, people tend to overlook an alternative approach to leverage intelligent roadside cameras to extend the perception ability beyond the visual range. We discover that the state-of-the-art vision-centric bird's eye view detection methods have inferior performances on roadside cameras. This is because these methods mainly focus on recovering the depth regarding the camera center, where the depth difference between the car and the ground quickly shrinks while the distance increases. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach, dubbed BEVHeight, to address this issue. In essence, instead of predicting the pixel-wise depth, we regress the height to the ground to achieve a distance-agnostic formulation to ease the optimization process of camera-only perception methods. On popular 3D detection benchmarks of roadside cameras, our method surpasses all previous vision-centric methods by a significant margin. The code is available at {\url{https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVHeight}}.
summary: While most recent autonomous driving system focuses on developing perception methods on ego-vehicle sensors, people tend to overlook an alternative approach to leverage intelligent roadside cameras to extend the perception ability beyond the visual range. We discover that the state-of-the-art vision-centric bird's eye view detection methods have inferior performances on roadside cameras. This is because these methods mainly focus on recovering the depth regarding the camera center, where the depth difference between the car and the ground quickly shrinks while the distance increases. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach, dubbed BEVHeight, to address this issue. In essence, instead of predicting the pixel-wise depth, we regress the height to the ground to achieve a distance-agnostic formulation to ease the optimization process of camera-only perception methods. On popular 3D detection benchmarks of roadside cameras, our method surpasses all previous vision-centric methods by a significant margin. The code is available at {\url{https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVHeight}}.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的自动驾驶系统专注于开发自动车辆传感器的感知方法，但人们往往忽视了利用智能路边摄像头将感知能力扩展到视觉范围之外的替代方法。我们发现最先进的以视觉为中心的鸟瞰检测方法在路边摄像机上的性能较差。这是因为这些方法主要侧重于恢复相机中心的深度，随着距离的增加，汽车和地面之间的深度差迅速缩小。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 BEVHeight，来解决这个问题。本质上，我们不是预测像素深度，而是回归到地面的高度，以实现与距离无关的公式，从而简化仅相机感知方法的优化过程。在流行的路边摄像头 3D 检测基准上，我们的方法大幅超越了之前所有以视觉为中心的方法。该代码可在 {\url{https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVHeight}} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEVHeight框架，通过回归地面高度而非像素级深度，解决基于路边摄像头的3D目标检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的鸟瞰图检测方法在路边摄像头场景中表现不佳，因其依赖摄像头中心的深度估计，而随距离增加深度差异迅速缩小。
AI.method: BEVHeight通过回归物体到地面的高度而非像素级深度，实现与距离无关的优化公式，简化单摄像头感知方法的训练过程。
AI.result: 在主流路边摄像头3D检测基准测试中，该方法显著优于所有先前基于视觉的方法。
AI.conclusion: BEVHeight通过高度回归有效解决了路边摄像头场景下的深度估计问题，为单摄像头3D目标检测提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有基于视觉的鸟瞰图检测方法在路边摄像头场景中表现不佳，因其依赖摄像头中心的深度估计，而随距离增加深度差异迅速缩小。
method: BEVHeight通过回归物体到地面的高度而非像素级深度，实现与距离无关的优化公式，简化单摄像头感知方法的训练过程。
result: 在主流路边摄像头3D检测基准测试中，该方法显著优于所有先前基于视觉的方法。
conclusion: BEVHeight通过高度回归有效解决了路边摄像头场景下的深度估计问题，为单摄像头3D目标检测提供了新思路。
search_text: BEVHeight: A Robust Framework for Vision-based Roadside 3D Object Detection BEVHeight：基于视觉的路边 3D 物体检测的稳健框架 While most recent autonomous driving system focuses on developing perception methods on ego-vehicle sensors, people tend to overlook an alternative approach to leverage intelligent roadside cameras to extend the perception ability beyond the visual range. We discover that the state-of-the-art vision-centric bird's eye view detection methods have inferior performances on roadside cameras. This is because these methods mainly focus on recovering the depth regarding the camera center, where the depth difference between the car and the ground quickly shrinks while the distance increases. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach, dubbed BEVHeight, to address this issue. In essence, instead of predicting the pixel-wise depth, we regress the height to the ground to achieve a distance-agnostic formulation to ease the optimization process of camera-only perception methods. On popular 3D detection benchmarks of roadside cameras, our method surpasses all previous vision-centric methods by a significant margin. The code is available at {\url{https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVHeight}}. 虽然最近的自动驾驶系统专注于开发自动车辆传感器的感知方法，但人们往往忽视了利用智能路边摄像头将感知能力扩展到视觉范围之外的替代方法。我们发现最先进的以视觉为中心的鸟瞰检测方法在路边摄像机上的性能较差。这是因为这些方法主要侧重于恢复相机中心的深度，随着距离的增加，汽车和地面之间的深度差迅速缩小。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 BEVHeight，来解决这个问题。本质上，我们不是预测像素深度，而是回归到地面的高度，以实现与距离无关的公式，从而简化仅相机感知方法的优化过程。在流行的路边摄像头 3D 检测基准上，我们的方法大幅超越了之前所有以视觉为中心的方法。该代码可在 {\url{https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/BEVHeight}} 获取。 本文提出BEVHeight框架，通过回归地面高度而非像素级深度，解决基于路边摄像头的3D目标检测问题。 Lei Yang,Kaicheng Yu,Tao Tang,Jun Li,Kun Yuan,Li Wang,Xinyu Zhang,Peng Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Chih-Chung Hsu,Chih-Yu Jian,Chia-Ming Lee,Chi-Han Tsai,Sheng-Chieh Dai
title: Strong Baseline and Bag of Tricks for COVID-19 Detection of CT Scans
title_zh: CT 扫描检测 COVID-19 的强大基线和技巧
comment: technical report. Keywords: Spatial-Slice correlation, COVID-19 classification, convolutional neural networks, computed tomography
comments: technical report. Keywords: Spatial-Slice correlation, COVID-19 classification, convolutional neural networks, computed tomography
abstract: This paper investigates the application of deep learning models for lung Computed Tomography (CT) image analysis. Traditional deep learning frameworks encounter compatibility issues due to variations in slice numbers and resolutions in CT images, which stem from the use of different machines. Commonly, individual slices are predicted and subsequently merged to obtain the final result; however, this approach lacks slice-wise feature learning and consequently results in decreased performance. We propose a novel slice selection method for each CT dataset to address this limitation, effectively filtering out uncertain slices and enhancing the model's performance. Furthermore, we introduce a spatial-slice feature learning (SSFL) technique\cite{hsu2022} that employs a conventional and efficient backbone model for slice feature training, followed by extracting one-dimensional data from the trained model for COVID and non-COVID classification using a dedicated classification model. Leveraging these experimental steps, we integrate one-dimensional features with multiple slices for channel merging and employ a 2D convolutional neural network (CNN) model for classification. In addition to the aforementioned methods, we explore various high-performance classification models, ultimately achieving promising results.
summary: This paper investigates the application of deep learning models for lung Computed Tomography (CT) image analysis. Traditional deep learning frameworks encounter compatibility issues due to variations in slice numbers and resolutions in CT images, which stem from the use of different machines. Commonly, individual slices are predicted and subsequently merged to obtain the final result; however, this approach lacks slice-wise feature learning and consequently results in decreased performance. We propose a novel slice selection method for each CT dataset to address this limitation, effectively filtering out uncertain slices and enhancing the model's performance. Furthermore, we introduce a spatial-slice feature learning (SSFL) technique\cite{hsu2022} that employs a conventional and efficient backbone model for slice feature training, followed by extracting one-dimensional data from the trained model for COVID and non-COVID classification using a dedicated classification model. Leveraging these experimental steps, we integrate one-dimensional features with multiple slices for channel merging and employ a 2D convolutional neural network (CNN) model for classification. In addition to the aforementioned methods, we explore various high-performance classification models, ultimately achieving promising results.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了深度学习模型在肺部计算机断层扫描（CT）图像分析中的应用。由于使用不同的机器，导致 CT 图像的切片数量和分辨率存在差异，传统深度学习框架会遇到兼容性问题。通常，对各个切片进行预测并随后合并以获得最终结果；然而，这种方法缺乏切片特征学习，因此导致性能下降。我们为每个 CT 数据集提出了一种新颖的切片选择方法来解决这一限制，有效过滤掉不确定的切片并增强模型的性能。此外，我们引入了一种空间切片特征学习（SSFL）技术\cite{hsu2022}，该技术采用传统且高效的骨干模型进行切片特征训练，然后使用专用分类模型从训练后的模型中提取一维数据以进行新冠肺炎和非新冠肺炎分类。利用这些实验步骤，我们将一维特征与多个切片集成以进行通道合并，并采用 2D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型进行分类。除了上述方法之外，我们还探索了各种高性能分类模型，最终取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度学习模型在肺部CT图像分析中的应用，提出了一种改进的切片选择方法和空间-切片特征学习技术以提高COVID-19检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习框架因CT图像切片数量和分辨率差异导致兼容性问题，且现有方法缺乏切片级特征学习，影响检测效果。
AI.method: 提出切片筛选方法过滤不确定切片，并引入空间-切片特征学习（SSFL）技术，结合1D特征提取与2D CNN分类模型进行多切片特征融合。
AI.result: 通过实验验证，所提方法在COVID-19分类任务中取得有竞争力的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 改进的切片处理与特征学习方法有效解决了CT图像异质性问题，为CT扫描的COVID-19检测提供了更优的基准方案。

authors_text: Hilde Weerts,Florian Pfisterer,Matthias Feurer,Katharina Eggensperger,Edward Bergman,Noor Awad,Joaquin Vanschoren,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Bernd Bischl,Frank Hutter
title: Can Fairness be Automated? Guidelines and Opportunities for Fairness-aware AutoML
title_zh: 公平可以自动化吗？公平感知 AutoML 的指南和机会
abstract: The field of automated machine learning (AutoML) introduces techniques that automate parts of the development of machine learning (ML) systems, accelerating the process and reducing barriers for novices. However, decisions derived from ML models can reproduce, amplify, or even introduce unfairness in our societies, causing harm to (groups of) individuals. In response, researchers have started to propose AutoML systems that jointly optimize fairness and predictive performance to mitigate fairness-related harm. However, fairness is a complex and inherently interdisciplinary subject, and solely posing it as an optimization problem can have adverse side effects. With this work, we aim to raise awareness among developers of AutoML systems about such limitations of fairness-aware AutoML, while also calling attention to the potential of AutoML as a tool for fairness research. We present a comprehensive overview of different ways in which fairness-related harm can arise and the ensuing implications for the design of fairness-aware AutoML. We conclude that while fairness cannot be automated, fairness-aware AutoML can play an important role in the toolbox of ML practitioners. We highlight several open technical challenges for future work in this direction. Additionally, we advocate for the creation of more user-centered assistive systems designed to tackle challenges encountered in fairness work
summary: The field of automated machine learning (AutoML) introduces techniques that automate parts of the development of machine learning (ML) systems, accelerating the process and reducing barriers for novices. However, decisions derived from ML models can reproduce, amplify, or even introduce unfairness in our societies, causing harm to (groups of) individuals. In response, researchers have started to propose AutoML systems that jointly optimize fairness and predictive performance to mitigate fairness-related harm. However, fairness is a complex and inherently interdisciplinary subject, and solely posing it as an optimization problem can have adverse side effects. With this work, we aim to raise awareness among developers of AutoML systems about such limitations of fairness-aware AutoML, while also calling attention to the potential of AutoML as a tool for fairness research. We present a comprehensive overview of different ways in which fairness-related harm can arise and the ensuing implications for the design of fairness-aware AutoML. We conclude that while fairness cannot be automated, fairness-aware AutoML can play an important role in the toolbox of ML practitioners. We highlight several open technical challenges for future work in this direction. Additionally, we advocate for the creation of more user-centered assistive systems designed to tackle challenges encountered in fairness work
abstract_zh: 自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 领域引入了一些技术，可自动完成机器学习 (ML) 系统开发的各个部分，从而加快流程并减少新手的障碍。然而，来自机器学习模型的决策可能会重现、放大甚至在我们的社会中引入不公平现象，从而对个人（群体）造成伤害。作为回应，研究人员已开始提出 AutoML 系统，联合优化公平性和预测性能，以减轻与公平性相关的损害。然而，公平是一个复杂且本质上是跨学科的主题，仅仅将其视为优化问题可能会产生不利的副作用。通过这项工作，我们的目标是提高 AutoML 系统开发人员对公平感知 AutoML 的局限性的认识，同时也呼吁人们关注 AutoML 作为公平性研究工具的潜力。我们全面概述了可能产生与公平相关的损害的不同方式，以及随之而来的对公平感知 AutoML 设计的影响。我们的结论是，虽然公平性无法自动化，但具有公平意识的 AutoML 可以在 ML 从业者的工具箱中发挥重要作用。我们强调了这个方向未来工作的几个开放的技术挑战。此外，我们主张创建更多以用户为中心的辅助系统，旨在应对公平工作中遇到的挑战

AI.tldr: 探讨公平性是否可被自动化，并提出公平性感知的AutoML指南与研究机会。
AI.motivation: ML模型可能加剧社会不公平，现有AutoML系统需兼顾公平性与性能，但公平性作为复杂问题需避免简单优化。
AI.method: 综述公平性危害来源及其对公平性感知AutoML设计的影响，分析技术挑战与未来方向。
AI.result: 公平性无法完全自动化，但公平性感知的AutoML可作为工具，需更多用户中心系统应对挑战。
AI.conclusion: 公平性不可自动化，但AutoML可辅助公平性研究，需关注技术挑战与用户需求。

authors_text: Guoqiang Jin,Fan Yang,Mingshan Sun,Ruyi Zhao,Yakun Liu,Wei Li,Tianpeng Bao,Liwei Wu,Xingyu Zeng,Rui Zhao
title: SeqCo-DETR: Sequence Consistency Training for Self-Supervised Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: SeqCo-DETR：使用 Transformer 进行自监督目标检测的序列一致性训练
abstract: Self-supervised pre-training and transformer-based networks have significantly improved the performance of object detection. However, most of the current self-supervised object detection methods are built on convolutional-based architectures. We believe that the transformers' sequence characteristics should be considered when designing a transformer-based self-supervised method for the object detection task. To this end, we propose SeqCo-DETR, a novel Sequence Consistency-based self-supervised method for object DEtection with TRansformers. SeqCo-DETR defines a simple but effective pretext by minimizes the discrepancy of the output sequences of transformers with different image views as input and leverages bipartite matching to find the most relevant sequence pairs to improve the sequence-level self-supervised representation learning performance. Furthermore, we provide a mask-based augmentation strategy incorporated with the sequence consistency strategy to extract more representative contextual information about the object for the object detection task. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on MS COCO (45.8 AP) and PASCAL VOC (64.1 AP), demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.

However, most of the current self-supervised object detection methods are built on convolutional-based architectures. We believe that the transformers' sequence characteristics should be considered when designing a transformer-based self-supervised method for the object detection task. To this end, we propose SeqCo-DETR, a novel Sequence Consistency-based self-supervised method for object DEtection with TRansformers. SeqCo-DETR defines a simple but effective pretext by minimizes the discrepancy of the output sequences of transformers with different image views as input and leverages bipartite matching to find the most relevant sequence pairs to improve the sequence-level self-supervised representation learning performance. Furthermore, we provide a mask-based augmentation strategy incorporated with the sequence consistency strategy to extract more representative contextual information about the object for the object detection task. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on MS COCO (45.8 AP) and PASCAL VOC (64.1 AP), demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 自监督预训练和基于变压器的网络显着提高了目标检测的性能。然而，当前大多数自监督目标检测方法都是建立在基于卷积的架构之上的。我们认为，在为目标检测任务设计基于变压器的自监督方法时，应该考虑变压器的序列特征。为此，我们提出了 SeqCo-DETR，一种新颖的基于序列一致性的自监督方法，用于使用 TRansformers 进行对象检测。 SeqCo-DETR 定义了一个简单但有效的借口，通过最小化具有不同图像视图作为输入的 Transformer 输出序列的差异，并利用二分匹配来找到最相关的序列对，以提高序列级自监督表示学习性能。此外，我们提供了一种基于掩模的增强策略，与序列一致性策略相结合，以提取有关对象检测任务的更具代表性的上下文信息。我们的方法在 MS COCO (45.8 AP) 和 PASCAL VOC (64.1 AP) 上取得了最先进的结果，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeqCo-DETR，一种基于序列一致性训练的自监督目标检测方法，利用Transformer架构提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督目标检测方法多基于卷积网络，未充分利用Transformer的序列特性，需设计针对性的自监督方案以挖掘序列级表征能力。
AI.method: 通过最小化不同图像视图下Transformer输出序列的差异，结合二分图匹配寻找相关序列对，并引入掩码增强策略提取上下文信息。
AI.result: 在MS COCO上达到45.8 AP，在PASCAL VOC上达到64.1 AP，均取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 序列一致性训练与掩码增强策略有效提升了Transformer在自监督目标检测中的表征学习能力。

authors_text: Maximo Cobos,Mirco Pezzoli,Fabio Antonacci,Augusto Sarti
title: Acoustic source localization in the spherical harmonics domain exploiting low-rank approximations
title_zh: 利用低阶近似在球谐域中进行声源定位
abstract: Acoustic signal processing in the spherical harmonics domain (SHD) is an active research area that exploits the signals acquired by higher order microphone arrays. A very important task is that concerning the localization of active sound sources. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to localize prominent acoustic sources in adverse acoustic scenarios. By using a proper normalization and arrangement of the estimated spherical harmonic coefficients, we exploit low-rank approximations to estimate the far field modal directional pattern of the dominant source at each time-frame. The experiments confirm the validity of the proposed approach, with superior performance compared to other recent SHD-based approaches.
summary: Acoustic signal processing in the spherical harmonics domain (SHD) is an active research area that exploits the signals acquired by higher order microphone arrays. A very important task is that concerning the localization of active sound sources. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to localize prominent acoustic sources in adverse acoustic scenarios. By using a proper normalization and arrangement of the estimated spherical harmonic coefficients, we exploit low-rank approximations to estimate the far field modal directional pattern of the dominant source at each time-frame. The experiments confirm the validity of the proposed approach, with superior performance compared to other recent SHD-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 球谐域 (SHD) 中的声学信号处理是一个活跃的研究领域，它利用高阶麦克风阵列采集的信号。一项非常重要的任务是主动声源的定位。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来定位不利声学场景中的突出声源。通过使用估计的球谐系数的适当归一化和排列，我们利用低秩近似来估计每个时间帧的主源的远场模态方向图。实验证实了所提出方法的有效性，与其他最近基于 SHD 的方法相比，具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于球面谐波域和低秩近似的声源定位方法，用于在复杂声学环境中有效识别主导声源。
AI.motivation: 球面谐波域声学信号处理在高阶麦克风阵列中具有重要应用，但现有方法在恶劣声学场景下定位性能不足，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过归一化处理估计的球面谐波系数，并利用低秩近似技术，逐帧提取远场模态方向模式以定位主导声源。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定位精度上优于其他基于球面谐波域的最新算法，尤其在噪声和混响环境中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 低秩近似方法有效提升了球面谐波域声源定位的鲁棒性，为复杂声学场景下的应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xingyu Zhao,Simos Gerasimou,Radu Calinescu,Calum Imrie,Valentin Robu,David Flynn
title: Bayesian Learning for the Robust Verification of Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 用于自主机器人稳健验证的贝叶斯学习
abstract: Autonomous robots used in infrastructure inspection, space exploration and other critical missions operate in highly dynamic environments. As such, they must continually verify their ability to complete the tasks associated with these missions safely and effectively. Here we present a Bayesian learning framework that enables this runtime verification of autonomous robots. The framework uses prior knowledge and observations of the verified robot to learn expected ranges for the occurrence rates of regular and singular (e.g., catastrophic failure) events. Interval continuous-time Markov models defined using these ranges are then analysed to obtain expected intervals of variation for system properties such as mission duration and success probability. We apply the framework to an autonomous robotic mission for underwater infrastructure inspection and repair. The formal proofs and experiments presented in the paper show that our framework produces results that reflect the uncertainty intrinsic to many real-world systems, enabling the robust verification of their quantitative properties under parametric uncertainty.
summary: Autonomous robots used in infrastructure inspection, space exploration and other critical missions operate in highly dynamic environments. As such, they must continually verify their ability to complete the tasks associated with these missions safely and effectively. Here we present a Bayesian learning framework that enables this runtime verification of autonomous robots. The framework uses prior knowledge and observations of the verified robot to learn expected ranges for the occurrence rates of regular and singular (e.g., catastrophic failure) events. Interval continuous-time Markov models defined using these ranges are then analysed to obtain expected intervals of variation for system properties such as mission duration and success probability. We apply the framework to an autonomous robotic mission for underwater infrastructure inspection and repair. The formal proofs and experiments presented in the paper show that our framework produces results that reflect the uncertainty intrinsic to many real-world systems, enabling the robust verification of their quantitative properties under parametric uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 用于基础设施检查、太空探索和其他关键任务的自主机器人在高度动态的环境中运行。因此，他们必须不断验证自己安全有效地完成与这些任务相关的任务的能力。在这里，我们提出了一个贝叶斯学习框架，可以实现自主机器人的运行时验证。该框架使用先验知识和对经过验证的机器人的观察来学习常规和奇异（例如灾难性故障）事件发生率的预期范围。然后分析使用这些范围定义的间隔连续时间马尔可夫模型，以获得系统属性（例如任务持续时间和成功概率）的预期变化间隔。我们将该框架应用于水下基础设施检查和维修的自主机器人任务。论文中提出的形式证明和实验表明，我们的框架产生的结果反映了许多现实世界系统固有的不确定性，从而能够在参数不确定性下对其定量属性进行稳健验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯学习框架，用于自主机器人在动态环境中的鲁棒验证，通过学习事件发生率范围并构建马尔可夫模型分析系统属性。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人在关键任务中需持续验证其安全性和有效性，但现有方法难以应对动态环境中的不确定性及参数波动带来的挑战。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯学习，结合先验知识与观测数据学习事件发生率区间，构建区间连续时间马尔可夫模型，分析任务持续时间、成功率等系统属性的预期变化范围。
AI.result: 框架在水下基础设施检测任务中验证有效，能准确反映现实系统的不确定性，实现参数不确定条件下的定量属性鲁棒验证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自主机器人提供了处理动态环境不确定性的有效方法，通过理论证明与实验验证，证明其在关键任务中的可靠性和实用性。

result: 框架在水下基础设施检测任务中验证有效，能准确反映现实系统的不确定性，实现参数不确定条件下的定量属性鲁棒验证。
conclusion: 该框架为自主机器人提供了处理动态环境不确定性的有效方法，通过理论证明与实验验证，证明其在关键任务中的可靠性和实用性。
search_text: Bayesian Learning for the Robust Verification of Autonomous Robots 用于自主机器人稳健验证的贝叶斯学习 Autonomous robots used in infrastructure inspection, space exploration and other critical missions operate in highly dynamic environments. As such, they must continually verify their ability to complete the tasks associated with these missions safely and effectively. Here we present a Bayesian learning framework that enables this runtime verification of autonomous robots. The framework uses prior knowledge and observations of the verified robot to learn expected ranges for the occurrence rates of regular and singular (e.g., catastrophic failure) events. Interval continuous-time Markov models defined using these ranges are then analysed to obtain expected intervals of variation for system properties such as mission duration and success probability. We apply the framework to an autonomous robotic mission for underwater infrastructure inspection and repair. The formal proofs and experiments presented in the paper show that our framework produces results that reflect the uncertainty intrinsic to many real-world systems, enabling the robust verification of their quantitative properties under parametric uncertainty. 用于基础设施检查、太空探索和其他关键任务的自主机器人在高度动态的环境中运行。因此，他们必须不断验证自己安全有效地完成与这些任务相关的任务的能力。在这里，我们提出了一个贝叶斯学习框架，可以实现自主机器人的运行时验证。该框架使用先验知识和对经过验证的机器人的观察来学习常规和奇异（例如灾难性故障）事件发生率的预期范围。然后分析使用这些范围定义的间隔连续时间马尔可夫模型，以获得系统属性（例如任务持续时间和成功概率）的预期变化间隔。我们将该框架应用于水下基础设施检查和维修的自主机器人任务。论文中提出的形式证明和实验表明，我们的框架产生的结果反映了许多现实世界系统固有的不确定性，从而能够在参数不确定性下对其定量属性进行稳健验证。 本文提出一种贝叶斯学习框架，用于自主机器人在动态环境中的鲁棒验证，通过学习事件发生率范围并构建马尔可夫模型分析系统属性。 Xingyu Zhao,Simos Gerasimou,Radu Calinescu,Calum Imrie,Valentin Robu,David Flynn cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Runyang Feng,Yixing Gao,Xueqing Ma,Tze Ho Elden Tse,Hyung Jin Chang
title: Mutual Information-Based Temporal Difference Learning for Human Pose Estimation in Video
title_zh: 基于互信息的时间差分学习用于视频中的人体姿势估计
comment: This paper is accepted to CVPR 2023
comments: This paper is accepted to CVPR 2023
abstract: Temporal modeling is crucial for multi-frame human pose estimation. Most existing methods directly employ optical flow or deformable convolution to predict full-spectrum motion fields, which might incur numerous irrelevant cues, such as a nearby person or background. Without further efforts to excavate meaningful motion priors, their results are suboptimal, especially in complicated spatiotemporal interactions. On the other hand, the temporal difference has the ability to encode representative motion information which can potentially be valuable for pose estimation but has not been fully exploited. In this paper, we present a novel multi-frame human pose estimation framework, which employs temporal differences across frames to model dynamic contexts and engages mutual information objectively to facilitate useful motion information disentanglement. To be specific, we design a multi-stage Temporal Difference Encoder that performs incremental cascaded learning conditioned on multi-stage feature difference sequences to derive informative motion representation. We further propose a Representation Disentanglement module from the mutual information perspective, which can grasp discriminative task-relevant motion signals by explicitly defining useful and noisy constituents of the raw motion features and minimizing their mutual information. These place us to rank No.1 in the Crowd Pose Estimation in Complex Events Challenge on benchmark dataset HiEve, and achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmarks PoseTrack2017, PoseTrack2018, and PoseTrack21.
summary: Temporal modeling is crucial for multi-frame human pose estimation. Most existing methods directly employ optical flow or deformable convolution to predict full-spectrum motion fields, which might incur numerous irrelevant cues, such as a nearby person or background. Without further efforts to excavate meaningful motion priors, their results are suboptimal, especially in complicated spatiotemporal interactions. On the other hand, the temporal difference has the ability to encode representative motion information which can potentially be valuable for pose estimation but has not been fully exploited. In this paper, we present a novel multi-frame human pose estimation framework, which employs temporal differences across frames to model dynamic contexts and engages mutual information objectively to facilitate useful motion information disentanglement. To be specific, we design a multi-stage Temporal Difference Encoder that performs incremental cascaded learning conditioned on multi-stage feature difference sequences to derive informative motion representation. We further propose a Representation Disentanglement module from the mutual information perspective, which can grasp discriminative task-relevant motion signals by explicitly defining useful and noisy constituents of the raw motion features and minimizing their mutual information. These place us to rank No.1 in the Crowd Pose Estimation in Complex Events Challenge on benchmark dataset HiEve, and achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmarks PoseTrack2017, PoseTrack2018, and PoseTrack21.
abstract_zh: 时间建模对于多帧人体姿势估计至关重要。大多数现有方法直接采用光流或可变形卷积来预测全谱运动场，这可能会产生许多不相关的线索，例如附近的人或背景。如果不进一步努力挖掘有意义的运动先验，它们的结果就不是最优的，特别是在复杂的时空相互作用中。另一方面，时间差异能够对代表性运动信息进行编码，这对于姿态估计可能有价值，但尚未得到充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多帧人体姿势估计框架，该框架利用帧之间的时间差异来建模动态上下文，并客观地利用相互信息来促进有用的运动信息解开。具体来说，我们设计了一个多级时间差分编码器，它以多级特征差异序列为条件执行增量级联学习，以获得信息丰富的运动表示。我们进一步从互信息的角度提出了表示解缠模块，它可以通过明确定义原始运动特征的有用和噪声成分并最小化它们的互信息来掌握判别性的任务相关运动信号。这些使我们在基准数据集 HiEve 上的复杂事件挑战人群姿势估计中排名第一，并在三个基准 PoseTrack2017、PoseTrack2018 和 PoseTrack21 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于互信息的时序差分学习框架，用于视频中的人体姿态估计，通过建模动态上下文和分离有用运动信息提升复杂场景下的估计效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖光流或可变形卷积预测运动场，但会引入背景或无关人物等冗余信息，导致复杂时空交互下姿态估计效果不佳。时序差分虽能编码代表性运动信息，但未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计多阶段时序差分编码器，通过级联学习多阶段特征差分序列提取运动表征；提出基于互信息的表示解耦模块，通过显式定义原始运动特征中的有用与噪声成分并最小化其互信息，分离判别性运动信号。
AI.result: 在HiEve数据集的Crowd Pose Estimation挑战中排名第一，并在PoseTrack2017/2018/21三个基准测试中达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序差分建模与互信息驱动的表示解耦，有效提升了复杂场景下视频人体姿态估计的准确性，验证了方法在处理冗余运动信息和捕捉动态上下文方面的优势。

authors_text: Artem Savkin,Rachid Ellouze,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: Unsupervised Traffic Scene Generation with Synthetic 3D Scene Graphs
title_zh: 使用合成 3D 场景图生成无监督交通场景
abstract: Image synthesis driven by computer graphics achieved recently a remarkable realism, yet synthetic image data generated this way reveals a significant domain gap with respect to real-world data. This is especially true in autonomous driving scenarios, which represent a critical aspect for overcoming utilizing synthetic data for training neural networks. We propose a method based on domain-invariant scene representation to directly synthesize traffic scene imagery without rendering. Specifically, we rely on synthetic scene graphs as our internal representation and introduce an unsupervised neural network architecture for realistic traffic scene synthesis. We enhance synthetic scene graphs with spatial information about the scene and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through scene manipulation.
summary: Image synthesis driven by computer graphics achieved recently a remarkable realism, yet synthetic image data generated this way reveals a significant domain gap with respect to real-world data. This is especially true in autonomous driving scenarios, which represent a critical aspect for overcoming utilizing synthetic data for training neural networks. We propose a method based on domain-invariant scene representation to directly synthesize traffic scene imagery without rendering. Specifically, we rely on synthetic scene graphs as our internal representation and introduce an unsupervised neural network architecture for realistic traffic scene synthesis. We enhance synthetic scene graphs with spatial information about the scene and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through scene manipulation.
abstract_zh: 由计算机图形驱动的图像合成最近实现了显着的真实感，但以这种方式生成的合成图像数据揭示了相对于真实世界数据的显着域差距。在自动驾驶场景中尤其如此，这代表了克服利用合成数据训练神经网络的一个关键方面。我们提出了一种基于域不变场景表示的方法，无需渲染即可直接合成交通场景图像。具体来说，我们依靠合成场景图作为我们的内部表示，并引入无监督神经网络架构来进行真实的交通场景合成。我们利用场景的空间信息增强合成场景图，并通过场景操作证明我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用合成3D场景图直接生成逼真的交通场景图像，以弥补合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基于计算机图形学的合成图像存在与真实世界数据的领域差距，影响自动驾驶场景中神经网络的训练效果，需更有效的合成方法。
AI.method: 基于合成场景图构建领域不变的场景表示，设计无监督神经网络架构，结合空间信息增强，直接生成交通场景图像。
AI.result: 通过场景操作验证了方法的有效性，生成的交通场景图像具有较高的真实感和可操作性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缩小了合成数据与真实数据的领域差距，为自动驾驶场景下的神经网络训练提供了更优质的合成数据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用合成3D场景图直接生成逼真的交通场景图像，以弥补合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距。

authors_text: Pierre Lison,Casey Kennington
title: Who's in Charge? Roles and Responsibilities of Decision-Making Components in Conversational Robots
title_zh: 谁负责？对话机器人中决策组件的角色和职责
comment: Presented at the HRI 2023 workshop "Human-Robot Conversational Interaction"
comments: Presented at the HRI 2023 workshop "Human-Robot Conversational Interaction"
abstract: Software architectures for conversational robots typically consist of multiple modules, each designed for a particular processing task or functionality. Some of these modules are developed for the purpose of making decisions about the next action that the robot ought to perform in the current context. Those actions may relate to physical movements, such as driving forward or grasping an object, but may also correspond to communicative acts, such as asking a question to the human user. In this position paper, we reflect on the organization of those decision modules in human-robot interaction platforms. We discuss the relative benefits and limitations of modular vs. end-to-end architectures, and argue that, despite the increasing popularity of end-to-end approaches, modular architectures remain preferable when developing conversational robots designed to execute complex tasks in collaboration with human users. We also show that most practical HRI architectures tend to be either robot-centric or dialogue-centric, depending on where developers wish to place the ``command center'' of their system. While those design choices may be justified in some application domains, they also limit the robot's ability to flexibly interleave physical movements and conversational behaviours. We contend that architectures placing ``action managers'' and ``interaction managers'' on an equal footing may provide the best path forward for future human-robot interaction systems.

Some of these modules are developed for the purpose of making decisions about the next action that the robot ought to perform in the current context. Those actions may relate to physical movements, such as driving forward or grasping an object, but may also correspond to communicative acts, such as asking a question to the human user. In this position paper, we reflect on the organization of those decision modules in human-robot interaction platforms. We discuss the relative benefits and limitations of modular vs. end-to-end architectures, and argue that, despite the increasing popularity of end-to-end approaches, modular architectures remain preferable when developing conversational robots designed to execute complex tasks in collaboration with human users. We also show that most practical HRI architectures tend to be either robot-centric or dialogue-centric, depending on where developers wish to place the ``command center'' of their system. While those design choices may be justified in some application domains, they also limit the robot's ability to flexibly interleave physical movements and conversational behaviours. We contend that architectures placing ``action managers'' and ``interaction managers'' on an equal footing may provide the best path forward for future human-robot interaction systems.
abstract_zh: 对话机器人的软件架构通常由多个模块组成，每个模块都针对特定的处理任务或功能而设计。其中一些模块的开发目的是为了决定机器人在当前上下文中应该执行的下一步动作。这些动作可以涉及物理运动，例如向前行驶或抓住物体，但也可以对应于交流动作，例如向人类用户提问。在这篇立场文件中，我们反思了人机交互平台中这些决策模块的组织。我们讨论了模块化与端到端架构的相对优点和局限性，并认为，尽管端到端方法越来越受欢迎，但在开发旨在与人类用户协作执行复杂任务的会话机器人时，模块化架构仍然更可取。我们还表明，大多数实用的 HRI 架构往往要么以机器人为中心，要么以对话为中心，具体取决于开发人员希望将系统的“命令中心”放置在哪里。虽然这些设计选择在某些应用领域可能是合理的，但它们也限制了机器人灵活地交错身体运动和对话行为的能力。我们认为，将“动作管理器”和“交互管理器”置于平等地位的架构可能为未来人机交互系统提供最佳的前进道路。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了会话型机器人中决策模块的组织方式，分析模块化与端到端架构的优劣，并提出未来人机交互系统应平衡动作管理与交互管理的架构设计。
AI.motivation: 现有会话型机器人架构多采用机器人中心或对话中心的设计，导致物理行为与对话行为难以灵活协同，限制了复杂协作任务的执行能力。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与案例分析，对比模块化架构与端到端架构在人机协作场景中的适用性，并评估现有HRI系统的实际设计倾向。
AI.result: 模块化架构在复杂协作任务中更具优势，但当前多数系统仍偏向单一中心化设计，导致行为协同受限。
AI.conclusion: 未来人机交互系统应采用平等协同的动作管理器与交互管理器架构，以提升机器人在物理行为与对话行为间的灵活协调能力。

authors_text: Wenhao Xu,Zhiyin Shao,Changxing Ding
title: Mining False Positive Examples for Text-Based Person Re-identification
title_zh: 挖掘基于文本的人员重新识别的误报示例
abstract: Text-based person re-identification (ReID) aims to identify images of the targeted person from a large-scale person image database according to a given textual description. However, due to significant inter-modal gaps, text-based person ReID remains a challenging problem. Most existing methods generally rely heavily on the similarity contributed by matched word-region pairs, while neglecting mismatched word-region pairs which may play a decisive role. Accordingly, we propose to mine false positive examples (MFPE) via a jointly optimized multi-branch architecture to handle this problem. MFPE contains three branches including a false positive mining (FPM) branch to highlight the role of mismatched word-region pairs. Besides, MFPE delicately designs a cross-relu loss to increase the gap of similarity scores between matched and mismatched word-region pairs. Extensive experiments on CUHK-PEDES demonstrate the superior effectiveness of MFPE. Our code is released at https://github.com/xx-adeline/MFPE.
summary: Text-based person re-identification (ReID) aims to identify images of the targeted person from a large-scale person image database according to a given textual description. However, due to significant inter-modal gaps, text-based person ReID remains a challenging problem. Most existing methods generally rely heavily on the similarity contributed by matched word-region pairs, while neglecting mismatched word-region pairs which may play a decisive role. Accordingly, we propose to mine false positive examples (MFPE) via a jointly optimized multi-branch architecture to handle this problem. MFPE contains three branches including a false positive mining (FPM) branch to highlight the role of mismatched word-region pairs. Besides, MFPE delicately designs a cross-relu loss to increase the gap of similarity scores between matched and mismatched word-region pairs. Extensive experiments on CUHK-PEDES demonstrate the superior effectiveness of MFPE. Our code is released at https://github.com/xx-adeline/MFPE.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的人物重识别（ReID）旨在根据给定的文本描述从大规模人物图像数据库中识别出目标人物的图像。然而，由于显着的模态间差距，基于文本的行人再识别仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数现有方法通常严重依赖匹配的词区域对贡献的相似性，而忽略了可能起决定性作用的不匹配的词区域对。因此，我们建议通过联合优化的多分支架构来挖掘误报示例（MFPE）来处理这个问题。 MFPE 包含三个分支，其中包括误报挖掘 (FPM) 分支，以突出不匹配的单词区域对的作用。此外，MFPE 巧妙地设计了一个 cross-relu 损失，以增加匹配和不匹配的单词区域对之间相似性得分的差距。在 CUHK-PEDES 上进行的大量实验证明了 MFPE 的卓越有效性。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/xx-adeline/MFPE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过挖掘假阳性示例来改进文本基行人重识别的方法，以解决跨模态差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本基行人重识别方法过度依赖匹配的词-区域对，忽视了可能起关键作用的不匹配对，导致跨模态差距难以有效处理。
AI.method: 设计多分支架构MFPE，包含假阳性挖掘分支和跨ReLU损失函数，通过扩大匹配与不匹配词-区域对的相似度差距来优化模型。
AI.result: 在CUHK-PEDES数据集上实验表明，MFPE方法在文本基行人重识别任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘假阳性示例并结合跨模态对比损失，MFPE有效缓解了文本与图像模态间的语义鸿沟，提升了重识别性能。

authors_text: Congqi Cao,Yizhe Wang,Yue Lu,Xin Zhang,Yanning Zhang
title: Co-Occurrence Matters: Learning Action Relation for Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 同现很重要：学习动作关系以实现时间动作本地化
abstract: Temporal action localization (TAL) is a prevailing task due to its great application potential. Existing works in this field mainly suffer from two weaknesses: (1) They often neglect the multi-label case and only focus on temporal modeling. (2) They ignore the semantic information in class labels and only use the visual information. To solve these problems, we propose a novel Co-Occurrence Relation Module (CORM) that explicitly models the co-occurrence relationship between actions. Besides the visual information, it further utilizes the semantic embeddings of class labels to model the co-occurrence relationship. The CORM works in a plug-and-play manner and can be easily incorporated with the existing sequence models. By considering both visual and semantic co-occurrence, our method achieves high multi-label relationship modeling capacity. Meanwhile, existing datasets in TAL always focus on low-semantic atomic actions. Thus we construct a challenging multi-label dataset UCF-Crime-TAL that focuses on high-semantic actions by annotating the UCF-Crime dataset at frame level and considering the semantic overlap of different events. Extensive experiments on two commonly used TAL datasets, \textit{i.e.}, MultiTHUMOS and TSU, and our newly proposed UCF-Crime-TAL demenstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CORM, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets.
summary: Temporal action localization (TAL) is a prevailing task due to its great application potential. Existing works in this field mainly suffer from two weaknesses: (1) They often neglect the multi-label case and only focus on temporal modeling. (2) They ignore the semantic information in class labels and only use the visual information. To solve these problems, we propose a novel Co-Occurrence Relation Module (CORM) that explicitly models the co-occurrence relationship between actions. Besides the visual information, it further utilizes the semantic embeddings of class labels to model the co-occurrence relationship. The CORM works in a plug-and-play manner and can be easily incorporated with the existing sequence models. By considering both visual and semantic co-occurrence, our method achieves high multi-label relationship modeling capacity. Meanwhile, existing datasets in TAL always focus on low-semantic atomic actions. Thus we construct a challenging multi-label dataset UCF-Crime-TAL that focuses on high-semantic actions by annotating the UCF-Crime dataset at frame level and considering the semantic overlap of different events. Extensive experiments on two commonly used TAL datasets, \textit{i.e.}, MultiTHUMOS and TSU, and our newly proposed UCF-Crime-TAL demenstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CORM, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets.
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位（TAL）由于其巨大的应用潜力而成为一项普遍的任务。该领域的现有工作主要存在两个弱点：（1）他们经常忽略多标签情况，只关注时间建模。 (2)他们忽略类标签中的语义信息，只使用视觉信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的同现关系模块（CORM），它显式地建模了动作之间的同现关系。除了视觉信息之外，它还利用类标签的语义嵌入来建模共现关系。 CORM以即插即用的方式工作，可以轻松地与现有的序列模型合并。通过考虑视觉和语义共现，我们的方法实现了高多标签关系建模能力。同时，TAL 中的现有数据集始终关注低语义原子动作。因此，我们构建了一个具有挑战性的多标签数据集 UCF-Crime-TAL，通过在帧级别注释 UCF-Crime 数据集并考虑不同事件的语义重叠来关注高语义动作。对两个常用的 TAL 数据集 MultiTHUMOS 和 TSU 以及我们新提出的 UCF-Crime-TAL 进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的 CORM 的有效性，它在这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的共现关系模块（CORM），通过结合视觉信息和类别标签的语义嵌入，改进时序动作定位（TAL）任务中的多标签关系建模，并构建了高语义动作数据集UCF-Crime-TAL。
AI.motivation: 现有TAL方法存在两方面不足：忽视多标签场景下的动作共现关系，且仅依赖视觉信息而未利用类别标签的语义信息。同时，现有数据集多聚焦低语义原子动作，缺乏高语义场景的标注。
AI.method: 设计Co-Occurrence Relation Module（CORM），显式建模动作间的共现关系，融合视觉特征与类别语义嵌入；提出高语义多标签数据集UCF-Crime-TAL，通过帧级标注和事件语义重叠分析增强数据挑战性。
AI.result: 在MultiTHUMOS、TSU及UCF-Crime-TAL三个数据集上实验表明，CORM方法在多标签动作定位任务中达到最先进性能，验证了视觉-语义共现建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语义感知的共现关系建模和高语义数据集，CORM显著提升了TAL任务在复杂多标签场景下的表现，为未来研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Co-Occurrence Matters: Learning Action Relation for Temporal Action Localization 同现很重要：学习动作关系以实现时间动作本地化 Temporal action localization (TAL) is a prevailing task due to its great application potential. Existing works in this field mainly suffer from two weaknesses: (1) They often neglect the multi-label case and only focus on temporal modeling. (2) They ignore the semantic information in class labels and only use the visual information. To solve these problems, we propose a novel Co-Occurrence Relation Module (CORM) that explicitly models the co-occurrence relationship between actions. Besides the visual information, it further utilizes the semantic embeddings of class labels to model the co-occurrence relationship. The CORM works in a plug-and-play manner and can be easily incorporated with the existing sequence models. By considering both visual and semantic co-occurrence, our method achieves high multi-label relationship modeling capacity. Meanwhile, existing datasets in TAL always focus on low-semantic atomic actions. Thus we construct a challenging multi-label dataset UCF-Crime-TAL that focuses on high-semantic actions by annotating the UCF-Crime dataset at frame level and considering the semantic overlap of different events. Extensive experiments on two commonly used TAL datasets, \textit{i.e.}, MultiTHUMOS and TSU, and our newly proposed UCF-Crime-TAL demenstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CORM, which achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets. 时间动作定位（TAL）由于其巨大的应用潜力而成为一项普遍的任务。该领域的现有工作主要存在两个弱点：（1）他们经常忽略多标签情况，只关注时间建模。 (2)他们忽略类标签中的语义信息，只使用视觉信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的同现关系模块（CORM），它显式地建模了动作之间的同现关系。除了视觉信息之外，它还利用类标签的语义嵌入来建模共现关系。 CORM以即插即用的方式工作，可以轻松地与现有的序列模型合并。通过考虑视觉和语义共现，我们的方法实现了高多标签关系建模能力。同时，TAL 中的现有数据集始终关注低语义原子动作。因此，我们构建了一个具有挑战性的多标签数据集 UCF-Crime-TAL，通过在帧级别注释 UCF-Crime 数据集并考虑不同事件的语义重叠来关注高语义动作。对两个常用的 TAL 数据集 MultiTHUMOS 和 TSU 以及我们新提出的 UCF-Crime-TAL 进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的 CORM 的有效性，它在这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 该论文提出了一种新的共现关系模块（CORM），通过结合视觉信息和类别标签的语义嵌入，改进时序动作定位（TAL）任务中的多标签关系建模，并构建了高语义动作数据集UCF-Crime-TAL。 Congqi Cao,Yizhe Wang,Yue Lu,Xin Zhang,Yanning Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Tim Puphal,Benedict Flade,Malte Probst,Volker Willert,Jürgen Adamy,Julian Eggert
title: Online and Predictive Warning System for Forced Lane Changes using Risk Maps
title_zh: 使用风险地图的强制变道在线预测警告系统
abstract: The survival analysis of driving trajectories allows for holistic evaluations of car-related risks caused by collisions or curvy roads. This analysis has advantages over common Time-To-X indicators, such as its predictive and probabilistic nature. However, so far, the theoretical risks have not been demonstrated in real-world environments. In this paper, we therefore present Risk Maps (RM) for online warning support in situations with forced lane changes, due to the end of roads. For this purpose, we first unify sensor data in a Relational Local Dynamic Map (R-LDM). RM is afterwards able to be run in real-time and efficiently probes a range of situations in order to determine risk-minimizing behaviors. Hereby, we focus on the improvement of uncertainty-awareness and transparency of the system. Risk, utility and comfort costs are included in a single formula and are intuitively visualized to the driver. In the conducted experiments, a low-cost sensor setup with a GNSS receiver for localization and multiple cameras for object detection are leveraged. The final system is successfully applied on two-lane roads and recommends lane change advices, which are separated in gap and no-gap indications. These results are promising and present an important step towards interpretable safety.
summary: The survival analysis of driving trajectories allows for holistic evaluations of car-related risks caused by collisions or curvy roads. This analysis has advantages over common Time-To-X indicators, such as its predictive and probabilistic nature. However, so far, the theoretical risks have not been demonstrated in real-world environments. In this paper, we therefore present Risk Maps (RM) for online warning support in situations with forced lane changes, due to the end of roads. For this purpose, we first unify sensor data in a Relational Local Dynamic Map (R-LDM). RM is afterwards able to be run in real-time and efficiently probes a range of situations in order to determine risk-minimizing behaviors. Hereby, we focus on the improvement of uncertainty-awareness and transparency of the system. Risk, utility and comfort costs are included in a single formula and are intuitively visualized to the driver. In the conducted experiments, a low-cost sensor setup with a GNSS receiver for localization and multiple cameras for object detection are leveraged. The final system is successfully applied on two-lane roads and recommends lane change advices, which are separated in gap and no-gap indications. These results are promising and present an important step towards interpretable safety.
abstract_zh: 驾驶轨迹的生存分析可以对碰撞或弯曲道路引起的与汽车相关的风险进行整体评估。该分析比常见的 Time-To-X 指标具有优势，例如其预测性和概率性。然而，到目前为止，理论风险尚未在现实​​环境中得到证实。因此，在本文中，我们提出了风险地图（RM），用于在由于道路尽头而强制变道的情况下提供在线警告支持。为此，我们首先将传感器数据统一到关系局部动态映射（R-LDM）中。 RM 随后能够实时运行并有效地探测一系列情况，以确定风险最小化行为。在此，我们重点关注系统不确定性意识和透明度的提高。风险、公用事业和舒适度成本包含在一个公式中，并为驾驶员直观地呈现。在进行的实验中，利用了低成本传感器设置，该传感器设置具有用于定位的 GNSS 接收器和用于物体检测的多个摄像头。最终系统成功应用于双车道道路，并提出变道建议，这些建议分为间隙指示和无间隙指示。这些结果充满希望，并为可解释的安全性迈出了重要的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于风险地图的在线预警系统，用于在道路尽头强制变道场景中提供风险最小化的行为建议。
AI.motivation: 传统Time-To-X指标缺乏预测性和概率性，且理论风险未在真实环境验证，需改进系统不确定性感知与透明度。
AI.method: 融合传感器数据构建关系局部动态地图（R-LDM），通过风险地图实时评估变道风险，结合风险、效用与舒适度成本公式生成直观预警。
AI.result: 基于低成本传感器（GNSS+摄像头）的系统在双车道道路实验中成功区分有/无间隙变道建议，验证了风险地图的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为可解释性安全研究提供重要进展，未来可扩展至更复杂交通场景。

authors_text: Sizheng Fan,Tian Min,Xiao Wu,Wei Cai
title: Altruistic and Profit-oriented: Making Sense of Roles in Web3 Community from Airdrop Perspective
title_zh: 利他与盈利：从空投角度解读Web3社区的角色
abstract: Regardless of which community, incentivizing users is a necessity for well-sustainable operations. In the blockchain-backed Web3 communities, known for their transparency and security, airdrop serves as a widespread incentive mechanism for allocating capital and power. However, it remains a controversy on how to justify airdrop to incentive and empower the decentralized governance. In this paper, we use ParaSwap as an example to propose a role taxonomy methodology through a data-driven study to understand the characteristic of community members and the effectiveness of airdrop. We find that users receive more rewards tend to take positive actions towards the community. We summarize several arbitrage patterns and confirm the current detection is not sufficient in screening out airdrop hunters. In conjunction with the results, we discuss from the aspects of interaction, financialization, and system design to conclude the challenges and possible research directions for decentralized communities.
summary: Regardless of which community, incentivizing users is a necessity for well-sustainable operations. In the blockchain-backed Web3 communities, known for their transparency and security, airdrop serves as a widespread incentive mechanism for allocating capital and power. However, it remains a controversy on how to justify airdrop to incentive and empower the decentralized governance. In this paper, we use ParaSwap as an example to propose a role taxonomy methodology through a data-driven study to understand the characteristic of community members and the effectiveness of airdrop. We find that users receive more rewards tend to take positive actions towards the community. We summarize several arbitrage patterns and confirm the current detection is not sufficient in screening out airdrop hunters. In conjunction with the results, we discuss from the aspects of interaction, financialization, and system design to conclude the challenges and possible research directions for decentralized communities.
abstract_zh: 无论哪个社区，激励用户都是良好可持续运营的必要条件。在以透明和安全着称的区块链支持的 Web3 社区中，空投作为分配资本和权力的广泛激励机制。然而，如何证明空投的合理性以激励和赋能去中心化治理仍然存在争议。在本文中，我们以ParaSwap为例，通过数据驱动的研究提出一种角色分类方法，以了解社区成员的特征和空投的有效性。我们发现，获得更多奖励的用户往往会对社区采取积极的行动。我们总结了几种套利模式，并确认当前的检测不足以筛选出空投猎人。结合结果，我们从交互、金融化、系统设计等方面进行讨论，总结出去中心化社区面临的挑战和可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过ParaSwap案例，采用数据驱动方法对Web3社区中的用户角色进行分类，分析空投机制对社区成员行为的影响及去中心化治理的挑战。
AI.motivation: 区块链社区需通过空投激励用户，但现有机制在公平分配资本、识别恶意行为（如空投猎人）及保障去中心化治理方面存在争议与不足。
AI.method: 基于ParaSwap的数据，提出角色分类方法论，通过分析用户行为特征与空投奖励关联性，结合套利模式检测现有机制缺陷。

search_text: Altruistic and Profit-oriented: Making Sense of Roles in Web3 Community from Airdrop Perspective 利他与盈利：从空投角度解读Web3社区的角色 Regardless of which community, incentivizing users is a necessity for well-sustainable operations. In the blockchain-backed Web3 communities, known for their transparency and security, airdrop serves as a widespread incentive mechanism for allocating capital and power. However, it remains a controversy on how to justify airdrop to incentive and empower the decentralized governance. In this paper, we use ParaSwap as an example to propose a role taxonomy methodology through a data-driven study to understand the characteristic of community members and the effectiveness of airdrop. We find that users receive more rewards tend to take positive actions towards the community. We summarize several arbitrage patterns and confirm the current detection is not sufficient in screening out airdrop hunters. In conjunction with the results, we discuss from the aspects of interaction, financialization, and system design to conclude the challenges and possible research directions for decentralized communities. 无论哪个社区，激励用户都是良好可持续运营的必要条件。在以透明和安全着称的区块链支持的 Web3 社区中，空投作为分配资本和权力的广泛激励机制。然而，如何证明空投的合理性以激励和赋能去中心化治理仍然存在争议。在本文中，我们以ParaSwap为例，通过数据驱动的研究提出一种角色分类方法，以了解社区成员的特征和空投的有效性。我们发现，获得更多奖励的用户往往会对社区采取积极的行动。我们总结了几种套利模式，并确认当前的检测不足以筛选出空投猎人。结合结果，我们从交互、金融化、系统设计等方面进行讨论，总结出去中心化社区面临的挑战和可能的研究方向。 本文通过ParaSwap案例，采用数据驱动方法对Web3社区中的用户角色进行分类，分析空投机制对社区成员行为的影响及去中心化治理的挑战。 Sizheng Fan,Tian Min,Xiao Wu,Wei Cai cs.HC

authors_text: Zhe Jin,Chaoyang Jiang
title: Range-Aided LiDAR-Inertial Multi-Vehicle Mapping in Degenerate Environment
title_zh: 退化环境中的距离辅助激光雷达惯性多车辆测绘
abstract: This paper presents a range-aided LiDAR-inertial multi-vehicle mapping system (RaLI-Multi). Firstly, we design a multi-metric weights LiDAR-inertial odometry by fusing observations from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) and a light detection and ranging sensor (LiDAR). The degenerate level and direction are evaluated by analyzing the distribution of normal vectors of feature point clouds and are used to activate the degeneration correction module in which range measurements correct the pose estimation from the degeneration direction. We then design a multi-vehicle mapping system in which a centralized vehicle receives local maps of each vehicle and range measurements between vehicles to optimize a global pose graph. The global map is broadcast to other vehicles for localization and mapping updates, and the centralized vehicle is dynamically fungible. Finally, we provide three experiments to verify the effectiveness of the proposed RaLI-Multi. The results show its superiority in degeneration environments
summary: This paper presents a range-aided LiDAR-inertial multi-vehicle mapping system (RaLI-Multi). Firstly, we design a multi-metric weights LiDAR-inertial odometry by fusing observations from an inertial measurement unit (IMU) and a light detection and ranging sensor (LiDAR). The degenerate level and direction are evaluated by analyzing the distribution of normal vectors of feature point clouds and are used to activate the degeneration correction module in which range measurements correct the pose estimation from the degeneration direction. We then design a multi-vehicle mapping system in which a centralized vehicle receives local maps of each vehicle and range measurements between vehicles to optimize a global pose graph. The global map is broadcast to other vehicles for localization and mapping updates, and the centralized vehicle is dynamically fungible. Finally, we provide three experiments to verify the effectiveness of the proposed RaLI-Multi. The results show its superiority in degeneration environments
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种测距辅助激光雷达惯性多车辆测绘系统（RaLI-Multi）。首先，我们通过融合惯性测量单元（IMU）和光检测和测距传感器（LiDAR）的观测数据来设计多度量权重激光雷达惯性里程计。通过分析特征点云法向向量的分布来评估退化水平和方向，并用于激活退化校正模块，在该模块中，距离测量从退化方向校正姿态估计。然后，我们设计了一个多车辆测绘系统，其中集中式车辆接收每辆车的本地地图和车辆之间的距离测量值，以优化全局位姿图。全球地图被广播到其他车辆以进行定位和地图更新，并且集中式车辆是动态可替换的。最后，我们提供了三个实验来验证所提出的 RaLI-Multi 的有效性。结果显示其在退化环境中的优越性

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合激光雷达与惯性测量单元的多车协同映射系统（RaLI-Multi），用于解决退化环境下的定位与建图问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉-惯性里程计在退化环境中（如无纹理或重复场景）易失效，而多车协同映射需应对传感器数据稀疏和动态环境的挑战。
AI.method: 设计多度量权重融合的激光雷达-惯性里程计，通过分析点云法线分布评估退化方向并触发距离测量校正模块；构建集中式多车映射系统，动态分配车辆角色并优化全局位姿图。
AI.result: 实验验证RaLI-Multi在退化环境中相较现有方法具有更高的定位精度与地图一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合距离测量与动态角色分配，RaLI-Multi有效提升了多车协同映射在退化环境中的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Cosmin I Bercea,Benedikt Wiestler,Daniel Rueckert,Julia A Schnabel
title: Reversing the Abnormal: Pseudo-Healthy Generative Networks for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 逆转异常：用于异常检测的伪健康生成网络
abstract: Early and accurate disease detection is crucial for patient management and successful treatment outcomes. However, the automatic identification of anomalies in medical images can be challenging. Conventional methods rely on large labeled datasets which are difficult to obtain. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel unsupervised approach, called PHANES (Pseudo Healthy generative networks for ANomaly Segmentation). Our method has the capability of reversing anomalies, i.e., preserving healthy tissue and replacing anomalous regions with pseudo-healthy (PH) reconstructions. Unlike recent diffusion models, our method does not rely on a learned noise distribution nor does it introduce random alterations to the entire image. Instead, we use latent generative networks to create masks around possible anomalies, which are refined using inpainting generative networks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PHANES in detecting stroke lesions in T1w brain MRI datasets and show significant improvements over state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. We believe that our proposed framework will open new avenues for interpretable, fast, and accurate anomaly segmentation with the potential to support various clinical-oriented downstream tasks.
summary: Early and accurate disease detection is crucial for patient management and successful treatment outcomes. However, the automatic identification of anomalies in medical images can be challenging. Conventional methods rely on large labeled datasets which are difficult to obtain. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel unsupervised approach, called PHANES (Pseudo Healthy generative networks for ANomaly Segmentation). Our method has the capability of reversing anomalies, i.e., preserving healthy tissue and replacing anomalous regions with pseudo-healthy (PH) reconstructions. Unlike recent diffusion models, our method does not rely on a learned noise distribution nor does it introduce random alterations to the entire image. Instead, we use latent generative networks to create masks around possible anomalies, which are refined using inpainting generative networks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PHANES in detecting stroke lesions in T1w brain MRI datasets and show significant improvements over state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. We believe that our proposed framework will open new avenues for interpretable, fast, and accurate anomaly segmentation with the potential to support various clinical-oriented downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 早期准确的疾病检测对于患者管理和成功的治疗结果至关重要。然而，自动识别医学图像中的异常现象可能具有挑战性。传统方法依赖于难以获得的大型标记数据集。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的无监督方法，称为 PHANES（异常分割的伪健康生成网络）。我们的方法具有逆转异常的能力，即保留健康组织并用伪健康（PH）重建替换异常区域。与最近的扩散模型不同，我们的方法不依赖于学习的噪声分布，也不会对整个图像引入随机改变。相反，我们使用潜在生成网络围绕可能的异常创建掩码，并使用修复生成网络对其进行细化。我们证明了 PHANES 在 T1w 脑 MRI 数据集中检测中风病变的有效性，并显示出相对于最先进 (SOTA) 方法的显着改进。我们相信，我们提出的框架将为可解释、快速和准确的异常分割开辟新的途径，并有可能支持各种面向临床的下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督异常检测方法PHANES，通过生成伪健康图像替换医学图像中的病变区域，用于精准检测脑部MRI中的中风病变。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像异常检测依赖大量标注数据，而实际中获取标注数据困难，且现有方法存在依赖噪声分布或全局图像扰动的局限性。
AI.method: 构建PHANES框架，利用潜在生成网络定位异常区域并生成掩码，通过修复网络生成伪健康图像实现异常区域替换，无需全局图像扰动或噪声分布假设。
AI.result: 在T1w脑部MRI数据集上，PHANES在中风病变检测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: PHANES为可解释、高效且准确的医学图像异常分割提供了新思路，有望支持多种临床应用任务。

conclusion: PHANES为可解释、高效且准确的医学图像异常分割提供了新思路，有望支持多种临床应用任务。
search_text: Reversing the Abnormal: Pseudo-Healthy Generative Networks for Anomaly Detection 逆转异常：用于异常检测的伪健康生成网络 Early and accurate disease detection is crucial for patient management and successful treatment outcomes. However, the automatic identification of anomalies in medical images can be challenging. Conventional methods rely on large labeled datasets which are difficult to obtain. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel unsupervised approach, called PHANES (Pseudo Healthy generative networks for ANomaly Segmentation). Our method has the capability of reversing anomalies, i.e., preserving healthy tissue and replacing anomalous regions with pseudo-healthy (PH) reconstructions. Unlike recent diffusion models, our method does not rely on a learned noise distribution nor does it introduce random alterations to the entire image. Instead, we use latent generative networks to create masks around possible anomalies, which are refined using inpainting generative networks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of PHANES in detecting stroke lesions in T1w brain MRI datasets and show significant improvements over state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. We believe that our proposed framework will open new avenues for interpretable, fast, and accurate anomaly segmentation with the potential to support various clinical-oriented downstream tasks. 早期准确的疾病检测对于患者管理和成功的治疗结果至关重要。然而，自动识别医学图像中的异常现象可能具有挑战性。传统方法依赖于难以获得的大型标记数据集。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的无监督方法，称为 PHANES（异常分割的伪健康生成网络）。我们的方法具有逆转异常的能力，即保留健康组织并用伪健康（PH）重建替换异常区域。与最近的扩散模型不同，我们的方法不依赖于学习的噪声分布，也不会对整个图像引入随机改变。相反，我们使用潜在生成网络围绕可能的异常创建掩码，并使用修复生成网络对其进行细化。我们证明了 PHANES 在 T1w 脑 MRI 数据集中检测中风病变的有效性，并显示出相对于最先进 (SOTA) 方法的显着改进。我们相信，我们提出的框架将为可解释、快速和准确的异常分割开辟新的途径，并有可能支持各种面向临床的下游任务。 本文提出一种无监督异常检测方法PHANES，通过生成伪健康图像替换医学图像中的病变区域，用于精准检测脑部MRI中的中风病变。 Cosmin I Bercea,Benedikt Wiestler,Daniel Rueckert,Julia A Schnabel eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziyu Yao,Xuxin Cheng,Yuexian Zou
title: PoseRAC: Pose Saliency Transformer for Repetitive Action Counting
title_zh: PoseRAC：用于重复动作计数的姿势显着变压器
abstract: This paper presents a significant contribution to the field of repetitive action counting through the introduction of a new approach called Pose Saliency Representation. The proposed method efficiently represents each action using only two salient poses instead of redundant frames, which significantly reduces the computational cost while improving the performance. Moreover, we introduce a pose-level method, PoseRAC, which is based on this representation and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two new version datasets by using Pose Saliency Annotation to annotate salient poses for training. Our lightweight model is highly efficient, requiring only 20 minutes for training on a GPU, and infers nearly 10x faster compared to previous methods. In addition, our approach achieves a substantial improvement over the previous state-of-the-art TransRAC, achieving an OBO metric of 0.56 compared to 0.29 of TransRAC. The code and new dataset are available at https://github.com/MiracleDance/PoseRAC for further research and experimentation, making our proposed approach highly accessible to the research community.
summary: This paper presents a significant contribution to the field of repetitive action counting through the introduction of a new approach called Pose Saliency Representation. The proposed method efficiently represents each action using only two salient poses instead of redundant frames, which significantly reduces the computational cost while improving the performance. Moreover, we introduce a pose-level method, PoseRAC, which is based on this representation and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two new version datasets by using Pose Saliency Annotation to annotate salient poses for training. Our lightweight model is highly efficient, requiring only 20 minutes for training on a GPU, and infers nearly 10x faster compared to previous methods. In addition, our approach achieves a substantial improvement over the previous state-of-the-art TransRAC, achieving an OBO metric of 0.56 compared to 0.29 of TransRAC. The code and new dataset are available at https://github.com/MiracleDance/PoseRAC for further research and experimentation, making our proposed approach highly accessible to the research community.
abstract_zh: 本文通过引入一种称为姿势显着性表示的新方法，对重复动作计数领域做出了重大贡献。该方法仅使用两个显着姿势而不是冗余帧来有效地表示每个动作，这在提高性能的同时显着降低了计算成本。此外，我们引入了一种姿势级方法 PoseRAC，它基于这种表示，并通过使用姿势显着性注释来注释显着姿势进行训练，在两个新版本数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们的轻量级模型非常高效，在 GPU 上训练仅需 20 分钟，并且推断速度比以前的方法快了近 10 倍。此外，我们的方法比之前最先进的 TransRAC 取得了实质性改进，实现了 0.56 的 OBO 指标，而 TransRAC 为 0.29。代码和新数据集可在 https://github.com/MiracleDance/PoseRAC 上获取，以供进一步研究和实验，使我们提出的方法易于研究社区使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseRAC方法，通过姿态显著性表示解决重复动作计数问题，提升效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖冗余帧导致计算成本高，且效率低下，因此提出更高效的姿态显著性表示方法以提升性能并减少计算负担。
AI.method: 提出姿态显著性表示（Pose Saliency Representation），仅使用两个关键姿态替代冗余帧，并基于此设计PoseRAC模型，利用姿态显著性标注进行训练，实现轻量化和高效推理。
AI.result: 在两个新数据集上达到SOTA，训练时间仅需20分钟，推理速度比之前方法快10倍，OBO指标0.56，显著优于TransRAC的0.29。
AI.conclusion: PoseRAC通过姿态显著性表示显著提升重复动作计数的效率和精度，轻量化设计与开源资源为相关研究提供有力支持。

authors_text: Honglin Li,Chenglu Zhu,Yunlong Zhang,Yuxuan Sun,Zhongyi Shui,Wenwei Kuang,Sunyi Zheng,Lin Yang
title: Task-specific Fine-tuning via Variational Information Bottleneck for Weakly-supervised Pathology Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 通过弱监督病理学全玻片图像分类的变异信息瓶颈进行特定任务的微调
abstract: While Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has shown promising results in digital Pathology Whole Slide Image (WSI) classification, such a paradigm still faces performance and generalization problems due to challenges in high computational costs on Gigapixel WSIs and limited sample size for model training. To deal with the computation problem, most MIL methods utilize a frozen pretrained model from ImageNet to obtain representations first. This process may lose essential information owing to the large domain gap and hinder the generalization of model due to the lack of image-level training-time augmentations. Though Self-supervised Learning (SSL) proposes viable representation learning schemes, the improvement of the downstream task still needs to be further explored in the conversion from the task-agnostic features of SSL to the task-specifics under the partial label supervised learning. To alleviate the dilemma of computation cost and performance, we propose an efficient WSI fine-tuning framework motivated by the Information Bottleneck theory. The theory enables the framework to find the minimal sufficient statistics of WSI, thus supporting us to fine-tune the backbone into a task-specific representation only depending on WSI-level weak labels. The WSI-MIL problem is further analyzed to theoretically deduce our fine-tuning method. Our framework is evaluated on five pathology WSI datasets on various WSI heads. The experimental results of our fine-tuned representations show significant improvements in both accuracy and generalization compared with previous works. Source code will be available at https://github.com/invoker-LL/WSI-finetuning.
summary: While Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has shown promising results in digital Pathology Whole Slide Image (WSI) classification, such a paradigm still faces performance and generalization problems due to challenges in high computational costs on Gigapixel WSIs and limited sample size for model training. To deal with the computation problem, most MIL methods utilize a frozen pretrained model from ImageNet to obtain representations first. This process may lose essential information owing to the large domain gap and hinder the generalization of model due to the lack of image-level training-time augmentations. Though Self-supervised Learning (SSL) proposes viable representation learning schemes, the improvement of the downstream task still needs to be further explored in the conversion from the task-agnostic features of SSL to the task-specifics under the partial label supervised learning. To alleviate the dilemma of computation cost and performance, we propose an efficient WSI fine-tuning framework motivated by the Information Bottleneck theory. The theory enables the framework to find the minimal sufficient statistics of WSI, thus supporting us to fine-tune the backbone into a task-specific representation only depending on WSI-level weak labels. The WSI-MIL problem is further analyzed to theoretically deduce our fine-tuning method. Our framework is evaluated on five pathology WSI datasets on various WSI heads. The experimental results of our fine-tuned representations show significant improvements in both accuracy and generalization compared with previous works. Source code will be available at https://github.com/invoker-LL/WSI-finetuning.
abstract_zh: 虽然多实例学习 (MIL) 在数字病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 分类方面显示出有希望的结果，但由于千兆像素 WSI 的高计算成本和模型训练的样本量有限的挑战，这种范例仍然面临性能和泛化问题。为了解决计算问题，大多数 MIL 方法首先利用 ImageNet 中的冻结预训练模型来获取表示。由于域间隙较大，该过程可能会丢失重要信息，并且由于缺乏图像级训练时间增强而阻碍模型的泛化。尽管自监督学习（SSL）提出了可行的表示学习方案，但在从 SSL 的任务无关特征到部分标签监督学习下的任务特定特征的转换中，下游任务的改进仍然需要进一步探索。为了缓解计算成本和性能的困境，我们在信息瓶颈理论的推动下提出了一种高效的 WSI 微调框架。该理论使框架能够找到 WSI 的最小足够统计量，从而支持我们仅根据 WSI 级别的弱标签将主干网络微调为特定于任务的表示。进一步分析 WSI-MIL 问题，从理论上推导出我们的微调方法。我们的框架在不同 WSI 头上的五个病理 WSI 数据集上进行评估。我们微调表示的实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，准确性和泛化性都有显着提高。源代码可在 https://github.com/invoker-LL/WSI-finetuning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分信息瓶颈理论的弱监督病理全切片图像分类框架，解决计算成本高和泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法依赖冻结的ImageNet预训练模型，导致领域差异信息丢失；自监督学习的特征难以转化为任务特定表示，需探索更有效的弱监督微调方法。
AI.method: 基于信息瓶颈理论设计高效微调框架，通过理论分析WSI-MIL问题，仅依赖WSI级弱标签进行任务特定表示学习，减少计算成本。
AI.result: 在五个病理数据集上实验显示，微调表示在准确率和泛化能力上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了计算效率与模型性能，为弱监督WSI分类提供了新思路。

The WSI-MIL problem is further analyzed to theoretically deduce our fine-tuning method. Our framework is evaluated on five pathology WSI datasets on various WSI heads. The experimental results of our fine-tuned representations show significant improvements in both accuracy and generalization compared with previous works. Source code will be available at https://github.com/invoker-LL/WSI-finetuning. 虽然多实例学习 (MIL) 在数字病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 分类方面显示出有希望的结果，但由于千兆像素 WSI 的高计算成本和模型训练的样本量有限的挑战，这种范例仍然面临性能和泛化问题。为了解决计算问题，大多数 MIL 方法首先利用 ImageNet 中的冻结预训练模型来获取表示。由于域间隙较大，该过程可能会丢失重要信息，并且由于缺乏图像级训练时间增强而阻碍模型的泛化。尽管自监督学习（SSL）提出了可行的表示学习方案，但在从 SSL 的任务无关特征到部分标签监督学习下的任务特定特征的转换中，下游任务的改进仍然需要进一步探索。为了缓解计算成本和性能的困境，我们在信息瓶颈理论的推动下提出了一种高效的 WSI 微调框架。该理论使框架能够找到 WSI 的最小足够统计量，从而支持我们仅根据 WSI 级别的弱标签将主干网络微调为特定于任务的表示。进一步分析 WSI-MIL 问题，从理论上推导出我们的微调方法。我们的框架在不同 WSI 头上的五个病理 WSI 数据集上进行评估。我们微调表示的实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，准确性和泛化性都有显着提高。源代码可在 https://github.com/invoker-LL/WSI-finetuning 获取。 本文提出一种基于变分信息瓶颈理论的弱监督病理全切片图像分类框架，解决计算成本高和泛化能力差的问题。 Honglin Li,Chenglu Zhu,Yunlong Zhang,Yuxuan Sun,Zhongyi Shui,Wenwei Kuang,Sunyi Zheng,Lin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Huilan Luo,Zehua Zeng
title: Real-time Multi-Object Tracking Based on Bi-directional Matching
title_zh: 基于双向匹配的实时多目标跟踪
abstract: In recent years, anchor-free object detection models combined with matching algorithms are used to achieve real-time muti-object tracking and also ensure high tracking accuracy. However, there are still great challenges in multi-object tracking. For example, when most part of a target is occluded or the target just disappears from images temporarily, it often leads to tracking interruptions for most of the existing tracking algorithms. Therefore, this study offers a bi-directional matching algorithm for multi-object tracking that makes advantage of bi-directional motion prediction information to improve occlusion handling. A stranded area is used in the matching algorithm to temporarily store the objects that fail to be tracked. When objects recover from occlusions, our method will first try to match them with objects in the stranded area to avoid erroneously generating new identities, thus forming a more continuous trajectory. Experiments show that our approach can improve the multi-object tracking performance in the presence of occlusions. In addition, this study provides an attentional up-sampling module that not only assures tracking accuracy but also accelerates training speed. In the MOT17 challenge, the proposed algorithm achieves 63.4% MOTA, 55.3% IDF1, and 20.1 FPS tracking speed.
summary: In recent years, anchor-free object detection models combined with matching algorithms are used to achieve real-time muti-object tracking and also ensure high tracking accuracy. However, there are still great challenges in multi-object tracking. For example, when most part of a target is occluded or the target just disappears from images temporarily, it often leads to tracking interruptions for most of the existing tracking algorithms. Therefore, this study offers a bi-directional matching algorithm for multi-object tracking that makes advantage of bi-directional motion prediction information to improve occlusion handling. A stranded area is used in the matching algorithm to temporarily store the objects that fail to be tracked. When objects recover from occlusions, our method will first try to match them with objects in the stranded area to avoid erroneously generating new identities, thus forming a more continuous trajectory. Experiments show that our approach can improve the multi-object tracking performance in the presence of occlusions. In addition, this study provides an attentional up-sampling module that not only assures tracking accuracy but also accelerates training speed. In the MOT17 challenge, the proposed algorithm achieves 63.4% MOTA, 55.3% IDF1, and 20.1 FPS tracking speed.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无锚目标检测模型结合匹配算法被用来实现实时多目标跟踪，并保证较高的跟踪精度。然而，多目标跟踪仍然面临着巨大的挑战。例如，当目标的大部分被遮挡或者目标暂时从图像中消失时，通常会导致大多数现有跟踪算法的跟踪中断。因此，本研究提供了一种用于多目标跟踪的双向匹配算法，该算法利用双向运动预测信息来改善遮挡处理。匹配算法中使用搁浅区来临时存储跟踪失败的物体。当对象从遮挡中恢复时，我们的方法将首先尝试将它们与搁浅区域中的对象进行匹配，以避免错误地生成新的身份，从而形成更连续的轨迹。实验表明，我们的方法可以在存在遮挡的情况下提高多目标跟踪性能。此外，本研究提供了注意力上采样模块，不仅可以保证跟踪精度，还可以加快训练速度。在 MOT17 挑战中，所提出的算法实现了 63.4% MOTA、55.3% IDF1 和 20.1 FPS 跟踪速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向匹配的实时多目标跟踪算法，旨在解决遮挡和目标消失导致的跟踪中断问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪算法在目标被遮挡或暂时消失时容易产生跟踪中断，导致轨迹不连续和身份误判。
AI.method: 设计双向匹配算法利用双向运动预测信息，结合临时存储区域（stranded area）避免误生成新身份，并引入注意力上采样模块提升准确率和训练速度。
AI.result: 在MOT17挑战中达到63.4% MOTA、55.3% IDF1和20.1 FPS的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了遮挡场景下的多目标跟踪连续性和准确性，同时保持实时性。

authors_text: Suhyeon Lee,Hyungjin Chung,Minyoung Park,Jonghyuk Park,Wi-Sun Ryu,Jong Chul Ye
title: Improving 3D Imaging with Pre-Trained Perpendicular 2D Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用预先训练的垂直 2D 扩散模型改进 3D 成像
abstract: Diffusion models have become a popular approach for image generation and reconstruction due to their numerous advantages. However, most diffusion-based inverse problem-solving methods only deal with 2D images, and even recently published 3D methods do not fully exploit the 3D distribution prior. To address this, we propose a novel approach using two perpendicular pre-trained 2D diffusion models to solve the 3D inverse problem. By modeling the 3D data distribution as a product of 2D distributions sliced in different directions, our method effectively addresses the curse of dimensionality. Our experimental results demonstrate that our method is highly effective for 3D medical image reconstruction tasks, including MRI Z-axis super-resolution, compressed sensing MRI, and sparse-view CT. Our method can generate high-quality voxel volumes suitable for medical applications.
summary: Diffusion models have become a popular approach for image generation and reconstruction due to their numerous advantages. However, most diffusion-based inverse problem-solving methods only deal with 2D images, and even recently published 3D methods do not fully exploit the 3D distribution prior. To address this, we propose a novel approach using two perpendicular pre-trained 2D diffusion models to solve the 3D inverse problem. By modeling the 3D data distribution as a product of 2D distributions sliced in different directions, our method effectively addresses the curse of dimensionality. Our experimental results demonstrate that our method is highly effective for 3D medical image reconstruction tasks, including MRI Z-axis super-resolution, compressed sensing MRI, and sparse-view CT. Our method can generate high-quality voxel volumes suitable for medical applications.
abstract_zh: 由于其众多优点，扩散模型已成为图像生成和重建的流行方法。然而，大多数基于扩散的逆问题解决方法仅处理 2D 图像，甚至最近发布的 3D 方法也没有充分利用 3D 分布先验。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，使用两个垂直的预训练 2D 扩散模型来解决 3D 逆问题。通过将 3D 数据分布建模为不同方向切片的 2D 分布的乘积，我们的方法有效地解决了维数灾难。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法对于 3D 医学图像重建任务非常有效，包括 MRI Z 轴超分辨率、压缩感知 MRI 和稀疏视图 CT。我们的方法可以生成适合医疗应用的高质量体素体积。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用两个垂直预训练的2D扩散模型解决3D成像逆问题，以提升医学影像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D扩散模型未能有效利用3D数据分布先验，且面临维度诅咒问题，限制了其在医学影像重建中的应用效果。
AI.method: 通过将3D数据分布建模为两个垂直方向2D分布的乘积，结合预训练2D扩散模型进行多方向切片重建。
AI.result: 在MRI超分辨率、压缩感知MRI和稀疏视角CT任务中，方法生成的体素质量显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了3D重建的维度挑战，在医学影像领域具有实用价值。
