authors_text: Liang Shi,Jie Zhang,Shiguang Shan
title: Real Face Foundation Representation Learning for Generalized Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于广义 Deepfake 检测的真实人脸基础表示学习
abstract: The emergence of deepfake technologies has become a matter of social concern as they pose threats to individual privacy and public security. It is now of great significance to develop reliable deepfake detectors. However, with numerous face manipulation algorithms present, it is almost impossible to collect sufficient representative fake faces, and it is hard for existing detectors to generalize to all types of manipulation. Therefore, we turn to learn the distribution of real faces, and indirectly identify fake images that deviate from the real face distribution. In this study, we propose Real Face Foundation Representation Learning (RFFR), which aims to learn a general representation from large-scale real face datasets and detect potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Specifically, we train a model on real face datasets by masked image modeling (MIM), which results in a discrepancy between input faces and the reconstructed ones when applying the model on fake samples. This discrepancy reveals the low-level artifacts not contained in RFFR, making it easier to build a deepfake detector sensitive to all kinds of potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method brings about better generalization performance, as it significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in cross-manipulation evaluations, and has the potential to further improve by introducing extra real faces for training RFFR.
summary: The emergence of deepfake technologies has become a matter of social concern as they pose threats to individual privacy and public security. It is now of great significance to develop reliable deepfake detectors. However, with numerous face manipulation algorithms present, it is almost impossible to collect sufficient representative fake faces, and it is hard for existing detectors to generalize to all types of manipulation. Therefore, we turn to learn the distribution of real faces, and indirectly identify fake images that deviate from the real face distribution. In this study, we propose Real Face Foundation Representation Learning (RFFR), which aims to learn a general representation from large-scale real face datasets and detect potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Specifically, we train a model on real face datasets by masked image modeling (MIM), which results in a discrepancy between input faces and the reconstructed ones when applying the model on fake samples. This discrepancy reveals the low-level artifacts not contained in RFFR, making it easier to build a deepfake detector sensitive to all kinds of potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method brings about better generalization performance, as it significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in cross-manipulation evaluations, and has the potential to further improve by introducing extra real faces for training RFFR.
abstract_zh: 深度造假技术的出现已成为社会关注的问题，因为它们对个人隐私和公共安全构成威胁。现在开发可靠的 Deepfake 探测器具有重要意义。然而，由于存在大量的人脸操纵算法，几乎不可能收集足够有代表性的假人脸，并且现有的检测器很难推广到所有类型的操纵。因此，我们转而学习真实人脸的分布，间接识别偏离真实人脸分布的假图像。在这项研究中，我们提出了真实人脸基础表示学习（RFFR），其目的是从大规模真实人脸数据集中学习通用表示并检测 RFFR 分布之外的潜在伪影。具体来说，我们通过掩模图像建模（MIM）在真实人脸数据集上训练模型，这会导致在将模型应用于假样本时输入人脸与重建人脸之间存在差异。这种差异揭示了 RFFR 中未包含的低级伪影，从而更容易构建对 RFFR 分布之外的各种潜在伪影敏感的深度伪造检测器。大量的实验表明，我们的方法带来了更好的泛化性能，因为它在交叉操作评估中显着优于最先进的方法，并且有可能通过引入额外的真实面孔来训练 RFFR 来进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于真实人脸基础表示学习的通用深度伪造检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器难以泛化到所有类型的伪造手法，且难以收集足够多的代表性伪造样本。
AI.method: 通过掩码图像建模（MIM）在大规模真实人脸数据集上训练模型，利用真实人脸分布与伪造图像的重建差异检测异常特征。
AI.result: 在跨伪造方法评估中显著优于现有最先进方法，且通过增加真实人脸训练数据可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦真实人脸分布学习能有效提升检测器的泛化能力，为通用深度伪造检测提供新思路。

search_text: Real Face Foundation Representation Learning for Generalized Deepfake Detection 用于广义 Deepfake 检测的真实人脸基础表示学习 The emergence of deepfake technologies has become a matter of social concern as they pose threats to individual privacy and public security. It is now of great significance to develop reliable deepfake detectors. However, with numerous face manipulation algorithms present, it is almost impossible to collect sufficient representative fake faces, and it is hard for existing detectors to generalize to all types of manipulation. Therefore, we turn to learn the distribution of real faces, and indirectly identify fake images that deviate from the real face distribution. In this study, we propose Real Face Foundation Representation Learning (RFFR), which aims to learn a general representation from large-scale real face datasets and detect potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Specifically, we train a model on real face datasets by masked image modeling (MIM), which results in a discrepancy between input faces and the reconstructed ones when applying the model on fake samples. This discrepancy reveals the low-level artifacts not contained in RFFR, making it easier to build a deepfake detector sensitive to all kinds of potential artifacts outside the distribution of RFFR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method brings about better generalization performance, as it significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in cross-manipulation evaluations, and has the potential to further improve by introducing extra real faces for training RFFR. 深度造假技术的出现已成为社会关注的问题，因为它们对个人隐私和公共安全构成威胁。现在开发可靠的 Deepfake 探测器具有重要意义。然而，由于存在大量的人脸操纵算法，几乎不可能收集足够有代表性的假人脸，并且现有的检测器很难推广到所有类型的操纵。因此，我们转而学习真实人脸的分布，间接识别偏离真实人脸分布的假图像。在这项研究中，我们提出了真实人脸基础表示学习（RFFR），其目的是从大规模真实人脸数据集中学习通用表示并检测 RFFR 分布之外的潜在伪影。具体来说，我们通过掩模图像建模（MIM）在真实人脸数据集上训练模型，这会导致在将模型应用于假样本时输入人脸与重建人脸之间存在差异。这种差异揭示了 RFFR 中未包含的低级伪影，从而更容易构建对 RFFR 分布之外的各种潜在伪影敏感的深度伪造检测器。大量的实验表明，我们的方法带来了更好的泛化性能，因为它在交叉操作评估中显着优于最先进的方法，并且有可能通过引入额外的真实面孔来训练 RFFR 来进一步改进。 本文提出了一种基于真实人脸基础表示学习的通用深度伪造检测方法。 Liang Shi,Jie Zhang,Shiguang Shan cs.CV

authors_text: Zhirui Gao,Renjiao Yi,Zheng Qin,Yunfan Ye,Chenyang Zhu,Kai Xu
title: Learning Accurate Template Matching with Differentiable Coarse-to-Fine Correspondence Refinement
title_zh: 通过可微的粗细对应细化学习精确的模板匹配
abstract: Template matching is a fundamental task in computer vision and has been studied for decades. It plays an essential role in manufacturing industry for estimating the poses of different parts, facilitating downstream tasks such as robotic grasping. Existing methods fail when the template and source images have different modalities, cluttered backgrounds or weak textures. They also rarely consider geometric transformations via homographies, which commonly exist even for planar industrial parts. To tackle the challenges, we propose an accurate template matching method based on differentiable coarse-to-fine correspondence refinement. We use an edge-aware module to overcome the domain gap between the mask template and the grayscale image, allowing robust matching. An initial warp is estimated using coarse correspondences based on novel structure-aware information provided by transformers. This initial alignment is passed to a refinement network using references and aligned images to obtain sub-pixel level correspondences which are used to give the final geometric transformation. Extensive evaluation shows that our method is significantly better than state-of-the-art methods and baselines, providing good generalization ability and visually plausible results even on unseen real data.
summary: Template matching is a fundamental task in computer vision and has been studied for decades. It plays an essential role in manufacturing industry for estimating the poses of different parts, facilitating downstream tasks such as robotic grasping. Existing methods fail when the template and source images have different modalities, cluttered backgrounds or weak textures. They also rarely consider geometric transformations via homographies, which commonly exist even for planar industrial parts. To tackle the challenges, we propose an accurate template matching method based on differentiable coarse-to-fine correspondence refinement. We use an edge-aware module to overcome the domain gap between the mask template and the grayscale image, allowing robust matching. An initial warp is estimated using coarse correspondences based on novel structure-aware information provided by transformers. This initial alignment is passed to a refinement network using references and aligned images to obtain sub-pixel level correspondences which are used to give the final geometric transformation. Extensive evaluation shows that our method is significantly better than state-of-the-art methods and baselines, providing good generalization ability and visually plausible results even on unseen real data.
abstract_zh: 模板匹配是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，已经研究了几十年。它在制造业中发挥着重要作用，可以估计不同零件的姿态，促进机器人抓取等下游任务。当模板和源图像具有不同的模态、杂乱的背景或弱纹理时，现有方法会失败。他们也很少考虑通过单应性进行几何变换，即使对于平面工业零件来说，这种几何变换也很常见。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于可微分粗细对应细化的精确模板匹配方法。我们使用边缘感知模块来克服掩模模板和灰度图像之间的域间隙，从而实现鲁棒匹配。使用基于变压器提供的新颖结构感知信息的粗略对应来估计初始扭曲。该初始对齐被传递到使用参考和对齐图像的细化网络以获得用于给出最终几何变换的子像素级对应关系。广泛的评估表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法和基线，即使在看不见的真实数据上也能提供良好的泛化能力和视觉上合理的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微分粗到细对应关系优化的精确模板匹配方法，以解决工业场景中的姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模板匹配方法在模态差异、杂乱背景或弱纹理情况下表现不佳，且未充分考虑平面工业部件常见的单应性几何变换。
AI.method: 通过边缘感知模块消除模板与图像的领域差异，结合Transformer提取结构感知信息生成初始对齐，再利用参考图像和对齐图像进行亚像素级优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，展现出良好的泛化能力，即使在未见过的真实数据上也能生成视觉合理的匹配结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过端到端的可微分优化流程，有效解决了工业场景中模板匹配的关键挑战，为机器人抓取等下游任务提供了更可靠的姿态估计方案。

authors_text: Guojin Chen,Zehua Pei,Haoyu Yang,Yuzhe Ma,Bei Yu,Martin D. F. Wong
title: Physics-Informed Optical Kernel Regression Using Complex-valued Neural Fields
title_zh: 使用复值神经场的物理信息光学核回归
abstract: Lithography is fundamental to integrated circuit fabrication, necessitating large computation overhead. The advancement of machine learning (ML)-based lithography models alleviates the trade-offs between manufacturing process expense and capability. However, all previous methods regard the lithography system as an image-to-image black box mapping, utilizing network parameters to learn by rote mappings from massive mask-to-aerial or mask-to-resist image pairs, resulting in poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a new ML-based paradigm disassembling the rigorous lithographic model into non-parametric mask operations and learned optical kernels containing determinant source, pupil, and lithography information. By optimizing complex-valued neural fields to perform optical kernel regression from coordinates, our method can accurately restore lithography system using a small-scale training dataset with fewer parameters, demonstrating superior generalization capability as well. Experiments show that our framework can use 31% of parameters while achieving 69$\times$ smaller mean squared error with 1.3$\times$ higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
summary: Lithography is fundamental to integrated circuit fabrication, necessitating large computation overhead. The advancement of machine learning (ML)-based lithography models alleviates the trade-offs between manufacturing process expense and capability. However, all previous methods regard the lithography system as an image-to-image black box mapping, utilizing network parameters to learn by rote mappings from massive mask-to-aerial or mask-to-resist image pairs, resulting in poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a new ML-based paradigm disassembling the rigorous lithographic model into non-parametric mask operations and learned optical kernels containing determinant source, pupil, and lithography information. By optimizing complex-valued neural fields to perform optical kernel regression from coordinates, our method can accurately restore lithography system using a small-scale training dataset with fewer parameters, demonstrating superior generalization capability as well. Experiments show that our framework can use 31% of parameters while achieving 69$\times$ smaller mean squared error with 1.3$\times$ higher throughput than the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 光刻是集成电路制造的基础，需要大量的计算开销。基于机器学习 (ML) 的光刻模型的进步减轻了制造工艺费用和能力之间的权衡。然而，以前的所有方法都将光刻系统视为图像到图像的黑盒映射，利用网络参数从大量掩模到航空或掩模到抗蚀剂图像对中死记硬背地学习，导致泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范例，将严格的光刻模型分解为非参数掩模操作，并学习包含行列式源、光瞳和光刻信息的光学内核。通过优化复值神经场以从坐标执行光学核回归，我们的方法可以使用参数较少的小规模训练数据集准确地恢复光刻系统，也表现出卓越的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的框架可以使用 31% 的参数，同时实现比最先进的方法小 69$\time$ 的均方误差，吞吐量提高 1.3$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的光学核回归方法，利用复值神经场优化光学核，以提高光刻系统的建模精度和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在光刻建模中将系统视为黑盒映射，导致泛化能力差。因此需要一种新的方法，结合物理信息以提高建模精度。
AI.method: 将严格光刻模型分解为非参数掩模操作和学习光学核，通过优化复值神经场进行光学核回归。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在参数量仅为31%的情况下，均方误差比现有方法小69倍，吞吐量提高1.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在减少参数量的同时，显著提升了光刻系统的建模精度和泛化能力，具有重要的实际应用价值。

However, all previous methods regard the lithography system as an image-to-image black box mapping, utilizing network parameters to learn by rote mappings from massive mask-to-aerial or mask-to-resist image pairs, resulting in poor generalization capability. In this paper, we propose a new ML-based paradigm disassembling the rigorous lithographic model into non-parametric mask operations and learned optical kernels containing determinant source, pupil, and lithography information. By optimizing complex-valued neural fields to perform optical kernel regression from coordinates, our method can accurately restore lithography system using a small-scale training dataset with fewer parameters, demonstrating superior generalization capability as well. Experiments show that our framework can use 31% of parameters while achieving 69$\times$ smaller mean squared error with 1.3$\times$ higher throughput than the state-of-the-art. 光刻是集成电路制造的基础，需要大量的计算开销。基于机器学习 (ML) 的光刻模型的进步减轻了制造工艺费用和能力之间的权衡。然而，以前的所有方法都将光刻系统视为图像到图像的黑盒映射，利用网络参数从大量掩模到航空或掩模到抗蚀剂图像对中死记硬背地学习，导致泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范例，将严格的光刻模型分解为非参数掩模操作，并学习包含行列式源、光瞳和光刻信息的光学内核。通过优化复值神经场以从坐标执行光学核回归，我们的方法可以使用参数较少的小规模训练数据集准确地恢复光刻系统，也表现出卓越的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的框架可以使用 31% 的参数，同时实现比最先进的方法小 69$\time$ 的均方误差，吞吐量提高 1.3$\times$。 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的光学核回归方法，利用复值神经场优化光学核，以提高光刻系统的建模精度和泛化能力。 Guojin Chen,Zehua Pei,Haoyu Yang,Yuzhe Ma,Bei Yu,Martin D. F. Wong cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Hang Zhang,Rongguang Wang,Renjiu Hu,Jinwei Zhang,Jiahao Li
title: DeDA: Deep Directed Accumulator
title_zh: DeDA：深度定向累加器
abstract: Chronic active multiple sclerosis lesions, also termed as rim+ lesions, can be characterized by a hyperintense rim at the edge of the lesion on quantitative susceptibility maps. These rim+ lesions exhibit a geometrically simple structure, where gradients at the lesion edge are radially oriented and a greater magnitude of gradients is observed in contrast to rim- (non rim+) lesions. However, recent studies have shown that the identification performance of such lesions remains unsatisfied due to the limited amount of data and high class imbalance. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective image processing operation, deep directed accumulator (DeDA), that provides a new perspective for injecting domain-specific inductive biases (priors) into neural networks for rim+ lesion identification. Given a feature map and a set of sampling grids, DeDA creates and quantizes an accumulator space into finite intervals, and accumulates feature values accordingly. This DeDA operation is a generalized discrete Radon transform and can also be regarded as a symmetric operation to the grid sampling within the forward-backward neural network framework, the process of which is order-agnostic, and can be efficiently implemented with the native CUDA programming. Experimental results on a dataset with 177 rim+ and 3986 rim- lesions show that 10.1% of improvement in a partial (false positive rate<0.1) area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (pROC AUC) and 10.2% of improvement in an area under the precision recall curve (PR AUC) can be achieved respectively comparing to other state-of-the-art methods. The source code is available online at https://github.com/tinymilky/DeDA
summary: Chronic active multiple sclerosis lesions, also termed as rim+ lesions, can be characterized by a hyperintense rim at the edge of the lesion on quantitative susceptibility maps. These rim+ lesions exhibit a geometrically simple structure, where gradients at the lesion edge are radially oriented and a greater magnitude of gradients is observed in contrast to rim- (non rim+) lesions. However, recent studies have shown that the identification performance of such lesions remains unsatisfied due to the limited amount of data and high class imbalance. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective image processing operation, deep directed accumulator (DeDA), that provides a new perspective for injecting domain-specific inductive biases (priors) into neural networks for rim+ lesion identification. Given a feature map and a set of sampling grids, DeDA creates and quantizes an accumulator space into finite intervals, and accumulates feature values accordingly. This DeDA operation is a generalized discrete Radon transform and can also be regarded as a symmetric operation to the grid sampling within the forward-backward neural network framework, the process of which is order-agnostic, and can be efficiently implemented with the native CUDA programming. Experimental results on a dataset with 177 rim+ and 3986 rim- lesions show that 10.1% of improvement in a partial (false positive rate<0.1) area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (pROC AUC) and 10.2% of improvement in an area under the precision recall curve (PR AUC) can be achieved respectively comparing to other state-of-the-art methods. The source code is available online at https://github.com/tinymilky/DeDA
abstract_zh: 慢性活动性多发性硬化症病变，也称为边缘+病变，其特征可以是定量磁敏图上病变边缘的高信号边缘。这些边缘+病变呈现出几何上简单的结构，其中病变边缘处的梯度是径向定向的，并且与边缘-（非边缘+）病变相比观察到更大程度的梯度。然而，最近的研究表明，由于数据量有限且类别不平衡程度较高，此类病变的识别性能仍不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的图像处理操作，即深度定向累加器（DeDA），它为将特定领域的归纳偏差（先验）注入神经网络以进行边缘+病变识别提供了新的视角。给定一个特征图和一组采样网格，DeDA 创建累加器空间并将其量化为有限间隔，并相应地累加特征值。该DeDA操作是广义的离散Radon变换，也可以看作是前向-后向神经网络框架内网格采样的对称操作，其过程与阶数无关，并且可以通过原生CUDA编程高效地实现。在具有 177 个 rim+ 和 3986 个 rim- 病变的数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，受试者操作特征曲线（pROC AUC）下的部分（假阳性率<0.1）区域可以改善 10.1%，精确回忆曲线（PR AUC）下的区域可以改善 10.2%。源代码可在线获取：https://github.com/tinymilky/DeDA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeDA的深度定向累加器方法，用于改进多发性硬化症中rim+病灶的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因数据量有限和类别不平衡问题导致rim+病灶识别效果不佳，需引入领域特定的归纳偏置以提升模型性能。
AI.method: DeDA通过特征图和采样网格构建量化累加空间，利用广义离散Radon变换实现特征值累加，结合CUDA编程提升效率。
AI.result: 在包含177个rim+和3986个rim-病灶的数据集上，DeDA使pROC AUC提升10.1%，PR AUC提升10.2%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DeDA通过注入领域先验有效解决了数据稀缺与类别不平衡问题，为病灶识别提供了新视角，代码已开源。

authors_text: Difan Zou,Yuan Cao,Yuanzhi Li,Quanquan Gu
title: The Benefits of Mixup for Feature Learning
title_zh: Mixup 对特征学习的好处
abstract: Mixup, a simple data augmentation method that randomly mixes two data points via linear interpolation, has been extensively applied in various deep learning applications to gain better generalization. However, the theoretical underpinnings of its efficacy are not yet fully understood. In this paper, we aim to seek a fundamental understanding of the benefits of Mixup. We first show that Mixup using different linear interpolation parameters for features and labels can still achieve similar performance to the standard Mixup. This indicates that the intuitive linearity explanation in Zhang et al., (2018) may not fully explain the success of Mixup. Then we perform a theoretical study of Mixup from the feature learning perspective. We consider a feature-noise data model and show that Mixup training can effectively learn the rare features (appearing in a small fraction of data) from its mixture with the common features (appearing in a large fraction of data). In contrast, standard training can only learn the common features but fails to learn the rare features, thus suffering from bad generalization performance. Moreover, our theoretical analysis also shows that the benefits of Mixup for feature learning are mostly gained in the early training phase, based on which we propose to apply early stopping in Mixup. Experimental results verify our theoretical findings and demonstrate the effectiveness of the early-stopped Mixup training.
summary: Mixup, a simple data augmentation method that randomly mixes two data points via linear interpolation, has been extensively applied in various deep learning applications to gain better generalization. However, the theoretical underpinnings of its efficacy are not yet fully understood. In this paper, we aim to seek a fundamental understanding of the benefits of Mixup. We first show that Mixup using different linear interpolation parameters for features and labels can still achieve similar performance to the standard Mixup. This indicates that the intuitive linearity explanation in Zhang et al., (2018) may not fully explain the success of Mixup. Then we perform a theoretical study of Mixup from the feature learning perspective. We consider a feature-noise data model and show that Mixup training can effectively learn the rare features (appearing in a small fraction of data) from its mixture with the common features (appearing in a large fraction of data). In contrast, standard training can only learn the common features but fails to learn the rare features, thus suffering from bad generalization performance. Moreover, our theoretical analysis also shows that the benefits of Mixup for feature learning are mostly gained in the early training phase, based on which we propose to apply early stopping in Mixup. Experimental results verify our theoretical findings and demonstrate the effectiveness of the early-stopped Mixup training.
abstract_zh: Mixup 是一种简单的数据增强方法，通过线性插值随机混合两个数据点，已广泛应用于各种深度学习应用中以获得更好的泛化能力。然而，其功效的理论基础尚未完全了解。在本文中，我们的目标是寻求对 Mixup 好处的基本了解。我们首先证明，对特征和标签使用不同的线性插值参数的 Mixup 仍然可以实现与标准 Mixup 类似的性能。这表明Zhang等人（2018）中直观的线性解释可能无法完全解释Mixup的成功。然后我们从特征学习的角度对Mixup进行理论研究。我们考虑特征噪声数据模型，并表明混合训练可以有效地从其与常见特征（出现在大部分数据中）的混合中学习罕见特征（出现在一小部分数据中）。相比之下，标准训练只能学习常见特征，而无法学习罕见特征，因此泛化性能较差。此外，我们的理论分析还表明，Mixup 对特征学习的好处主要是在早期训练阶段获得的，基于此，我们建议在 Mixup 中应用早期停止。实验结果验证了我们的理论发现，并证明了提前停止 Mixup 训练的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从特征学习的角度理解Mixup方法的优势，并提出一种基于早期停止的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管Mixup已被广泛应用于深度学习中以提升泛化能力，但其理论基础尚未完全明确。因此，本文试图从特征学习的角度深入探讨Mixup的优势。
AI.method: 作者首先展示了使用不同线性插值参数对特征和标签进行Mixup仍可达到与标准Mixup相似的效果。然后，他们通过理论分析表明，Mixup训练能够有效学习稀有特征，而标准训练则难以做到。基于此，作者提出了在Mixup训练中使用早期停止的方法。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了理论分析，并证明了早期停止的Mixup训练方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Mixup在特征学习中的优势主要体现在早期训练阶段，通过引入早期停止可以进一步提升其性能。

authors_text: Xiyue Guo,Junjie Hu,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang
title: Descriptor Distillation for Efficient Multi-Robot SLAM
title_zh: 高效多机器人 SLAM 的描述符蒸馏
abstract: Performing accurate localization while maintaining the low-level communication bandwidth is an essential challenge of multi-robot simultaneous localization and mapping (MR-SLAM). In this paper, we tackle this problem by generating a compact yet discriminative feature descriptor with minimum inference time. We propose descriptor distillation that formulates the descriptor generation into a learning problem under the teacher-student framework. To achieve real-time descriptor generation, we design a compact student network and learn it by transferring the knowledge from a pre-trained large teacher model. To reduce the descriptor dimensions from the teacher to the student, we propose a novel loss function that enables the knowledge transfer between two different dimensional descriptors. The experimental results demonstrate that our model is 30% lighter than the state-of-the-art model and produces better descriptors in patch matching. Moreover, we build a MR-SLAM system based on the proposed method and show that our descriptor distillation can achieve higher localization performance for MR-SLAM with lower bandwidth.
summary: Performing accurate localization while maintaining the low-level communication bandwidth is an essential challenge of multi-robot simultaneous localization and mapping (MR-SLAM). In this paper, we tackle this problem by generating a compact yet discriminative feature descriptor with minimum inference time. We propose descriptor distillation that formulates the descriptor generation into a learning problem under the teacher-student framework. To achieve real-time descriptor generation, we design a compact student network and learn it by transferring the knowledge from a pre-trained large teacher model. To reduce the descriptor dimensions from the teacher to the student, we propose a novel loss function that enables the knowledge transfer between two different dimensional descriptors. The experimental results demonstrate that our model is 30% lighter than the state-of-the-art model and produces better descriptors in patch matching. Moreover, we build a MR-SLAM system based on the proposed method and show that our descriptor distillation can achieve higher localization performance for MR-SLAM with lower bandwidth.
abstract_zh: 在保持低水平通信带宽的同时执行准确的定位是多机器人同时定位和建图（MR-SLAM）的基本挑战。在本文中，我们通过以最短的推理时间生成紧凑但有区别的特征描述符来解决这个问题。我们提出描述符蒸馏，将描述符生成公式化为师生框架下的学习问题。为了实现实时描述符生成，我们设计了一个紧凑的学生网络，并通过从预先训练的大型教师模型转移知识来学习它。为了减少从教师到学生的描述符维度，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，可以实现两个不同维度描述符之间的知识转移。实验结果表明，我们的模型比最先进的模型轻 30%，并且在块匹配中产生更好的描述符。此外，我们基于所提出的方法构建了一个 MR-SLAM 系统，并表明我们的描述符蒸馏可以以较低的带宽为 MR-SLAM 实现更高的定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种描述符蒸馏方法，用于在保持低通信带宽的同时提升多机器人SLAM的定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人SLAM系统面临定位精度与低通信带宽之间的矛盾，现有方法难以兼顾效率与性能。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生框架设计紧凑学生网络，通过知识迁移生成高效特征描述符，并提出跨维度损失函数实现描述符压缩。
AI.result: 模型体积较现有方法减少30%，描述符匹配性能更优，构建的MR-SLAM系统在定位精度和通信效率上均表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 描述符蒸馏方法有效平衡了多机器人SLAM的实时性与准确性需求，为低带宽场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Jun-Hwa Kim,Namho Kim,Chee Sun Won
title: Multi Modal Facial Expression Recognition with Transformer-Based Fusion Networks and Dynamic Sampling
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的融合网络和动态采样的多模态面部表情识别
abstract: Facial expression recognition is an essential task for various applications, including emotion detection, mental health analysis, and human-machine interactions. In this paper, we propose a multi-modal facial expression recognition method that exploits audio information along with facial images to provide a crucial clue to differentiate some ambiguous facial expressions. Specifically, we introduce a Modal Fusion Module (MFM) to fuse audio-visual information, where image and audio features are extracted from Swin Transformer. Additionally, we tackle the imbalance problem in the dataset by employing dynamic data resampling. Our model has been evaluated in the Affective Behavior in-the-wild (ABAW) challenge of CVPR 2023.
summary: Facial expression recognition is an essential task for various applications, including emotion detection, mental health analysis, and human-machine interactions. In this paper, we propose a multi-modal facial expression recognition method that exploits audio information along with facial images to provide a crucial clue to differentiate some ambiguous facial expressions. Specifically, we introduce a Modal Fusion Module (MFM) to fuse audio-visual information, where image and audio features are extracted from Swin Transformer. Additionally, we tackle the imbalance problem in the dataset by employing dynamic data resampling. Our model has been evaluated in the Affective Behavior in-the-wild (ABAW) challenge of CVPR 2023.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别是各种应用的一项重要任务，包括情绪检测、心理健康分析和人机交互。在本文中，我们提出了一种多模式面部表情识别方法，该方法利用音频信息和面部图像来提供区分一些模糊面部表情的关键线索。具体来说，我们引入了模态融合模块（MFM）来融合视听信息，其中图像和音频特征是从 Swin Transformer 中提取的。此外，我们通过采用动态数据重采样来解决数据集中的不平衡问题。我们的模型已在 CVPR 2023 的野外情感行为 (ABAW) 挑战中进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音频与视觉信息的多模态面部表情识别方法，通过Transformer融合网络与动态采样解决数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 单一视觉信息难以区分模糊表情，且现有数据集存在类别不平衡问题，需引入音频线索与动态采样技术提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计模态融合模块（MFM）整合Swin Transformer提取的音频-视觉特征，采用动态数据重采样策略缓解类别不平衡。
AI.result: 模型在CVPR 2023 ABAW挑战赛中完成评估，验证了多模态融合与动态采样方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态信息融合与动态采样策略可有效提升面部表情识别准确率，为复杂场景下的情绪分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Heung-Chang Lee,Jeonggeun Song
title: SymBa: Symmetric Backpropagation-Free Contrastive Learning with Forward-Forward Algorithm for Optimizing Convergence
title_zh: SymBa：利用前向前向算法优化收敛的对称反向传播对比学习
abstract: The paper proposes a new algorithm called SymBa that aims to achieve more biologically plausible learning than Back-Propagation (BP). The algorithm is based on the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm, which is a BP-free method for training neural networks. SymBa improves the FF algorithm's convergence behavior by addressing the problem of asymmetric gradients caused by conflicting converging directions for positive and negative samples. The algorithm balances positive and negative losses to enhance performance and convergence speed. Furthermore, it modifies the FF algorithm by adding Intrinsic Class Pattern (ICP) containing class information to prevent the loss of class information during training. The proposed algorithm has the potential to improve our understanding of how the brain learns and processes information and to develop more effective and efficient artificial intelligence systems. The paper presents experimental results that demonstrate the effectiveness of SymBa algorithm compared to the FF algorithm and BP.
summary: The paper proposes a new algorithm called SymBa that aims to achieve more biologically plausible learning than Back-Propagation (BP). The algorithm is based on the Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm, which is a BP-free method for training neural networks. SymBa improves the FF algorithm's convergence behavior by addressing the problem of asymmetric gradients caused by conflicting converging directions for positive and negative samples. The algorithm balances positive and negative losses to enhance performance and convergence speed. Furthermore, it modifies the FF algorithm by adding Intrinsic Class Pattern (ICP) containing class information to prevent the loss of class information during training. The proposed algorithm has the potential to improve our understanding of how the brain learns and processes information and to develop more effective and efficient artificial intelligence systems. The paper presents experimental results that demonstrate the effectiveness of SymBa algorithm compared to the FF algorithm and BP.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为 SymBa 的新算法，旨在实现比反向传播 (BP) 更符合生物学原理的学习。该算法基于前向-前向（FF）算法，这是一种训练神经网络的无BP方法。 SymBa通过解决正负样本收敛方向冲突导致的梯度不对称问题，改善了FF算法的收敛行为。该算法平衡正负损失以提高性能和收敛速度。此外，它通过添加包含类信息的固有类模式（ICP）来修改FF算法，以防止训练期间类信息的丢失。所提出的算法有可能提高我们对大脑如何学习和处理信息的理解，并开发更有效和高效的人工智能系统。本文提供的实验结果证明了 SymBa 算法相对于 FF 算法和 BP 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SymBa的新算法，旨在通过改进前向-前向（FF）算法的收敛性，实现无需反向传播的对比学习。
AI.motivation: 反向传播（BP）算法与生物学习机制存在差异，而现有前向-前向算法在处理正负样本时存在梯度不对称问题，影响收敛效率。
AI.method: SymBa通过平衡正负样本损失缓解梯度不对称，并引入包含类别信息的内在类别模式（ICP）模块，增强模型对类别信息的保留能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，SymBa在收敛速度和性能上优于传统前向-前向算法和反向传播算法。
AI.conclusion: SymBa为理解生物学习机制提供了新视角，同时为开发高效的人工智能系统提供了潜在方案。

The paper presents experimental results that demonstrate the effectiveness of SymBa algorithm compared to the FF algorithm and BP. 该论文提出了一种名为 SymBa 的新算法，旨在实现比反向传播 (BP) 更符合生物学原理的学习。该算法基于前向-前向（FF）算法，这是一种训练神经网络的无BP方法。 SymBa通过解决正负样本收敛方向冲突导致的梯度不对称问题，改善了FF算法的收敛行为。该算法平衡正负损失以提高性能和收敛速度。此外，它通过添加包含类信息的固有类模式（ICP）来修改FF算法，以防止训练期间类信息的丢失。所提出的算法有可能提高我们对大脑如何学习和处理信息的理解，并开发更有效和高效的人工智能系统。本文提供的实验结果证明了 SymBa 算法相对于 FF 算法和 BP 的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为SymBa的新算法，旨在通过改进前向-前向（FF）算法的收敛性，实现无需反向传播的对比学习。 Heung-Chang Lee,Jeonggeun Song cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Han Yang,Qiuli Wang,Yue Zhang,Zhulin An,Chen Liu,Xiaohong Zhang,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Lung Nodule Segmentation and Uncertain Region Prediction with an Uncertainty-Aware Attention Mechanism
title_zh: 利用不确定性感知注意机制进行肺结节分割和不确定区域预测
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures. We have reported a preliminary version of this work in MICCAI 2022
comments: 10 pages, 10 figures. We have reported a preliminary version of this work in MICCAI 2022
abstract: Radiologists possess diverse training and clinical experiences, leading to variations in the segmentation annotations of lung nodules and resulting in segmentation uncertainty.Conventional methods typically select a single annotation as the learning target or attempt to learn a latent space comprising multiple annotations. However, these approaches fail to leverage the valuable information inherent in the consensus and disagreements among the multiple annotations. In this paper, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Attention Mechanism (UAAM) that utilizes consensus and disagreements among multiple annotations to facilitate better segmentation. To this end, we introduce the Multi-Confidence Mask (MCM), which combines a Low-Confidence (LC) Mask and a High-Confidence (HC) Mask.The LC mask indicates regions with low segmentation confidence, where radiologists may have different segmentation choices. Following UAAM, we further design an Uncertainty-Guide Multi-Confidence Segmentation Network (UGMCS-Net), which contains three modules: a Feature Extracting Module that captures a general feature of a lung nodule, an Uncertainty-Aware Module that produces three features for the the annotations' union, intersection, and annotation set, and an Intersection-Union Constraining Module that uses distances between the three features to balance the predictions of final segmentation and MCM. To comprehensively demonstrate the performance of our method, we propose a Complex Nodule Validation on LIDC-IDRI, which tests UGMCS-Net's segmentation performance on lung nodules that are difficult to segment using common methods. Experimental results demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the segmentation performance on nodules that are difficult to segment using conventional methods.
summary: Radiologists possess diverse training and clinical experiences, leading to variations in the segmentation annotations of lung nodules and resulting in segmentation uncertainty.Conventional methods typically select a single annotation as the learning target or attempt to learn a latent space comprising multiple annotations. However, these approaches fail to leverage the valuable information inherent in the consensus and disagreements among the multiple annotations. In this paper, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Attention Mechanism (UAAM) that utilizes consensus and disagreements among multiple annotations to facilitate better segmentation. To this end, we introduce the Multi-Confidence Mask (MCM), which combines a Low-Confidence (LC) Mask and a High-Confidence (HC) Mask.The LC mask indicates regions with low segmentation confidence, where radiologists may have different segmentation choices. Following UAAM, we further design an Uncertainty-Guide Multi-Confidence Segmentation Network (UGMCS-Net), which contains three modules: a Feature Extracting Module that captures a general feature of a lung nodule, an Uncertainty-Aware Module that produces three features for the the annotations' union, intersection, and annotation set, and an Intersection-Union Constraining Module that uses distances between the three features to balance the predictions of final segmentation and MCM. To comprehensively demonstrate the performance of our method, we propose a Complex Nodule Validation on LIDC-IDRI, which tests UGMCS-Net's segmentation performance on lung nodules that are difficult to segment using common methods. Experimental results demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the segmentation performance on nodules that are difficult to segment using conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 放射科医生拥有不同的培训和临床经验，导致肺结节的分割注释存在差异并导致分割不确定性。传统方法通常选择单个注释作为学习目标或尝试学习包含多个注释的潜在空间。然而，这些方法无法利用多个注释之间的共识和分歧所固有的有价值的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种不确定性感知注意机制（UAAM），它利用多个注释之间的共识和分歧来促进更好的分割。为此，我们引入了多置信度掩模（MCM），它结合了低置信度（LC）掩模和高置信度（HC）掩模。LC掩模表示分割置信度较低的区域，放射科医生可能有不同的分割选择。继UAAM之后，我们进一步设计了一个不确定性引导多置信分割网络（UGMCS-Net），它包含三个模块：捕获肺结节一般特征的特征提取模块，为注释的并集、交集和注释集生成三个特征的不确定性感知模块，以及使用三个特征之间的距离来平衡最终分割和MCM的预测的交集并集约束模块。为了全面展示我们方法的性能，我们提出了 LIDC-IDRI 上的复杂结节验证，它测试了 UGMCS-Net 对使用常用方法难以分割的肺结节的分割性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着提高传统方法难以分割的结节的分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定感知注意力机制的肺结节分割与不确定区域预测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法未能有效利用多标注间的共识与分歧信息，导致肺结节分割存在不确定性，尤其在复杂结节上表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计了不确定感知注意力机制（UAAM）与多置信度掩码（MCM），结合低置信度掩码（LC）和高置信度掩码（HC），并构建包含特征提取模块、不确定感知模块和交并集约束模块的UGMCS-Net网络。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集的复杂结节验证中，该方法显著提升了传统方法难以分割的结节分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多标注的共识与分歧信息，所提方法有效改善了肺结节分割的准确性与不确定区域预测能力。

authors_text: Charles O'Neill
title: Rice paddy disease classifications using CNNs
title_zh: 使用 CNN 进行水稻病害分类
abstract: Rice is a staple food in the world's diet, and yet huge percentages of crop yields are lost each year to disease. To combat this problem, people have been searching for ways to automate disease diagnosis. Here, we extend on previous modelling work by analysing how disease-classification accuracy is sensitive to both model architecture and common computer vision techniques. In doing so, we maximise accuracy whilst working in the constraints of smaller model sizes, minimum GPUs and shorter training times. Whilst previous state-of-the-art models had 93% accuracy only predicting 5 diseases, we improve this to 98.7% using 10 disease classes.
summary: Rice is a staple food in the world's diet, and yet huge percentages of crop yields are lost each year to disease. To combat this problem, people have been searching for ways to automate disease diagnosis. Here, we extend on previous modelling work by analysing how disease-classification accuracy is sensitive to both model architecture and common computer vision techniques. In doing so, we maximise accuracy whilst working in the constraints of smaller model sizes, minimum GPUs and shorter training times. Whilst previous state-of-the-art models had 93% accuracy only predicting 5 diseases, we improve this to 98.7% using 10 disease classes.
abstract_zh: 大米是世界人民饮食中的主食，但每年有很大比例的农作物产量因疾病而损失。为了解决这个问题，人们一直在寻找自动化疾病诊断的方法。在这里，我们通过分析疾病分类准确性对模型架构和常见计算机视觉技术的敏感程度，扩展了之前的建模工作。在此过程中，我们可以在较小模型大小、最少 GPU 和较短训练时间的限制下最大限度地提高准确性。虽然之前最先进的模型仅预测 5 种疾病的准确率达到 93%，但我们使用 10 种疾病类别将其提高到 98.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNNs）对水稻田疾病进行分类，旨在提高分类准确率并优化模型效率。
AI.motivation: 水稻作为全球主食，因疾病导致的产量损失严重。现有方法在有限资源下难以实现高精度多类别疾病诊断，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析模型架构与计算机视觉技术对分类准确率的影响，在模型尺寸、GPU资源及训练时间受限条件下优化CNN结构。
AI.result: 将疾病分类准确率从原有5类93%提升至10类98.7%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的CNN模型在资源受限场景下实现了更高精度的水稻疾病分类，为农业病害检测提供高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhuo Su,Matti Pietikäinen,Li Liu
title: From Local Binary Patterns to Pixel Difference Networks for Efficient Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 从局部二进制模式到像素差异网络，实现高效的视觉表示学习
comment: A small survey paper on Local Binary Pattern (LBP) inspired Deep Learning networks, accepted in SCIA 2023 (Scandinavian Conference on Image Analysis)
comments: A small survey paper on Local Binary Pattern (LBP) inspired Deep Learning networks, accepted in SCIA 2023 (Scandinavian Conference on Image Analysis)
abstract: LBP is a successful hand-crafted feature descriptor in computer vision. However, in the deep learning era, deep neural networks, especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can automatically learn powerful task-aware features that are more discriminative and of higher representational capacity. To some extent, such hand-crafted features can be safely ignored when designing deep computer vision models. Nevertheless, due to LBP's preferable properties in visual representation learning, an interesting topic has arisen to explore the value of LBP in enhancing modern deep models in terms of efficiency, memory consumption, and predictive performance. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review on such efforts which aims to incorporate the LBP mechanism into the design of CNN modules to make deep models stronger. In retrospect of what has been achieved so far, the paper discusses open challenges and directions for future research.
summary: LBP is a successful hand-crafted feature descriptor in computer vision. However, in the deep learning era, deep neural networks, especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can automatically learn powerful task-aware features that are more discriminative and of higher representational capacity. To some extent, such hand-crafted features can be safely ignored when designing deep computer vision models. Nevertheless, due to LBP's preferable properties in visual representation learning, an interesting topic has arisen to explore the value of LBP in enhancing modern deep models in terms of efficiency, memory consumption, and predictive performance. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review on such efforts which aims to incorporate the LBP mechanism into the design of CNN modules to make deep models stronger. In retrospect of what has been achieved so far, the paper discusses open challenges and directions for future research.
abstract_zh: LBP 是计算机视觉中成功的手工特征描述符。然而，在深度学习时代，深度神经网络，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN）可以自动学习强大的任务感知特征，这些特征更具判别力和更高的表示能力。在某种程度上，在设计深度计算机视觉模型时，可以安全地忽略这些手工制作的特征。然而，由于 LBP 在视觉表示学习中的更佳特性，一个有趣的话题出现了，即探索 LBP 在增强现代深度模型的效率、内存消耗和预测性能方面的价值。在本文中，我们对这些努力进行了全面的回顾，旨在将 LBP 机制纳入 CNN 模块的设计中，以使深度模型变得更强。回顾迄今为止所取得的成就，本文讨论了未来研究的开放挑战和方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了将局部二值模式（LBP）机制整合到卷积神经网络（CNN）模块中以提升视觉表示学习效率的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型已能自动学习特征，但LBP在效率和表示能力上的特性仍可能为现代模型提供增强价值。
AI.method: 系统回顾现有研究，分析LBP机制与CNN结合的设计方法，并讨论当前挑战与未来方向。
AI.result: 总结了LBP在提升模型效率、内存占用和预测性能方面的研究成果，指出尚未解决的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: LBP与深度学习的结合具有潜力，未来需在计算效率与表征能力平衡、跨任务泛化性等方面进一步探索。

search_text: From Local Binary Patterns to Pixel Difference Networks for Efficient Visual Representation Learning 从局部二进制模式到像素差异网络，实现高效的视觉表示学习 LBP is a successful hand-crafted feature descriptor in computer vision. However, in the deep learning era, deep neural networks, especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can automatically learn powerful task-aware features that are more discriminative and of higher representational capacity. To some extent, such hand-crafted features can be safely ignored when designing deep computer vision models. Nevertheless, due to LBP's preferable properties in visual representation learning, an interesting topic has arisen to explore the value of LBP in enhancing modern deep models in terms of efficiency, memory consumption, and predictive performance. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review on such efforts which aims to incorporate the LBP mechanism into the design of CNN modules to make deep models stronger. In retrospect of what has been achieved so far, the paper discusses open challenges and directions for future research. LBP 是计算机视觉中成功的手工特征描述符。然而，在深度学习时代，深度神经网络，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN）可以自动学习强大的任务感知特征，这些特征更具判别力和更高的表示能力。在某种程度上，在设计深度计算机视觉模型时，可以安全地忽略这些手工制作的特征。然而，由于 LBP 在视觉表示学习中的更佳特性，一个有趣的话题出现了，即探索 LBP 在增强现代深度模型的效率、内存消耗和预测性能方面的价值。在本文中，我们对这些努力进行了全面的回顾，旨在将 LBP 机制纳入 CNN 模块的设计中，以使深度模型变得更强。回顾迄今为止所取得的成就，本文讨论了未来研究的开放挑战和方向。 本文综述了将局部二值模式（LBP）机制整合到卷积神经网络（CNN）模块中以提升视觉表示学习效率的研究进展。 Zhuo Su,Matti Pietikäinen,Li Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaohan Wang,Wenguan Wang,Jiayi Shao,Yi Yang
title: Lana: A Language-Capable Navigator for Instruction Following and Generation
title_zh: Lana：具有语言能力的指令跟踪和生成导航器
abstract: Recently, visual-language navigation (VLN) -- entailing robot agents to follow navigation instructions -- has shown great advance. However, existing literature put most emphasis on interpreting instructions into actions, only delivering "dumb" wayfinding agents. In this article, we devise LANA, a language-capable navigation agent which is able to not only execute human-written navigation commands, but also provide route descriptions to humans. This is achieved by simultaneously learning instruction following and generation with only one single model. More specifically, two encoders, respectively for route and language encoding, are built and shared by two decoders, respectively, for action prediction and instruction generation, so as to exploit cross-task knowledge and capture task-specific characteristics. Throughout pretraining and fine-tuning, both instruction following and generation are set as optimization objectives. We empirically verify that, compared with recent advanced task-specific solutions, LANA attains better performances on both instruction following and route description, with nearly half complexity. In addition, endowed with language generation capability, LANA can explain to humans its behaviors and assist human's wayfinding. This work is expected to foster future efforts towards building more trustworthy and socially-intelligent navigation robots.
summary: Recently, visual-language navigation (VLN) -- entailing robot agents to follow navigation instructions -- has shown great advance. However, existing literature put most emphasis on interpreting instructions into actions, only delivering "dumb" wayfinding agents. In this article, we devise LANA, a language-capable navigation agent which is able to not only execute human-written navigation commands, but also provide route descriptions to humans. This is achieved by simultaneously learning instruction following and generation with only one single model. More specifically, two encoders, respectively for route and language encoding, are built and shared by two decoders, respectively, for action prediction and instruction generation, so as to exploit cross-task knowledge and capture task-specific characteristics. Throughout pretraining and fine-tuning, both instruction following and generation are set as optimization objectives. We empirically verify that, compared with recent advanced task-specific solutions, LANA attains better performances on both instruction following and route description, with nearly half complexity. In addition, endowed with language generation capability, LANA can explain to humans its behaviors and assist human's wayfinding. This work is expected to foster future efforts towards building more trustworthy and socially-intelligent navigation robots.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉语言导航（VLN）——要求机器人代理遵循导航指令——已经取得了巨大的进步。然而，现有文献最强调将指令解释为行动，只提供“愚蠢”的寻路代理。在本文中，我们设计了 LANA，一种支持语言的导航代理，它不仅能够执行人类编写的导航命令，还能够向人类提供路线描述。这是通过仅使用一个模型同时学习指令跟随和生成来实现的。更具体地说，两个编码器分别用于路线编码和语言编码，两个编码器分别用于动作预测和指令生成，并由两个解码器共享，以便利用跨任务知识并捕获特定于任务的特征。在整个预训练和微调过程中，指令跟随和生成都被设置为优化目标。我们通过经验验证，与最新的先进任务特定解决方案相比，LANA 在指令跟踪和路线描述方面都获得了更好的性能，并且复杂度接近一半。此外，LANA具有语言生成能力，可以向人类解释其行为并协助人类寻路。这项工作预计将促进未来构建更值得信赖和社交智能导航机器人的努力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LANA，一种能同时执行导航指令并生成路线描述的视觉语言导航代理。
AI.motivation: 现有导航系统仅能机械执行指令，缺乏与人类交互的语言能力，难以实现可信赖的社会化导航。
AI.method: 构建共享编码器-解码器架构，通过单一模型联合学习指令跟随（动作预测）与路线描述生成任务。
AI.result: 在指令执行和路线描述任务上均优于现有方法，模型复杂度降低50%，具备行为解释能力。
AI.conclusion: LANA为开发兼具任务执行能力与人类交互能力的智能导航系统提供了新范式。

authors_text: Sungwon Han,Seungeon Lee,Fangzhao Wu,Sundong Kim,Chuhan Wu,Xiting Wang,Xing Xie,Meeyoung Cha
title: DualFair: Fair Representation Learning at Both Group and Individual Levels via Contrastive Self-supervision
title_zh: DualFair：通过对比自我监督在群体和个人层面进行公平表征学习
comment: Accepted and will be published at TheWebConf2023 (WWW2023)
comments: Accepted and will be published at TheWebConf2023 (WWW2023)
abstract: Algorithmic fairness has become an important machine learning problem, especially for mission-critical Web applications. This work presents a self-supervised model, called DualFair, that can debias sensitive attributes like gender and race from learned representations. Unlike existing models that target a single type of fairness, our model jointly optimizes for two fairness criteria - group fairness and counterfactual fairness - and hence makes fairer predictions at both the group and individual levels. Our model uses contrastive loss to generate embeddings that are indistinguishable for each protected group, while forcing the embeddings of counterfactual pairs to be similar. It then uses a self-knowledge distillation method to maintain the quality of representation for the downstream tasks. Extensive analysis over multiple datasets confirms the model's validity and further shows the synergy of jointly addressing two fairness criteria, suggesting the model's potential value in fair intelligent Web applications.
summary: Algorithmic fairness has become an important machine learning problem, especially for mission-critical Web applications. This work presents a self-supervised model, called DualFair, that can debias sensitive attributes like gender and race from learned representations. Unlike existing models that target a single type of fairness, our model jointly optimizes for two fairness criteria - group fairness and counterfactual fairness - and hence makes fairer predictions at both the group and individual levels. Our model uses contrastive loss to generate embeddings that are indistinguishable for each protected group, while forcing the embeddings of counterfactual pairs to be similar. It then uses a self-knowledge distillation method to maintain the quality of representation for the downstream tasks. Extensive analysis over multiple datasets confirms the model's validity and further shows the synergy of jointly addressing two fairness criteria, suggesting the model's potential value in fair intelligent Web applications.
abstract_zh: 算法公平性已成为一个重要的机器学习问题，特别是对于任务关键型 Web 应用程序而言。这项工作提出了一种名为 DualFair 的自我监督模型，它可以从学习到的表征中消除性别和种族等敏感属性的偏差。与针对单一类型公平性的现有模型不同，我们的模型针对两个公平标准（群体公平性和反事实公平性）联合进行优化，从而在群体和个人层面上做出更公平的预测。我们的模型使用对比损失来生成每个受保护组无法区分的嵌入，同时强制反事实对的嵌入相似。然后，它使用自知识蒸馏方法来保持下游任务的表示质量。对多个数据集的广泛分析证实了该模型的有效性，并进一步显示了联合解决两个公平标准的协同作用，表明该模型在公平智能 Web 应用程序中的潜在价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DualFair的自监督模型，通过对比学习在群体和个体层面消除性别、种族等敏感属性，实现公平表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性算法通常仅针对单一公平标准（如群体公平或反事实公平），难以同时满足多维度公平需求，需开发兼顾群体与个体层面公平性的新方法。
AI.method: 采用对比损失生成跨群体不可区分的嵌入表示，同时强制反事实对的嵌入相似；结合自知识蒸馏技术保持下游任务表示质量。
AI.result: 多数据集实验验证了模型有效性，证明联合优化群体公平与反事实公平的协同效应，提升了预测公平性。
AI.conclusion: DualFair通过联合优化双维度公平标准，在保持表示质量的同时实现更全面的公平性，为公平智能应用提供新思路。

Our model uses contrastive loss to generate embeddings that are indistinguishable for each protected group, while forcing the embeddings of counterfactual pairs to be similar. It then uses a self-knowledge distillation method to maintain the quality of representation for the downstream tasks. Extensive analysis over multiple datasets confirms the model's validity and further shows the synergy of jointly addressing two fairness criteria, suggesting the model's potential value in fair intelligent Web applications. 算法公平性已成为一个重要的机器学习问题，特别是对于任务关键型 Web 应用程序而言。这项工作提出了一种名为 DualFair 的自我监督模型，它可以从学习到的表征中消除性别和种族等敏感属性的偏差。与针对单一类型公平性的现有模型不同，我们的模型针对两个公平标准（群体公平性和反事实公平性）联合进行优化，从而在群体和个人层面上做出更公平的预测。我们的模型使用对比损失来生成每个受保护组无法区分的嵌入，同时强制反事实对的嵌入相似。然后，它使用自知识蒸馏方法来保持下游任务的表示质量。对多个数据集的广泛分析证实了该模型的有效性，并进一步显示了联合解决两个公平标准的协同作用，表明该模型在公平智能 Web 应用程序中的潜在价值。 本文提出一种名为DualFair的自监督模型，通过对比学习在群体和个体层面消除性别、种族等敏感属性，实现公平表示学习。 Sungwon Han,Seungeon Lee,Fangzhao Wu,Sundong Kim,Chuhan Wu,Xiting Wang,Xing Xie,Meeyoung Cha cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Zipeng Qi,Hao Chen,Chenyang Liu,Zhenwei Shi,Zhengxia Zou
title: Implicit Ray-Transformers for Multi-view Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于多视图遥感图像分割的隐式射线变换器
abstract: The mainstream CNN-based remote sensing (RS) image semantic segmentation approaches typically rely on massive labeled training data. Such a paradigm struggles with the problem of RS multi-view scene segmentation with limited labeled views due to the lack of considering 3D information within the scene. In this paper, we propose ''Implicit Ray-Transformer (IRT)'' based on Implicit Neural Representation (INR), for RS scene semantic segmentation with sparse labels (such as 4-6 labels per 100 images). We explore a new way of introducing multi-view 3D structure priors to the task for accurate and view-consistent semantic segmentation. The proposed method includes a two-stage learning process. In the first stage, we optimize a neural field to encode the color and 3D structure of the remote sensing scene based on multi-view images. In the second stage, we design a Ray Transformer to leverage the relations between the neural field 3D features and 2D texture features for learning better semantic representations. Different from previous methods that only consider 3D prior or 2D features, we incorporate additional 2D texture information and 3D prior by broadcasting CNN features to different point features along the sampled ray. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, we construct a challenging dataset containing six synthetic sub-datasets collected from the Carla platform and three real sub-datasets from Google Maps. Experiments show that the proposed method outperforms the CNN-based methods and the state-of-the-art INR-based segmentation methods in quantitative and qualitative metrics.
summary: The mainstream CNN-based remote sensing (RS) image semantic segmentation approaches typically rely on massive labeled training data. Such a paradigm struggles with the problem of RS multi-view scene segmentation with limited labeled views due to the lack of considering 3D information within the scene. In this paper, we propose ''Implicit Ray-Transformer (IRT)'' based on Implicit Neural Representation (INR), for RS scene semantic segmentation with sparse labels (such as 4-6 labels per 100 images). We explore a new way of introducing multi-view 3D structure priors to the task for accurate and view-consistent semantic segmentation. The proposed method includes a two-stage learning process. In the first stage, we optimize a neural field to encode the color and 3D structure of the remote sensing scene based on multi-view images. In the second stage, we design a Ray Transformer to leverage the relations between the neural field 3D features and 2D texture features for learning better semantic representations. Different from previous methods that only consider 3D prior or 2D features, we incorporate additional 2D texture information and 3D prior by broadcasting CNN features to different point features along the sampled ray. To verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, we construct a challenging dataset containing six synthetic sub-datasets collected from the Carla platform and three real sub-datasets from Google Maps. Experiments show that the proposed method outperforms the CNN-based methods and the state-of-the-art INR-based segmentation methods in quantitative and qualitative metrics.
abstract_zh: 主流的基于 CNN 的遥感 (RS) 图像语义分割方法通常依赖于海量标记训练数据。由于缺乏考虑场景内的 3D 信息，这种范例很难解决带有有限标记视图的 RS 多视图场景分割问题。在本文中，我们提出了基于隐式神经表示（INR）的“隐式光线变换器（IRT）”，用于具有稀疏标签（例如每100张图像4-6个标签）的RS场景语义分割。我们探索了一种在任务之前引入多视图 3D 结构的新方法，以实现准确且视图一致的语义分割。所提出的方法包括两个阶段的学习过程。在第一阶段，我们优化神经场来编码基于多视图图像的遥感场景的颜色和 3D 结构。在第二阶段，我们设计了一个 Ray Transformer，利用神经场 3D 特征和 2D 纹理特征之间的关系来学习更好的语义表示。与之前仅考虑 3D 先验或 2D 特征的方法不同，我们通过将 CNN 特征广播到沿采样射线的不同点特征来合并额外的 2D 纹理信息和 3D 先验。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，我们构建了一个具有挑战性的数据集，其中包含从 Carla 平台收集的六个合成子数据集和来自 Google 地图的三个真实子数据集。实验表明，所提出的方法在定量和定性指标方面优于基于 CNN 的方法和最先进的基于 INR 的分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于隐式神经表示（INR）的隐式射线变换器（IRT），用于解决多视角遥感图像分割中标签稀疏和缺乏3D信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法依赖大量标注数据，难以处理遥感多视角场景分割中标签稀疏及未考虑3D信息的缺陷。
AI.method: 采用两阶段学习：第一阶段通过神经场编码多视角图像的色彩与3D结构；第二阶段设计射线变换器，结合神经场3D特征与2D纹理特征，沿采样射线广播CNN特征以融合多模态信息。
AI.result: 在包含Carla平台合成数据和Google Maps真实数据的挑战性数据集上，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于CNN和现有INR分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 隐式射线变换器通过有效融合3D先验与2D纹理信息，为稀疏标注下的多视角遥感图像分割提供了新颖且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Saeideh Yousefzadeh,Hamidreza Pourreza,Hamidreza Mahyar
title: A Triplet-loss Dilated Residual Network for High-Resolution Representation Learning in Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于图像检索中高分辨率表示学习的三元组损失扩张残差网络
abstract: Content-based image retrieval is the process of retrieving a subset of images from an extensive image gallery based on visual contents, such as color, shape or spatial relations, and texture. In some applications, such as localization, image retrieval is employed as the initial step. In such cases, the accuracy of the top-retrieved images significantly affects the overall system accuracy. The current paper introduces a simple yet efficient image retrieval system with a fewer trainable parameters, which offers acceptable accuracy in top-retrieved images. The proposed method benefits from a dilated residual convolutional neural network with triplet loss. Experimental evaluations show that this model can extract richer information (i.e., high-resolution representations) by enlarging the receptive field, thus improving image retrieval accuracy without increasing the depth or complexity of the model. To enhance the extracted representations' robustness, the current research obtains candidate regions of interest from each feature map and applies Generalized-Mean pooling to the regions. As the choice of triplets in a triplet-based network affects the model training, we employ a triplet online mining method. We test the performance of the proposed method under various configurations on two of the challenging image-retrieval datasets, namely Revisited Paris6k (RPar) and UKBench. The experimental results show an accuracy of 94.54 and 80.23 (mean precision at rank 10) in the RPar medium and hard modes and 3.86 (recall at rank 4) in the UKBench dataset, respectively.
summary: Content-based image retrieval is the process of retrieving a subset of images from an extensive image gallery based on visual contents, such as color, shape or spatial relations, and texture. In some applications, such as localization, image retrieval is employed as the initial step. In such cases, the accuracy of the top-retrieved images significantly affects the overall system accuracy. The current paper introduces a simple yet efficient image retrieval system with a fewer trainable parameters, which offers acceptable accuracy in top-retrieved images. The proposed method benefits from a dilated residual convolutional neural network with triplet loss. Experimental evaluations show that this model can extract richer information (i.e., high-resolution representations) by enlarging the receptive field, thus improving image retrieval accuracy without increasing the depth or complexity of the model. To enhance the extracted representations' robustness, the current research obtains candidate regions of interest from each feature map and applies Generalized-Mean pooling to the regions. As the choice of triplets in a triplet-based network affects the model training, we employ a triplet online mining method. We test the performance of the proposed method under various configurations on two of the challenging image-retrieval datasets, namely Revisited Paris6k (RPar) and UKBench. The experimental results show an accuracy of 94.54 and 80.23 (mean precision at rank 10) in the RPar medium and hard modes and 3.86 (recall at rank 4) in the UKBench dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 基于内容的图像检索是根据视觉内容（例如颜色、形状或空间关系以及纹理）从广泛的图像库中检索图像子集的过程。在某些应用中，例如定位，图像检索被用作初始步骤。在这种情况下，顶部检索图像的准确性会显着影响整个系统的准确性。当前的论文介绍了一种简单而高效的图像检索系统，具有较少的可训练参数，在顶级检索图像中提供了可接受的准确性。所提出的方法受益于具有三元组损失的扩张残差卷积神经网络。实验评估表明，该模型可以通过扩大感受野来提取更丰富的信息（即高分辨率表示），从而在不增加模型深度或复杂度的情况下提高图像检索精度。为了增强提取的表示的鲁棒性，当前的研究从每个特征图中获取候选感兴趣区域，并对这些区域应用广义均值池化。由于基于三元组的网络中三元组的选择会影响模型训练，因此我们采用了三元组在线挖掘方法。我们在两个具有挑战性的图像检索数据集（即 Revisited Paris6k (RPar) 和 UKBench）上测试了所提出方法在各种配置下的性能。实验结果显示，RPar 中等和困难模式下的准确度分别为 94.54 和 80.23（第 10 级的平均精度），在 UKBench 数据集中的准确度为 3.86（第 4 级的召回率）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三元组损失的扩张残差网络，用于提高高分辨率图像检索的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法在复杂场景下准确率不足，且模型复杂度与参数量较高，需在保持效率的同时提升检索性能。
AI.method: 采用扩张残差卷积网络扩大感受野，结合三元组损失函数，并通过广义均值池化与在线三元组挖掘优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在RPar数据集上达到94.54%（中等难度）和80.23%（困难难度）的mAP@10，在UKBench数据集上达到3.86的Recall@4。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过扩张结构与三元组损失有效提升了高分辨率特征表示，以较低参数量实现了 competitive 的检索性能。

We test the performance of the proposed method under various configurations on two of the challenging image-retrieval datasets, namely Revisited Paris6k (RPar) and UKBench. The experimental results show an accuracy of 94.54 and 80.23 (mean precision at rank 10) in the RPar medium and hard modes and 3.86 (recall at rank 4) in the UKBench dataset, respectively. 基于内容的图像检索是根据视觉内容（例如颜色、形状或空间关系以及纹理）从广泛的图像库中检索图像子集的过程。在某些应用中，例如定位，图像检索被用作初始步骤。在这种情况下，顶部检索图像的准确性会显着影响整个系统的准确性。当前的论文介绍了一种简单而高效的图像检索系统，具有较少的可训练参数，在顶级检索图像中提供了可接受的准确性。所提出的方法受益于具有三元组损失的扩张残差卷积神经网络。实验评估表明，该模型可以通过扩大感受野来提取更丰富的信息（即高分辨率表示），从而在不增加模型深度或复杂度的情况下提高图像检索精度。为了增强提取的表示的鲁棒性，当前的研究从每个特征图中获取候选感兴趣区域，并对这些区域应用广义均值池化。由于基于三元组的网络中三元组的选择会影响模型训练，因此我们采用了三元组在线挖掘方法。我们在两个具有挑战性的图像检索数据集（即 Revisited Paris6k (RPar) 和 UKBench）上测试了所提出方法在各种配置下的性能。实验结果显示，RPar 中等和困难模式下的准确度分别为 94.54 和 80.23（第 10 级的平均精度），在 UKBench 数据集中的准确度为 3.86（第 4 级的召回率）。 本文提出一种基于三元组损失的扩张残差网络，用于提高高分辨率图像检索的准确率。 Saeideh Yousefzadeh,Hamidreza Pourreza,Hamidreza Mahyar cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sangjun Noh,Raeyoung Kang,Taewon Kim,Seunghyeok Back,Seongho Bak,Kyoobin Lee
title: Learning to Place Unseen Objects Stably using a Large-scale Simulation
title_zh: 使用大规模模拟学习稳定放置看不见的物体
abstract: Object placement is a fundamental task for robots, yet it remains challenging for partially observed objects. Existing methods for object placement have limitations, such as the requirement for a complete 3D model of the object or the inability to handle complex shapes and novel objects that restrict the applicability of robots in the real world. Herein, we focus on addressing the Unseen Object Placement (UOP}=) problem. We tackled the UOP problem using two methods: (1) UOP-Sim, a large-scale dataset to accommodate various shapes and novel objects, and (2) UOP-Net, a point cloud segmentation-based approach that directly detects the most stable plane from partial point clouds. Our UOP approach enables robots to place objects stably, even when the object's shape and properties are not fully known, thus providing a promising solution for object placement in various environments. We verify our approach through simulation and real-world robot experiments, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance for placing single-view and partial objects. Robot demos, codes, and dataset are available at https://gistailab.github.io/uop/
summary: Object placement is a fundamental task for robots, yet it remains challenging for partially observed objects. Existing methods for object placement have limitations, such as the requirement for a complete 3D model of the object or the inability to handle complex shapes and novel objects that restrict the applicability of robots in the real world. Herein, we focus on addressing the Unseen Object Placement (UOP}=) problem. We tackled the UOP problem using two methods: (1) UOP-Sim, a large-scale dataset to accommodate various shapes and novel objects, and (2) UOP-Net, a point cloud segmentation-based approach that directly detects the most stable plane from partial point clouds. Our UOP approach enables robots to place objects stably, even when the object's shape and properties are not fully known, thus providing a promising solution for object placement in various environments. We verify our approach through simulation and real-world robot experiments, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance for placing single-view and partial objects. Robot demos, codes, and dataset are available at https://gistailab.github.io/uop/
abstract_zh: 物体放置是机器人的一项基本任务，但对于部分观察到的物体仍然具有挑战性。现有的物体放置方法存在局限性，例如需要物体的完整 3D 模型或无法处理复杂的形状和新颖的物体，从而限制了机器人在现实世界中的适用性。在这里，我们重点解决看不见的对象放置（UOP}=）问题。我们使用两种方法解决 UOP 问题：(1) UOP-Sim，一个容纳各种形状和新物体的大规模数据集；(2) UOP-Net，一种基于点云分割的方法，可直接从部分点云中检测最稳定的平面。我们的 UOP 方法使机器人能够稳定地放置物体，即使物体的形状和属性不完全已知，从而为各种环境中的物体放置提供了一种有前景的解决方案。我们通过模拟和现实世界的机器人实验验证了我们的方法，展示了放置单视图和部分对象的最先进的性能。机器人演示、代码和数据集可在 https://gistailab.github.io/uop/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大规模模拟和点云分割的方法，解决机器人放置未见过的复杂形状物体时的稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有物体放置方法依赖完整3D模型或无法处理复杂形状和新物体，限制了机器人在真实环境中的适用性。
AI.method: 构建UOP-Sim大规模数据集，并设计UOP-Net网络通过点云分割直接检测部分点云中最稳定的放置平面。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中均取得最先进性能，成功实现单视角和部分观测物体的稳定放置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人在未知环境中放置新物体提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛环境适应性。

authors_text: Lilac Atassi
title: Generating symbolic music using diffusion models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型生成象征性音乐
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic models have emerged as simple yet very powerful generative models. Unlike other generative models, diffusion models do not suffer from mode collapse or require a discriminator to generate high-quality samples. In this paper, a diffusion model that uses a binomial prior distribution to generate piano rolls is proposed. The paper also proposes an efficient method to train the model and generate samples. The generated music has coherence at time scales up to the length of the training piano roll segments. The paper demonstrates how this model is conditioned on the input and can be used to harmonize a given melody, complete an incomplete piano roll, or generate a variation of a given piece. The code is publicly shared to encourage the use and development of the method by the community.
summary: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic models have emerged as simple yet very powerful generative models. Unlike other generative models, diffusion models do not suffer from mode collapse or require a discriminator to generate high-quality samples. In this paper, a diffusion model that uses a binomial prior distribution to generate piano rolls is proposed. The paper also proposes an efficient method to train the model and generate samples. The generated music has coherence at time scales up to the length of the training piano roll segments. The paper demonstrates how this model is conditioned on the input and can be used to harmonize a given melody, complete an incomplete piano roll, or generate a variation of a given piece. The code is publicly shared to encourage the use and development of the method by the community.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型已经成为简单但非常强大的生成模型。与其他生成模型不同，扩散模型不会遭受模式崩溃或需要判别器来生成高质量样本。在本文中，提出了一种使用二项式先验分布来生成钢琴卷帘的扩散模型。论文还提出了一种有效的方法来训练模型和生成样本。生成的音乐在时间尺度上具有连贯性，直至训练钢琴卷帘片段的长度。该论文演示了该模型如何以输入为条件，并可用于协调给定的旋律、完成不完整的钢琴卷轴或生成给定乐曲的变奏。该代码公开共享，以鼓励社区使用和开发该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的符号音乐生成方法，通过二项式先验分布生成钢琴卷，并实现音乐和谐化、补全和变体生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型无需判别器且避免模式崩溃，适合生成高质量音乐序列，但现有方法在符号音乐生成领域应用不足。
AI.method: 设计使用二项式先验的扩散模型，结合高效训练策略，通过条件输入实现旋律和谐化、钢琴卷补全及音乐变体生成。
AI.result: 生成音乐在时间尺度上保持连贯性，可成功完成旋律伴奏、片段补全和风格变体任务，代码已开源共享。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型有效解决了符号音乐生成的序列连贯性问题，开源实现促进了该方向的进一步研究与应用。

authors_text: Qiaole Dong,Chenjie Cao,Yanwei Fu
title: Rethinking Optical Flow from Geometric Matching Consistent Perspective
title_zh: 从几何匹配一致的角度重新思考光流
abstract: Optical flow estimation is a challenging problem remaining unsolved. Recent deep learning based optical flow models have achieved considerable success. However, these models often train networks from the scratch on standard optical flow data, which restricts their ability to robustly and geometrically match image features. In this paper, we propose a rethinking to previous optical flow estimation. We particularly leverage Geometric Image Matching (GIM) as a pre-training task for the optical flow estimation (MatchFlow) with better feature representations, as GIM shares some common challenges as optical flow estimation, and with massive labeled real-world data. Thus, matching static scenes helps to learn more fundamental feature correlations of objects and scenes with consistent displacements. Specifically, the proposed MatchFlow model employs a QuadTree attention-based network pre-trained on MegaDepth to extract coarse features for further flow regression. Extensive experiments show that our model has great cross-dataset generalization. Our method achieves 11.5% and 10.1% error reduction from GMA on Sintel clean pass and KITTI test set. At the time of anonymous submission, our MatchFlow(G) enjoys state-of-the-art performance on Sintel clean and final pass compared to published approaches with comparable computation and memory footprint. Codes and models will be released in https://github.com/DQiaole/MatchFlow.
summary: Optical flow estimation is a challenging problem remaining unsolved. Recent deep learning based optical flow models have achieved considerable success. However, these models often train networks from the scratch on standard optical flow data, which restricts their ability to robustly and geometrically match image features. In this paper, we propose a rethinking to previous optical flow estimation. We particularly leverage Geometric Image Matching (GIM) as a pre-training task for the optical flow estimation (MatchFlow) with better feature representations, as GIM shares some common challenges as optical flow estimation, and with massive labeled real-world data. Thus, matching static scenes helps to learn more fundamental feature correlations of objects and scenes with consistent displacements. Specifically, the proposed MatchFlow model employs a QuadTree attention-based network pre-trained on MegaDepth to extract coarse features for further flow regression. Extensive experiments show that our model has great cross-dataset generalization. Our method achieves 11.5% and 10.1% error reduction from GMA on Sintel clean pass and KITTI test set. At the time of anonymous submission, our MatchFlow(G) enjoys state-of-the-art performance on Sintel clean and final pass compared to published approaches with comparable computation and memory footprint. Codes and models will be released in https://github.com/DQiaole/MatchFlow.
abstract_zh: 光流估计是一个尚未解决的具有挑战性的问题。最近基于深度学习的光流模型取得了相当大的成功。然而，这些模型通常在标准光流数据上从头开始训练网络，这限制了它们稳健地、几何地匹配图像特征的能力。在本文中，我们提出了对以前的光流估计的重新思考。我们特别利用几何图像匹配（GIM）作为光流估计（MatchFlow）的预训练任务，具有更好的特征表示，因为 GIM 与光流估计一样存在一些常见的挑战，并且具有大量标记的真实世界数据。因此，匹配静态场景有助于学习具有一致位移的物体和场景的更基本的特征相关性。具体来说，所提出的 MatchFlow 模型采用在 MegaDepth 上预训练的基于四叉树注意力的网络来提取粗略特征以进行进一步的流回归。大量的实验表明我们的模型具有很好的跨数据集泛化能力。我们的方法在 Sintel clean pass 和 KITTI 测试集上比 GMA 误差减少了 11.5% 和 10.1%。在匿名提交时，与具有可比计算和内存占用的已发布方法相比，我们的 MatchFlow(G) 在 Sintel clean 和 Final pass 上享有最先进的性能。代码和模型将在https://github.com/DQiaole/MatchFlow发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何图像匹配预训练的光流估计方法MatchFlow，通过改进特征表示提升光流估计的鲁棒性和几何匹配能力。
AI.motivation: 现有光流模型从头训练导致特征表示能力受限，难以应对真实场景的几何匹配挑战，而几何图像匹配（GIM）任务具有相似挑战且拥有大量真实数据。
AI.method: 设计MatchFlow模型，采用QuadTree注意力机制网络在MegaDepth数据集上预训练提取粗粒度特征，再通过光流回归网络实现跨数据集泛化。
AI.result: 在Sintel clean pass和KITTI测试集上分别较GMA减少11.5%和10.1%误差，在匿名提交时达到SOTA性能且计算内存开销相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何匹配预训练显著提升光流估计性能，验证了跨任务特征学习的有效性，代码和模型已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何图像匹配预训练的光流估计方法MatchFlow，通过改进特征表示提升光流估计的鲁棒性和几何匹配能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有光流模型从头训练导致特征表示能力受限，难以应对真实场景的几何匹配挑战，而几何图像匹配（GIM）任务具有相似挑战且拥有大量真实数据。

search_text: Rethinking Optical Flow from Geometric Matching Consistent Perspective 从几何匹配一致的角度重新思考光流 Optical flow estimation is a challenging problem remaining unsolved. Recent deep learning based optical flow models have achieved considerable success. However, these models often train networks from the scratch on standard optical flow data, which restricts their ability to robustly and geometrically match image features. In this paper, we propose a rethinking to previous optical flow estimation. We particularly leverage Geometric Image Matching (GIM) as a pre-training task for the optical flow estimation (MatchFlow) with better feature representations, as GIM shares some common challenges as optical flow estimation, and with massive labeled real-world data. Thus, matching static scenes helps to learn more fundamental feature correlations of objects and scenes with consistent displacements. Specifically, the proposed MatchFlow model employs a QuadTree attention-based network pre-trained on MegaDepth to extract coarse features for further flow regression. Extensive experiments show that our model has great cross-dataset generalization. Our method achieves 11.5% and 10.1% error reduction from GMA on Sintel clean pass and KITTI test set. At the time of anonymous submission, our MatchFlow(G) enjoys state-of-the-art performance on Sintel clean and final pass compared to published approaches with comparable computation and memory footprint. Codes and models will be released in https://github.com/DQiaole/MatchFlow. 光流估计是一个尚未解决的具有挑战性的问题。最近基于深度学习的光流模型取得了相当大的成功。然而，这些模型通常在标准光流数据上从头开始训练网络，这限制了它们稳健地、几何地匹配图像特征的能力。在本文中，我们提出了对以前的光流估计的重新思考。我们特别利用几何图像匹配（GIM）作为光流估计（MatchFlow）的预训练任务，具有更好的特征表示，因为 GIM 与光流估计一样存在一些常见的挑战，并且具有大量标记的真实世界数据。因此，匹配静态场景有助于学习具有一致位移的物体和场景的更基本的特征相关性。具体来说，所提出的 MatchFlow 模型采用在 MegaDepth 上预训练的基于四叉树注意力的网络来提取粗略特征以进行进一步的流回归。大量的实验表明我们的模型具有很好的跨数据集泛化能力。我们的方法在 Sintel clean pass 和 KITTI 测试集上比 GMA 误差减少了 11.5% 和 10.1%。在匿名提交时，与具有可比计算和内存占用的已发布方法相比，我们的 MatchFlow(G) 在 Sintel clean 和 Final pass 上享有最先进的性能。代码和模型将在https://github.com/DQiaole/MatchFlow发布。 本文提出了一种基于几何图像匹配预训练的光流估计方法MatchFlow，通过改进特征表示提升光流估计的鲁棒性和几何匹配能力。 Qiaole Dong,Chenjie Cao,Yanwei Fu cs.CV
